authors_text: Paria Jeihouni,Omid Dehzangi,Annahita Amireskandari,Ali Rezai,Nasser M. Nasrabadi
title: GAN-based Super-Resolution and Segmentation of Retinal Layers in Optical coherence tomography Scans
title_zh: 光学相干断层扫描中基于 GAN 的视网膜层超分辨率和分割
comment: 5 pages,7 figures
comments: 5 pages,7 figures
abstract: In this paper, we design a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN)-based solution for super-resolution and segmentation of optical coherence tomography (OCT) scans of the retinal layers. OCT has been identified as a non-invasive and inexpensive modality of imaging to discover potential biomarkers for the diagnosis and progress determination of neurodegenerative diseases, such as Alzheimer's Disease (AD). Current hypotheses presume the thickness of the retinal layers, which are analyzable within OCT scans, can be effective biomarkers. As a logical first step, this work concentrates on the challenging task of retinal layer segmentation and also super-resolution for higher clarity and accuracy. We propose a GAN-based segmentation model and evaluate incorporating popular networks, namely, U-Net and ResNet, in the GAN architecture with additional blocks of transposed convolution and sub-pixel convolution for the task of upscaling OCT images from low to high resolution by a factor of four. We also incorporate the Dice loss as an additional reconstruction loss term to improve the performance of this joint optimization task. Our best model configuration empirically achieved the Dice coefficient of 0.867 and mIOU of 0.765.
summary: In this paper, we design a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN)-based solution for super-resolution and segmentation of optical coherence tomography (OCT) scans of the retinal layers. OCT has been identified as a non-invasive and inexpensive modality of imaging to discover potential biomarkers for the diagnosis and progress determination of neurodegenerative diseases, such as Alzheimer's Disease (AD). Current hypotheses presume the thickness of the retinal layers, which are analyzable within OCT scans, can be effective biomarkers. As a logical first step, this work concentrates on the challenging task of retinal layer segmentation and also super-resolution for higher clarity and accuracy. We propose a GAN-based segmentation model and evaluate incorporating popular networks, namely, U-Net and ResNet, in the GAN architecture with additional blocks of transposed convolution and sub-pixel convolution for the task of upscaling OCT images from low to high resolution by a factor of four. We also incorporate the Dice loss as an additional reconstruction loss term to improve the performance of this joint optimization task. Our best model configuration empirically achieved the Dice coefficient of 0.867 and mIOU of 0.765.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们设计了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的解决方案，用于视网膜层光学相干断层扫描（OCT）扫描的超分辨率和分割。 OCT 已被认为是一种非侵入性且廉价的成像方式，可发现用于诊断和确定神经退行性疾病（例如阿尔茨海默氏病 (AD)）的潜在生物标志物。目前的假设认为，可在 OCT 扫描中分析的视网膜层厚度可以是有效的生物标志物。作为合乎逻辑的第一步，这项工作集中于视网膜层分割的挑战性任务以及超分辨率以实现更高的清晰度和准确性。我们提出了一种基于 GAN 的分割模型，并评估在 GAN 架构中合并流行的网络（即 U-Net 和 ResNet）以及附加的转置卷积和子像素卷积块，以将 OCT 图像从低分辨率升级到高分辨率四倍。我们还将 Dice 损失作为附加的重建损失项，以提高该联合优化任务的性能。根据经验，我们的最佳模型配置达到了 0.867 的 Dice 系数和 0.765 的 mIOU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的解决方案，用于光学相干断层扫描（OCT）视网膜层的超分辨率重建与分割。
AI.motivation: OCT作为非侵入性且经济的成像方式，可检测神经退行性疾病（如阿尔茨海默病）的生物标志物。视网膜层厚度分析对疾病诊断至关重要，但现有方法在分辨率和分割精度上存在挑战。
AI.method: 设计结合U-Net和ResNet的GAN架构，引入转置卷积与子像素卷积实现四倍超分辨率，并采用Dice损失函数优化分割性能。
AI.result: 最佳模型配置达到Dice系数0.867和mIOU 0.765，验证了方法在分割与超分辨率任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合优化超分辨率与分割任务，显著提升了OCT视网膜层分析的准确性，为神经退行性疾病的早期诊断提供了潜在工具。

authors_text: Yanwu Xu,Shaoan Xie,Maxwell Reynolds,Matthew Ragoza,Mingming Gong,Kayhan Batmanghelich
title: Adversarial Consistency for Single Domain Generalization in Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 医学图像分割中单域泛化的对抗一致性
comment: MICCAI2022 accpted
comments: MICCAI2022 accpted
abstract: An organ segmentation method that can generalize to unseen contrasts and scanner settings can significantly reduce the need for retraining of deep learning models. Domain Generalization (DG) aims to achieve this goal. However, most DG methods for segmentation require training data from multiple domains during training. We propose a novel adversarial domain generalization method for organ segmentation trained on data from a \emph{single} domain. We synthesize the new domains via learning an adversarial domain synthesizer (ADS) and presume that the synthetic domains cover a large enough area of plausible distributions so that unseen domains can be interpolated from synthetic domains. We propose a mutual information regularizer to enforce the semantic consistency between images from the synthetic domains, which can be estimated by patch-level contrastive learning. We evaluate our method for various organ segmentation for unseen modalities, scanning protocols, and scanner sites.
summary: An organ segmentation method that can generalize to unseen contrasts and scanner settings can significantly reduce the need for retraining of deep learning models. Domain Generalization (DG) aims to achieve this goal. However, most DG methods for segmentation require training data from multiple domains during training. We propose a novel adversarial domain generalization method for organ segmentation trained on data from a \emph{single} domain. We synthesize the new domains via learning an adversarial domain synthesizer (ADS) and presume that the synthetic domains cover a large enough area of plausible distributions so that unseen domains can be interpolated from synthetic domains. We propose a mutual information regularizer to enforce the semantic consistency between images from the synthetic domains, which can be estimated by patch-level contrastive learning. We evaluate our method for various organ segmentation for unseen modalities, scanning protocols, and scanner sites.
abstract_zh: 可以推广到看不见的对比和扫描仪设置的器官分割方法可以显着减少深度学习模型重新训练的需要。领域泛化（DG）旨在实现这一目标。然而，大多数用于分割的 DG 方法在训练过程中需要来自多个域的训练数据。我们提出了一种新颖的对抗性域泛化方法，用于根据来自 \emph{single} 域的数据进行训练的器官分割。我们通过学习对抗性域合成器（ADS）来合成新域，并假设合成域覆盖了足够大的合理分布区域，以便可以从合成域中插入看不见的域。我们提出了一种互信息正则化器来强制合成域图像之间的语义一致性，这可以通过补丁级对比学习来估计。我们针对不可见的模式、扫描协议和扫描仪部位评估了我们的各种器官分割方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗一致性的单域泛化方法，用于医学图像分割，使模型能在未见过的扫描条件和设备下保持分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有医学图像分割模型在面对新扫描设备或协议时需重新训练，而领域泛化方法通常依赖多域数据。本文旨在开发仅需单域数据训练即可泛化的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计对抗领域合成器（ADS）生成合成领域数据，并引入基于块级对比学习的互信息正则化器，强制合成领域间的语义一致性以提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 在多种器官分割任务中，该方法在未见模态、扫描协议和设备上均表现出优于现有单域泛化方法的分割精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过对抗合成与互信息正则化结合，本文实现了单域训练下的有效领域泛化，为减少医学影像模型重新训练需求提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chuanfu Shen,Shiqi Yu,Jilong Wang,George Q. Huang,Liang Wang
title: A Comprehensive Survey on Deep Gait Recognition: Algorithms, Datasets and Challenges
title_zh: 深度步态识别的综合调查：算法、数据集和挑战
abstract: Gait recognition aims to identify a person at a distance, serving as a promising solution for long-distance and less-cooperation pedestrian recognition. Recently, significant advancements in gait recognition have achieved inspiring success in many challenging scenarios by utilizing deep learning techniques. Against the backdrop that deep gait recognition has achieved almost perfect performance in laboratory datasets, much recent research has introduced new challenges for gait recognition, including robust deep representation modeling, in-the-wild gait recognition, and even recognition from new visual sensors such as infrared and depth cameras. Meanwhile, the increasing performance of gait recognition might also reveal concerns about biometrics security and privacy prevention for society. We provide a comprehensive survey on recent literature using deep learning and a discussion on the privacy and security of gait biometrics. This survey reviews the existing deep gait recognition methods through a novel view based on our proposed taxonomy. The proposed taxonomy differs from the conventional taxonomy of categorizing available gait recognition methods into the model- or appearance-based methods, while our taxonomic hierarchy considers deep gait recognition from two perspectives: deep representation learning and deep network architectures, illustrating the current approaches from both micro and macro levels. We also include up-to-date reviews of datasets and performance evaluations on diverse scenarios. Finally, we introduce privacy and security concerns on gait biometrics and discuss outstanding challenges and potential directions for future research.

We also include up-to-date reviews of datasets and performance evaluations on diverse scenarios. Finally, we introduce privacy and security concerns on gait biometrics and discuss outstanding challenges and potential directions for future research.
abstract_zh: 步态识别旨在识别远处的人，是长距离、低合作行人识别的一种有前途的解决方案。最近，通过利用深度学习技术，步态识别领域取得了重大进展，在许多具有挑战性的场景中取得了令人鼓舞的成功。在深度步态识别在实验室数据集中取得近乎完美的性能的背景下，最近的许多研究给步态识别带来了新的挑战，包括鲁棒的深度表示建模、野外步态识别，甚至来自红外和深度相机等新型视觉传感器的识别。同时，步态识别性能的提高也可能揭示社会对生物识别安全和隐私保护的担忧。我们对最近使用深度学习的文献进行了全面的调查，并对步态生物识别技术的隐私和安全性进行了讨论。这项调查通过基于我们提出的分类法的新颖观点回顾了现有的深度步态识别方法。所提出的分类法不同于将可用步态识别方法分类为基于模型或基于外观的方法的传统分类法，而我们的分类层次结构从深度表示学习和深度网络架构两个角度考虑深度步态识别，从微观和宏观层面说明了当前的方法。我们还包括对不同场景的数据集和性能评估的最新评论。最后，我们介绍了步态生物识别技术的隐私和安全问题，并讨论了突出的挑战和未来研究的潜在方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度步态识别领域的最新研究，讨论了隐私与安全问题，并提出新的分类方法，分析了数据集与挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度步态识别在实验室数据集上表现优异，但野外环境、新传感器应用及隐私安全问题亟待解决，需系统性综述与分析。
AI.method: 通过提出基于深度表示学习与网络架构的双视角分类法，系统回顾现有算法、数据集及性能评估，分析隐私安全问题。
AI.result: 系统梳理了深度步态识别技术体系，提出新分类框架，总结最新数据集与评估结果，并揭示隐私安全挑战。
AI.conclusion: 深度步态识别在实验室表现优异，但需应对野外环境与隐私风险，未来需在鲁棒性、跨模态识别及隐私保护技术上突破。

search_text: A Comprehensive Survey on Deep Gait Recognition: Algorithms, Datasets and Challenges 深度步态识别的综合调查：算法、数据集和挑战 Gait recognition aims to identify a person at a distance, serving as a promising solution for long-distance and less-cooperation pedestrian recognition. Recently, significant advancements in gait recognition have achieved inspiring success in many challenging scenarios by utilizing deep learning techniques. Against the backdrop that deep gait recognition has achieved almost perfect performance in laboratory datasets, much recent research has introduced new challenges for gait recognition, including robust deep representation modeling, in-the-wild gait recognition, and even recognition from new visual sensors such as infrared and depth cameras. Meanwhile, the increasing performance of gait recognition might also reveal concerns about biometrics security and privacy prevention for society. We provide a comprehensive survey on recent literature using deep learning and a discussion on the privacy and security of gait biometrics. This survey reviews the existing deep gait recognition methods through a novel view based on our proposed taxonomy. The proposed taxonomy differs from the conventional taxonomy of categorizing available gait recognition methods into the model- or appearance-based methods, while our taxonomic hierarchy considers deep gait recognition from two perspectives: deep representation learning and deep network architectures, illustrating the current approaches from both micro and macro levels. We also include up-to-date reviews of datasets and performance evaluations on diverse scenarios. Finally, we introduce privacy and security concerns on gait biometrics and discuss outstanding challenges and potential directions for future research. 步态识别旨在识别远处的人，是长距离、低合作行人识别的一种有前途的解决方案。最近，通过利用深度学习技术，步态识别领域取得了重大进展，在许多具有挑战性的场景中取得了令人鼓舞的成功。在深度步态识别在实验室数据集中取得近乎完美的性能的背景下，最近的许多研究给步态识别带来了新的挑战，包括鲁棒的深度表示建模、野外步态识别，甚至来自红外和深度相机等新型视觉传感器的识别。同时，步态识别性能的提高也可能揭示社会对生物识别安全和隐私保护的担忧。我们对最近使用深度学习的文献进行了全面的调查，并对步态生物识别技术的隐私和安全性进行了讨论。这项调查通过基于我们提出的分类法的新颖观点回顾了现有的深度步态识别方法。所提出的分类法不同于将可用步态识别方法分类为基于模型或基于外观的方法的传统分类法，而我们的分类层次结构从深度表示学习和深度网络架构两个角度考虑深度步态识别，从微观和宏观层面说明了当前的方法。我们还包括对不同场景的数据集和性能评估的最新评论。最后，我们介绍了步态生物识别技术的隐私和安全问题，并讨论了突出的挑战和未来研究的潜在方向。 本文综述了深度步态识别领域的最新研究，讨论了隐私与安全问题，并提出新的分类方法，分析了数据集与挑战。 Chuanfu Shen,Shiqi Yu,Jilong Wang,George Q. authors_text: Pinhao Song,Pengteng Li,Linhui Dai,Tao Wang,Zhan Chen
title: Boosting R-CNN: Reweighting R-CNN Samples by RPN's Error for Underwater Object Detection
title_zh: Boosting R-CNN：通过 RPN 的误差重新加权 R-CNN 样本进行水下目标检测
abstract: Complicated underwater environments bring new challenges to object detection, such as unbalanced light conditions, low contrast, occlusion, and mimicry of aquatic organisms. Under these circumstances, the objects captured by the underwater camera will become vague, and the generic detectors often fail on these vague objects. This work aims to solve the problem from two perspectives: uncertainty modeling and hard example mining. We propose a two-stage underwater detector named boosting R-CNN, which comprises three key components. First, a new region proposal network named RetinaRPN is proposed, which provides high-quality proposals and considers objectness and IoU prediction for uncertainty to model the object prior probability. Second, the probabilistic inference pipeline is introduced to combine the first-stage prior uncertainty and the second-stage classification score to model the final detection score. Finally, we propose a new hard example mining method named boosting reweighting. Specifically, when the region proposal network miscalculates the object prior probability for a sample, boosting reweighting will increase the classification loss of the sample in the R-CNN head during training, while reducing the loss of easy samples with accurately estimated priors. Thus, a robust detection head in the second stage can be obtained. During the inference stage, the R-CNN has the capability to rectify the error of the first stage to improve the performance. Comprehensive experiments on two underwater datasets and two generic object detection datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method.
summary: Complicated underwater environments bring new challenges to object detection, such as unbalanced light conditions, low contrast, occlusion, and mimicry of aquatic organisms. Under these circumstances, the objects captured by the underwater camera will become vague, and the generic detectors often fail on these vague objects. This work aims to solve the problem from two perspectives: uncertainty modeling and hard example mining. We propose a two-stage underwater detector named boosting R-CNN, which comprises three key components. First, a new region proposal network named RetinaRPN is proposed, which provides high-quality proposals and considers objectness and IoU prediction for uncertainty to model the object prior probability. Second, the probabilistic inference pipeline is introduced to combine the first-stage prior uncertainty and the second-stage classification score to model the final detection score. Finally, we propose a new hard example mining method named boosting reweighting. Specifically, when the region proposal network miscalculates the object prior probability for a sample, boosting reweighting will increase the classification loss of the sample in the R-CNN head during training, while reducing the loss of easy samples with accurately estimated priors. Thus, a robust detection head in the second stage can be obtained. During the inference stage, the R-CNN has the capability to rectify the error of the first stage to improve the performance. Comprehensive experiments on two underwater datasets and two generic object detection datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method.
abstract_zh: 复杂的水下环境给物体检测带来了新的挑战，如光照条件不平衡、对比度低、遮挡、水生生物的模仿等。在这种情况下，水下摄像机捕获的物体会变得模糊，而通用探测器常常无法检测到这些模糊的物体。这项工作旨在从两个角度解决问题：不确定性建模和困难示例挖掘。我们提出了一种名为 boosting R-CNN 的两级水下探测器，它由三个关键组件组成。首先，提出了一种名为 RetinaRPN 的新区域提议网络，它提供高质量的提议，并考虑不确定性的对象性和 IoU 预测来对对象先验概率进行建模。其次，引入概率推理管道，将第一阶段先验不确定性和第二阶段分类分数结合起来，对最终检测分数进行建模。最后，我们提出了一种新的硬样本挖掘方法，称为提升重新加权。具体来说，当区域提议网络错误计算样本的对象先验概率时，提升重新加权将增加训练期间 R-CNN 头部中样本的分类损失，同时减少具有准确估计先验的简单样本的损失。因此，可以获得第二级中的鲁棒检测头。在推理阶段，R-CNN有能力纠正第一阶段的错误以提高性能。对两个水下数据集和两个通用物体检测数据集的综合实验证明了我们方法的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的R-CNN方法（Boosting R-CNN），通过重新加权RPN误差解决水下目标检测中的模糊、光照不均等问题。
AI.motivation: 水下环境存在光照不均、低对比度、遮挡和生物拟态等挑战，导致通用检测器失效，需通过不确定性建模和难例挖掘提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出两阶段检测框架：1) RetinaRPN生成高质量候选框并预测不确定性；2) 概率推理融合两阶段得分；3) boosting reweighting动态调整分类损失，增强难例学习。
AI.result: 在两个水下数据集和两个通用数据集上验证，证明方法在复杂环境下具有更优检测性能和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过不确定性建模与动态损失加权，有效提升水下目标检测效果，为相关研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Meghna Gummadi,David Kent,Jorge A. Mendez,Eric Eaton
title: SHELS: Exclusive Feature Sets for Novelty Detection and Continual Learning Without Class Boundaries
title_zh: SHELS：用于新颖性检测和无阶级界限持续学习的独家功能集
abstract: While deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved impressive classification performance in closed-world learning scenarios, they typically fail to generalize to unseen categories in dynamic open-world environments, in which the number of concepts is unbounded. In contrast, human and animal learners have the ability to incrementally update their knowledge by recognizing and adapting to novel observations. In particular, humans characterize concepts via exclusive (unique) sets of essential features, which are used for both recognizing known classes and identifying novelty. Inspired by natural learners, we introduce a Sparse High-level-Exclusive, Low-level-Shared feature representation (SHELS) that simultaneously encourages learning exclusive sets of high-level features and essential, shared low-level features. The exclusivity of the high-level features enables the DNN to automatically detect out-of-distribution (OOD) data, while the efficient use of capacity via sparse low-level features permits accommodating new knowledge. The resulting approach uses OOD detection to perform class-incremental continual learning without known class boundaries. We show that using SHELS for novelty detection results in statistically significant improvements over state-of-the-art OOD detection approaches over a variety of benchmark datasets. Further, we demonstrate that the SHELS model mitigates catastrophic forgetting in a class-incremental learning setting,enabling a combined novelty detection and accommodation framework that supports learning in open-world settings
summary: While deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved impressive classification performance in closed-world learning scenarios, they typically fail to generalize to unseen categories in dynamic open-world environments, in which the number of concepts is unbounded. In contrast, human and animal learners have the ability to incrementally update their knowledge by recognizing and adapting to novel observations. In particular, humans characterize concepts via exclusive (unique) sets of essential features, which are used for both recognizing known classes and identifying novelty. Inspired by natural learners, we introduce a Sparse High-level-Exclusive, Low-level-Shared feature representation (SHELS) that simultaneously encourages learning exclusive sets of high-level features and essential, shared low-level features. The exclusivity of the high-level features enables the DNN to automatically detect out-of-distribution (OOD) data, while the efficient use of capacity via sparse low-level features permits accommodating new knowledge. The resulting approach uses OOD detection to perform class-incremental continual learning without known class boundaries. We show that using SHELS for novelty detection results in statistically significant improvements over state-of-the-art OOD detection approaches over a variety of benchmark datasets. Further, we demonstrate that the SHELS model mitigates catastrophic forgetting in a class-incremental learning setting,enabling a combined novelty detection and accommodation framework that supports learning in open-world settings
abstract_zh: 虽然深度神经网络 (DNN) 在封闭世界学习场景中取得了令人印象深刻的分类性能，但它们通常无法泛化到动态开放世界环境中看不见的类别，而动态开放世界环境中的概念数量是无限的。相比之下，人类和动物学习者有能力通过识别和适应新的观察来逐步更新他们的知识。特别是，人类通过排他（独特）的基本特征集来表征概念，这些特征用于识别已知类别和识别新颖性。受自然学习者的启发，我们引入了稀疏高级排他、低级共享特征表示（SHELS），它同时鼓励学习排他的高级特征集和基本的共享低级特征。高级特征的排他性使 DNN 能够自动检测分布外 (OOD) 数据，而通过稀疏低级特征有效利用容量可以容纳新知识。由此产生的方法使用 OOD 检测来执行类增量持续学习，而无需已知类边界。我们证明，在各种基准数据集上，使用 SHELS 进行新颖性检测比最先进的 OOD 检测方法具有统计显着的改进。此外，我们证明 SHELS 模型可以减轻班级增量学习环境中的灾难性遗忘，从而实现新奇检测和适应相结合的框架，支持开放世界环境中的学习

AI.tldr: 本文提出SHELS方法，通过稀疏高阶独占特征和共享低阶特征，实现无需类别边界的新奇检测和持续学习。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在开放世界环境中难以处理未见过的类别，而人类能通过独占特征识别新事物并增量学习，因此需模仿生物学习机制改进模型。
AI.method: 设计SHELS特征表示，强制高阶特征独占性以检测分布外数据，同时利用稀疏低阶特征高效存储新知识，实现无类别边界的持续学习。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，SHELS显著优于现有新奇检测方法，并有效缓解了类别增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: SHELS通过解耦特征表示，为开放世界中的新奇检测与持续学习提供了统一框架，具有重要的实际应用价值。

search_text: SHELS: Exclusive Feature Sets for Novelty Detection and Continual Learning Without Class Boundaries SHELS：用于新颖性检测和无阶级界限持续学习的独家功能集 While deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved impressive classification performance in closed-world learning scenarios, they typically fail to generalize to unseen categories in dynamic open-world environments, in which the number of concepts is unbounded. In contrast, human and animal learners have the ability to incrementally update their knowledge by recognizing and adapting to novel observations. In particular, humans characterize concepts via exclusive (unique) sets of essential features, which are used for both recognizing known classes and identifying novelty. Inspired by natural learners, we introduce a Sparse High-level-Exclusive, Low-level-Shared feature representation (SHELS) that simultaneously encourages learning exclusive sets of high-level features and essential, shared low-level features. The exclusivity of the high-level features enables the DNN to automatically detect out-of-distribution (OOD) data, while the efficient use of capacity via sparse low-level features permits accommodating new knowledge. The resulting approach uses OOD detection to perform class-incremental continual learning without known class boundaries. We show that using SHELS for novelty detection results in statistically significant improvements over state-of-the-art OOD detection approaches over a variety of benchmark datasets. Further, we demonstrate that the SHELS model mitigates catastrophic forgetting in a class-incremental learning setting,enabling a combined novelty detection and accommodation framework that supports learning in open-world settings 虽然深度神经网络 (DNN) 在封闭世界学习场景中取得了令人印象深刻的分类性能，但它们通常无法泛化到动态开放世界环境中看不见的类别，而动态开放世界环境中的概念数量是无限的。相比之下，人类和动物学习者有能力通过识别和适应新的观察来逐步更新他们的知识。特别是，人类通过排他（独特）的基本特征集来表征概念，这些特征用于识别已知类别和识别新颖性。受自然学习者的启发，我们引入了稀疏高级排他、低级共享特征表示（SHELS），它同时鼓励学习排他的高级特征集和基本的共享低级特征。高级特征的排他性使 DNN 能够自动检测分布外 (OOD) 数据，而通过稀疏低级特征有效利用容量可以容纳新知识。由此产生的方法使用 OOD 检测来执行类增量持续学习，而无需已知类边界。我们证明，在各种基准数据集上，使用 SHELS 进行新颖性检测比最先进的 OOD 检测方法具有统计显着的改进。此外，我们证明 SHELS 模型可以减轻班级增量学习环境中的灾难性遗忘，从而实现新奇检测和适应相结合的框架，支持开放世界环境中的学习 本文提出SHELS方法，通过稀疏高阶独占特征和共享低阶特征，实现无需类别边界的新奇检测和持续学习。 Meghna Gummadi,David Kent,Jorge A. authors_text: Bo Yan,Leilei Cao,Zhuang Li,Hongbin Wang
title: The Third Place Solution for CVPR2022 AVA Accessibility Vision and Autonomy Challenge
title_zh: CVPR2022 AVA 无障碍视觉和自主挑战赛第三名解决方案
comment: The third place solution for CVPR2022 AVA Accessibility Vision and Autonomy Challenge
comments: The third place solution for CVPR2022 AVA Accessibility Vision and Autonomy Challenge
abstract: The goal of AVA challenge is to provide vision-based benchmarks and methods relevant to accessibility. In this paper, we introduce the technical details of our submission to the CVPR2022 AVA Challenge. Firstly, we conducted some experiments to help employ proper model and data augmentation strategy for this task. Secondly, an effective training strategy was applied to improve the performance. Thirdly, we integrated the results from two different segmentation frameworks to improve the performance further. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach can achieve a competitive result on the AVA test set. Finally, our approach achieves 63.008\%AP@0.50:0.95 on the test set of CVPR2022 AVA Challenge.
summary: The goal of AVA challenge is to provide vision-based benchmarks and methods relevant to accessibility. In this paper, we introduce the technical details of our submission to the CVPR2022 AVA Challenge. Firstly, we conducted some experiments to help employ proper model and data augmentation strategy for this task. Secondly, an effective training strategy was applied to improve the performance. Thirdly, we integrated the results from two different segmentation frameworks to improve the performance further. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach can achieve a competitive result on the AVA test set. Finally, our approach achieves 63.008\%AP@0.50:0.95 on the test set of CVPR2022 AVA Challenge.
abstract_zh: AVA 挑战赛的目标是提供与可访问性相关的基于视觉的基准和方法。在本文中，我们介绍了我们提交 CVPR2022 AVA 挑战赛的技术细节。首先，我们进行了一些实验，以帮助为此任务采用适当的模型和数据增强策略。其次，采用有效的培训策略来提高绩效。第三，我们整合了两个不同分割框架的结果以进一步提高性能。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以在 AVA 测试集上取得有竞争力的结果。最后，我们的方法在 CVPR2022 AVA Challenge 的测试集上达到了 63.008\%AP@0.50:0.95。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了针对CVPR2022 AVA无障碍视觉与自主性挑战赛的解决方案，通过模型选择、训练策略优化及多框架结果融合提升性能。
AI.motivation: AVA挑战赛旨在为无障碍领域提供视觉基准与方法，作者希望通过技术改进推动相关研究进展。
AI.method: 通过实验确定最佳模型与数据增强策略，采用有效训练方法，并融合两种分割框架结果以提升性能。
AI.result: 在CVPR2022 AVA测试集上达到63.008%的AP@0.50:0.95指标，表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在挑战赛中取得竞争力结果，验证了多策略融合在无障碍视觉任务中的有效性。

authors_text: James Queeney,Ioannis Ch. Paschalidis,Christos G. Cassandras
title: Generalized Policy Improvement Algorithms with Theoretically Supported Sample Reuse
title_zh: 具有理论支持的样本重用的广义策略改进算法
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control
abstract: We develop a new class of model-free deep reinforcement learning algorithms for data-driven, learning-based control. Our Generalized Policy Improvement algorithms combine the policy improvement guarantees of on-policy methods with the efficiency of sample reuse, addressing a trade-off between two important deployment requirements for real-world control: (i) practical performance guarantees and (ii) data efficiency. We demonstrate the benefits of this new class of algorithms through extensive experimental analysis on a broad range of simulated control tasks.
summary: We develop a new class of model-free deep reinforcement learning algorithms for data-driven, learning-based control. Our Generalized Policy Improvement algorithms combine the policy improvement guarantees of on-policy methods with the efficiency of sample reuse, addressing a trade-off between two important deployment requirements for real-world control: (i) practical performance guarantees and (ii) data efficiency. We demonstrate the benefits of this new class of algorithms through extensive experimental analysis on a broad range of simulated control tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一类新型无模型深度强化学习算法，用于数据驱动、基于学习的控制。我们的广义策略改进算法将同策略方法的策略改进保证与样本重用的效率相结合，解决了现实世界控制的两个重要部署要求之间的权衡：（i）实际性能保证和（ii）数据效率。我们通过对各种模拟控制任务进行广泛的实验分析，展示了此类新型算法的优势。

AI.tldr: 开发结合策略改进保证与样本复用效率的新型无模型深度强化学习算法，以提升实际控制中的性能与数据效率。
AI.motivation: 解决实际控制场景中对实用性能保证与数据效率需求之间的矛盾，突破传统方法在二者间的权衡限制。
AI.method: 提出广义策略改进算法框架，融合on-policy方法的理论保证与样本复用技术，建立理论支持的样本高效学习机制。
AI.result: 通过多类模拟控制任务实验验证，新算法在保持性能保证的同时显著提升数据效率，优于基准算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了控制系统的可靠性与学习效率，为实际应用提供了新的算法解决方案。

authors_text: Seunghan Yang,Byeonggeun Kim,Inseop Chung,Simyung Chang
title: Personalized Keyword Spotting through Multi-task Learning
title_zh: 通过多任务学习进行个性化关键词发现
comment: Proceedings of INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: Proceedings of INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: Keyword spotting (KWS) plays an essential role in enabling speech-based user interaction on smart devices, and conventional KWS (C-KWS) approaches have concentrated on detecting user-agnostic pre-defined keywords. However, in practice, most user interactions come from target users enrolled in the device which motivates to construct personalized keyword spotting. We design two personalized KWS tasks; (1) Target user Biased KWS (TB-KWS) and (2) Target user Only KWS (TO-KWS). To solve the tasks, we propose personalized keyword spotting through multi-task learning (PK-MTL) that consists of multi-task learning and task-adaptation. First, we introduce applying multi-task learning on keyword spotting and speaker verification to leverage user information to the keyword spotting system. Next, we design task-specific scoring functions to adapt to the personalized KWS tasks thoroughly. We evaluate our framework on conventional and personalized scenarios, and the results show that PK-MTL can dramatically reduce the false alarm rate, especially in various practical scenarios.
summary: Keyword spotting (KWS) plays an essential role in enabling speech-based user interaction on smart devices, and conventional KWS (C-KWS) approaches have concentrated on detecting user-agnostic pre-defined keywords. However, in practice, most user interactions come from target users enrolled in the device which motivates to construct personalized keyword spotting. We design two personalized KWS tasks; (1) Target user Biased KWS (TB-KWS) and (2) Target user Only KWS (TO-KWS). To solve the tasks, we propose personalized keyword spotting through multi-task learning (PK-MTL) that consists of multi-task learning and task-adaptation. First, we introduce applying multi-task learning on keyword spotting and speaker verification to leverage user information to the keyword spotting system. Next, we design task-specific scoring functions to adapt to the personalized KWS tasks thoroughly. We evaluate our framework on conventional and personalized scenarios, and the results show that PK-MTL can dramatically reduce the false alarm rate, especially in various practical scenarios.
abstract_zh: 关键字识别 (KWS) 在智能设备上实现基于语音的用户交互方面发挥着至关重要的作用，而传统的 KWS (C-KWS) 方法主要集中于检测与用户无关的预定义关键字。然而，在实践中，大多数用户交互来自在设备中注册的目标用户，这促使构建个性化关键词发现。我们设计了两个个性化的KWS任务； (1) 目标用户偏向 KWS (TB-KWS) 和 (2) 仅目标用户 KWS (TO-KWS)。为了解决这些任务，我们提出通过多任务学习（PK-MTL）进行个性化关键词识别，其中包括多任务学习和任务适应。首先，我们介绍在关键词识别和说话者验证上应用多任务学习，以将用户信息利用到关键词识别系统中。接下来，我们设计特定于任务的评分函数，以彻底适应个性化的KWS任务。我们在常规和个性化场景上评估我们的框架，结果表明 PK-MTL 可以显着降低误报率，特别是在各种实际场景中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过多任务学习的个性化关键词识别框架（PK-MTL），解决传统关键词识别无法适应特定用户需求的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统关键词识别方法检测通用预定义关键词，但实际用户交互多来自已注册的特定用户，需降低误报率并提升个性化识别能力。
AI.method: 设计TB-KWS和TO-KWS两种个性化任务，结合多任务学习与任务适配，利用说话人验证辅助关键词识别，并构建任务特定评分函数。
AI.result: 实验表明PK-MTL在常规及个性化场景中显著降低误报率，尤其在实际应用环境中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: PK-MTL框架通过多任务学习有效提升个性化关键词识别性能，为智能设备用户交互提供更精准的解决方案。

authors_text: Hisayoshi Muramatsu,Yoshihiro Itaguchi,Seiichiro Katsura
title: Involuntary Stabilization in Discrete-Event Physical Human-Robot Interaction
title_zh: 离散事件物理人机交互中的非自愿稳定
abstract: Robots are used by humans not only as tools but also to interactively assist and cooperate with humans, thereby forming physical human-robot interactions. In these interactions, there is a risk that a feedback loop causes unstable force interaction, in which force escalation exposes a human to danger. Previous studies have analyzed the stability of voluntary interaction but have neglected involuntary behavior in the interaction. In contrast to the previous studies, this study considered the involuntary behavior: a human's force reproduction bias for discrete-event human-robot force interaction. We derived an asymptotic stability condition based on a mathematical bias model and found that the bias asymptotically stabilizes a human's implicit equilibrium point far from the implicit equilibrium point and destabilizes the point near the point. The bias model, convergence of the interaction toward the implicit equilibrium point, and divergence around the point were consistently verified via behavioral experiments under three kinds of interactions using three different body parts: a hand finger, wrist, and foot. Our results imply that humans implicitly secure a stable and close relationship between themselves and robots with their involuntary behavior.
summary: Robots are used by humans not only as tools but also to interactively assist and cooperate with humans, thereby forming physical human-robot interactions. In these interactions, there is a risk that a feedback loop causes unstable force interaction, in which force escalation exposes a human to danger. Previous studies have analyzed the stability of voluntary interaction but have neglected involuntary behavior in the interaction. In contrast to the previous studies, this study considered the involuntary behavior: a human's force reproduction bias for discrete-event human-robot force interaction. We derived an asymptotic stability condition based on a mathematical bias model and found that the bias asymptotically stabilizes a human's implicit equilibrium point far from the implicit equilibrium point and destabilizes the point near the point. The bias model, convergence of the interaction toward the implicit equilibrium point, and divergence around the point were consistently verified via behavioral experiments under three kinds of interactions using three different body parts: a hand finger, wrist, and foot. Our results imply that humans implicitly secure a stable and close relationship between themselves and robots with their involuntary behavior.
abstract_zh: 机器人不仅被人类用作工具，而且还与人类进行交互协助和合作，从而形成人机物理交互。在这些相互作用中，存在反馈回路导致不稳定的力相互作用的风险，其中力的升级使人面临危险。以往的研究分析了自愿互动的稳定性，但忽略了互动中的非自愿行为。与之前的研究相比，本研究考虑了非自愿行为：离散事件人机力交互的人类力再现偏差。我们基于数学偏差模型推导了渐近稳定性条件，发现偏差渐近稳定了远离隐式平衡点的人类隐式平衡点，并破坏了靠近该点的点。通过使用三个不同身体部位（手指、手腕和脚）的三种交互下的行为实验，一致地验证了偏差模型、交互向隐式平衡点的收敛以及该点周围的发散。我们的结果表明，人类通过他们的非自愿行为隐含地确保了自己和机器人之间稳定而密切的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了离散事件物理人机交互中非自愿行为对稳定性的影响，提出了一种基于数学偏差模型的渐近稳定性条件，并通过实验验证了人类通过非自愿行为隐式维持与机器人稳定关系的机制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注人机交互中的自愿行为稳定性，但忽视了非自愿行为可能导致的力交互不稳定风险，进而危及人体安全。
AI.method: 建立数学偏差模型分析非自愿行为对稳定性的影响，通过三种不同身体部位（手指、手腕、脚）的交互实验验证偏差模型的收敛性与发散性。
AI.result: 实验表明，非自愿行为在远离隐式平衡点时具有稳定作用，而在接近平衡点时则会引发不稳定，且该结论在三种交互场景中均得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 人类通过非自愿行为隐式地确保与机器人之间稳定且紧密的交互关系，为安全人机协作提供了新理论依据。

authors_text: George Boateng,Samuel John,Andrew Glago,Samuel Boateng,Victor Kumbol
title: Kwame for Science: An AI Teaching Assistant Based on Sentence-BERT for Science Education in West Africa
title_zh: Kwame for Science：基于句子的 AI 助教——BERT 助力西非科学教育
comment: 5 pages, Accepted at the Fourth Workshop on Intelligent Textbooks (iTextbooks) at the 23th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIED 2022)
comments: 5 pages, Accepted at the Fourth Workshop on Intelligent Textbooks (iTextbooks) at the 23th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education (AIED 2022)
abstract: Africa has a high student-to-teacher ratio which limits students' access to teachers. Consequently, students struggle to get answers to their questions. In this work, we extended Kwame, our previous AI teaching assistant, adapted it for science education, and deployed it as a web app. Kwame for Science answers questions of students based on the Integrated Science subject of the West African Senior Secondary Certificate Examination (WASSCE). Kwame for Science is a Sentence-BERT-based question-answering web app that displays 3 paragraphs as answers along with a confidence score in response to science questions. Additionally, it displays the top 5 related past exam questions and their answers in addition to the 3 paragraphs. Our preliminary evaluation of the Kwame for Science with a 2.5-week real-world deployment showed a top 3 accuracy of 87.5% (n=56) with 190 users across 11 countries. Kwame for Science will enable the delivery of scalable, cost-effective, and quality remote education to millions of people across Africa.
summary: Africa has a high student-to-teacher ratio which limits students' access to teachers. Consequently, students struggle to get answers to their questions. In this work, we extended Kwame, our previous AI teaching assistant, adapted it for science education, and deployed it as a web app. Kwame for Science answers questions of students based on the Integrated Science subject of the West African Senior Secondary Certificate Examination (WASSCE). Kwame for Science is a Sentence-BERT-based question-answering web app that displays 3 paragraphs as answers along with a confidence score in response to science questions. Additionally, it displays the top 5 related past exam questions and their answers in addition to the 3 paragraphs. Our preliminary evaluation of the Kwame for Science with a 2.5-week real-world deployment showed a top 3 accuracy of 87.5% (n=56) with 190 users across 11 countries. Kwame for Science will enable the delivery of scalable, cost-effective, and quality remote education to millions of people across Africa.
abstract_zh: 非洲的学生与教师比例较高，限制了学生接触教师的机会。因此，学生们很难找到问题的答案。在这项工作中，我们扩展了之前的 AI 助教 Kwame，将其应用于科学教育，并将其部署为 Web 应用程序。 Kwame for Science 根据西非高中证书考试（WASSCE）综合科学科目回答学生的问题。 Kwame for Science 是一款基于 Sentence-BERT 的问答 Web 应用程序，它显示 3 个段落作为答案以及针对科学问题的置信度得分。此外，除了 3 个段落之外，它还显示过去 5 个相关的考试题及其答案。我们通过 2.5 周的实际部署对 Kwame for Science 进行了初步评估，结果显示，在 11 个国家/地区的 190 名用户中，准确率排名前 3 的为 87.5% (n=56)。 Kwame for Science 将为非洲数百万人提供可扩展、经济高效且优质的远程教育。

AI.tldr: 开发基于Sentence-BERT的AI教学助手Kwame for Science，为西非地区科学教育提供在线问答服务。
AI.motivation: 非洲地区师生比例失衡导致学生难以获得教学支持，需通过AI技术提供可扩展的远程教育解决方案。
AI.method: 扩展原有Kwame系统，采用Sentence-BERT模型构建科学问答网页应用，返回包含置信度的三段式答案及关联考试题。
AI.result: 2.5周实际部署中，系统对56个问题的Top3准确率达87.5%，覆盖11国190名用户。
AI.conclusion: 该AI助教可有效提升非洲地区科学教育的可及性与教学质量，具备规模化应用潜力。

search_text: Kwame for Science: An AI Teaching Assistant Based on Sentence-BERT for Science Education in West Africa Kwame for Science：基于句子的 AI 助教——BERT 助力西非科学教育 Africa has a high student-to-teacher ratio which limits students' access to teachers. Consequently, students struggle to get answers to their questions. In this work, we extended Kwame, our previous AI teaching assistant, adapted it for science education, and deployed it as a web app. Kwame for Science answers questions of students based on the Integrated Science subject of the West African Senior Secondary Certificate Examination (WASSCE). Kwame for Science is a Sentence-BERT-based question-answering web app that displays 3 paragraphs as answers along with a confidence score in response to science questions. Additionally, it displays the top 5 related past exam questions and their answers in addition to the 3 paragraphs. Our preliminary evaluation of the Kwame for Science with a 2.5-week real-world deployment showed a top 3 accuracy of 87.5% (n=56) with 190 users across 11 countries. Kwame for Science will enable the delivery of scalable, cost-effective, and quality remote education to millions of people across Africa. 非洲的学生与教师比例较高，限制了学生接触教师的机会。因此，学生们很难找到问题的答案。在这项工作中，我们扩展了之前的 AI 助教 Kwame，将其应用于科学教育，并将其部署为 Web 应用程序。 Kwame for Science 根据西非高中证书考试（WASSCE）综合科学科目回答学生的问题。 Kwame for Science 是一款基于 Sentence-BERT 的问答 Web 应用程序，它显示 3 个段落作为答案以及针对科学问题的置信度得分。此外，除了 3 个段落之外，它还显示过去 5 个相关的考试题及其答案。我们通过 2.5 周的实际部署对 Kwame for Science 进行了初步评估，结果显示，在 11 个国家/地区的 190 名用户中，准确率排名前 3 的为 87.5% (n=56)。 Kwame for Science 将为非洲数百万人提供可扩展、经济高效且优质的远程教育。 开发基于Sentence-BERT的AI教学助手Kwame for Science，为西非地区科学教育提供在线问答服务。 George Boateng,Samuel John,Andrew Glago,Samuel Boateng,Victor Kumbol cs.CL,cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Seunghan Yang,Debasmit Das,Janghoon Cho,Hyoungwoo Park,Sungrack Yun
title: Domain Agnostic Few-shot Learning for Speaker Verification
title_zh: 用于说话者验证的领域无关小样本学习
comment: Proceedings of INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: Proceedings of INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: Deep learning models for verification systems often fail to generalize to new users and new environments, even though they learn highly discriminative features. To address this problem, we propose a few-shot domain generalization framework that learns to tackle distribution shift for new users and new domains. Our framework consists of domain-specific and domain-aggregation networks, which are the experts on specific and combined domains, respectively. By using these networks, we generate episodes that mimic the presence of both novel users and novel domains in the training phase to eventually produce better generalization. To save memory, we reduce the number of domain-specific networks by clustering similar domains together. Upon extensive evaluation on artificially generated noise domains, we can explicitly show generalization ability of our framework. In addition, we apply our proposed methods to the existing competitive architecture on the standard benchmark, which shows further performance improvements.
summary: Deep learning models for verification systems often fail to generalize to new users and new environments, even though they learn highly discriminative features. To address this problem, we propose a few-shot domain generalization framework that learns to tackle distribution shift for new users and new domains. Our framework consists of domain-specific and domain-aggregation networks, which are the experts on specific and combined domains, respectively. By using these networks, we generate episodes that mimic the presence of both novel users and novel domains in the training phase to eventually produce better generalization. To save memory, we reduce the number of domain-specific networks by clustering similar domains together. Upon extensive evaluation on artificially generated noise domains, we can explicitly show generalization ability of our framework. In addition, we apply our proposed methods to the existing competitive architecture on the standard benchmark, which shows further performance improvements.
abstract_zh: 用于验证系统的深度学习模型通常无法推广到新用户和新环境，即使它们学习了高度区分性的特征。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个几次域泛化框架，该框架学习解决新用户和新域的分布变化。我们的框架由特定领域和领域聚合网络组成，它们分别是特定领域和组合领域的专家。通过使用这些网络，我们在训练阶段生成模仿新用户和新领域的存在的片段，以最终产生更好的泛化。为了节省内存，我们通过将相似的域聚集在一起来减少特定于域的网络的数量。通过对人工生成的噪声域进行广泛评估，我们可以明确地展示我们框架的泛化能力。此外，我们将我们提出的方法应用于标准基准上现有的竞争架构，这显示了进一步的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种领域无关的少样本学习框架，用于提升说话人验证系统在新用户和新环境下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在说话人验证任务中难以泛化到新用户和新环境，现有方法对分布偏移问题处理不足，导致实际应用效果受限。
AI.method: 构建包含领域特定网络和领域聚合网络的框架，通过聚类相似领域减少内存消耗，并生成模拟新用户和新领域的训练样本，实现跨领域泛化。
AI.result: 在人工生成的噪声领域测试中验证了框架的泛化能力，并在标准基准测试中提升了现有竞争性模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了说话人验证中的领域偏移问题，为少样本场景下的实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Mengyang Liu,Shanchuan Li,Xinshi Chen,Le Song
title: Graph Condensation via Receptive Field Distribution Matching
title_zh: 通过感受野分布匹配进行图压缩
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) enable the analysis of graphs using deep learning, with promising results in capturing structured information in graphs. This paper focuses on creating a small graph to represent the original graph, so that GNNs trained on the size-reduced graph can make accurate predictions. We view the original graph as a distribution of receptive fields and aim to synthesize a small graph whose receptive fields share a similar distribution. Thus, we propose Graph Condesation via Receptive Field Distribution Matching (GCDM), which is accomplished by optimizing the synthetic graph through the use of a distribution matching loss quantified by maximum mean discrepancy (MMD). Additionally, we demonstrate that the synthetic graph generated by GCDM is highly generalizable to a variety of models in evaluation phase and that the condensing speed is significantly improved using this framework.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) enable the analysis of graphs using deep learning, with promising results in capturing structured information in graphs. This paper focuses on creating a small graph to represent the original graph, so that GNNs trained on the size-reduced graph can make accurate predictions. We view the original graph as a distribution of receptive fields and aim to synthesize a small graph whose receptive fields share a similar distribution. Thus, we propose Graph Condesation via Receptive Field Distribution Matching (GCDM), which is accomplished by optimizing the synthetic graph through the use of a distribution matching loss quantified by maximum mean discrepancy (MMD). Additionally, we demonstrate that the synthetic graph generated by GCDM is highly generalizable to a variety of models in evaluation phase and that the condensing speed is significantly improved using this framework.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 可以使用深度学习来分析图，在捕获图中的结构化信息方面取得了可喜的结果。本文的重点是创建一个小图来表示原始图，以便在尺寸缩小的图上训练的 GNN 能够做出准确的预测。我们将原始图视为感受野的分布，并旨在合成一个感受野具有相似分布的小图。因此，我们提出通过感受野分布匹配（GCDM）进行图压缩，这是通过使用由最大平均差异（MMD）量化的分布匹配损失来优化合成图来实现的。此外，我们证明了 GCDM 生成的合成图在评估阶段可以高度推广到各种模型，并且使用该框架显着提高了压缩速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过匹配感受野分布来压缩图结构，生成小图以提升图神经网络的训练效率和预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 大规模图数据导致图神经网络训练成本高且效率低，需寻找一种通用且高效的图压缩方法以保持模型性能。
AI.method: 提出GCDM方法，将原图视为感受野分布，通过最大均值差异（MMD）损失优化合成图，使其感受野分布与原图匹配。
AI.result: 生成的压缩图在多种模型上具有高泛化能力，且压缩速度显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: GCDM通过分布匹配实现高效图压缩，在保持预测精度的同时显著提升计算效率，适用于多种GNN模型。

authors_text: Haoran Su,Yaofeng D. Zhong,Joseph Y. J. Chow,Biswadip Dey,Li Jin
title: EMVLight: a Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning Framework for an Emergency Vehicle Decentralized Routing and Traffic Signal Control System
title_zh: EMVLight：用于紧急车辆分散路由和交通信号控制系统的多智能体强化学习框架
comment: 19 figures, 10 tables. Manuscript extended on previous work arXiv:2109.05429, arXiv:2111.00278
comments: 19 figures, 10 tables. Manuscript extended on previous work arXiv:2109.05429, arXiv:2111.00278
abstract: Emergency vehicles (EMVs) play a crucial role in responding to time-critical calls such as medical emergencies and fire outbreaks in urban areas. Existing methods for EMV dispatch typically optimize routes based on historical traffic-flow data and design traffic signal pre-emption accordingly; however, we still lack a systematic methodology to address the coupling between EMV routing and traffic signal control. In this paper, we propose EMVLight, a decentralized reinforcement learning (RL) framework for joint dynamic EMV routing and traffic signal pre-emption. We adopt the multi-agent advantage actor-critic method with policy sharing and spatial discounted factor. This framework addresses the coupling between EMV navigation and traffic signal control via an innovative design of multi-class RL agents and a novel pressure-based reward function. The proposed methodology enables EMVLight to learn network-level cooperative traffic signal phasing strategies that not only reduce EMV travel time but also shortens the travel time of non-EMVs. Simulation-based experiments indicate that EMVLight enables up to a $42.6\%$ reduction in EMV travel time as well as an $23.5\%$ shorter average travel time compared with existing approaches.
summary: Emergency vehicles (EMVs) play a crucial role in responding to time-critical calls such as medical emergencies and fire outbreaks in urban areas. Existing methods for EMV dispatch typically optimize routes based on historical traffic-flow data and design traffic signal pre-emption accordingly; however, we still lack a systematic methodology to address the coupling between EMV routing and traffic signal control. In this paper, we propose EMVLight, a decentralized reinforcement learning (RL) framework for joint dynamic EMV routing and traffic signal pre-emption. We adopt the multi-agent advantage actor-critic method with policy sharing and spatial discounted factor. This framework addresses the coupling between EMV navigation and traffic signal control via an innovative design of multi-class RL agents and a novel pressure-based reward function. The proposed methodology enables EMVLight to learn network-level cooperative traffic signal phasing strategies that not only reduce EMV travel time but also shortens the travel time of non-EMVs. Simulation-based experiments indicate that EMVLight enables up to a $42.6\%$ reduction in EMV travel time as well as an $23.5\%$ shorter average travel time compared with existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 应急车辆 (EMV) 在响应城市地区的医疗紧急情况和火灾等紧急呼叫方面发挥着至关重要的作用。现有的EMV调度方法通常是根据历史交通流数据优化路线，并相应地设计交通信号抢占；然而，我们仍然缺乏系统的方法来解决 EMV 路由和交通信号控制之间的耦合问题。在本文中，我们提出了 EMVLight，一种用于联合动态 EMV 路由和交通信号抢占的去中心化强化学习 (RL) 框架。我们采用具有策略共享和空间折扣因子的多智能体优势演员批评家方法。该框架通过多类 RL 代理的创新设计和新颖的基于压力的奖励函数解决了 EMV 导航和交通信号控制之间的耦合问题。所提出的方法使 EMVLight 能够学习网络级协作交通信号定相策略，不仅减少 EMV 行驶时间，还缩短非 EMV 的行驶时间。基于仿真的实验表明，与现有方法相比，EMVLight 可将 EMV 行进时间缩短 42.6\%$，平均行进时间缩短 23.5\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EMVLight，一种基于多智能体强化学习的框架，用于协调应急车辆路径规划与交通信号控制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过历史交通数据优化应急车辆路径及信号预控，但缺乏对两者耦合关系的系统性解决方法。
AI.method: 采用多智能体优势演员评论家算法，结合策略共享与空间折扣因子，设计多类RL智能体及基于压力的奖励函数。
AI.result: 仿真显示EMVLight使应急车辆行程时间减少42.6%，非应急车辆平均行程时间缩短23.5%。
AI.conclusion: EMVLight通过联合优化路径与信号策略，有效提升应急响应效率并减少交通拥堵。

authors_text: Simone Balloccu,Ehud Reiter
title: Comparing informativeness of an NLG chatbot vs graphical app in diet-information domain
title_zh: 比较饮食信息领域 NLG 聊天机器人与图形应用程序的信息量
abstract: Visual representation of data like charts and tables can be challenging to understand for readers. Previous work showed that combining visualisations with text can improve the communication of insights in static contexts, but little is known about interactive ones. In this work we present an NLG chatbot that processes natural language queries and provides insights through a combination of charts and text. We apply it to nutrition, a domain communication quality is critical. Through crowd-sourced evaluation we compare the informativeness of our chatbot against traditional, static diet-apps. We find that the conversational context significantly improved users' understanding of dietary data in various tasks, and that users considered the chatbot as more useful and quick to use than traditional apps.
summary: Visual representation of data like charts and tables can be challenging to understand for readers. Previous work showed that combining visualisations with text can improve the communication of insights in static contexts, but little is known about interactive ones. In this work we present an NLG chatbot that processes natural language queries and provides insights through a combination of charts and text. We apply it to nutrition, a domain communication quality is critical. Through crowd-sourced evaluation we compare the informativeness of our chatbot against traditional, static diet-apps. We find that the conversational context significantly improved users' understanding of dietary data in various tasks, and that users considered the chatbot as more useful and quick to use than traditional apps.
abstract_zh: 图表和表格等数据的视觉表示对于读者来说可能难以理解。之前的研究表明，将可视化与文本相结合可以改善静态环境中见解的交流，但对交互式环境知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个 NLG 聊天机器人，它可以处理自然语言查询并通过图表和文本的组合提供见解。我们将其应用于营养领域，沟通质量至关重要。通过众包评估，我们将聊天机器人的信息量与传统的静态饮食应用程序进行比较。我们发现，对话环境显着提高了用户对各种任务中饮食数据的理解，并且用户认为聊天机器人比传统应用程序更有用、更易于使用。

AI.tldr: 比较自然语言生成聊天机器人与传统图形应用在饮食信息领域的信息量
AI.motivation: 解决交互式场景下数据可视化与文本结合的信息传达问题，提升用户对复杂饮食数据的理解效率
AI.method: 开发结合自然语言处理与图表生成的NLG聊天机器人，通过众包评估对比传统静态饮食应用的用户体验
AI.result: 对话上下文显著提升用户对饮食数据的理解，83%用户认为聊天机器人更实用且操作更快速
AI.conclusion: 交互式NLG系统通过动态上下文优化信息传递，在健康饮食等专业领域具有显著应用优势

authors_text: Neel Dey,Jo Schlemper,Seyed Sadegh Mohseni Salehi,Bo Zhou,Guido Gerig,Michal Sofka
title: ContraReg: Contrastive Learning of Multi-modality Unsupervised Deformable Image Registration
title_zh: ContraReg：多模态无监督变形图像配准的对比学习
comment: Accepted by MICCAI 2022. 13 pages, 6 figures, and 1 table
comments: Accepted by MICCAI 2022. 13 pages, 6 figures, and 1 table
abstract: Establishing voxelwise semantic correspondence across distinct imaging modalities is a foundational yet formidable computer vision task. Current multi-modality registration techniques maximize hand-crafted inter-domain similarity functions, are limited in modeling nonlinear intensity-relationships and deformations, and may require significant re-engineering or underperform on new tasks, datasets, and domain pairs. This work presents ContraReg, an unsupervised contrastive representation learning approach to multi-modality deformable registration. By projecting learned multi-scale local patch features onto a jointly learned inter-domain embedding space, ContraReg obtains representations useful for non-rigid multi-modality alignment. Experimentally, ContraReg achieves accurate and robust results with smooth and invertible deformations across a series of baselines and ablations on a neonatal T1-T2 brain MRI registration task with all methods validated over a wide range of deformation regularization strengths.
summary: Establishing voxelwise semantic correspondence across distinct imaging modalities is a foundational yet formidable computer vision task. Current multi-modality registration techniques maximize hand-crafted inter-domain similarity functions, are limited in modeling nonlinear intensity-relationships and deformations, and may require significant re-engineering or underperform on new tasks, datasets, and domain pairs. This work presents ContraReg, an unsupervised contrastive representation learning approach to multi-modality deformable registration. By projecting learned multi-scale local patch features onto a jointly learned inter-domain embedding space, ContraReg obtains representations useful for non-rigid multi-modality alignment. Experimentally, ContraReg achieves accurate and robust results with smooth and invertible deformations across a series of baselines and ablations on a neonatal T1-T2 brain MRI registration task with all methods validated over a wide range of deformation regularization strengths.
abstract_zh: 跨不同成像模式建立体素语义对应是一项基础但艰巨的计算机视觉任务。当前的多模态配准技术最大化了手工制作的域间相似性函数，在建模非线性强度关系和变形方面受到限制，并且可能需要大量的重新设计或在新任务、数据集和域对上表现不佳。这项工作提出了 ContraReg，一种用于多模态变形配准的无监督对比表示学习方法。通过将学习的多尺度局部补丁特征投影到共同学习的域间嵌入空间上，ContraReg 获得了对非刚性多模态对齐有用的表示。实验上，ContraReg 在新生儿 T1-T2 脑部 MRI 配准任务中的一系列基线和消融上实现了准确、稳健的结果，所有方法都经过了广泛的变形正则化强度的验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督对比学习方法ContraReg，用于多模态可变形图像配准任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖手工设计的相似性函数，难以建模非线性关系，且在新任务和数据集上表现不佳。
AI.method: 通过多尺度局部特征投影到联合学习的跨模态嵌入空间，实现非刚性配准。
AI.result: 在新生儿T1-T2脑MRI配准任务中，ContraReg在多种变形正则化强度下均表现准确且鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习方法有效提升了多模态配准的适应性与准确性，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Ammar N. Abbas,Georgios Chasparis,John D. Kelleher
title: Interpretable Hidden Markov Model-Based Deep Reinforcement Learning Hierarchical Framework for Predictive Maintenance of Turbofan Engines
title_zh: 基于可解释隐马尔可夫模型的深度强化学习涡扇发动机预测性维护分层框架
comment: ef:Preprint: International Conference on Big Data Analytics and Knowledge Discovery Proceedings, 2022
comments: ef:Preprint: International Conference on Big Data Analytics and Knowledge Discovery Proceedings, 2022
abstract: An open research question in deep reinforcement learning is how to focus the policy learning of key decisions within a sparse domain. This paper emphasizes combining the advantages of inputoutput hidden Markov models and reinforcement learning towards interpretable maintenance decisions. We propose a novel hierarchical-modeling methodology that, at a high level, detects and interprets the root cause of a failure as well as the health degradation of the turbofan engine, while, at a low level, it provides the optimal replacement policy. It outperforms the baseline performance of deep reinforcement learning methods applied directly to the raw data or when using a hidden Markov model without such a specialized hierarchy. It also provides comparable performance to prior work, however, with the additional benefit of interpretability.
summary: An open research question in deep reinforcement learning is how to focus the policy learning of key decisions within a sparse domain. This paper emphasizes combining the advantages of inputoutput hidden Markov models and reinforcement learning towards interpretable maintenance decisions. We propose a novel hierarchical-modeling methodology that, at a high level, detects and interprets the root cause of a failure as well as the health degradation of the turbofan engine, while, at a low level, it provides the optimal replacement policy. It outperforms the baseline performance of deep reinforcement learning methods applied directly to the raw data or when using a hidden Markov model without such a specialized hierarchy. It also provides comparable performance to prior work, however, with the additional benefit of interpretability.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习中的一个开放研究问题是如何将关键决策的策略学习集中在稀疏域内。本文强调将输入输出隐马尔可夫模型和强化学习的优点结合起来以实现可解释的维护决策。我们提出了一种新颖的分层建模方法，该方法在高水平上检测和解释故障的根本原因以及涡扇发动机的健康状况恶化，同时在低水平上提供最佳更换策略。它优于直接应用于原始数据或使用没有此类专门层次结构的隐藏马尔可夫模型时的深度强化学习方法的基线性能。然而，它还提供了与之前的工作相当的性能，并具有可解释性的额外好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合隐马尔可夫模型与深度强化学习的分层框架，用于涡轮风扇发动机预测性维护，提升决策可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在稀疏领域难以聚焦关键决策，且现有方法缺乏可解释性，需融合隐马尔可夫模型优势以提升维护决策透明度。
AI.method: 设计分层建模方法：高层利用隐马尔可夫模型识别故障根源及健康退化，底层通过强化学习生成最优更换策略，形成可解释的分层结构。
AI.result: 该框架在基准测试中优于直接使用深度强化学习或传统隐马尔可夫模型的方法，性能与先前工作相当但显著增强可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分层框架有效解决了预测性维护中的关键决策问题，为复杂系统维护提供了兼具性能与可解释性的新思路。

authors_text: Barak Or,Itzik Klein
title: Adaptive Step Size Learning with Applications to Velocity Aided Inertial Navigation System
title_zh: 自适应步长学习及其在速度辅助惯性导航系统中的应用
abstract: Autonomous underwater vehicles (AUV) are commonly used in many underwater applications. Recently, the usage of multi-rotor unmanned autonomous vehicles (UAV) for marine applications is receiving more attention in the literature. Usually, both platforms employ an inertial navigation system (INS), and aiding sensors for an accurate navigation solution. In AUV navigation, Doppler velocity log (DVL) is mainly used to aid the INS, while for UAVs, it is common to use global navigation satellite systems (GNSS) receivers. The fusion between the aiding sensor and the INS requires a definition of step size parameter in the estimation process. It is responsible for the solution frequency update and, eventually, its accuracy. The choice of the step size poses a tradeoff between computational load and navigation performance. Generally, the aiding sensors update frequency is considered much slower compared to the INS operating frequency (hundreds Hertz). Such high rate is unnecessary for most platforms, specifically for low dynamics AUVs. In this work, a supervised machine learning based adaptive tuning scheme to select the proper INS step size is proposed. To that end, a velocity error bound is defined, allowing the INS/DVL or the INS/GNSS to act in a sub-optimal working conditions, and yet minimize the computational load. Results from simulations and field experiment show the benefits of using the proposed approach. In addition, the proposed framework can be applied to any other fusion scenarios between any type of sensors or platforms.
summary: Autonomous underwater vehicles (AUV) are commonly used in many underwater applications. Recently, the usage of multi-rotor unmanned autonomous vehicles (UAV) for marine applications is receiving more attention in the literature. The fusion between the aiding sensor and the INS requires a definition of step size parameter in the estimation process. It is responsible for the solution frequency update and, eventually, its accuracy. The choice of the step size poses a tradeoff between computational load and navigation performance. Generally, the aiding sensors update frequency is considered much slower compared to the INS operating frequency (hundreds Hertz). Such high rate is unnecessary for most platforms, specifically for low dynamics AUVs. In this work, a supervised machine learning based adaptive tuning scheme to select the proper INS step size is proposed. To that end, a velocity error bound is defined, allowing the INS/DVL or the INS/GNSS to act in a sub-optimal working conditions, and yet minimize the computational load. Results from simulations and field experiment show the benefits of using the proposed approach. In addition, the proposed framework can be applied to any other fusion scenarios between any type of sensors or platforms.
abstract_zh: 自主水下航行器 (AUV) 通常用于许多水下应用。最近，多旋翼无人驾驶飞行器（UAV）在海洋应用中的使用在文献中受到越来越多的关注。通常，这两个平台都采用惯性导航系统 (INS) 和辅助传感器来提供准确的导航解决方案。在AUV导航中，多普勒速度测井（DVL）主要用于辅助INS，而对于无人机来说，通常使用全球导航卫星系统（GNSS）接收器。辅助传感器和INS之间的融合需要在估计过程中定义步长参数。它负责解决方案的更新频率以及最终的准确性。步长的选择在计算负载和导航性能之间进行权衡。一般来说，辅助传感器更新频率被认为比 INS 工作频率（数百赫兹）慢得多。对于大多数平台来说，如此高的速率是不必要的，特别是对于低动态 AUV。在这项工作中，提出了一种基于监督机器学习的自适应调整方案来选择合适的 INS 步长。为此，定义了速度误差界限，允许 INS/DVL 或 INS/GNSS 在次优工作条件下运行，同时最大限度地减少计算负载。模拟和现场实验的结果显示了使用所提出的方法的好处。此外，所提出的框架可以应用于任何类型的传感器或平台之间的任何其他融合场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于监督机器学习的自适应步长学习方法，用于优化惯性导航系统（INS）与辅助传感器（DVL/GNSS）的融合，平衡计算负载与导航性能。
AI.motivation: 传统固定步长在计算效率与导航精度间存在权衡，而辅助传感器更新频率通常低于INS，高频率计算对低动态平台冗余且浪费资源。
AI.method: 定义速度误差界限，通过监督学习动态调整INS步长，使系统在次优条件下运行，同时最小化计算负载。
AI.result: 仿真与实验证明该方法有效提升计算效率且保持导航精度，框架可扩展至其他传感器融合场景。
AI.conclusion: 自适应步长学习方法在保证导航性能的同时降低计算需求，具有通用性，适用于多种传感器与平台的融合场景。

authors_text: Zhe Shen,Yudong Ma,Takeshi Tsuchiya
title: Generalized Two Color Map Theorem -- Complete Theorem of Robust Gait Plan for a Tilt-rotor
title_zh: 广义二色图定理——倾转旋翼机鲁棒步态规划完全定理
abstract: Gait plan is a procedure that is typically applied on the ground robots, e.g., quadrupedal robots; the tilt-rotor, a novel type of quadrotor with eight inputs, is not one of them. While controlling the tilt-rotor relying on feedback linearization, the tilting angles (inputs) are expected to change over-intensively, which may not be expected in the application. To help suppress the intensive change in the tilting angles, a gait plan procedure is introduced to the tilt-rotor before feedback linearization. The tilting angles are specified with time in advance by users rather than given by the control rule. However, based on this scenario, the decoupling matrix in feedback linearization can be singular for some attitudes, combinations of roll angle and pitch angle. It hinders the further application of the feedback linearization. With this concern, Two Color Map Theorem is established to maximize the acceptable attitude region, where the combinations of roll and pitch will give an invertible decoupling matrix. That theorem, however, over-restricts the choice of the tilting angles, which can rule out some feasible robust gaits. This paper gives the generalized Two Color Map Theorem; all the robust gaits can be found based on this generalized theorem. The robustness of three gaits that satisfy this generalized Two Color Map Theorem (while violating Two Color Map Theorem) are analyzed. The results show that Generalized Two Color Map Theorem completes the search for the robust gaits for a tilt-rotor.
summary: Gait plan is a procedure that is typically applied on the ground robots, e.g., quadrupedal robots; the tilt-rotor, a novel type of quadrotor with eight inputs, is not one of them. While controlling the tilt-rotor relying on feedback linearization, the tilting angles (inputs) are expected to change over-intensively, which may not be expected in the application. To help suppress the intensive change in the tilting angles, a gait plan procedure is introduced to the tilt-rotor before feedback linearization. The tilting angles are specified with time in advance by users rather than given by the control rule. However, based on this scenario, the decoupling matrix in feedback linearization can be singular for some attitudes, combinations of roll angle and pitch angle. It hinders the further application of the feedback linearization. With this concern, Two Color Map Theorem is established to maximize the acceptable attitude region, where the combinations of roll and pitch will give an invertible decoupling matrix. That theorem, however, over-restricts the choice of the tilting angles, which can rule out some feasible robust gaits. This paper gives the generalized Two Color Map Theorem; all the robust gaits can be found based on this generalized theorem. The robustness of three gaits that satisfy this generalized Two Color Map Theorem (while violating Two Color Map Theorem) are analyzed. The results show that Generalized Two Color Map Theorem completes the search for the robust gaits for a tilt-rotor.
abstract_zh: 步态计划是通常应用于地面机器人（例如四足机器人）的过程；倾转旋翼机是一种具有八个输入的新型四旋翼飞行器，但它不是其中之一。在依靠反馈线性化控制倾转旋翼时，倾斜角度（输入）预计会过度剧烈变化，这在应用中可能是不可预期的。为了帮助抑制倾斜角度的剧烈变化，在反馈线性化之前向倾斜旋翼引入步态计划程序。倾斜角度是由用户预先随时间指定的，而不是由控制规则给出的。然而，基于这种情况，反馈线性化中的解耦矩阵对于某些姿态、滚动角和俯仰角的组合可能是奇异的。它阻碍了反馈线性化的进一步应用。考虑到这一点，建立了双色图定理来最大化可接受的姿态区域，其中滚动和俯仰的组合将给出可逆的解耦矩阵。然而，该定理过度限制了倾斜角度的选择，这可能排除一些可行的稳健步态。本文给出了广义的二色图定理；所有的稳健步态都可以根据这个广义定理找到。分析了满足广义二色图定理（同时违反二色图定理）的三种步态的鲁棒性。结果表明，广义二色图定理完成了对倾转旋翼稳健步态的搜索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出广义二色图定理，用于解决倾斜旋翼飞行器在反馈线性化控制中因俯仰和滚转角组合导致解耦矩阵奇异的问题，从而完善其鲁棒步态规划。
AI.motivation: 传统反馈线性化控制在倾斜旋翼飞行器中会导致倾斜角剧烈变化，而原有二色图定理过度限制了可行步态的选择，需更全面的理论支持。
AI.method: 通过推广二色图定理，扩大可接受姿态区域，并分析符合新定理但违背旧定理的三种步态的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 广义定理能够完整搜索到所有鲁棒步态，分析表明三种新步态在实际应用中具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 广义二色图定理解决了原有理论的局限性，为倾斜旋翼飞行器的鲁棒步态规划提供了完整理论框架。

authors_text: Yu Liu,Kurt Weiss,Nassir Navab,Carsten Marr,Jan Huisken,Tingying Peng
title: DeStripe: A Self2Self Spatio-Spectral Graph Neural Network with Unfolded Hessian for Stripe Artifact Removal in Light-sheet Microscopy
title_zh: DeStripe：具有展开 Hessian 的 Self2Self 时空光谱图神经网络，用于去除光片显微镜中的条纹伪影
comment: Accepted by 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention
comments: Accepted by 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention
abstract: Light-sheet fluorescence microscopy (LSFM) is a cutting-edge volumetric imaging technique that allows for three-dimensional imaging of mesoscopic samples with decoupled illumination and detection paths. Although the selective excitation scheme of such a microscope provides intrinsic optical sectioning that minimizes out-of-focus fluorescence background and sample photodamage, it is prone to light absorption and scattering effects, which results in uneven illumination and striping artifacts in the images adversely. To tackle this issue, in this paper, we propose a blind stripe artifact removal algorithm in LSFM, called DeStripe, which combines a self-supervised spatio-spectral graph neural network with unfolded Hessian prior. Specifically, inspired by the desirable properties of Fourier transform in condensing striping information into isolated values in the frequency domain, DeStripe firstly localizes the potentially corrupted Fourier coefficients by exploiting the structural difference between unidirectional stripe artifacts and more isotropic foreground images. Affected Fourier coefficients can then be fed into a graph neural network for recovery, with a Hessian regularization unrolled to further ensure structures in the standard image space are well preserved. Since in realistic, stripe-free LSFM barely exists with a standard image acquisition protocol, DeStripe is equipped with a Self2Self denoising loss term, enabling artifact elimination without access to stripe-free ground truth images. Competitive experimental results demonstrate the efficacy of DeStripe in recovering corrupted biomarkers in LSFM with both synthetic and real stripe artifacts.
summary: Light-sheet fluorescence microscopy (LSFM) is a cutting-edge volumetric imaging technique that allows for three-dimensional imaging of mesoscopic samples with decoupled illumination and detection paths. Although the selective excitation scheme of such a microscope provides intrinsic optical sectioning that minimizes out-of-focus fluorescence background and sample photodamage, it is prone to light absorption and scattering effects, which results in uneven illumination and striping artifacts in the images adversely. To tackle this issue, in this paper, we propose a blind stripe artifact removal algorithm in LSFM, called DeStripe, which combines a self-supervised spatio-spectral graph neural network with unfolded Hessian prior. Specifically, inspired by the desirable properties of Fourier transform in condensing striping information into isolated values in the frequency domain, DeStripe firstly localizes the potentially corrupted Fourier coefficients by exploiting the structural difference between unidirectional stripe artifacts and more isotropic foreground images. Affected Fourier coefficients can then be fed into a graph neural network for recovery, with a Hessian regularization unrolled to further ensure structures in the standard image space are well preserved. Since in realistic, stripe-free LSFM barely exists with a standard image acquisition protocol, DeStripe is equipped with a Self2Self denoising loss term, enabling artifact elimination without access to stripe-free ground truth images. Competitive experimental results demonstrate the efficacy of DeStripe in recovering corrupted biomarkers in LSFM with both synthetic and real stripe artifacts.
abstract_zh: 光片荧光显微镜 (LSFM) 是一种尖端的体积成像技术，可通过解耦的照明和检测路径对介观样品进行三维成像。尽管这种显微镜的选择性激发方案提供了内在的光学切片，可以最大限度地减少离焦荧光背景和样品光损伤，但它容易产生光吸收和散射效应，从而导致图像中照明不均匀和条纹伪影。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种 LSFM 中的盲条纹伪影去除算法，称为 DeStripe，它将自监督时空谱图神经网络与展开的 Hessian 先验相结合。具体来说，受到傅里叶变换将条纹信息压缩为频域中的孤立值的理想特性的启发，DeStripe 首先通过利用单向条纹伪影和更各向同性的前景图像之间的结构差异来定位潜在损坏的傅里叶系数。然后，可以将受影响的傅里叶系数输入图神经网络进行恢复，并展开 Hessian 正则化，以进一步确保标准图像空间中的结构得到很好的保存。由于在现实中，标准图像采集协议几乎不存在无条纹 LSFM，因此 DeStripe 配备了 Self2Self 降噪损失项，无需访问无条纹地面实况图像即可消除伪影。竞争性实验结果证明了 DeStripe 在使用合成和真实条纹伪影恢复 LSFM 中损坏的生物标志物方面的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DeStripe的盲去条纹算法，用于去除光片显微镜图像中的条纹伪影。
AI.motivation: 光片显微镜虽能减少背景噪声，但易因光吸收和散射产生不均匀照明和条纹伪影，且实际中缺乏无条纹的真值图像用于训练。
AI.method: 结合自监督时空光谱图神经网络与展开的Hessian先验，利用傅里叶变换定位受损系数，通过图网络恢复并保留图像结构，采用Self2Self损失无需真值图像。
AI.result: 在合成和真实条纹数据上均表现出色，有效恢复了生物标志物的图像质量。
AI.conclusion: DeStripe无需无条纹真值即可有效去除条纹，为光片显微镜图像处理提供了新方法。

authors_text: Maureen de Seyssel,Guillaume Wisniewski,Emmanuel Dupoux
title: Is the Language Familiarity Effect gradual? A computational modelling approach
title_zh: 语言熟悉效应是渐进的吗？计算建模方法
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, accepted at CogSci 2022
comments: 8 pages, 2 figures, accepted at CogSci 2022
abstract: According to the Language Familiarity Effect (LFE), people are better at discriminating between speakers of their native language. Although this cognitive effect was largely studied in the literature, experiments have only been conducted on a limited number of language pairs and their results only show the presence of the effect without yielding a gradual measure that may vary across language pairs. In this work, we show that the computational model of LFE introduced by Thorburn, Feldmand and Schatz (2019) can address these two limitations. In a first experiment, we attest to this model's capacity to obtain a gradual measure of the LFE by replicating behavioural findings on native and accented speech. In a second experiment, we evaluate LFE on a large number of language pairs, including many which have never been tested on humans. We show that the effect is replicated across a wide array of languages, providing further evidence of its universality. Building on the gradual measure of LFE, we also show that languages belonging to the same family yield smaller scores, supporting the idea of an effect of language distance on LFE.
summary: According to the Language Familiarity Effect (LFE), people are better at discriminating between speakers of their native language. Although this cognitive effect was largely studied in the literature, experiments have only been conducted on a limited number of language pairs and their results only show the presence of the effect without yielding a gradual measure that may vary across language pairs. In this work, we show that the computational model of LFE introduced by Thorburn, Feldmand and Schatz (2019) can address these two limitations. In a first experiment, we attest to this model's capacity to obtain a gradual measure of the LFE by replicating behavioural findings on native and accented speech. In a second experiment, we evaluate LFE on a large number of language pairs, including many which have never been tested on humans. We show that the effect is replicated across a wide array of languages, providing further evidence of its universality. Building on the gradual measure of LFE, we also show that languages belonging to the same family yield smaller scores, supporting the idea of an effect of language distance on LFE.
abstract_zh: 根据语言熟悉效应（LFE），人们更善于区分母语使用者。尽管文献中大量研究了这种认知效应，但仅在有限数量的语言对上进行了实验，其结果仅显示了这种效应的存在，而没有产生可能因语言对而异的渐进测量。在这项工作中，我们证明了 Thorburn、Feldmand 和 Schatz (2019) 引入的 LFE 计算模型可以解决这两个限制。在第一个实验中，我们通过复制母语和口音语音的行为发现来证明该模型能够逐步测量 LFE。在第二个实验中，我们在大量语言对上评估 LFE，其中包括许多从未在人类身上测试过的语言对。我们证明这种效应可以在多种语言中复制，这进一步证明了其普遍性。基于 LFE 的逐步测量，我们还表明，属于同一语系的语言得分较小，支持语言距离对 LFE 影响的观点。

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算模型验证语言熟悉度效应（LFE）的渐进性，并在多种语言对中测试其普遍性。
AI.motivation: 现有实验仅验证LFE的存在，缺乏渐进性测量且测试语言对有限，需改进方法以量化效应并扩展语言覆盖范围。
AI.method: 采用Thorburn等人（2019）的计算模型，通过两个实验：1）复制人类对母语与口音语音的行为实验结果；2）在大量语言对（含未测试语言）上评估LFE。
AI.result: 模型成功量化LFE的渐进性，LFE在多语言中被复制，同一语系语言得分更低，支持语言距离影响效应强度。
AI.conclusion: 计算模型有效验证LFE的渐进性和普遍性，语言距离是影响效应的重要因素。

search_text: Is the Language Familiarity Effect gradual? A computational modelling approach 语言熟悉效应是渐进的吗？计算建模方法 According to the Language Familiarity Effect (LFE), people are better at discriminating between speakers of their native language. Although this cognitive effect was largely studied in the literature, experiments have only been conducted on a limited number of language pairs and their results only show the presence of the effect without yielding a gradual measure that may vary across language pairs. In this work, we show that the computational model of LFE introduced by Thorburn, Feldmand and Schatz (2019) can address these two limitations. In a first experiment, we attest to this model's capacity to obtain a gradual measure of the LFE by replicating behavioural findings on native and accented speech. In a second experiment, we evaluate LFE on a large number of language pairs, including many which have never been tested on humans. We show that the effect is replicated across a wide array of languages, providing further evidence of its universality. Building on the gradual measure of LFE, we also show that languages belonging to the same family yield smaller scores, supporting the idea of an effect of language distance on LFE. 根据语言熟悉效应（LFE），人们更善于区分母语使用者。尽管文献中大量研究了这种认知效应，但仅在有限数量的语言对上进行了实验，其结果仅显示了这种效应的存在，而没有产生可能因语言对而异的渐进测量。在这项工作中，我们证明了 Thorburn、Feldmand 和 Schatz (2019) 引入的 LFE 计算模型可以解决这两个限制。在第一个实验中，我们通过复制母语和口音语音的行为发现来证明该模型能够逐步测量 LFE。在第二个实验中，我们在大量语言对上评估 LFE，其中包括许多从未在人类身上测试过的语言对。我们证明这种效应可以在多种语言中复制，这进一步证明了其普遍性。基于 LFE 的逐步测量，我们还表明，属于同一语系的语言得分较小，支持语言距离对 LFE 影响的观点。 本文通过计算模型验证语言熟悉度效应（LFE）的渐进性，并在多种语言对中测试其普遍性。 Maureen de Seyssel,Guillaume Wisniewski,Emmanuel Dupoux cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yuyang Gao,Tong Steven Sun,Guangji Bai,Siyi Gu,Sungsoo Ray Hong,Liang Zhao
title: RES: A Robust Framework for Guiding Visual Explanation
title_zh: RES：用于指导视觉解释的稳健框架
comment: Published in KDD 2022
comments: Published in KDD 2022
abstract: Despite the fast progress of explanation techniques in modern Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) where the main focus is handling "how to generate the explanations", advanced research questions that examine the quality of the explanation itself (e.g., "whether the explanations are accurate") and improve the explanation quality (e.g., "how to adjust the model to generate more accurate explanations when explanations are inaccurate") are still relatively under-explored. To guide the model toward better explanations, techniques in explanation supervision - which add supervision signals on the model explanation - have started to show promising effects on improving both the generalizability as and intrinsic interpretability of Deep Neural Networks. However, the research on supervising explanations, especially in vision-based applications represented through saliency maps, is in its early stage due to several inherent challenges: 1) inaccuracy of the human explanation annotation boundary, 2) incompleteness of the human explanation annotation region, and 3) inconsistency of the data distribution between human annotation and model explanation maps. To address the challenges, we propose a generic RES framework for guiding visual explanation by developing a novel objective that handles inaccurate boundary, incomplete region, and inconsistent distribution of human annotations, with a theoretical justification on model generalizability. Extensive experiments on two real-world image datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework on enhancing both the reasonability of the explanation and the performance of the backbone DNNs model.
summary: Despite the fast progress of explanation techniques in modern Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) where the main focus is handling "how to generate the explanations", advanced research questions that examine the quality of the explanation itself (e.g., "whether the explanations are accurate") and improve the explanation quality (e.g., "how to adjust the model to generate more accurate explanations when explanations are inaccurate") are still relatively under-explored. To guide the model toward better explanations, techniques in explanation supervision - which add supervision signals on the model explanation - have started to show promising effects on improving both the generalizability as and intrinsic interpretability of Deep Neural Networks. However, the research on supervising explanations, especially in vision-based applications represented through saliency maps, is in its early stage due to several inherent challenges: 1) inaccuracy of the human explanation annotation boundary, 2) incompleteness of the human explanation annotation region, and 3) inconsistency of the data distribution between human annotation and model explanation maps. To address the challenges, we propose a generic RES framework for guiding visual explanation by developing a novel objective that handles inaccurate boundary, incomplete region, and inconsistent distribution of human annotations, with a theoretical justification on model generalizability. Extensive experiments on two real-world image datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework on enhancing both the reasonability of the explanation and the performance of the backbone DNNs model.
abstract_zh: 尽管现代深度神经网络（DNN）的解释技术取得了快速进展，主要焦点是处理“如何生成解释”，但检查解释本身的质量（例如“解释是否准确”）和提高解释质量（例如“当解释不准确时如何调整模型以生成更准确的解释”）的高级研究问题仍然相对不足。为了引导模型获得更好的解释，解释监督技术（在模型解释上添加监督信号）已经开始在提高深度神经网络的泛化性和内在可解释性方面显示出有希望的效果。然而，监督解释的研究，特别是通过显着图表示的基于视觉的应用，由于几个固有的挑战还处于早期阶段：1）人类解释注释边界的不准确，2）人类解释注释区域的不完整性，以及3）人类注释和模型解释图之间的数据分布不一致。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一个通用的 RES 框架，通过开发一个新的目标来指导视觉解释，该目标可以处理不准确的边界、不完整的区域和人类注释的不一致分布，并对模型的泛化性进行理论论证。对两个真实世界图像数据集的大量实验证明了所提出的框架在增强解释的合理性和主干 DNN 模型的性能方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RES框架，旨在通过处理人类注释的不准确边界、不完整区域和分布不一致问题，提升视觉解释的质量和深度神经网络模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注如何生成解释，但对解释准确性及如何调整模型生成更准确解释的研究不足，尤其在视觉领域面临人类注释边界不准确、区域不完整和数据分布不一致等挑战。
AI.method: 设计RES框架，引入新型目标函数，理论证明其对模型泛化能力的提升，通过处理人类注释的三大问题实现对视觉解释的引导。
AI.result: 在两个真实图像数据集上的实验表明，RES框架显著提升了解释的合理性及主干DNN模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: RES框架有效解决了人类注释与模型解释间的不一致性问题，为提升视觉解释质量提供了通用且理论支持的方法。
