authors_text: Pranay Manocha,Zeyu Jin,Adam Finkelstein
title: Audio Similarity is Unreliable as a Proxy for Audio Quality
title_zh: 音频相似度作为音频质量的代理并不可靠
comment: To Appear, Interspeech 2022
comments: To Appear, Interspeech 2022
abstract: Many audio processing tasks require perceptual assessment. However, the time and expense of obtaining ``gold standard'' human judgments limit the availability of such data. Most applications incorporate full reference or other similarity-based metrics (e.g. PESQ) that depend on a clean reference. Researchers have relied on such metrics to evaluate and compare various proposed methods, often concluding that small, measured differences imply one is more effective than another. This paper demonstrates several practical scenarios where similarity metrics fail to agree with human perception, because they: (1) vary with clean references; (2) rely on attributes that humans factor out when considering quality, and (3) are sensitive to imperceptible signal level differences. In those scenarios, we show that no-reference metrics do not suffer from such shortcomings and correlate better with human perception. We conclude therefore that similarity serves as an unreliable proxy for audio quality.
summary: Many audio processing tasks require perceptual assessment. However, the time and expense of obtaining ``gold standard'' human judgments limit the availability of such data. Most applications incorporate full reference or other similarity-based metrics (e.g. PESQ) that depend on a clean reference. Researchers have relied on such metrics to evaluate and compare various proposed methods, often concluding that small, measured differences imply one is more effective than another. This paper demonstrates several practical scenarios where similarity metrics fail to agree with human perception, because they: (1) vary with clean references; (2) rely on attributes that humans factor out when considering quality, and (3) are sensitive to imperceptible signal level differences. In those scenarios, we show that no-reference metrics do not suffer from such shortcomings and correlate better with human perception. We conclude therefore that similarity serves as an unreliable proxy for audio quality.
abstract_zh: 许多音频处理任务需要感知评估。然而，获得“黄金标准”人类判断的时间和费用限制了此类数据的可用性。大多数应用程序都包含完整的参考或其他基于相似性的指标（例如 PESQ），这些指标依赖于干净的参考。研究人员依靠这些指标来评估和比较各种提出的方​​法，通常得出的结论是，微小的、可测量的差异意味着一种方法比另一种方法更有效。本文演示了几种相似性度量与人类感知不一致的实际场景，因为它们：（1）随着干净的参考而变化； (2) 依赖于人类在考虑质量时排除的属性，(3) 对难以察觉的信号电平差异敏感。在这些场景中，我们表明无参考指标不会遭受这些缺点，并且与人类感知更好地相关。因此我们得出结论，相似性作为音频质量的不可靠代理。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨音频相似度指标作为音频质量代理的不可靠性，并揭示其局限性。
AI.motivation: 由于获取人类感知评估数据成本高，现有方法依赖相似度指标，但需验证其与人类感知的一致性。
AI.method: 通过对比不同场景下的相似度指标与无参考指标，分析其与人类感知评估的相关性。
AI.result: 结果显示相似度指标在参考信号变化、忽略感知因素和微小信号差异时表现不佳，而无参考指标更符合人类判断。
AI.conclusion: 结论为音频相似度无法可靠替代音频质量评估，应采用无参考指标。

ai_content_json.method: 通过对比不同场景下的相似度指标与无参考指标，分析其与人类感知评估的相关性。
ai_content_json.result: 结果显示相似度指标在参考信号变化、忽略感知因素和微小信号差异时表现不佳，而无参考指标更符合人类判断。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 结论为音频相似度无法可靠替代音频质量评估，应采用无参考指标。

search_text: Audio Similarity is Unreliable as a Proxy for Audio Quality 音频相似度作为音频质量的代理并不可靠 Many audio processing tasks require perceptual assessment. However, the time and expense of obtaining ``gold standard'' human judgments limit the availability of such data. Most applications incorporate full reference or other similarity-based metrics (e.g. PESQ) that depend on a clean reference. Researchers have relied on such metrics to evaluate and compare various proposed methods, often concluding that small, measured differences imply one is more effective than another. This paper demonstrates several practical scenarios where similarity metrics fail to agree with human perception, because they: (1) vary with clean references; (2) rely on attributes that humans factor out when considering quality, and (3) are sensitive to imperceptible signal level differences. In those scenarios, we show that no-reference metrics do not suffer from such shortcomings and correlate better with human perception. We conclude therefore that similarity serves as an unreliable proxy for audio quality. 许多音频处理任务需要感知评估。然而，获得“黄金标准”人类判断的时间和费用限制了此类数据的可用性。大多数应用程序都包含完整的参考或其他基于相似性的指标（例如 PESQ），这些指标依赖于干净的参考。研究人员依靠这些指标来评估和比较各种提出的方​​法，通常得出的结论是，微小的、可测量的差异意味着一种方法比另一种方法更有效。本文演示了几种相似性度量与人类感知不一致的实际场景，因为它们：（1）随着干净的参考而变化； (2) 依赖于人类在考虑质量时排除的属性，(3) 对难以察觉的信号电平差异敏感。在这些场景中，我们表明无参考指标不会遭受这些缺点，并且与人类感知更好地相关。因此我们得出结论，相似性作为音频质量的不可靠代理。 本文探讨音频相似度指标作为音频质量代理的不可靠性，并揭示其局限性。 Pranay Manocha,Zeyu Jin,Adam Finkelstein eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Claus Smitt,Michael Halstead,Alireza Ahmadi,Chris McCool
title: Explicitly incorporating spatial information to recurrent networks for agriculture
title_zh: 将空间信息明确纳入农业循环网络
abstract: In agriculture, the majority of vision systems perform still image classification. Yet, recent work has highlighted the potential of spatial and temporal cues as a rich source of information to improve the classification performance. In this paper, we propose novel approaches to explicitly capture both spatial and temporal information to improve the classification of deep convolutional neural networks. We leverage available RGB-D images and robot odometry to perform inter-frame feature map spatial registration. This information is then fused within recurrent deep learnt models, to improve their accuracy and robustness. We demonstrate that this can considerably improve the classification performance with our best performing spatial-temporal model (ST-Atte) achieving absolute performance improvements for intersection-over-union (IoU[%]) of 4.7 for crop-weed segmentation and 2.6 for fruit (sweet pepper) segmentation. Furthermore, we show that these approaches are robust to variable framerates and odometry errors, which are frequently observed in real-world applications.
summary: In agriculture, the majority of vision systems perform still image classification. Yet, recent work has highlighted the potential of spatial and temporal cues as a rich source of information to improve the classification performance. In this paper, we propose novel approaches to explicitly capture both spatial and temporal information to improve the classification of deep convolutional neural networks. We leverage available RGB-D images and robot odometry to perform inter-frame feature map spatial registration. This information is then fused within recurrent deep learnt models, to improve their accuracy and robustness. We demonstrate that this can considerably improve the classification performance with our best performing spatial-temporal model (ST-Atte) achieving absolute performance improvements for intersection-over-union (IoU[%]) of 4.7 for crop-weed segmentation and 2.6 for fruit (sweet pepper) segmentation. Furthermore, we show that these approaches are robust to variable framerates and odometry errors, which are frequently observed in real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 在农业中，大多数视觉系统执行静态图像分类。然而，最近的工作强调了空间和时间线索作为丰富的信息源来提高分类性能的潜力。在本文中，我们提出了显式捕获空间和时间信息的新方法，以改进深度卷积神经网络的分类。我们利用可用的 RGB-D 图像和机器人里程计来执行帧间特征图空间配准。然后将这些信息融合到循环深度学习模型中，以提高其准确性和鲁棒性。我们证明，这可以显着提高分类性能，我们性能最佳的时空模型 (ST-Atte) 的交叉联合 (IoU[%]) 的绝对性能改进为作物-杂草分割 4.7 和水果（甜椒）分割 2.6。此外，我们表明这些方法对于可变帧率和里程计误差具有鲁棒性，这些误差在实际应用中经常观察到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将空间和时间信息显式结合到循环网络中，以提升农业场景下的图像分类性能，特别是在作物-杂草和水果分割任务中。
AI.motivation: 传统农业视觉系统依赖静态图像分类，而空间和时间线索能提供更丰富的信息，有助于提升分类准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 利用RGB-D图像和机器人里程计实现帧间特征图空间配准，并将空间信息与时间信息融合至循环神经网络（如ST-Atte模型）中。
AI.result: ST-Atte模型在作物-杂草分割任务中提升4.7% IoU，在甜椒分割任务中提升2.6% IoU，且对变帧率和里程计误差具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 显式融合空间-时间信息可显著提升农业图像分类性能，且方法适用于实际应用中的复杂环境条件。

authors_text: Georg Siedel,Silvia Vock,Andrey Morozov,Stefan Voß
title: Utilizing Class Separation Distance for the Evaluation of Corruption Robustness of Machine Learning Classifiers
title_zh: 利用类分离距离评估机器学习分类器的腐败鲁棒性
comment: Accepted for the IJCAI-ECAI-22 Workshop on Artificial Intelligence Safety (AISafety 2022) We made an important correction in the abstract compared to the published version, changing "mean corruption corruption robustness" to "minimal separation corruption robustness" which is the correct name of our proposed metric
comments: Accepted for the IJCAI-ECAI-22 Workshop on Artificial Intelligence Safety (AISafety 2022) We made an important correction in the abstract compared to the published version, changing "mean corruption corruption robustness" to "minimal separation corruption robustness" which is the correct name of our proposed metric
abstract: Robustness is a fundamental pillar of Machine Learning (ML) classifiers, substantially determining their reliability. Methods for assessing classifier robustness are therefore essential. In this work, we address the challenge of evaluating corruption robustness in a way that allows comparability and interpretability on a given dataset. We propose a test data augmentation method that uses a robustness distance $ε$ derived from the datasets minimal class separation distance. The resulting MSCR (minimal separation corruption robustness) metric allows a dataset-specific comparison of different classifiers with respect to their corruption robustness. The MSCR value is interpretable, as it represents the classifiers avoidable loss of accuracy due to statistical corruptions. On 2D and image data, we show that the metric reflects different levels of classifier robustness. Furthermore, we observe unexpected optima in classifiers robust accuracy through training and testing classifiers with different levels of noise. While researchers have frequently reported on a significant tradeoff on accuracy when training robust models, we strengthen the view that a tradeoff between accuracy and corruption robustness is not inherent. Our results indicate that robustness training through simple data augmentation can already slightly improve accuracy.
summary: Robustness is a fundamental pillar of Machine Learning (ML) classifiers, substantially determining their reliability. Methods for assessing classifier robustness are therefore essential. In this work, we address the challenge of evaluating corruption robustness in a way that allows comparability and interpretability on a given dataset. We propose a test data augmentation method that uses a robustness distance $ε$ derived from the datasets minimal class separation distance. The resulting MSCR (minimal separation corruption robustness) metric allows a dataset-specific comparison of different classifiers with respect to their corruption robustness. The MSCR value is interpretable, as it represents the classifiers avoidable loss of accuracy due to statistical corruptions. On 2D and image data, we show that the metric reflects different levels of classifier robustness. Furthermore, we observe unexpected optima in classifiers robust accuracy through training and testing classifiers with different levels of noise. While researchers have frequently reported on a significant tradeoff on accuracy when training robust models, we strengthen the view that a tradeoff between accuracy and corruption robustness is not inherent. Our results indicate that robustness training through simple data augmentation can already slightly improve accuracy.
abstract_zh: 鲁棒性是机器学习 (ML) 分类器的基本支柱，在很大程度上决定了其可靠性。因此，评估分类器稳健性的方法至关重要。在这项工作中，我们解决了以允许给定数据集的可比性和可解释性的方式评估腐败鲁棒性的挑战。我们提出了一种测试数据增强方法，该方法使用从数据集最小类分离距离派生的鲁棒性距离 $ε$。由此产生的 MSCR（最小分离损坏稳健性）指标允许对不同分类器的损坏稳健性进行特定于数据集的比较。 MSCR 值是可解释的，因为它代表分类器由于统计损坏而可避免的准确性损失。在 2D 和图像数据上，我们表明该指标反映了不同级别的分类器鲁棒性。此外，通过使用不同噪声水平训练和测试分类器，我们观察到分类器鲁棒准确性的意外优化。虽然研究人员经常报告在训练鲁棒模型时对准确性的重大权衡，但我们强化了这样的观点：准确性和腐败鲁棒性之间的权衡并不是固有的。我们的结果表明，通过简单的数据增强进行鲁棒性训练已经可以稍微提高准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类别分离距离的MSCR指标，用于评估机器学习分类器在数据污染下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有分类器鲁棒性评估方法缺乏可比性和可解释性，需建立与数据集相关的可解释评估体系。
AI.method: 通过计算数据集最小类别分离距离生成鲁棒性距离ε，结合测试数据增强方法构建MSCR指标，量化分类器因统计污染导致的准确率损失。
AI.result: 在二维数据和图像数据上验证了MSCR指标的有效性，发现鲁棒性训练可通过简单数据增强略微提升准确率，且准确率与鲁棒性之间不存在必然权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: MSCR指标为分类器鲁棒性比较提供数据集特异性评估框架，证明通过数据增强提升鲁棒性无需显著牺牲准确率。

In this work, we address the challenge of evaluating corruption robustness in a way that allows comparability and interpretability on a given dataset. On 2D and image data, we show that the metric reflects different levels of classifier robustness. Furthermore, we observe unexpected optima in classifiers robust accuracy through training and testing classifiers with different levels of noise. While researchers have frequently reported on a significant tradeoff on accuracy when training robust models, we strengthen the view that a tradeoff between accuracy and corruption robustness is not inherent. Our results indicate that robustness training through simple data augmentation can already slightly improve accuracy. 鲁棒性是机器学习 (ML) 分类器的基本支柱，在很大程度上决定了其可靠性。因此，评估分类器稳健性的方法至关重要。在这项工作中，我们解决了以允许给定数据集的可比性和可解释性的方式评估腐败鲁棒性的挑战。我们提出了一种测试数据增强方法，该方法使用从数据集最小类分离距离派生的鲁棒性距离 $ε$。由此产生的 MSCR（最小分离损坏稳健性）指标允许对不同分类器的损坏稳健性进行特定于数据集的比较。 MSCR 值是可解释的，因为它代表分类器由于统计损坏而可避免的准确性损失。在 2D 和图像数据上，我们表明该指标反映了不同级别的分类器鲁棒性。此外，通过使用不同噪声水平训练和测试分类器，我们观察到分类器鲁棒准确性的意外优化。虽然研究人员经常报告在训练鲁棒模型时对准确性的重大权衡，但我们强化了这样的观点：准确性和腐败鲁棒性之间的权衡并不是固有的。我们的结果表明，通过简单的数据增强进行鲁棒性训练已经可以稍微提高准确性。 本文提出一种基于类别分离距离的MSCR指标，用于评估机器学习分类器在数据污染下的鲁棒性。 Georg Siedel,Silvia Vock,Andrey Morozov,Stefan Voß cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Taejun Bak,Junmo Lee,Hanbin Bae,Jinhyeok Yang,Jae-Sung Bae,Young-Sun Joo
title: Avocodo: Generative Adversarial Network for Artifact-free Vocoder
title_zh: Avocodo：用于无伪影声码器的生成对抗网络
comment: Accepted for publication in the 37th AAAI conference on artificial intelligence (AAAI 2023)
comments: Accepted for publication in the 37th AAAI conference on artificial intelligence (AAAI 2023)
abstract: Neural vocoders based on the generative adversarial neural network (GAN) have been widely used due to their fast inference speed and lightweight networks while generating high-quality speech waveforms. Since the perceptually important speech components are primarily concentrated in the low-frequency bands, most GAN-based vocoders perform multi-scale analysis that evaluates downsampled speech waveforms. This multi-scale analysis helps the generator improve speech intelligibility. However, in preliminary experiments, we discovered that the multi-scale analysis which focuses on the low-frequency bands causes unintended artifacts, e.g., aliasing and imaging artifacts, which degrade the synthesized speech waveform quality. Therefore, in this paper, we investigate the relationship between these artifacts and GAN-based vocoders and propose a GAN-based vocoder, called Avocodo, that allows the synthesis of high-fidelity speech with reduced artifacts. We introduce two kinds of discriminators to evaluate speech waveforms in various perspectives: a collaborative multi-band discriminator and a sub-band discriminator. We also utilize a pseudo quadrature mirror filter bank to obtain downsampled multi-band speech waveforms while avoiding aliasing. According to experimental results, Avocodo outperforms baseline GAN-based vocoders, both objectively and subjectively, while reproducing speech with fewer artifacts.

Since the perceptually important speech components are primarily concentrated in the low-frequency bands, most GAN-based vocoders perform multi-scale analysis that evaluates downsampled speech waveforms. This multi-scale analysis helps the generator improve speech intelligibility. However, in preliminary experiments, we discovered that the multi-scale analysis which focuses on the low-frequency bands causes unintended artifacts, e.g., aliasing and imaging artifacts, which degrade the synthesized speech waveform quality. Therefore, in this paper, we investigate the relationship between these artifacts and GAN-based vocoders and propose a GAN-based vocoder, called Avocodo, that allows the synthesis of high-fidelity speech with reduced artifacts. We introduce two kinds of discriminators to evaluate speech waveforms in various perspectives: a collaborative multi-band discriminator and a sub-band discriminator. We also utilize a pseudo quadrature mirror filter bank to obtain downsampled multi-band speech waveforms while avoiding aliasing. According to experimental results, Avocodo outperforms baseline GAN-based vocoders, both objectively and subjectively, while reproducing speech with fewer artifacts.
abstract_zh: 基于生成对抗性神经网络（GAN）的神经声码器因其推理速度快、网络轻量化而在生成高质量语音波形的同时得到了广泛的应用。由于感知上重要的语音成分主要集中在低频段，因此大多数基于 GAN 的声码器都会执行多尺度分析来评估下采样的语音波形。这种多尺度分析有助于生成器提高语音清晰度。然而，在初步实验中，我们发现专注于低频段的多尺度分析会导致意外的伪影，例如混叠和成像伪影，从而降低合成语音波形的质量。因此，在本文中，我们研究了这些伪影和基于 GAN 的声码器之间的关系，并提出了一种基于 GAN 的声码器，称为 Avocodo，它允许合成具有减少伪影的高保真语音。我们引入两种鉴别器来从不同角度评估语音波形：协作多频带鉴别器和子带鉴别器。我们还利用伪正交镜像滤波器组来获得下采样的多频带语音波形，同时避免混叠。根据实验结果，Avocodo 在客观和主观上都优于基于 GAN 的基线声码器，同时以更少的伪影再现语音。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的无伪影语音合成器Avocodo，旨在解决现有GAN声码器在多尺度分析中产生的混叠和成像伪影问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN声码器通过多尺度分析低频带提升语音可懂度，但会导致混叠和成像伪影，降低合成语音质量。需探索伪影与GAN声码器的关系并提出改进方案。
AI.method: 设计两种判别器（多频带协作判别器和子带判别器）从不同视角评估语音波形，并引入伪正交镜像滤波器组实现无混叠的多频带降采样。
AI.result: 实验表明Avocodo在客观和主观指标上均优于基线GAN声码器，合成语音伪影显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 通过多尺度频域分析与新型判别器设计，Avocodo有效抑制了GAN声码器的伪影，实现了高保真语音合成。

authors_text: Bruno Casella,Alessio Barbaro Chisari,Sebastiano Battiato,Mario Valerio Giuffrida
title: Transfer Learning via Test-Time Neural Networks Aggregation
title_zh: 通过测试时神经网络聚合进行迁移学习
comment: 8 pages
comments: 8 pages
abstract: It has been demonstrated that deep neural networks outperform traditional machine learning. However, deep networks lack generalisability, that is, they will not perform as good as in a new (testing) set drawn from a different distribution due to the domain shift. In order to tackle this known issue, several transfer learning approaches have been proposed, where the knowledge of a trained model is transferred into another to improve performance with different data. However, most of these approaches require additional training steps, or they suffer from catastrophic forgetting that occurs when a trained model has overwritten previously learnt knowledge. We address both problems with a novel transfer learning approach that uses network aggregation. We train dataset-specific networks together with an aggregation network in a unified framework. The loss function includes two main components: a task-specific loss (such as cross-entropy) and an aggregation loss. The proposed aggregation loss allows our model to learn how trained deep network parameters can be aggregated with an aggregation operator. We demonstrate that the proposed approach learns model aggregation at test time without any further training step, reducing the burden of transfer learning to a simple arithmetical operation. The proposed approach achieves comparable performance w.r.t. the baseline. Besides, if the aggregation operator has an inverse, we will show that our model also inherently allows for selective forgetting, i.e., the aggregated model can forget one of the datasets it was trained on, retaining information on the others.
summary: It has been demonstrated that deep neural networks outperform traditional machine learning. However, deep networks lack generalisability, that is, they will not perform as good as in a new (testing) set drawn from a different distribution due to the domain shift. In order to tackle this known issue, several transfer learning approaches have been proposed, where the knowledge of a trained model is transferred into another to improve performance with different data. However, most of these approaches require additional training steps, or they suffer from catastrophic forgetting that occurs when a trained model has overwritten previously learnt knowledge. We address both problems with a novel transfer learning approach that uses network aggregation. We train dataset-specific networks together with an aggregation network in a unified framework. The loss function includes two main components: a task-specific loss (such as cross-entropy) and an aggregation loss. The proposed aggregation loss allows our model to learn how trained deep network parameters can be aggregated with an aggregation operator. We demonstrate that the proposed approach learns model aggregation at test time without any further training step, reducing the burden of transfer learning to a simple arithmetical operation. The proposed approach achieves comparable performance w.r.t. the baseline. Besides, if the aggregation operator has an inverse, we will show that our model also inherently allows for selective forgetting, i.e., the aggregated model can forget one of the datasets it was trained on, retaining information on the others.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，深度神经网络优于传统机器学习。然而，深度网络缺乏通用性，也就是说，由于域转移，它们的性能不如从不同分布抽取的新（测试）集中表现得那么好。为了解决这个已知问题，人们提出了几种迁移学习方法，将经过训练的模型的知识转移到另一个模型中，以提高不同数据的性能。然而，这些方法中的大多数都需要额外的训练步骤，或者当经过训练的模型覆盖了先前学习的知识时，就会发生灾难性的遗忘。我们通过使用网络聚合的新型迁移学习方法来解决这两个问题。我们在统一框架中训练特定于数据集的网络和聚合网络。损失函数包括两个主要组成部分：特定于任务的损失（例如交叉熵）和聚合损失。所提出的聚合损失使我们的模型能够学习如何使用聚合算子聚合经过训练的深度网络参数。我们证明了所提出的方法在测试时学习模型聚合，无需任何进一步的训练步骤，从而将迁移学习的负担减轻为简单的算术运算。所提出的方法实现了可比的性能。基线。此外，如果聚合算子有逆，我们将证明我们的模型本质上也允许选择性遗忘，即聚合模型可以忘记它所训练的数据集之一，而保留其他数据集的信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需额外训练步骤的迁移学习方法，通过测试时神经网络聚合解决领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 深度网络在领域偏移场景下泛化能力不足，现有迁移方法需额外训练或面临灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 构建统一框架联合训练数据集特定网络与聚合网络，损失函数包含任务损失和聚合损失，通过算子实现参数聚合。
AI.result: 方法在无需再训练情况下达到基线性能，且支持逆算子下的选择性遗忘能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法将迁移学习简化为算术操作，同时具备选择性遗忘特性，提升迁移效率与灵活性。

search_text: Transfer Learning via Test-Time Neural Networks Aggregation 通过测试时神经网络聚合进行迁移学习 It has been demonstrated that deep neural networks outperform traditional machine learning. However, most of these approaches require additional training steps, or they suffer from catastrophic forgetting that occurs when a trained model has overwritten previously learnt knowledge. We address both problems with a novel transfer learning approach that uses network aggregation. We train dataset-specific networks together with an aggregation network in a unified framework. The loss function includes two main components: a task-specific loss (such as cross-entropy) and an aggregation loss. The proposed aggregation loss allows our model to learn how trained deep network parameters can be aggregated with an aggregation operator. We demonstrate that the proposed approach learns model aggregation at test time without any further training step, reducing the burden of transfer learning to a simple arithmetical operation. The proposed approach achieves comparable performance w.r.t. the baseline. authors_text: Youlong Ding,Xueyang Wu,Zhitao Li,Zeheng Wu,Shengqi Tan,Qian Xu,Weike Pan,Qiang Yang
title: An Efficient Industrial Federated Learning Framework for AIoT: A Face Recognition Application
title_zh: AIoT高效工业联邦学习框架：人脸识别应用
comment: FL-IJCAL'22 Accepted Paper
comments: FL-IJCAL'22 Accepted Paper
abstract: Recently, the artificial intelligence of things (AIoT) has been gaining increasing attention, with an intriguing vision of providing highly intelligent services through the network connection of things, leading to an advanced AI-driven ecology. However, recent regulatory restrictions on data privacy preclude uploading sensitive local data to data centers and utilizing them in a centralized approach. Directly applying federated learning algorithms in this scenario could hardly meet the industrial requirements of both efficiency and accuracy. Therefore, we propose an efficient industrial federated learning framework for AIoT in terms of a face recognition application. Specifically, we propose to utilize the concept of transfer learning to speed up federated training on devices and further present a novel design of a private projector that helps protect shared gradients without incurring additional memory consumption or computational cost. Empirical studies on a private Asian face dataset show that our approach can achieve high recognition accuracy in only 20 communication rounds, demonstrating its effectiveness in prediction and its efficiency in training.
summary: Recently, the artificial intelligence of things (AIoT) has been gaining increasing attention, with an intriguing vision of providing highly intelligent services through the network connection of things, leading to an advanced AI-driven ecology. However, recent regulatory restrictions on data privacy preclude uploading sensitive local data to data centers and utilizing them in a centralized approach. Directly applying federated learning algorithms in this scenario could hardly meet the industrial requirements of both efficiency and accuracy. Therefore, we propose an efficient industrial federated learning framework for AIoT in terms of a face recognition application. Specifically, we propose to utilize the concept of transfer learning to speed up federated training on devices and further present a novel design of a private projector that helps protect shared gradients without incurring additional memory consumption or computational cost. Empirical studies on a private Asian face dataset show that our approach can achieve high recognition accuracy in only 20 communication rounds, demonstrating its effectiveness in prediction and its efficiency in training.
abstract_zh: 近年来，物联网人工智能（AIoT）越来越受到关注，其愿景是通过物联网提供高度智能的服务，形成先进的人工智能驱动的生态。然而，最近对数据隐私的监管限制阻碍了将敏感的本地数据上传到数据中心并以集中的方式利用它们。在这种场景下直接应用联邦学习算法很难同时满足工业界对效率和准确性的要求。因此，我们在人脸识别应用方面提出了一种高效的AIoT工业联邦学习框架。具体来说，我们建议利用迁移学习的概念来加速设备上的联合训练，并进一步提出一种私人投影仪的新颖设计，有助于保护共享梯度，而不会产生额外的内存消耗或计算成本。对亚洲私人人脸数据集的实证研究表明，我们的方法只需 20 轮通信即可实现较高的识别准确率，证明了其预测的有效性和训练的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的工业级联邦学习框架，针对AIoT场景下的人脸识别应用，解决数据隐私限制下的训练效率与准确率问题。
AI.motivation: 数据隐私法规禁止上传敏感本地数据至中心服务器，传统联邦学习难以满足工业场景对训练效率和模型精度的双重需求。
AI.method: 结合迁移学习加速设备端联邦训练，设计无需额外计算/存储开销的私有投影器保护共享梯度。
AI.result: 在亚洲人脸数据集上仅需20轮通信即达成高识别准确率，验证了方法在预测精度与训练效率上的双重优势。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了工业AIoT场景下的隐私保护、训练效率与模型性能需求，为联邦学习实际部署提供可行方案。

search_text: An Efficient Industrial Federated Learning Framework for AIoT: A Face Recognition Application AIoT高效工业联邦学习框架：人脸识别应用 Recently, the artificial intelligence of things (AIoT) has been gaining increasing attention, with an intriguing vision of providing highly intelligent services through the network connection of things, leading to an advanced AI-driven ecology. However, recent regulatory restrictions on data privacy preclude uploading sensitive local data to data centers and utilizing them in a centralized approach. Directly applying federated learning algorithms in this scenario could hardly meet the industrial requirements of both efficiency and accuracy. Therefore, we propose an efficient industrial federated learning framework for AIoT in terms of a face recognition application. Specifically, we propose to utilize the concept of transfer learning to speed up federated training on devices and further present a novel design of a private projector that helps protect shared gradients without incurring additional memory consumption or computational cost. Empirical studies on a private Asian face dataset show that our approach can achieve high recognition accuracy in only 20 communication rounds, demonstrating its effectiveness in prediction and its efficiency in training. 近年来，物联网人工智能（AIoT）越来越受到关注，其愿景是通过物联网提供高度智能的服务，形成先进的人工智能驱动的生态。然而，最近对数据隐私的监管限制阻碍了将敏感的本地数据上传到数据中心并以集中的方式利用它们。在这种场景下直接应用联邦学习算法很难同时满足工业界对效率和准确性的要求。因此，我们在人脸识别应用方面提出了一种高效的AIoT工业联邦学习框架。具体来说，我们建议利用迁移学习的概念来加速设备上的联合训练，并进一步提出一种私人投影仪的新颖设计，有助于保护共享梯度，而不会产生额外的内存消耗或计算成本。对亚洲私人人脸数据集的实证研究表明，我们的方法只需 20 轮通信即可实现较高的识别准确率，证明了其预测的有效性和训练的效率。 本文提出一种高效的工业级联邦学习框架，针对AIoT场景下的人脸识别应用，解决数据隐私限制下的训练效率与准确率问题。 Youlong Ding,Xueyang Wu,Zhitao Li,Zeheng Wu,Shengqi Tan,Qian Xu,Weike Pan,Qiang Yang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Severi Rissanen,Markus Heinonen,Arno Solin
title: Generative Modelling With Inverse Heat Dissipation
title_zh: 逆热耗散生成模型
abstract: While diffusion models have shown great success in image generation, their noise-inverting generative process does not explicitly consider the structure of images, such as their inherent multi-scale nature. Inspired by diffusion models and the empirical success of coarse-to-fine modelling, we propose a new diffusion-like model that generates images through stochastically reversing the heat equation, a PDE that locally erases fine-scale information when run over the 2D plane of the image. We interpret the solution of the forward heat equation with constant additive noise as a variational approximation in the diffusion latent variable model. Our new model shows emergent qualitative properties not seen in standard diffusion models, such as disentanglement of overall colour and shape in images. Spectral analysis on natural images highlights connections to diffusion models and reveals an implicit coarse-to-fine inductive bias in them.
summary: While diffusion models have shown great success in image generation, their noise-inverting generative process does not explicitly consider the structure of images, such as their inherent multi-scale nature. Inspired by diffusion models and the empirical success of coarse-to-fine modelling, we propose a new diffusion-like model that generates images through stochastically reversing the heat equation, a PDE that locally erases fine-scale information when run over the 2D plane of the image. We interpret the solution of the forward heat equation with constant additive noise as a variational approximation in the diffusion latent variable model. Our new model shows emergent qualitative properties not seen in standard diffusion models, such as disentanglement of overall colour and shape in images. Spectral analysis on natural images highlights connections to diffusion models and reveals an implicit coarse-to-fine inductive bias in them.
abstract_zh: 虽然扩散模型在图像生成方面取得了巨大成功，但其噪声反演生成过程并未明确考虑图像的结构，例如其固有的多尺度性质。受扩散模型和从粗到精建模的经验成功的启发，我们提出了一种新的类扩散模型，该模型通过随机反转热方程生成图像，这是一种在图像的 2D 平面上运行时局部擦除精细尺度信息的偏微分方程。我们将具有恒定附加噪声的正向热方程的解解释为扩散潜变量模型中的变分近似。我们的新模型显示了标准扩散模型中未见的新兴定性特性，例如图像中整体颜色和形状的解开。对自然图像的光谱分析突出了与扩散模型的联系，并揭示了其中隐含的从粗到细的归纳偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于逆热方程的生成模型，通过模拟热扩散的逆过程实现图像生成，改进传统扩散模型对图像多尺度结构的建模不足。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散模型虽在图像生成中表现优异，但其噪声逆过程未显式考虑图像的多尺度结构特性，导致生成结果缺乏对全局与局部特征的解耦能力。
AI.method: 将热方程的逆过程与扩散模型结合，通过随机反转二维图像平面的热扩散过程生成图像，并将带常数噪声的正向热方程解解释为扩散潜在变量模型的变分近似。
AI.result: 新模型实现了图像颜色与形状的解耦，谱分析揭示了其与扩散模型的关联性，并显式体现了隐含的从粗到细归纳偏置。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过物理启发的热方程逆过程改进了生成模型的结构感知能力，同时揭示了扩散模型中潜在的多尺度建模机制，为生成模型设计提供新思路。

authors_text: Brandon Trabucco,Gunnar Sigurdsson,Robinson Piramuthu,Gaurav S. Sukhatme,Ruslan Salakhutdinov
title: A Simple Approach for Visual Rearrangement: 3D Mapping and Semantic Search
title_zh: 视觉重排的简单方法：3D 映射和语义搜索
comment: Winner of the Rearrangement Challenge at CVPR 2022
comments: Winner of the Rearrangement Challenge at CVPR 2022
abstract: Physically rearranging objects is an important capability for embodied agents. Visual room rearrangement evaluates an agent's ability to rearrange objects in a room to a desired goal based solely on visual input. We propose a simple yet effective method for this problem: (1) search for and map which objects need to be rearranged, and (2) rearrange each object until the task is complete. Our approach consists of an off-the-shelf semantic segmentation model, voxel-based semantic map, and semantic search policy to efficiently find objects that need to be rearranged. On the AI2-THOR Rearrangement Challenge, our method improves on current state-of-the-art end-to-end reinforcement learning-based methods that learn visual rearrangement policies from 0.53% correct rearrangement to 16.56%, using only 2.7% as many samples from the environment.
summary: Physically rearranging objects is an important capability for embodied agents. Visual room rearrangement evaluates an agent's ability to rearrange objects in a room to a desired goal based solely on visual input. We propose a simple yet effective method for this problem: (1) search for and map which objects need to be rearranged, and (2) rearrange each object until the task is complete. Our approach consists of an off-the-shelf semantic segmentation model, voxel-based semantic map, and semantic search policy to efficiently find objects that need to be rearranged. On the AI2-THOR Rearrangement Challenge, our method improves on current state-of-the-art end-to-end reinforcement learning-based methods that learn visual rearrangement policies from 0.53% correct rearrangement to 16.56%, using only 2.7% as many samples from the environment.
abstract_zh: 物理上重新排列对象是实体代理的一项重要能力。视觉房间重新排列评估智能体仅根据视觉输入将房间中的物体重新排列到所需目标的能力。我们针对这个问题提出了一种简单而有效的方法：（1）搜索并映射哪些对象需要重新排列，（2）重新排列每个对象直到任务完成。我们的方法包括现成的语义分割模型、基于体素的语义图和语义搜索策略，以有效地查找需要重新排列的对象。在 AI2-THOR 重排挑战中，我们的方法改进了当前最先进的基于端到端强化学习的方法，该方法将视觉重排策略从 0.53% 的正确重排率提高到 16.56%，仅使用环境中 2.7% 的样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D映射和语义搜索的简单有效方法，用于通过视觉输入实现房间内物体的重新排列。
AI.motivation: 物理重排物体是具身智能体的重要能力，但现有端到端强化学习方法样本效率低且效果差（仅0.53%正确率），需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 结合现成语义分割模型、体素语义地图和语义搜索策略，分两步完成任务：1）识别需重排物体，2）逐个执行重排操作。
AI.result: 在AI2-THOR重排挑战中，仅用2.7%样本量便将正确率提升至16.56%，超越现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模块化设计和语义理解显著提升了视觉重排任务的样本效率与成功率，验证了分步策略的有效性。

motivation: 物理重排物体是具身智能体的重要能力，但现有端到端强化学习方法样本效率低且效果差（仅0.53%正确率），需更高效解决方案。
method: 结合现成语义分割模型、体素语义地图和语义搜索策略，分两步完成任务：1）识别需重排物体，2）逐个执行重排操作。
result: 在AI2-THOR重排挑战中，仅用2.7%样本量便将正确率提升至16.56%，超越现有最佳方法。
conclusion: 该方法通过模块化设计和语义理解显著提升了视觉重排任务的样本效率与成功率，验证了分步策略的有效性。
search_text: A Simple Approach for Visual Rearrangement: 3D Mapping and Semantic Search 视觉重排的简单方法：3D 映射和语义搜索 Physically rearranging objects is an important capability for embodied agents. Visual room rearrangement evaluates an agent's ability to rearrange objects in a room to a desired goal based solely on visual input. We propose a simple yet effective method for this problem: (1) search for and map which objects need to be rearranged, and (2) rearrange each object until the task is complete. Our approach consists of an off-the-shelf semantic segmentation model, voxel-based semantic map, and semantic search policy to efficiently find objects that need to be rearranged. On the AI2-THOR Rearrangement Challenge, our method improves on current state-of-the-art end-to-end reinforcement learning-based methods that learn visual rearrangement policies from 0.53% correct rearrangement to 16.56%, using only 2.7% as many samples from the environment. 物理上重新排列对象是实体代理的一项重要能力。视觉房间重新排列评估智能体仅根据视觉输入将房间中的物体重新排列到所需目标的能力。我们针对这个问题提出了一种简单而有效的方法：（1）搜索并映射哪些对象需要重新排列，（2）重新排列每个对象直到任务完成。我们的方法包括现成的语义分割模型、基于体素的语义图和语义搜索策略，以有效地查找需要重新排列的对象。在 AI2-THOR 重排挑战中，我们的方法改进了当前最先进的基于端到端强化学习的方法，该方法将视觉重排策略从 0.53% 的正确重排率提高到 16.56%，仅使用环境中 2.7% 的样本。 本文提出了一种基于3D映射和语义搜索的简单有效方法，用于通过视觉输入实现房间内物体的重新排列。 Brandon Trabucco,Gunnar Sigurdsson,Robinson Piramuthu,Gaurav S. Sukhatme,Ruslan Salakhutdinov cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Abhishek Paul,Manav Mukesh Jain,Jinesh Jain,Pratik Chattopadhyay
title: Gait Cycle Reconstruction and Human Identification from Occluded Sequences
title_zh: 从遮挡序列重建步态周期和人体识别
abstract: Gait-based person identification from videos captured at surveillance sites using Computer Vision-based techniques is quite challenging since these walking sequences are usually corrupted with occlusion, and a complete cycle of gait is not always available. In this work, we propose an effective neural network-based model to reconstruct the occluded frames in an input sequence before carrying out gait recognition. Specifically, we employ LSTM networks to predict an embedding for each occluded frame both from the forward and the backward directions, and next fuse the predictions from the two LSTMs by employing a network of residual blocks and convolutional layers. While the LSTMs are trained to minimize the mean-squared loss, the fusion network is trained to optimize the pixel-wise cross-entropy loss between the ground-truth and the reconstructed samples. Evaluation of our approach has been done using synthetically occluded sequences generated from the OU-ISIR LP and CASIA-B data and real-occluded sequences present in the TUM-IITKGP data. The effectiveness of the proposed reconstruction model has been verified through the Dice score and gait-based recognition accuracy using some popular gait recognition methods. Comparative study with existing occlusion handling methods in gait recognition highlights the superiority of our proposed occlusion reconstruction approach over the others.
summary: Gait-based person identification from videos captured at surveillance sites using Computer Vision-based techniques is quite challenging since these walking sequences are usually corrupted with occlusion, and a complete cycle of gait is not always available. In this work, we propose an effective neural network-based model to reconstruct the occluded frames in an input sequence before carrying out gait recognition. Specifically, we employ LSTM networks to predict an embedding for each occluded frame both from the forward and the backward directions, and next fuse the predictions from the two LSTMs by employing a network of residual blocks and convolutional layers. While the LSTMs are trained to minimize the mean-squared loss, the fusion network is trained to optimize the pixel-wise cross-entropy loss between the ground-truth and the reconstructed samples. Evaluation of our approach has been done using synthetically occluded sequences generated from the OU-ISIR LP and CASIA-B data and real-occluded sequences present in the TUM-IITKGP data. The effectiveness of the proposed reconstruction model has been verified through the Dice score and gait-based recognition accuracy using some popular gait recognition methods. Comparative study with existing occlusion handling methods in gait recognition highlights the superiority of our proposed occlusion reconstruction approach over the others.
abstract_zh: 使用基于计算机视觉的技术从监控站点捕获的视频中进行基于步态的人员识别非常具有挑战性，因为这些行走序列通常会因遮挡而损坏，并且并不总是可以获得完整的步态周期。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种有效的基于神经网络的模型，用于在进行步态识别之前重建输入序列中的被遮挡帧。具体来说，我们使用 LSTM 网络从前向和后向预测每个被遮挡帧的嵌入，然后通过使用残差块和卷积层的网络融合两个 LSTM 的预测。虽然 LSTM 经过训练以最小化均方损失，但融合网络经过训练以优化地面实况和重建样本之间的像素交叉熵损失。我们的方法的评估是使用从 OU-ISIR LP 和 CASIA-B 数据生成的合成闭塞序列以及 TUM-IITKGP 数据中存在的真实闭塞序列来完成的。使用一些流行的步态识别方法通过 Dice 评分和基于步态的识别精度验证了所提出的重建模型的有效性。与步态识别中现有遮挡处理方法的比较研究突出了我们提出的遮挡重建方法相对于其他方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的模型，用于从遮挡视频序列中重建步态周期并实现人体识别。
AI.motivation: 监控场景下的步态识别因遮挡和不完整步态周期而面临挑战，现有方法难以有效处理此类问题。
AI.method: 采用双向LSTM预测遮挡帧嵌入，结合残差块与卷积层融合预测结果，分别通过均方误差和像素级交叉熵损失训练LSTM与融合网络。
AI.result: 在合成遮挡数据集（OU-ISIR LP、CASIA-B）和真实遮挡数据集（TUM-IITKGP）上，Dice分数与步态识别准确率优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提遮挡重建方法在步态识别任务中表现优于现有技术，有效提升了遮挡序列的处理能力。

authors_text: Xiaodan Xing,Jiahao Huang,Yang Nan,Yinzhe Wu,Chengjia Wang,Zhifan Gao,Simon Walsh,Guang Yang
title: CS$^2$: A Controllable and Simultaneous Synthesizer of Images and Annotations with Minimal Human Intervention
title_zh: CS$^2$：以最少的人为干预的可控同步图像和注释合成器
comment: 11 figures, Accepted by MICCAI 2022
comments: 11 figures, Accepted by MICCAI 2022
abstract: The destitution of image data and corresponding expert annotations limit the training capacities of AI diagnostic models and potentially inhibit their performance. To address such a problem of data and label scarcity, generative models have been developed to augment the training datasets. Previously proposed generative models usually require manually adjusted annotations (e.g., segmentation masks) or need pre-labeling. However, studies have found that these pre-labeling based methods can induce hallucinating artifacts, which might mislead the downstream clinical tasks, while manual adjustment could be onerous and subjective. To avoid manual adjustment and pre-labeling, we propose a novel controllable and simultaneous synthesizer (dubbed CS$^2$) in this study to generate both realistic images and corresponding annotations at the same time. Our CS$^2$ model is trained and validated using high resolution CT (HRCT) data collected from COVID-19 patients to realize an efficient infections segmentation with minimal human intervention. Our contributions include 1) a conditional image synthesis network that receives both style information from reference CT images and structural information from unsupervised segmentation masks, and 2) a corresponding segmentation mask synthesis network to automatically segment these synthesized images simultaneously. Our experimental studies on HRCT scans collected from COVID-19 patients demonstrate that our CS$^2$ model can lead to realistic synthesized datasets and promising segmentation results of COVID infections compared to the state-of-the-art nnUNet trained and fine-tuned in a fully supervised manner.
summary: The destitution of image data and corresponding expert annotations limit the training capacities of AI diagnostic models and potentially inhibit their performance. To address such a problem of data and label scarcity, generative models have been developed to augment the training datasets. Previously proposed generative models usually require manually adjusted annotations (e.g., segmentation masks) or need pre-labeling. However, studies have found that these pre-labeling based methods can induce hallucinating artifacts, which might mislead the downstream clinical tasks, while manual adjustment could be onerous and subjective. To avoid manual adjustment and pre-labeling, we propose a novel controllable and simultaneous synthesizer (dubbed CS$^2$) in this study to generate both realistic images and corresponding annotations at the same time. Our CS$^2$ model is trained and validated using high resolution CT (HRCT) data collected from COVID-19 patients to realize an efficient infections segmentation with minimal human intervention. Our contributions include 1) a conditional image synthesis network that receives both style information from reference CT images and structural information from unsupervised segmentation masks, and 2) a corresponding segmentation mask synthesis network to automatically segment these synthesized images simultaneously. Our experimental studies on HRCT scans collected from COVID-19 patients demonstrate that our CS$^2$ model can lead to realistic synthesized datasets and promising segmentation results of COVID infections compared to the state-of-the-art nnUNet trained and fine-tuned in a fully supervised manner.
abstract_zh: 图像数据和相应专家注释的缺乏限制了人工智能诊断模型的训练能力，并可能抑制其性能。为了解决数据和标签稀缺的问题，已经开发了生成模型来增强训练数据集。以前提出的生成模型通常需要手动调整注释（例如，分割掩模）或需要预先标记。然而，研究发现这些基于预标记的方法会引起幻觉伪影，这可能会误导下游的临床任务，而手动调整可能会很繁重且主观。为了避免手动调整和预标记，我们在本研究中提出了一种新颖的可控同步合成器（称为 CS$^2$），以同时生成逼真的图像和相应的注释。我们的 CS$^2$ 模型使用从 COVID-19 患者收集的高分辨率 CT (HRCT) 数据进行训练和验证，以最少的人为干预实现有效的感染分割。我们的贡献包括 1) 一个条件图像合成网络，它接收来自参考 CT 图像的风格信息和来自无监督分割掩模的结构信息，以及 2) 一个相应的分割掩模合成网络，用于同时自动分割这些合成图像。我们对从 COVID-19 患者收集的 HRCT 扫描进行的实验研究表明，与以完全监督的方式训练和微调的最先进的 nnUNet 相比，我们的 CS$^2$ 模型可以产生真实的合成数据集和有希望的 COVID 感染分割结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CS²的可控同时合成器，用于在最小人工干预下生成真实图像及其对应标注。
AI.motivation: 图像数据和专家标注的匮乏限制了AI诊断模型的训练能力，现有生成模型需手动调整标注或预标注，易导致幻觉伪影或主观性过强。
AI.method: 设计包含条件图像合成网络和分割掩码合成网络的CS²模型，前者结合参考CT图像的风格信息与无监督分割掩码的结构信息，后者自动分割合成图像。
AI.result: 在COVID-19患者的HRCT数据集上，CS²生成的合成数据集具有现实感，且感染分割结果优于全监督训练的nnUNet模型。
AI.conclusion: CS²通过无需人工干预的图像与标注联合生成，为医学影像领域数据稀缺问题提供了高效解决方案，提升了感染分割的准确性。

Our CS$^2$ model is trained and validated using high resolution CT (HRCT) data collected from COVID-19 patients to realize an efficient infections segmentation with minimal human intervention. Our contributions include 1) a conditional image synthesis network that receives both style information from reference CT images and structural information from unsupervised segmentation masks, and 2) a corresponding segmentation mask synthesis network to automatically segment these synthesized images simultaneously. Our experimental studies on HRCT scans collected from COVID-19 patients demonstrate that our CS$^2$ model can lead to realistic synthesized datasets and promising segmentation results of COVID infections compared to the state-of-the-art nnUNet trained and fine-tuned in a fully supervised manner. 图像数据和相应专家注释的缺乏限制了人工智能诊断模型的训练能力，并可能抑制其性能。为了解决数据和标签稀缺的问题，已经开发了生成模型来增强训练数据集。以前提出的生成模型通常需要手动调整注释（例如，分割掩模）或需要预先标记。然而，研究发现这些基于预标记的方法会引起幻觉伪影，这可能会误导下游的临床任务，而手动调整可能会很繁重且主观。为了避免手动调整和预标记，我们在本研究中提出了一种新颖的可控同步合成器（称为 CS$^2$），以同时生成逼真的图像和相应的注释。我们的 CS$^2$ 模型使用从 COVID-19 患者收集的高分辨率 CT (HRCT) 数据进行训练和验证，以最少的人为干预实现有效的感染分割。我们的贡献包括 1) 一个条件图像合成网络，它接收来自参考 CT 图像的风格信息和来自无监督分割掩模的结构信息，以及 2) 一个相应的分割掩模合成网络，用于同时自动分割这些合成图像。我们对从 COVID-19 患者收集的 HRCT 扫描进行的实验研究表明，与以完全监督的方式训练和微调的最先进的 nnUNet 相比，我们的 CS$^2$ 模型可以产生真实的合成数据集和有希望的 COVID 感染分割结果。 本文提出了一种名为CS²的可控同时合成器，用于在最小人工干预下生成真实图像及其对应标注。 Xiaodan Xing,Jiahao Huang,Yang Nan,Yinzhe Wu,Chengjia Wang,Zhifan Gao,Simon Walsh,Guang Yang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Junren Pan,Shuqiang Wang
title: Cross-Modal Transformer GAN: A Brain Structure-Function Deep Fusing Framework for Alzheimer's Disease
title_zh: 跨模态 Transformer GAN：阿尔茨海默病的大脑结构功能深度融合框架
abstract: Cross-modal fusion of different types of neuroimaging data has shown great promise for predicting the progression of Alzheimer's Disease(AD). However, most existing methods applied in neuroimaging can not efficiently fuse the functional and structural information from multi-modal neuroimages. In this work, a novel cross-modal transformer generative adversarial network(CT-GAN) is proposed to fuse functional information contained in resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (rs-fMRI) and structural information contained in Diffusion Tensor Imaging (DTI). The developed bi-attention mechanism can match functional information to structural information efficiently and maximize the capability of extracting complementary information from rs-fMRI and DTI. By capturing the deep complementary information between structural features and functional features, the proposed CT-GAN can detect the AD-related brain connectivity, which could be used as a bio-marker of AD. Experimental results show that the proposed model can not only improve classification performance but also detect the AD-related brain connectivity effectively.
summary: Cross-modal fusion of different types of neuroimaging data has shown great promise for predicting the progression of Alzheimer's Disease(AD). However, most existing methods applied in neuroimaging can not efficiently fuse the functional and structural information from multi-modal neuroimages. In this work, a novel cross-modal transformer generative adversarial network(CT-GAN) is proposed to fuse functional information contained in resting-state functional magnetic resonance imaging (rs-fMRI) and structural information contained in Diffusion Tensor Imaging (DTI). The developed bi-attention mechanism can match functional information to structural information efficiently and maximize the capability of extracting complementary information from rs-fMRI and DTI. By capturing the deep complementary information between structural features and functional features, the proposed CT-GAN can detect the AD-related brain connectivity, which could be used as a bio-marker of AD. Experimental results show that the proposed model can not only improve classification performance but also detect the AD-related brain connectivity effectively.
abstract_zh: 不同类型神经影像数据的跨模式融合在预测阿尔茨海默病（AD）的进展方面显示出巨大的前景。然而，大多数应用于神经影像的现有方法不能有效地融合多模态神经图像的功能和结构信息。在这项工作中，提出了一种新型的跨模态变压器生成对抗网络（CT-GAN）来融合静息态功能磁共振成像（rs-fMRI）中包含的功能信息和扩散张量成像（DTI）中包含的结构信息。所开发的双注意力机制可以有效地将功能信息与结构信息匹配，并最大限度地提高从 rs-fMRI 和 DTI 中提取互补信息的能力。通过捕获结构特征和功能特征之间的深层互补信息，所提出的 CT-GAN 可以检测 AD 相关的大脑连接性，这可以用作 AD 的生物标记。实验结果表明，该模型不仅可以提高分类性能，而且可以有效检测AD相关的大脑连接性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态Transformer生成对抗网络（CT-GAN），用于融合静息态功能磁共振成像（rs-fMRI）和弥散张量成像（DTI）数据，以预测阿尔茨海默病（AD）的进展。
AI.motivation: 现有神经影像学方法难以高效融合多模态数据中的结构和功能信息，限制了AD预测的准确性。
AI.method: 设计双向注意力机制，匹配rs-fMRI的功能信息与DTI的结构信息，提取互补特征并检测AD相关脑连接。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在分类性能和AD相关脑连接检测效果上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: CT-GAN通过深度融合多模态数据，为AD预测提供了有效的生物标志物和新方法。

authors_text: Lam Pham,Khoa Tran,Dat Ngo,Jasmin Lampert,Alexander Schindler
title: Remote Sensing Image Classification using Transfer Learning and Attention Based Deep Neural Network
title_zh: 使用迁移学习和基于注意力的深度神经网络进行遥感图像分类
abstract: The task of remote sensing image scene classification (RSISC), which aims at classifying remote sensing images into groups of semantic categories based on their contents, has taken the important role in a wide range of applications such as urban planning, natural hazards detection, environment monitoring,vegetation mapping, or geospatial object detection. During the past years, research community focusing on RSISC task has shown significant effort to publish diverse datasets as well as propose different approaches to deal with the RSISC challenges. Recently, almost proposed RSISC systems base on deep learning models which prove powerful and outperform traditional approaches using image processing and machine learning. In this paper, we also leverage the power of deep learning technology, evaluate a variety of deep neural network architectures, indicate main factors affecting the performance of a RSISC system. Given the comprehensive analysis, we propose a deep learning based framework for RSISC, which makes use of the transfer learning technique and multihead attention scheme. The proposed deep learning framework is evaluated on the benchmark NWPU-RESISC45 dataset and achieves the best classification accuracy of 94.7% which shows competitive to the state-of-the-art systems and potential for real-life applications.
summary: The task of remote sensing image scene classification (RSISC), which aims at classifying remote sensing images into groups of semantic categories based on their contents, has taken the important role in a wide range of applications such as urban planning, natural hazards detection, environment monitoring,vegetation mapping, or geospatial object detection. During the past years, research community focusing on RSISC task has shown significant effort to publish diverse datasets as well as propose different approaches to deal with the RSISC challenges. Recently, almost proposed RSISC systems base on deep learning models which prove powerful and outperform traditional approaches using image processing and machine learning. In this paper, we also leverage the power of deep learning technology, evaluate a variety of deep neural network architectures, indicate main factors affecting the performance of a RSISC system. Given the comprehensive analysis, we propose a deep learning based framework for RSISC, which makes use of the transfer learning technique and multihead attention scheme. The proposed deep learning framework is evaluated on the benchmark NWPU-RESISC45 dataset and achieves the best classification accuracy of 94.7% which shows competitive to the state-of-the-art systems and potential for real-life applications.
abstract_zh: 遥感图像场景分类（RSISC）任务旨在根据遥感图像的内容将其分类为语义类别组，在城市规划、自然灾害检测、环境监测、植被测绘或地理空间目标检测等广泛应用中发挥着重要作用。在过去的几年里，专注于 RSISC 任务的研究社区付出了巨大的努力来发布不同的数据集，并提出不同的方法来应对 RSISC 挑战。最近，几乎提出了基于深度学习模型的 RSISC 系统，这些模型被证明是强大的，并且优于使用图像处理和机器学习的传统方法。在本文中，我们还利用深度学习技术的力量，评估各种深度神经网络架构，指出影响 RSISC 系统性能的主要因素。经过综合分析，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的 RSISC 框架，该框架利用了迁移学习技术和多头注意力机制。所提出的深度学习框架在基准 NWPU-RESISC45 数据集上进行评估，并实现了 94.7% 的最佳分类精度，这显示出与最先进的系统的竞争力和实际应用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合迁移学习和多头注意力机制的深度学习框架，用于提高遥感图像场景分类的准确率。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在遥感图像分类中表现优异，但现有系统仍面临数据集多样性、模型性能优化等挑战，需进一步提升分类效果以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 评估多种深度神经网络架构，分析影响系统性能的关键因素，提出融合迁移学习与多头注意力机制的深度学习框架。
AI.result: 在NWPU-RESISC45数据集上实现94.7%的分类准确率，达到当时最先进的水平，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习与注意力机制的结合显著提升了遥感图像分类性能，展现出在实际应用中的潜力。

authors_text: Emma Slade,Kim M. Branson
title: Deep reinforced active learning for multi-class image classification
title_zh: 用于多类图像分类的深度强化主动学习
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures
abstract: High accuracy medical image classification can be limited by the costs of acquiring more data as well as the time and expertise needed to label existing images. In this paper, we apply active learning to medical image classification, a method which aims to maximise model performance on a minimal subset from a larger pool of data. We present a new active learning framework, based on deep reinforcement learning, to learn an active learning query strategy to label images based on predictions from a convolutional neural network. Our framework modifies the deep-Q network formulation, allowing us to pick data based additionally on geometric arguments in the latent space of the classifier, allowing for high accuracy multi-class classification in a batch-based active learning setting, enabling the agent to label datapoints that are both diverse and about which it is most uncertain. We apply our framework to two medical imaging datasets and compare with standard query strategies as well as the most recent reinforcement learning based active learning approach for image classification.
summary: High accuracy medical image classification can be limited by the costs of acquiring more data as well as the time and expertise needed to label existing images. In this paper, we apply active learning to medical image classification, a method which aims to maximise model performance on a minimal subset from a larger pool of data. We present a new active learning framework, based on deep reinforcement learning, to learn an active learning query strategy to label images based on predictions from a convolutional neural network. Our framework modifies the deep-Q network formulation, allowing us to pick data based additionally on geometric arguments in the latent space of the classifier, allowing for high accuracy multi-class classification in a batch-based active learning setting, enabling the agent to label datapoints that are both diverse and about which it is most uncertain. We apply our framework to two medical imaging datasets and compare with standard query strategies as well as the most recent reinforcement learning based active learning approach for image classification.
abstract_zh: 高精度医学图像分类可能会受到获取更多数据的成本以及标记现有图像所需的时间和专业知识的限制。在本文中，我们将主动学习应用于医学图像分类，该方法旨在最大化来自较大数据池的最小子集的模型性能。我们提出了一种基于深度强化学习的新主动学习框架，用于学习主动学习查询策略，以基于卷积神经网络的预测来标记图像。我们的框架修改了 Deep-Q 网络公式，使我们能够根据分类器潜在空间中的几何参数额外挑选数据，从而在基于批量的主动学习设置中实现高精度的多类分类，使代理能够标记既多样化又最不确定的数据点。我们将我们的框架应用于两个医学成像数据集，并与标准查询策略以及最新的基于强化学习的主动学习图像分类方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的主动学习框架，用于解决医学图像分类中数据标注成本高和效率低的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分类需要大量标注数据，但获取和标注数据成本高且耗时，传统主动学习方法难以平衡数据多样性和模型不确定性。
AI.method: 设计结合深度Q网络和潜在空间几何分析的强化学习框架，通过策略网络选择兼具多样性和不确定性的样本进行标注。
AI.result: 在两个医学图像数据集上验证，相比传统策略和最新强化学习方法，该框架显著提升分类准确率并减少所需标注样本数量。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效解决了医学图像分类中的标注效率问题，为高精度模型训练提供了低成本可行的主动学习方案。

search_text: Deep reinforced active learning for multi-class image classification 用于多类图像分类的深度强化主动学习 High accuracy medical image classification can be limited by the costs of acquiring more data as well as the time and expertise needed to label existing images. In this paper, we apply active learning to medical image classification, a method which aims to maximise model performance on a minimal subset from a larger pool of data. We present a new active learning framework, based on deep reinforcement learning, to learn an active learning query strategy to label images based on predictions from a convolutional neural network. Our framework modifies the deep-Q network formulation, allowing us to pick data based additionally on geometric arguments in the latent space of the classifier, allowing for high accuracy multi-class classification in a batch-based active learning setting, enabling the agent to label datapoints that are both diverse and about which it is most uncertain. We apply our framework to two medical imaging datasets and compare with standard query strategies as well as the most recent reinforcement learning based active learning approach for image classification. 高精度医学图像分类可能会受到获取更多数据的成本以及标记现有图像所需的时间和专业知识的限制。在本文中，我们将主动学习应用于医学图像分类，该方法旨在最大化来自较大数据池的最小子集的模型性能。我们提出了一种基于深度强化学习的新主动学习框架，用于学习主动学习查询策略，以基于卷积神经网络的预测来标记图像。我们的框架修改了 Deep-Q 网络公式，使我们能够根据分类器潜在空间中的几何参数额外挑选数据，从而在基于批量的主动学习设置中实现高精度的多类分类，使代理能够标记既多样化又最不确定的数据点。我们将我们的框架应用于两个医学成像数据集，并与标准查询策略以及最新的基于强化学习的主动学习图像分类方法进行比较。 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的主动学习框架，用于解决医学图像分类中数据标注成本高和效率低的问题。 Emma Slade,Kim M. Branson cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Chenglizhao Chen,Mengke Song,Wenfeng Song,Li Guo,Muwei Jian
title: A Comprehensive Survey on Video Saliency Detection with Auditory Information: the Audio-visual Consistency Perceptual is the Key!
title_zh: 听觉信息视频显着性检测综合综述：视听一致性感知是关键！
abstract: Video saliency detection (VSD) aims at fast locating the most attractive objects/things/patterns in a given video clip. Existing VSD-related works have mainly relied on the visual system but paid less attention to the audio aspect, while, actually, our audio system is the most vital complementary part to our visual system. Also, audio-visual saliency detection (AVSD), one of the most representative research topics for mimicking human perceptual mechanisms, is currently in its infancy, and none of the existing survey papers have touched on it, especially from the perspective of saliency detection. Thus, the ultimate goal of this paper is to provide an extensive review to bridge the gap between audio-visual fusion and saliency detection. In addition, as another highlight of this review, we have provided a deep insight into key factors which could directly determine the performances of AVSD deep models, and we claim that the audio-visual consistency degree (AVC) -- a long-overlooked issue, can directly influence the effectiveness of using audio to benefit its visual counterpart when performing saliency detection. Moreover, in order to make the AVC issue more practical and valuable for future followers, we have newly equipped almost all existing publicly available AVSD datasets with additional frame-wise AVC labels. Based on these upgraded datasets, we have conducted extensive quantitative evaluations to ground our claim on the importance of AVC in the AVSD task. In a word, both our ideas and new sets serve as a convenient platform with preliminaries and guidelines, all of which are very potential to facilitate future works in promoting state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance further.
summary: Video saliency detection (VSD) aims at fast locating the most attractive objects/things/patterns in a given video clip. Existing VSD-related works have mainly relied on the visual system but paid less attention to the audio aspect, while, actually, our audio system is the most vital complementary part to our visual system. Also, audio-visual saliency detection (AVSD), one of the most representative research topics for mimicking human perceptual mechanisms, is currently in its infancy, and none of the existing survey papers have touched on it, especially from the perspective of saliency detection. Thus, the ultimate goal of this paper is to provide an extensive review to bridge the gap between audio-visual fusion and saliency detection. In addition, as another highlight of this review, we have provided a deep insight into key factors which could directly determine the performances of AVSD deep models, and we claim that the audio-visual consistency degree (AVC) -- a long-overlooked issue, can directly influence the effectiveness of using audio to benefit its visual counterpart when performing saliency detection. Moreover, in order to make the AVC issue more practical and valuable for future followers, we have newly equipped almost all existing publicly available AVSD datasets with additional frame-wise AVC labels. Based on these upgraded datasets, we have conducted extensive quantitative evaluations to ground our claim on the importance of AVC in the AVSD task. In a word, both our ideas and new sets serve as a convenient platform with preliminaries and guidelines, all of which are very potential to facilitate future works in promoting state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance further.
abstract_zh: 视频显着性检测（VSD）旨在快速定位给定视频剪辑中最具吸引力的对象/事物/模式。现有的VSD相关作品主要依赖于视觉系统，而对音频方面的关注较少，而实际上，我们的音频系统是我们视觉系统最重要的补充部分。此外，视听显着性检测（AVSD）作为模仿人类感知机制最具代表性的研究课题之一，目前还处于起步阶段，现有的调查论文都没有涉及它，特别是从显着性检测的角度来看。因此，本文的最终目标是提供广泛的综述，以弥合视听融合和显着性检测之间的差距。此外，作为本次审查的另一个亮点，我们深入了解了直接决定 AVSD 深度模型性能的关键因素，并且我们声称，视听一致性度（AVC）——一个长期被忽视的问题，可以直接影响在执行显着性检测时使用音频来使其视觉对应物受益的有效性。此外，为了使 AVC 问题对未来的关注者更加实用和有价值，我们为几乎所有现有的公开可用的 AVSD 数据集新配备了额外的逐帧 AVC 标签。基于这些升级的数据集，我们进行了广泛的定量评估，以证明 AVC 在 AVSD 任务中的重要性。总之，我们的想法和新套件都可以作为一个方便的平台，提供预备知识和指导方针，所有这些都非常有可能促进未来的工作，进一步促进最先进（SOTA）的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了结合听觉信息的视频显著性检测（AVSD），强调音频-视觉一致性（AVC）对提升检测效果的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 现有视频显著性检测过度依赖视觉信息，忽视了音频作为视觉系统重要补充的作用，导致AVSD研究处于起步阶段且缺乏系统性总结。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析AVSD技术框架，提出AVC作为核心影响因素，并为公开数据集添加帧级AVC标签，基于改进数据集进行定量实验验证。
AI.result: 实验结果证实AVC显著影响AVSD模型性能，新数据集和分析框架为后续研究提供了基准和指导。
AI.conclusion: 本文构建的理论体系与数据资源为推进AVSD领域前沿技术发展奠定了基础，建议未来研究重点关注音频-视觉一致性机制的深入挖掘。

authors_text: Yun-nong Chen,Yan-kun Zhen,Chu-ning Shi,Jia-zhi Li,Liu-qing Chen,Ze-jian Li,Ling-yun Sun,Ting-ting Zhou,Yan-fang Chang
title: UI Layers Merger: Merging UI layers via Visual Learning and Boundary Prior
title_zh: UI 层合并：通过视觉学习和边界先验合并 UI 层
comment: 15 pages, accepted to Frontiers of Information Technology & Electronic Engineering. This is a preprint version, the copyright belongs to the Springer Nature journals
comments: 15 pages, accepted to Frontiers of Information Technology & Electronic Engineering. This is a preprint version, the copyright belongs to the Springer Nature journals
abstract: With the fast-growing GUI development workload in the Internet industry, some work on intelligent methods attempted to generate maintainable front-end code from UI screenshots. It can be more suitable for utilizing UI design drafts that contain UI metadata. However, fragmented layers inevitably appear in the UI design drafts which greatly reduces the quality of code generation. None of the existing GUI automated techniques detects and merges the fragmented layers to improve the accessibility of generated code. In this paper, we propose UI Layers Merger (UILM), a vision-based method, which can automatically detect and merge fragmented layers into UI components. Our UILM contains Merging Area Detector (MAD) and a layers merging algorithm. MAD incorporates the boundary prior knowledge to accurately detect the boundaries of UI components. Then, the layers merging algorithm can search out the associated layers within the components' boundaries and merge them into a whole part. We present a dynamic data augmentation approach to boost the performance of MAD. We also construct a large-scale UI dataset for training the MAD and testing the performance of UILM. The experiment shows that the proposed method outperforms the best baseline regarding merging area detection and achieves a decent accuracy regarding layers merging.
summary: With the fast-growing GUI development workload in the Internet industry, some work on intelligent methods attempted to generate maintainable front-end code from UI screenshots. It can be more suitable for utilizing UI design drafts that contain UI metadata. However, fragmented layers inevitably appear in the UI design drafts which greatly reduces the quality of code generation. None of the existing GUI automated techniques detects and merges the fragmented layers to improve the accessibility of generated code. In this paper, we propose UI Layers Merger (UILM), a vision-based method, which can automatically detect and merge fragmented layers into UI components. Our UILM contains Merging Area Detector (MAD) and a layers merging algorithm. MAD incorporates the boundary prior knowledge to accurately detect the boundaries of UI components. Then, the layers merging algorithm can search out the associated layers within the components' boundaries and merge them into a whole part. We present a dynamic data augmentation approach to boost the performance of MAD. We also construct a large-scale UI dataset for training the MAD and testing the performance of UILM. The experiment shows that the proposed method outperforms the best baseline regarding merging area detection and achieves a decent accuracy regarding layers merging.
abstract_zh: 随着互联网行业GUI开发工作量的快速增长，一些智能方法的工作尝试从UI截图生成可维护的前端代码。它更适合利用包含 UI 元数据的 UI 设计草稿。然而，UI设计稿中不可避免地会出现碎片化的层次，这大大降低了代码生成的质量。现有的 GUI 自动化技术都没有检测并合并碎片层以提高生成代码的可访问性。在本文中，我们提出了 UI Layers Merger (UILM)，这是一种基于视觉的方法，可以自动检测碎片层并将其合并到 UI 组件中。我们的 UILM 包含合并区域检测器 (MAD) 和层合并算法。 MAD结合了边界先验知识来准确检测UI组件的边界。然后，层合并算法可以搜索到组件边界内的关联层并将它们合并成一个整体。我们提出了一种动态数据增强方法来提高 MAD 的性能。我们还构建了一个大规模的 UI 数据集来训练 MAD 并测试 UILM 的性能。实验表明，所提出的方法在合并区域检测方面优于最佳基线，并在层合并方面实现了不错的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UI Layers Merger（UILM），一种基于视觉学习和边界先验知识的方法，用于自动检测并合并UI设计草图中的碎片化图层以提高代码生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI自动化技术无法检测和合并UI设计草图中的碎片化图层，导致生成代码的可访问性降低，亟需改进方法提升代码生成质量。
AI.method: UILM包含两个核心模块：利用边界先验知识的合并区域检测器（MAD）和图层合并算法。通过动态数据增强提升MAD性能，并构建大规模UI数据集进行训练与测试。
AI.result: UILM在合并区域检测任务中优于最佳基线方法，图层合并准确率表现良好，有效提升了UI代码生成的完整性与可维护性。
AI.conclusion: UILM通过视觉学习与边界先验结合，成功解决了UI设计草图中碎片化图层合并问题，为自动化前端代码生成提供了新思路。

search_text: UI Layers Merger: Merging UI layers via Visual Learning and Boundary Prior UI 层合并：通过视觉学习和边界先验合并 UI 层 With the fast-growing GUI development workload in the Internet industry, some work on intelligent methods attempted to generate maintainable front-end code from UI screenshots. It can be more suitable for utilizing UI design drafts that contain UI metadata. However, fragmented layers inevitably appear in the UI design drafts which greatly reduces the quality of code generation. None of the existing GUI automated techniques detects and merges the fragmented layers to improve the accessibility of generated code. In this paper, we propose UI Layers Merger (UILM), a vision-based method, which can automatically detect and merge fragmented layers into UI components. Our UILM contains Merging Area Detector (MAD) and a layers merging algorithm. MAD incorporates the boundary prior knowledge to accurately detect the boundaries of UI components. Then, the layers merging algorithm can search out the associated layers within the components' boundaries and merge them into a whole part. We present a dynamic data augmentation approach to boost the performance of MAD. We also construct a large-scale UI dataset for training the MAD and testing the performance of UILM. The experiment shows that the proposed method outperforms the best baseline regarding merging area detection and achieves a decent accuracy regarding layers merging. 随着互联网行业GUI开发工作量的快速增长，一些智能方法的工作尝试从UI截图生成可维护的前端代码。它更适合利用包含 UI 元数据的 UI 设计草稿。然而，UI设计稿中不可避免地会出现碎片化的层次，这大大降低了代码生成的质量。现有的 GUI 自动化技术都没有检测并合并碎片层以提高生成代码的可访问性。在本文中，我们提出了 UI Layers Merger (UILM)，这是一种基于视觉的方法，可以自动检测碎片层并将其合并到 UI 组件中。我们的 UILM 包含合并区域检测器 (MAD) 和层合并算法。 MAD结合了边界先验知识来准确检测UI组件的边界。然后，层合并算法可以搜索到组件边界内的关联层并将它们合并成一个整体。我们提出了一种动态数据增强方法来提高 MAD 的性能。我们还构建了一个大规模的 UI 数据集来训练 MAD 并测试 UILM 的性能。实验表明，所提出的方法在合并区域检测方面优于最佳基线，并在层合并方面实现了不错的精度。 本文提出UI Layers Merger（UILM），一种基于视觉学习和边界先验知识的方法，用于自动检测并合并UI设计草图中的碎片化图层以提高代码生成质量。 Yun-nong Chen,Yan-kun Zhen,Chu-ning Shi,Jia-zhi Li,Liu-qing Chen,Ze-jian Li,Ling-yun Sun,Ting-ting Zhou,Yan-fang Chang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: David Yevick
title: Rotated Digit Recognition by Variational Autoencoders with Fixed Output Distributions
title_zh: 具有固定输出分布的变分自动编码器的旋转数字识别
abstract: This paper demonstrates that a simple modification of the variational autoencoder (VAE) formalism enables the method to identify and classify rotated and distorted digits. In particular, the conventional objective (cost) function employed during the training process of a VAE both quantifies the agreement between the input and output data records and ensures that the latent space representation of the input data record is statistically generated with an appropriate mean and standard deviation. After training, simulated data realizations are generated by decoding appropriate latent space points. Since, however, standard VAE:s trained on randomly rotated MNIST digits cannot reliably distinguish between different digit classes since the rotated input data is effectively compared to a similarly rotated output data record. In contrast, an alternative implementation in which the objective function compares the output associated with each rotated digit to a corresponding fixed unreferenced reference digit is shown here to discriminate accurately among the rotated digits in latent space even when the dimension of the latent space is 2 or 3.
summary: This paper demonstrates that a simple modification of the variational autoencoder (VAE) formalism enables the method to identify and classify rotated and distorted digits. In particular, the conventional objective (cost) function employed during the training process of a VAE both quantifies the agreement between the input and output data records and ensures that the latent space representation of the input data record is statistically generated with an appropriate mean and standard deviation. After training, simulated data realizations are generated by decoding appropriate latent space points. Since, however, standard VAE:s trained on randomly rotated MNIST digits cannot reliably distinguish between different digit classes since the rotated input data is effectively compared to a similarly rotated output data record. In contrast, an alternative implementation in which the objective function compares the output associated with each rotated digit to a corresponding fixed unreferenced reference digit is shown here to discriminate accurately among the rotated digits in latent space even when the dimension of the latent space is 2 or 3.
abstract_zh: 本文证明，对变分自动编码器（VAE）形式的简单修改使得该方法能够识别和分类旋转和扭曲的数字。特别是，VAE 训练过程中采用的传统目标（成本）函数既量化了输入和输出数据记录之间的一致性，又确保输入数据记录的潜在空间表示以适当的均值和标准差统计生成。训练后，通过解码适当的潜在空间点来生成模拟数据实现。然而，由于在随机旋转的 MNIST 数字上训练的标准 VAE: 无法可靠地区分不同的数字类别，因为旋转的输入数据与类似旋转的输出数据记录进行了有效的比较。相反，这里示出了一种替代实现，其中目标函数将与每个旋转数字相关联的输出与相应的固定未引用参考数字进行比较，以准确地区分潜在空间中的旋转数字，即使潜在空间的维度是2或3。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的变分自编码器方法，用于准确识别和分类旋转或扭曲的数字。
AI.motivation: 传统VAE在训练后难以区分旋转后的不同数字类别，因为其输出与旋转输入直接比较，导致分类效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过修改VAE的目标函数，使其将每个旋转数字的输出与固定不变的参考数字进行比较，而非直接比较旋转后的输入输出。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使潜在空间维度仅为2或3，该方法也能在潜在空间中准确区分不同旋转角度的数字。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效克服了传统VAE在旋转数字分类中的局限性，证明了固定参考分布的VAE在低维潜在空间中的有效性。

authors_text: Yuxiao Chen,Boris Ivanovic,Marco Pavone
title: ScePT: Scene-consistent, Policy-based Trajectory Predictions for Planning
title_zh: ScePT：用于规划的场景一致、基于策略的轨迹预测
abstract: Trajectory prediction is a critical functionality of autonomous systems that share environments with uncontrolled agents, one prominent example being self-driving vehicles. Currently, most prediction methods do not enforce scene consistency, i.e., there are a substantial amount of self-collisions between predicted trajectories of different agents in the scene. Moreover, many approaches generate individual trajectory predictions per agent instead of joint trajectory predictions of the whole scene, which makes downstream planning difficult. In this work, we present ScePT, a policy planning-based trajectory prediction model that generates accurate, scene-consistent trajectory predictions suitable for autonomous system motion planning. It explicitly enforces scene consistency and learns an agent interaction policy that can be used for conditional prediction. Experiments on multiple real-world pedestrians and autonomous vehicle datasets show that ScePT} matches current state-of-the-art prediction accuracy with significantly improved scene consistency. We also demonstrate ScePT's ability to work with a downstream contingency planner.
summary: Trajectory prediction is a critical functionality of autonomous systems that share environments with uncontrolled agents, one prominent example being self-driving vehicles. Currently, most prediction methods do not enforce scene consistency, i.e., there are a substantial amount of self-collisions between predicted trajectories of different agents in the scene. Moreover, many approaches generate individual trajectory predictions per agent instead of joint trajectory predictions of the whole scene, which makes downstream planning difficult. In this work, we present ScePT, a policy planning-based trajectory prediction model that generates accurate, scene-consistent trajectory predictions suitable for autonomous system motion planning. It explicitly enforces scene consistency and learns an agent interaction policy that can be used for conditional prediction. Experiments on multiple real-world pedestrians and autonomous vehicle datasets show that ScePT} matches current state-of-the-art prediction accuracy with significantly improved scene consistency. We also demonstrate ScePT's ability to work with a downstream contingency planner.
abstract_zh: 轨迹预测是与不受控制的代理共享环境的自主系统的一项关键功能，一个突出的例子是自动驾驶车辆。目前，大多数预测方法并不强制场景一致性，即场景中不同智能体的预测轨迹之间存在大量的自碰撞。此外，许多方法为每个智能体生成单独的轨迹预测，而不是整个场景的联合轨迹预测，这使得下游规划变得困难。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ScePT，一种基于策略规划的轨迹预测模型，可生成适合自主系统运动规划的准确、场景一致的轨迹预测。它明确地强制场景一致性并学习可用于条件预测的代理交互策略。对多个现实世界行人和自动驾驶车辆数据集的实验表明，ScePT} 与当前最先进的预测精度相匹配，并且显着提高了场景一致性。我们还展示了 ScePT 与下游应急计划人员合作的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于策略规划的轨迹预测模型ScePT，用于生成场景一致且适合自动驾驶系统运动规划的轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法缺乏场景一致性，导致预测轨迹间存在大量自碰撞，且多采用独立预测而非全局联合预测，增加了下游规划难度。
AI.method: ScePT通过显式强制场景一致性，并学习代理交互策略，实现多智能体轨迹的联合预测与条件预测。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界数据集上，ScePT在保持预测精度的同时显著提升场景一致性，并能与下游应急规划器协同工作。
AI.conclusion: ScePT通过场景一致性约束和策略学习，有效解决了轨迹预测中的碰撞风险与规划兼容性问题，为自动驾驶系统提供更可靠的预测支持。

conclusion: ScePT通过场景一致性约束和策略学习，有效解决了轨迹预测中的碰撞风险与规划兼容性问题，为自动驾驶系统提供更可靠的预测支持。
search_text: ScePT: Scene-consistent, Policy-based Trajectory Predictions for Planning ScePT：用于规划的场景一致、基于策略的轨迹预测 Trajectory prediction is a critical functionality of autonomous systems that share environments with uncontrolled agents, one prominent example being self-driving vehicles. Currently, most prediction methods do not enforce scene consistency, i.e., there are a substantial amount of self-collisions between predicted trajectories of different agents in the scene. Moreover, many approaches generate individual trajectory predictions per agent instead of joint trajectory predictions of the whole scene, which makes downstream planning difficult. In this work, we present ScePT, a policy planning-based trajectory prediction model that generates accurate, scene-consistent trajectory predictions suitable for autonomous system motion planning. It explicitly enforces scene consistency and learns an agent interaction policy that can be used for conditional prediction. Experiments on multiple real-world pedestrians and autonomous vehicle datasets show that ScePT} matches current state-of-the-art prediction accuracy with significantly improved scene consistency. We also demonstrate ScePT's ability to work with a downstream contingency planner. 轨迹预测是与不受控制的代理共享环境的自主系统的一项关键功能，一个突出的例子是自动驾驶车辆。目前，大多数预测方法并不强制场景一致性，即场景中不同智能体的预测轨迹之间存在大量的自碰撞。此外，许多方法为每个智能体生成单独的轨迹预测，而不是整个场景的联合轨迹预测，这使得下游规划变得困难。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ScePT，一种基于策略规划的轨迹预测模型，可生成适合自主系统运动规划的准确、场景一致的轨迹预测。它明确地强制场景一致性并学习可用于条件预测的代理交互策略。对多个现实世界行人和自动驾驶车辆数据集的实验表明，ScePT} 与当前最先进的预测精度相匹配，并且显着提高了场景一致性。我们还展示了 ScePT 与下游应急计划人员合作的能力。 本文提出了一种基于策略规划的轨迹预测模型ScePT，用于生成场景一致且适合自动驾驶系统运动规划的轨迹预测。 Yuxiao Chen,Boris Ivanovic,Marco Pavone cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Olger Siebinga,Arkady Zgonnikov,David Abbink
title: Uncovering variability in human driving behavior through automatic extraction of similar traffic scenes from large naturalistic datasets
title_zh: 通过从大型自然数据集中自动提取相似的交通场景来揭示人类驾驶行为的变异性
abstract: Recently, multiple naturalistic traffic datasets of human-driven trajectories have been published (e.g., highD, NGSim, and pNEUMA). These datasets have been used in studies that investigate variability in human driving behavior, for example for scenario-based validation of autonomous vehicle (AV) behavior, modeling driver behavior, or validating driver models. Thus far, these studies focused on the variability on an operational level (e.g., velocity profiles during a lane change), not on a tactical level (i.e., to change lanes or not). Investigating the variability on both levels is necessary to develop driver models and AVs that include multiple tactical behaviors. To expose multi-level variability, the human responses to the same traffic scene could be investigated. However, no method exists to automatically extract similar scenes from datasets. Here, we present a four-step extraction method that uses the Hausdorff distance, a mathematical distance metric for sets. We performed a case study on the highD dataset that showed that the method is practically applicable. The human responses to the selected scenes exposed the variability on both the tactical and operational levels. With this new method, the variability in operational and tactical human behavior can be investigated, without the need for costly and time-consuming driving-simulator experiments.
summary: Recently, multiple naturalistic traffic datasets of human-driven trajectories have been published (e.g., highD, NGSim, and pNEUMA). These datasets have been used in studies that investigate variability in human driving behavior, for example for scenario-based validation of autonomous vehicle (AV) behavior, modeling driver behavior, or validating driver models. Thus far, these studies focused on the variability on an operational level (e.g., velocity profiles during a lane change), not on a tactical level (i.e., to change lanes or not). Investigating the variability on both levels is necessary to develop driver models and AVs that include multiple tactical behaviors. To expose multi-level variability, the human responses to the same traffic scene could be investigated. However, no method exists to automatically extract similar scenes from datasets. Here, we present a four-step extraction method that uses the Hausdorff distance, a mathematical distance metric for sets. We performed a case study on the highD dataset that showed that the method is practically applicable. The human responses to the selected scenes exposed the variability on both the tactical and operational levels. With this new method, the variability in operational and tactical human behavior can be investigated, without the need for costly and time-consuming driving-simulator experiments.
abstract_zh: 最近，已经发布了多个人类驱动轨迹的自然交通数据集（例如 highD、NGSim 和 pNEUMA）。这些数据集已用于调查人类驾驶行为变异性的研究，例如基于场景的自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 行为验证、驾驶员行为建模或验证驾驶员模型。到目前为止，这些研究侧重于操作层面的可变性（例如，变道期间的速度曲线），而不是战术层面的可变性（即是否变道）。研究两个层面的可变性对于开发包含多种战术行为的驾驶员模型和自动驾驶汽车是必要的。为了揭示多层次的变异性，可以研究人类对同一交通场景的反应。然而，不存在从数据集中自动提取相似场景的方法。在这里，我们提出了一种使用豪斯多夫距离（集合的数学距离度量）的四步提取方法。我们对 highD 数据集进行了案例研究，表明该方法是实际适用的。人类对所选场景的反应暴露了战术和操作层面的可变性。通过这种新方法，可以研究人类操作和战术行为的变化，而无需进行昂贵且耗时的驾驶模拟器实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从大规模自然驾驶数据集中自动提取相似交通场景的方法，以揭示人类驾驶行为在操作和战术层面的变异性。
AI.motivation: 现有的自然驾驶数据集已被用于研究人类驾驶行为的变异性，但主要集中在操作层面，而缺乏对战术层面（如是否变道）的分析，因此需要一种方法来揭示多层次的变异性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种四步提取方法，使用Hausdorff距离作为数学距离度量，从数据集中自动提取相似的交通场景。
AI.result: 通过对highD数据集的案例研究，验证了该方法的实用性，并展示了人类对所选场景的响应在操作和战术层面的变异性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够揭示人类驾驶行为在操作和战术层面的变异性，无需依赖昂贵且耗时的驾驶模拟实验。
