authors_text: Kyung-Su Kim,Seong Je Oh,Ju Hwan Lee,Myung Jin Chung
title: 3D unsupervised anomaly detection and localization through virtual multi-view projection and reconstruction: Clinical validation on low-dose chest computed tomography
title_zh: 通过虚拟多视图投影和重建进行 3D 无监督异常检测和定位：低剂量胸部计算机断层扫描的临床验证
comment: Kyung-Su Kim and Seong Je Oh have contributed equally to this work as the co-first author. Kyung-Su Kim (kskim.doc@gmail.com) and Myung Jin Chung (mj1.chung@samsung.com) have contributed equally to this work as the co-corresponding author
comments: Kyung-Su Kim and Seong Je Oh have contributed equally to this work as the co-first author. Kyung-Su Kim (kskim.doc@gmail.com) and Myung Jin Chung (mj1.chung@samsung.com) have contributed equally to this work as the co-corresponding author
abstract: Computer-aided diagnosis for low-dose computed tomography (CT) based on deep learning has recently attracted attention as a first-line automatic testing tool because of its high accuracy and low radiation exposure. However, existing methods rely on supervised learning, imposing an additional burden to doctors for collecting disease data or annotating spatial labels for network training, consequently hindering their implementation. We propose a method based on a deep neural network for computer-aided diagnosis called virtual multi-view projection and reconstruction for unsupervised anomaly detection. Presumably, this is the first method that only requires data from healthy patients for training to identify three-dimensional (3D) regions containing any anomalies. The method has three key components. Unlike existing computer-aided diagnosis tools that use conventional CT slices as the network input, our method 1) improves the recognition of 3D lung structures by virtually projecting an extracted 3D lung region to obtain two-dimensional (2D) images from diverse views to serve as network inputs, 2) accommodates the input diversity gain for accurate anomaly detection, and 3) achieves 3D anomaly/disease localization through a novel 3D map restoration method using multiple 2D anomaly maps. The proposed method based on unsupervised learning improves the patient-level anomaly detection by 10% (area under the curve, 0.959) compared with a gold standard based on supervised learning (area under the curve, 0.848), and it localizes the anomaly region with 93% accuracy, demonstrating its high performance.
summary: Computer-aided diagnosis for low-dose computed tomography (CT) based on deep learning has recently attracted attention as a first-line automatic testing tool because of its high accuracy and low radiation exposure. However, existing methods rely on supervised learning, imposing an additional burden to doctors for collecting disease data or annotating spatial labels for network training, consequently hindering their implementation. We propose a method based on a deep neural network for computer-aided diagnosis called virtual multi-view projection and reconstruction for unsupervised anomaly detection. Presumably, this is the first method that only requires data from healthy patients for training to identify three-dimensional (3D) regions containing any anomalies. The method has three key components. Unlike existing computer-aided diagnosis tools that use conventional CT slices as the network input, our method 1) improves the recognition of 3D lung structures by virtually projecting an extracted 3D lung region to obtain two-dimensional (2D) images from diverse views to serve as network inputs, 2) accommodates the input diversity gain for accurate anomaly detection, and 3) achieves 3D anomaly/disease localization through a novel 3D map restoration method using multiple 2D anomaly maps. The proposed method based on unsupervised learning improves the patient-level anomaly detection by 10% (area under the curve, 0.959) compared with a gold standard based on supervised learning (area under the curve, 0.848), and it localizes the anomaly region with 93% accuracy, demonstrating its high performance.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的低剂量计算机断层扫描（CT）计算机辅助诊断因其高精度和低辐射暴露作为一线自动测试工具而受到关注。然而，现有的方法依赖于监督学习，给医生收集疾病数据或为网络训练标注空间标签带来了额外的负担，从而阻碍了其实施。我们提出了一种基于深度神经网络的计算机辅助诊断方法，称为虚拟多视图投影和重建，用于无监督异常检测。据推测，这是第一种仅需要健康患者的数据进行训练即可识别包含任何异常的三维 (3D) 区域的方法。该方法具有三个关键组成部分。与使用传统 CT 切片作为网络输入的现有计算机辅助诊断工具不同，我们的方法 1）通过虚拟投影提取的 3D 肺部区域以从不同视图获取二维（2D）图像作为网络输入来提高 3D 肺部结构的识别，2）适应输入多样性增益以进行准确的异常检测，3）通过使用多个 2D 异常图的新颖 3D 地图恢复方法实现 3D 异常/疾病定位。与基于监督学习的金标准（曲线下面积，0.848）相比，所提出的基于无监督学习的方法将患者级别的异常检测提高了10％（曲线下面积，0.959），并且以93％的准确度定位异常区域，证明了其高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于虚拟多视角投影与重建的无监督三维异常检测与定位方法，并在低剂量胸部CT上进行临床验证。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的低剂量CT辅助诊断方法依赖监督学习，需医生标注病变数据，增加了实施负担，亟需无需标注数据的无监督方法。
AI.method: 通过虚拟投影提取的3D肺区生成多视角2D图像作为输入，结合输入多样性增强检测能力，并利用多2D异常图重建3D异常定位图。
AI.result: 无监督方法在患者级异常检测AUC达0.959（较监督方法提升10%），异常定位准确率达93%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需标注数据即可实现高精度的3D异常检测与定位，为低剂量CT辅助诊断提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: 3D unsupervised anomaly detection and localization through virtual multi-view projection and reconstruction: Clinical validation on low-dose chest computed tomography 通过虚拟多视图投影和重建进行 3D 无监督异常检测和定位：低剂量胸部计算机断层扫描的临床验证 Computer-aided diagnosis for low-dose computed tomography (CT) based on deep learning has recently attracted attention as a first-line automatic testing tool because of its high accuracy and low radiation exposure. However, existing methods rely on supervised learning, imposing an additional burden to doctors for collecting disease data or annotating spatial labels for network training, consequently hindering their implementation. The method has three key components. Unlike existing computer-aided diagnosis tools that use conventional CT slices as the network input, our method 1) improves the recognition of 3D lung structures by virtually projecting an extracted 3D lung region to obtain two-dimensional (2D) images from diverse views to serve as network inputs, 2) accommodates the input diversity gain for accurate anomaly detection, and 3) achieves 3D anomaly/disease localization through a novel 3D map restoration method using multiple 2D anomaly maps. The proposed method based on unsupervised learning improves the patient-level anomaly detection by 10% (area under the curve, 0.959) compared with a gold standard based on supervised learning (area under the curve, 0.848), and it localizes the anomaly region with 93% accuracy, demonstrating its high performance. 基于深度学习的低剂量计算机断层扫描（CT）计算机辅助诊断因其高精度和低辐射暴露作为一线自动测试工具而受到关注。然而，现有的方法依赖于监督学习，给医生收集疾病数据或为网络训练标注空间标签带来了额外的负担，从而阻碍了其实施。我们提出了一种基于深度神经网络的计算机辅助诊断方法，称为虚拟多视图投影和重建，用于无监督异常检测。据推测，这是第一种仅需要健康患者的数据进行训练即可识别包含任何异常的三维 (3D) 区域的方法。该方法具有三个关键组成部分。与使用传统 CT 切片作为网络输入的现有计算机辅助诊断工具不同，我们的方法 1）通过虚拟投影提取的 3D 肺部区域以从不同视图获取二维（2D）图像作为网络输入来提高 3D 肺部结构的识别，2）适应输入多样性增益以进行准确的异常检测，3）通过使用多个 2D 异常图的新颖 3D 地图恢复方法实现 3D 异常/疾病定位。与基于监督学习的金标准（曲线下面积，0.848）相比，所提出的基于无监督学习的方法将患者级别的异常检测提高了10％（曲线下面积，0.959），并且以93％的准确度定位异常区域，证明了其高性能。 本文提出一种基于虚拟多视角投影与重建的无监督三维异常检测与定位方法，并在低剂量胸部CT上进行临床验证。 Kyung-Su Kim,Seong Je Oh,Ju Hwan Lee,Myung Jin Chung eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Wenbin Liao,Jiewen Xiao,Chengbo Zhao,Yonggong Han,ZhiJie Geng,Jianxin Wang,Yihua Yang
title: Mushroom image recognition and distance generation based on attention-mechanism model and genetic information
title_zh: 基于注意力机制模型和遗传信息的蘑菇图像识别与距离生成
abstract: The species identification of Macrofungi, i.e. mushrooms, has always been a challenging task. There are still a large number of poisonous mushrooms that have not been found, which poses a risk to people's life. However, the traditional identification method requires a large number of experts with knowledge in the field of taxonomy for manual identification, it is not only inefficient but also consumes a lot of manpower and capital costs. In this paper, we propose a new model based on attention-mechanism, MushroomNet, which applies the lightweight network MobileNetV3 as the backbone model, combined with the attention structure proposed by us, and has achieved excellent performance in the mushroom recognition task. On the public dataset, the test accuracy of the MushroomNet model has reached 83.9%, and on the local dataset, the test accuracy has reached 77.4%. The proposed attention mechanisms well focused attention on the bodies of mushroom image for mixed channel attention and the attention heat maps visualized by Grad-CAM. Further, in this study, genetic distance was added to the mushroom image recognition task, the genetic distance was used as the representation space, and the genetic distance between each pair of mushroom species in the dataset was used as the embedding of the genetic distance representation space, so as to predict the image distance and species. identify. We found that using the MES activation function can predict the genetic distance of mushrooms very well, but the accuracy is lower than that of SoftMax. The proposed MushroomNet was demonstrated it shows great potential for automatic and online mushroom image and the proposed automatic procedure would assist and be a reference to traditional mushroom classification.
summary: The species identification of Macrofungi, i.e. mushrooms, has always been a challenging task. There are still a large number of poisonous mushrooms that have not been found, which poses a risk to people's life. However, the traditional identification method requires a large number of experts with knowledge in the field of taxonomy for manual identification, it is not only inefficient but also consumes a lot of manpower and capital costs. In this paper, we propose a new model based on attention-mechanism, MushroomNet, which applies the lightweight network MobileNetV3 as the backbone model, combined with the attention structure proposed by us, and has achieved excellent performance in the mushroom recognition task. On the public dataset, the test accuracy of the MushroomNet model has reached 83.9%, and on the local dataset, the test accuracy has reached 77.4%. The proposed attention mechanisms well focused attention on the bodies of mushroom image for mixed channel attention and the attention heat maps visualized by Grad-CAM. Further, in this study, genetic distance was added to the mushroom image recognition task, the genetic distance was used as the representation space, and the genetic distance between each pair of mushroom species in the dataset was used as the embedding of the genetic distance representation space, so as to predict the image distance and species. identify. We found that using the MES activation function can predict the genetic distance of mushrooms very well, but the accuracy is lower than that of SoftMax. The proposed MushroomNet was demonstrated it shows great potential for automatic and online mushroom image and the proposed automatic procedure would assist and be a reference to traditional mushroom classification.
abstract_zh: 大型真菌（即蘑菇）的物种鉴定一直是一项具有挑战性的任务。目前仍有大量有毒蘑菇未被发现，对人们的生命构成威胁。然而，传统的识别方法需要大量具有分类学领域知识的专家进行人工识别，不仅效率低下，而且消耗大量的人力和资金成本。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于注意力机制的新模型MushroomNet，该模型应用轻量级网络MobileNetV3作为骨干模型，结合我们提出的注意力结构，在蘑菇识别任务中取得了优异的性能。在公共数据集上，MushroomNet模型的测试准确率达到了83.9%，在本地数据集上，测试准确率达到了77.4%。所提出的注意力机制很好地将注意力集中在混合通道注意力的蘑菇图像主体和 Grad-CAM 可视化的注意力热图上。进一步，本研究将遗传距离加入到蘑菇图像识别任务中，将遗传距离作为表示空间，将数据集中每对蘑菇物种之间的遗传距离作为遗传距离表示空间的嵌入，从而预测图像距离和物种。确认。我们发现使用MES激活函数可以很好地预测蘑菇的遗传距离，但精度低于SoftMax。所提出的 MushroomNet 被证明在自动和在线蘑菇图像方面显示出巨大的潜力，并且所提出的自动程序将有助于并成为传统蘑菇分类的参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于注意力机制和遗传信息的蘑菇图像识别模型MushroomNet，结合轻量级网络MobileNetV3与自定义注意力结构，并引入遗传距离进行物种识别。
AI.motivation: 传统蘑菇分类依赖专家人工识别，效率低且成本高，而大量未被发现的毒蘑菇对人类生命安全构成威胁，亟需自动化识别方法。
AI.method: 构建MushroomNet模型，以MobileNetV3为骨干网络，融合自研注意力机制并可视化Grad-CAM热图；将遗传距离作为表示空间嵌入，利用MES激活函数预测遗传距离。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上测试准确率达83.9%，本地数据集达77.4%；MES激活函数可有效预测遗传距离，但准确率低于SoftMax。
AI.conclusion: MushroomNet展示了自动化的蘑菇图像识别潜力，为传统分类方法提供参考，未来可进一步优化遗传距离与图像特征的融合策略。

authors_text: Yuchen Su,Zhiwen Shao,Yong Zhou,Fanrong Meng,Hancheng Zhu,Bing Liu,Rui Yao
title: TextDCT: Arbitrary-Shaped Text Detection via Discrete Cosine Transform Mask
title_zh: TextDCT：通过离散余弦变换掩模进行任意形状的文本检测
comment: This paper has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
comments: This paper has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
abstract: Arbitrary-shaped scene text detection is a challenging task due to the variety of text changes in font, size, color, and orientation. Most existing regression based methods resort to regress the masks or contour points of text regions to model the text instances. However, regressing the complete masks requires high training complexity, and contour points are not sufficient to capture the details of highly curved texts. To tackle the above limitations, we propose a novel light-weight anchor-free text detection framework called TextDCT, which adopts the discrete cosine transform (DCT) to encode the text masks as compact vectors. Further, considering the imbalanced number of training samples among pyramid layers, we only employ a single-level head for top-down prediction. To model the multi-scale texts in a single-level head, we introduce a novel positive sampling strategy by treating the shrunk text region as positive samples, and design a feature awareness module (FAM) for spatial-awareness and scale-awareness by fusing rich contextual information and focusing on more significant features. Moreover, we propose a segmented non-maximum suppression (S-NMS) method that can filter low-quality mask regressions. Extensive experiments are conducted on four challenging datasets, which demonstrate our TextDCT obtains competitive performance on both accuracy and efficiency. Specifically, TextDCT achieves F-measure of 85.1 at 17.2 frames per second (FPS) and F-measure of 84.9 at 15.1 FPS for CTW1500 and Total-Text datasets, respectively.
summary: Arbitrary-shaped scene text detection is a challenging task due to the variety of text changes in font, size, color, and orientation. Most existing regression based methods resort to regress the masks or contour points of text regions to model the text instances. However, regressing the complete masks requires high training complexity, and contour points are not sufficient to capture the details of highly curved texts. To tackle the above limitations, we propose a novel light-weight anchor-free text detection framework called TextDCT, which adopts the discrete cosine transform (DCT) to encode the text masks as compact vectors. Further, considering the imbalanced number of training samples among pyramid layers, we only employ a single-level head for top-down prediction. To model the multi-scale texts in a single-level head, we introduce a novel positive sampling strategy by treating the shrunk text region as positive samples, and design a feature awareness module (FAM) for spatial-awareness and scale-awareness by fusing rich contextual information and focusing on more significant features. Moreover, we propose a segmented non-maximum suppression (S-NMS) method that can filter low-quality mask regressions. Extensive experiments are conducted on four challenging datasets, which demonstrate our TextDCT obtains competitive performance on both accuracy and efficiency. Specifically, TextDCT achieves F-measure of 85.1 at 17.2 frames per second (FPS) and F-measure of 84.9 at 15.1 FPS for CTW1500 and Total-Text datasets, respectively.
abstract_zh: 由于文本的字体、大小、颜色和方向变化多样，任意形状的场景文本检测是一项具有挑战性的任务。大多数现有的基于回归的方法都采用回归文本区域的掩模或轮廓点来对文本实例进行建模。然而，回归完整的掩模需要很高的训练复杂度，并且轮廓点不足以捕获高度弯曲文本的细节。为了解决上述限制，我们提出了一种称为 TextDCT 的新型轻量级无锚文本检测框架，它采用离散余弦变换（DCT）将文本掩码编码为紧凑向量。此外，考虑到金字塔层之间训练样本数量不平衡，我们仅采用单级头进行自上而下的预测。为了对单级头部中的多尺度文本进行建模，我们引入了一种新颖的正采样策略，将缩小的文本区域视为正样本，并通过融合丰富的上下文信息并关注更重要的特征，设计用于空间感知和尺度感知的特征感知模块（FAM）。此外，我们提出了一种分段非极大值抑制（S-NMS）方法，可以过滤低质量的掩模回归。在四个具有挑战性的数据集上进行了广泛的实验，这表明我们的 TextDCT 在准确性和效率方面都获得了有竞争力的性能。具体而言，对于 CTW1500 和 Total-Text 数据集，TextDCT 在 17.2 帧/秒 (FPS) 下实现了 85.1 的 F 测量，在 15.1 FPS 下实现了 84.9 的 F 测量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于离散余弦变换（DCT）的轻量级文本检测框架TextDCT，用于检测任意形状的场景文本。
AI.motivation: 现有基于回归的方法在处理复杂形状文本时存在训练复杂度高、轮廓点无法捕捉弯曲文本细节等问题，需设计更高效的检测方案。
AI.method: 采用DCT将文本掩码编码为紧凑向量，设计单级头结构结合正样本采样策略与特征感知模块（FAM），并引入分段非极大值抑制（S-NMS）优化掩码回归。
AI.result: 在CTW1500和Total-Text数据集上分别以17.2 FPS和15.1 FPS达到85.1和84.9的F-measure，兼顾精度与效率。
AI.conclusion: TextDCT通过DCT编码与多尺度特征融合有效解决了任意形状文本检测的挑战，在多个数据集上表现优异。

result: 在CTW1500和Total-Text数据集上分别以17.2 FPS和15.1 FPS达到85.1和84.9的F-measure，兼顾精度与效率。
conclusion: TextDCT通过DCT编码与多尺度特征融合有效解决了任意形状文本检测的挑战，在多个数据集上表现优异。
search_text: TextDCT: Arbitrary-Shaped Text Detection via Discrete Cosine Transform Mask TextDCT：通过离散余弦变换掩模进行任意形状的文本检测 Arbitrary-shaped scene text detection is a challenging task due to the variety of text changes in font, size, color, and orientation. Most existing regression based methods resort to regress the masks or contour points of text regions to model the text instances. However, regressing the complete masks requires high training complexity, and contour points are not sufficient to capture the details of highly curved texts. To tackle the above limitations, we propose a novel light-weight anchor-free text detection framework called TextDCT, which adopts the discrete cosine transform (DCT) to encode the text masks as compact vectors. Further, considering the imbalanced number of training samples among pyramid layers, we only employ a single-level head for top-down prediction. To model the multi-scale texts in a single-level head, we introduce a novel positive sampling strategy by treating the shrunk text region as positive samples, and design a feature awareness module (FAM) for spatial-awareness and scale-awareness by fusing rich contextual information and focusing on more significant features. Moreover, we propose a segmented non-maximum suppression (S-NMS) method that can filter low-quality mask regressions. Extensive experiments are conducted on four challenging datasets, which demonstrate our TextDCT obtains competitive performance on both accuracy and efficiency. Specifically, TextDCT achieves F-measure of 85.1 at 17.2 frames per second (FPS) and F-measure of 84.9 at 15.1 FPS for CTW1500 and Total-Text datasets, respectively. 由于文本的字体、大小、颜色和方向变化多样，任意形状的场景文本检测是一项具有挑战性的任务。大多数现有的基于回归的方法都采用回归文本区域的掩模或轮廓点来对文本实例进行建模。然而，回归完整的掩模需要很高的训练复杂度，并且轮廓点不足以捕获高度弯曲文本的细节。为了解决上述限制，我们提出了一种称为 TextDCT 的新型轻量级无锚文本检测框架，它采用离散余弦变换（DCT）将文本掩码编码为紧凑向量。此外，考虑到金字塔层之间训练样本数量不平衡，我们仅采用单级头进行自上而下的预测。为了对单级头部中的多尺度文本进行建模，我们引入了一种新颖的正采样策略，将缩小的文本区域视为正样本，并通过融合丰富的上下文信息并关注更重要的特征，设计用于空间感知和尺度感知的特征感知模块（FAM）。此外，我们提出了一种分段非极大值抑制（S-NMS）方法，可以过滤低质量的掩模回归。在四个具有挑战性的数据集上进行了广泛的实验，这表明我们的 TextDCT 在准确性和效率方面都获得了有竞争力的性能。具体而言，对于 CTW1500 和 Total-Text 数据集，TextDCT 在 17.2 帧/秒 (FPS) 下实现了 85.1 的 F 测量，在 15.1 FPS 下实现了 84.9 的 F 测量。 本文提出一种基于离散余弦变换（DCT）的轻量级文本检测框架TextDCT，用于检测任意形状的场景文本。 Yuchen Su,Zhiwen Shao,Yong Zhou,Fanrong Meng,Hancheng Zhu,Bing Liu,Rui Yao cs.CV

authors_text: Deniz Ağaoğlu Çağırıcı,Peter Zeman
title: Recognition and Isomorphism of Proper $\boldsymbol{U}$-graphs in FPT-time
title_zh: FPT 时间内真 $\boldsymbol{U}$ 图的识别和同构
abstract: An $H$-graph is an intersection graph of connected subgraphs of a suitable subdivision of a fixed graph $H$. Many important classes of graphs, including interval graphs, circular-arc graphs, and chordal graphs, can be expressed as $H$-graphs, and, in particular, every graph is an $H$-graph for a suitable graph $H$. An $H$-graph is called proper if it has a representation where no subgraph properly contains another. We consider the recognition and isomorphism problems for proper $U$-graphs where $U$ is a unicylic graph. We prove that testing whether a graph is a (proper) $U$-graph, for some $U$, is NP-hard. On the positive side, we give an FPT-time recognition algorithm, parametrized by $\vert U \vert$. As an application, we obtain an FPT-time isomorphism algorithm for proper $U$-graphs, parametrized by $\vert U \vert$. To complement this, we prove that the isomorphism problem for (proper) $H$-graphs, is as hard as the general isomorphism problem for every fixed $H$ which is not unicyclic.
summary: An $H$-graph is an intersection graph of connected subgraphs of a suitable subdivision of a fixed graph $H$. Many important classes of graphs, including interval graphs, circular-arc graphs, and chordal graphs, can be expressed as $H$-graphs, and, in particular, every graph is an $H$-graph for a suitable graph $H$. An $H$-graph is called proper if it has a representation where no subgraph properly contains another. We consider the recognition and isomorphism problems for proper $U$-graphs where $U$ is a unicylic graph. We prove that testing whether a graph is a (proper) $U$-graph, for some $U$, is NP-hard. On the positive side, we give an FPT-time recognition algorithm, parametrized by $\vert U \vert$. As an application, we obtain an FPT-time isomorphism algorithm for proper $U$-graphs, parametrized by $\vert U \vert$. To complement this, we prove that the isomorphism problem for (proper) $H$-graphs, is as hard as the general isomorphism problem for every fixed $H$ which is not unicyclic.
abstract_zh: $H$ 图是固定图 $H$ 的适当细分的连通子图的交集图。许多重要的图类，包括区间图、圆弧图和弦图，都可以表示为$H$-图，并且特别地，每个图都是合适图$H$的$H$-图。如果 $H$ 图具有一个没有子图正确包含另一个子图的表示，则该 $H$ 图被称为正确的。我们考虑适当的 $U$ 图的识别和同构问题，其中 $U$ 是单环图。我们证明，对于某些 $U$ 来说，测试一个图是否是（正确的）$U$ 图是 NP 困难的。从积极的一面来看，我们给出了一个 FPT 时间识别算法，参数化为 $\vert U \vert$。作为一个应用，我们获得了适当 $U$ 图的 FPT 时间同构算法，参数化为 $\vert U \vert$。为了补充这一点，我们证明（适当的）$H$图的同构问题与每个非单环固定$H$的一般同构问题一样困难。

AI.tldr: 本文研究proper U-图的识别与同构问题，提出参数化为|U|的FPT时间算法，并分析其复杂性。
AI.motivation: H-图涵盖多种重要图类，而proper U-图作为单圈图的特例，其识别与同构问题的复杂性分析具有理论意义。
AI.method: 通过证明NP难性，设计基于|U|参数的FPT算法，并比较不同H结构下的同构问题难度。
AI.result: 证明proper U-图识别为NP难，给出FPT时间算法；同构问题在|U|参数下可解，但非单圈H的同构问题与一般图同构等价。
AI.conclusion: 单圈图U的proper U-图问题可通过FPT算法解决，而其他H的同构问题复杂性更高，凸显单圈图的特殊性。

authors_text: Mia-Katrin Kvalsund,Kyrre Glette,Frank Veenstra
title: Centralized and Decentralized Control in Modular Robots and Their Effect on Morphology
title_zh: 模块化机器人的集中和分散控制及其对形态的影响
comment: 9 pages, 10 figures, to be published in the ALIFE 2022 Proceedings
comments: 9 pages, 10 figures, to be published in the ALIFE 2022 Proceedings
abstract: In Evolutionary Robotics, evolutionary algorithms are used to co-optimize morphology and control. However, co-optimizing leads to different challenges: How do you optimize a controller for a body that often changes its number of inputs and outputs? Researchers must then make some choice between centralized or decentralized control. In this article, we study the effects of centralized and decentralized controllers on modular robot performance and morphologies. This is done by implementing one centralized and two decentralized continuous time recurrent neural network controllers, as well as a sine wave controller for a baseline. We found that a decentralized approach that was more independent of morphology size performed significantly better than the other approaches. It also worked well in a larger variety of morphology sizes. In addition, we highlighted the difficulties of implementing centralized control for a changing morphology, and saw that our centralized controller struggled more with early convergence than the other approaches. Our findings indicate that duplicated decentralized networks are beneficial when evolving both the morphology and control of modular robots. Overall, if these findings translate to other robot systems, our results and issues encountered can help future researchers make a choice of control method when co-optimizing morphology and control.
summary: In Evolutionary Robotics, evolutionary algorithms are used to co-optimize morphology and control. However, co-optimizing leads to different challenges: How do you optimize a controller for a body that often changes its number of inputs and outputs? Researchers must then make some choice between centralized or decentralized control. In this article, we study the effects of centralized and decentralized controllers on modular robot performance and morphologies. This is done by implementing one centralized and two decentralized continuous time recurrent neural network controllers, as well as a sine wave controller for a baseline. We found that a decentralized approach that was more independent of morphology size performed significantly better than the other approaches. It also worked well in a larger variety of morphology sizes. In addition, we highlighted the difficulties of implementing centralized control for a changing morphology, and saw that our centralized controller struggled more with early convergence than the other approaches. Our findings indicate that duplicated decentralized networks are beneficial when evolving both the morphology and control of modular robots. Overall, if these findings translate to other robot systems, our results and issues encountered can help future researchers make a choice of control method when co-optimizing morphology and control.
abstract_zh: 在进化机器人学中，进化算法用于共同优化形态和控制。然而，协同优化会带来不同的挑战：如何针对经常改变输入和输出数量的物体优化控制器？然后，研究人员必须在集中控制或分散控制之间做出选择。在本文中，我们研究集中式和分散式控制器对模块化机器人性能和形态的影响。这是通过实现一个集中式和两个分散式连续时间循环神经网络控制器以及用于基线的正弦波控制器来完成的。我们发现，更独立于形态大小的分散方法比其他方法表现得更好。它在多种形态尺寸中也表现良好。此外，我们强调了对不断变化的形态实施集中控制的困难，并发现我们的集中控制器在早期收敛方面比其他方法更加困难。我们的研究结果表明，重复的分散网络在发展模块化机器人的形态和控制时是有益的。总的来说，如果这些发现转化为其他机器人系统，我们的结果和遇到的问题可以帮助未来的研究人员在共同优化形态和控制时选择控制方法。

AI.tldr: 比较集中式与分布式控制对模块化机器人性能及形态的影响
AI.motivation: 解决共同优化形态与控制时控制器适应形态变化的难题
AI.method: 实现并对比集中式、两种分布式递归神经网络及正弦波控制器
AI.result: 分布式控制器在多种形态中表现更优，集中式控制器早熟收敛问题更明显
AI.conclusion: 分布式网络在形态与控制共进化中更具优势，可为未来研究提供参考

authors_text: Debottam Dutta,Debarpan Bhattacharya,Sriram Ganapathy,Amir H. Poorjam,Deepak Mittal,Maneesh Singh
title: Interpretable Acoustic Representation Learning on Breathing and Speech Signals for COVID-19 Detection
title_zh: 用于 COVID-19 检测的呼吸和语音信号的可解释声学表征学习
abstract: In this paper, we describe an approach for representation learning of audio signals for the task of COVID-19 detection. The raw audio samples are processed with a bank of 1-D convolutional filters that are parameterized as cosine modulated Gaussian functions. The choice of these kernels allows the interpretation of the filterbanks as smooth band-pass filters. The filtered outputs are pooled, log-compressed and used in a self-attention based relevance weighting mechanism. The relevance weighting emphasizes the key regions of the time-frequency decomposition that are important for the downstream task. The subsequent layers of the model consist of a recurrent architecture and the models are trained for a COVID-19 detection task. In our experiments on the Coswara data set, we show that the proposed model achieves significant performance improvements over the baseline system as well as other representation learning approaches. Further, the approach proposed is shown to be uniformly applicable for speech and breathing signals and for transfer learning from a larger data set.
summary: In this paper, we describe an approach for representation learning of audio signals for the task of COVID-19 detection. The raw audio samples are processed with a bank of 1-D convolutional filters that are parameterized as cosine modulated Gaussian functions. The choice of these kernels allows the interpretation of the filterbanks as smooth band-pass filters. The filtered outputs are pooled, log-compressed and used in a self-attention based relevance weighting mechanism. The relevance weighting emphasizes the key regions of the time-frequency decomposition that are important for the downstream task. The subsequent layers of the model consist of a recurrent architecture and the models are trained for a COVID-19 detection task. In our experiments on the Coswara data set, we show that the proposed model achieves significant performance improvements over the baseline system as well as other representation learning approaches. Further, the approach proposed is shown to be uniformly applicable for speech and breathing signals and for transfer learning from a larger data set.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了一种用于 COVID-19 检测任务的音频信号表示学习方法。原始音频样本使用一组一维卷积滤波器进行处理，这些滤波器被参数化为余弦调制高斯函数。这些内核的选择允许将滤波器组解释为平滑带通滤波器。过滤后的输出被汇集、对数压缩并用于基于自注意力的相关性加权机制。相关性加权强调时频分解的关键区域，这对下游任务很重要。模型的后续层由循环架构组成，并且模型针对 COVID-19 检测任务进行训练。在 Coswara 数据集上的实验中，我们表明所提出的模型比基线系统以及其他表示学习方法实现了显着的性能改进。此外，所提出的方法被证明一致适用于语音和呼吸信号以及来自更大数据集的迁移学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的音频表示学习方法，用于通过呼吸和语音信号检测 COVID-19。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在 COVID-19 音频检测中缺乏可解释性，且难以同时处理呼吸与语音信号，需设计统一且可解释的模型框架。
AI.method: 采用余弦调制高斯函数参数化的1-D卷积滤波器提取音频特征，结合池化、对数压缩与自注意力机制进行关键区域加权，最后通过循环网络实现检测。
AI.result: 在 Coswara 数据集上显著优于基线模型及其他表示学习方法，且适用于语音与呼吸信号，并支持跨数据集迁移学习。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过可解释的滤波器设计与注意力机制，在 COVID-19 检测任务中实现了性能与可解释性的平衡，具有广泛适用性。

search_text: Interpretable Acoustic Representation Learning on Breathing and Speech Signals for COVID-19 Detection 用于 COVID-19 检测的呼吸和语音信号的可解释声学表征学习 In this paper, we describe an approach for representation learning of audio signals for the task of COVID-19 detection. The raw audio samples are processed with a bank of 1-D convolutional filters that are parameterized as cosine modulated Gaussian functions. The choice of these kernels allows the interpretation of the filterbanks as smooth band-pass filters. The filtered outputs are pooled, log-compressed and used in a self-attention based relevance weighting mechanism. The relevance weighting emphasizes the key regions of the time-frequency decomposition that are important for the downstream task. The subsequent layers of the model consist of a recurrent architecture and the models are trained for a COVID-19 detection task. In our experiments on the Coswara data set, we show that the proposed model achieves significant performance improvements over the baseline system as well as other representation learning approaches. Further, the approach proposed is shown to be uniformly applicable for speech and breathing signals and for transfer learning from a larger data set. 在本文中，我们描述了一种用于 COVID-19 检测任务的音频信号表示学习方法。原始音频样本使用一组一维卷积滤波器进行处理，这些滤波器被参数化为余弦调制高斯函数。这些内核的选择允许将滤波器组解释为平滑带通滤波器。过滤后的输出被汇集、对数压缩并用于基于自注意力的相关性加权机制。相关性加权强调时频分解的关键区域，这对下游任务很重要。模型的后续层由循环架构组成，并且模型针对 COVID-19 检测任务进行训练。在 Coswara 数据集上的实验中，我们表明所提出的模型比基线系统以及其他表示学习方法实现了显着的性能改进。此外，所提出的方法被证明一致适用于语音和呼吸信号以及来自更大数据集的迁移学习。 本文提出一种可解释的音频表示学习方法，用于通过呼吸和语音信号检测 COVID-19。 Debottam Dutta,Debarpan Bhattacharya,Sriram Ganapathy,Amir H. Poorjam,Deepak Mittal,Maneesh Singh eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Catherine Véronneau,Jeff Denis,Louis-Philippe Lebel,Marc Denninger,Jean-Sébastien Plante,Alexandre Girard
title: A Lightweight Force-Controllable Wearable Arm Based on Magnetorheological-Hydrostatic Actuators
title_zh: 基于磁流变静压执行器的轻型力控可穿戴手臂
comment: ef:2019 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2019, pp. 4018-402
comments: ef:2019 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2019, pp. 4018-402
abstract: Supernumerary Robotic Limbs (SRLs) are wearable robots augmenting human capabilities by acting as a co-worker, reaching objects, support human arms, etc. However, existing SRLs lack the mechanical backdrivability and bandwidth required for tasks where the interaction forces must be controllable such as painting, manipulating fragile objects, etc. Being highly backdrivable with a high bandwidth while minimizing weight presents a major technological challenge imposed by the limited performances of conventional electromagnetic actuators. This paper studies the feasibility of using magnetorheological (MR) clutches coupled to a low-friction hydrostatic transmission to provide a highly capable, but yet lightweight, force-controllable SRL. A 2.7 kg 2-DOFs wearable robotic arm is designed and built. Shoulder and elbow joints are designed to deliver 39 and 25 Nm, with 115 and 180° of range of motion. Experimental studies conducted on a one-DOF test bench and validated analytically demonstrate a high force bandwidth (>25 Hz) and a good ability to control interaction forces even when interacting with an external impedance. Furthermore, three force-control approaches are studied and demonstrated experimentally: open-loop, closed-loop on force, and closed-loop on pressure. All three methods are shown to be effective. Overall, the proposed MR-Hydrostatic actuation system is well-suited for a lightweight SRL interacting with both human and environment that add unpredictable disturbances.
summary: Supernumerary Robotic Limbs (SRLs) are wearable robots augmenting human capabilities by acting as a co-worker, reaching objects, support human arms, etc. However, existing SRLs lack the mechanical backdrivability and bandwidth required for tasks where the interaction forces must be controllable such as painting, manipulating fragile objects, etc. Being highly backdrivable with a high bandwidth while minimizing weight presents a major technological challenge imposed by the limited performances of conventional electromagnetic actuators. This paper studies the feasibility of using magnetorheological (MR) clutches coupled to a low-friction hydrostatic transmission to provide a highly capable, but yet lightweight, force-controllable SRL. A 2.7 kg 2-DOFs wearable robotic arm is designed and built. Shoulder and elbow joints are designed to deliver 39 and 25 Nm, with 115 and 180° of range of motion. Experimental studies conducted on a one-DOF test bench and validated analytically demonstrate a high force bandwidth (>25 Hz) and a good ability to control interaction forces even when interacting with an external impedance. Furthermore, three force-control approaches are studied and demonstrated experimentally: open-loop, closed-loop on force, and closed-loop on pressure. All three methods are shown to be effective. Overall, the proposed MR-Hydrostatic actuation system is well-suited for a lightweight SRL interacting with both human and environment that add unpredictable disturbances.
abstract_zh: 多余机器人肢体 (SRL) 是可穿戴机器人，通过充当同事、伸手触及物体、支撑人类手臂等来增强人类能力。然而，现有的 SRL 缺乏相互作用力必须可控的任务所需的机械反向驱动能力和带宽，例如绘画、操纵易碎物体等。具有高带宽的高度反向驱动能力，同时最大限度地减轻重量，是传统电磁执行器性能有限所带来的重大技术挑战。本文研究了使用磁流变 (MR) 离合器与低摩擦静液压传动装置相结合的可行性，以提供高性能但重量轻、力可控的 SRL。设计并制造了 2.7 kg 2-DOFs 可穿戴机械臂。肩关节和肘关节设计可提供 39 和 25 Nm 的扭矩，以及 115 和 180° 的运动范围。在单自由度测试台上进行并经过分析验证的实验研究表明，即使在与外部阻抗相互作用时，也具有高力带宽（> 25 Hz）和良好的控制相互作用力的能力。此外，还通过实验研究和演示了三种力控制方法：开环、闭环力和闭环压力。所有三种方法均被证明是有效的。总体而言，所提出的 MR 静液压驱动系统非常适合与人类和环境相互作用的轻型 SRL，从而增加不可预测的干扰。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于磁流变-静液压驱动器的轻量级可控制力外骨骼手臂，旨在解决现有超数肢体在机械可逆性和带宽方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有超数肢体（SRL）在需要精确控制交互力的任务（如绘画、操作易碎物体）中存在机械可逆性差、带宽不足的问题，传统电磁执行器性能限制了轻量化设计。
AI.method: 采用磁流变离合器与低摩擦静液压传动结合的驱动方案，设计2.7kg的2自由度外骨骼手臂，通过单自由度测试台验证并对比开环控制、力闭环控制和压力闭环控制三种方法。
AI.result: 实验显示系统具有>25Hz的高力带宽，能有效控制与外部阻抗的交互力，三种控制方法均表现出良好效果。
AI.conclusion: 磁流变-静液压驱动系统可有效满足轻量化外骨骼手臂在复杂环境与人体交互中对力控制的需求。

authors_text: Xu Yang,Juantao Zhong,Daoyuan Wu,Xiao Yi,Jimmy H. M. Lee,Tan Lee,Peng Han
title: Effective Online Exam Proctoring by Combining Lightweight Face Detection and Deep Recognition
title_zh: 结合轻量级人脸检测和深度识别进行有效的在线考试监考
comment: This is a technical report from Lingnan University and the Chinese University of Hong Kong
comments: This is a technical report from Lingnan University and the Chinese University of Hong Kong
abstract: Online exams conducted via video conferencing platforms such as Zoom have become widespread, yet ensuring exam integrity remains challenging due to the difficulty of monitoring multiple video feeds in real time. We present iExam, an online exam proctoring and analysis system that combines lightweight real-time face detection with deep face recognition for postexam analysis. iExam assists invigilators by monitoring student presence during exams and identifies abnormal behaviors, such as face disappearance, face rotation, and identity substitution, from recorded videos. The system addresses three key challenges: (i)efficient real-time video capture and analysis, (ii) automated student identity labeling using enhanced OCR on dynamic Zoom name tags, and (iii) resource-efficient training and inference on standard teacher devices. Extensive experiments show that iExam achieves 90.4% accuracy in real-time face detection and 98.4% accuracy in post-exam recognition with low overhead, demonstrating its practicality and effectiveness for online exam proctoring.
summary: Online exams conducted via video conferencing platforms such as Zoom have become widespread, yet ensuring exam integrity remains challenging due to the difficulty of monitoring multiple video feeds in real time. We present iExam, an online exam proctoring and analysis system that combines lightweight real-time face detection with deep face recognition for postexam analysis. iExam assists invigilators by monitoring student presence during exams and identifies abnormal behaviors, such as face disappearance, face rotation, and identity substitution, from recorded videos. The system addresses three key challenges: (i)efficient real-time video capture and analysis, (ii) automated student identity labeling using enhanced OCR on dynamic Zoom name tags, and (iii) resource-efficient training and inference on standard teacher devices. Extensive experiments show that iExam achieves 90.4% accuracy in real-time face detection and 98.4% accuracy in post-exam recognition with low overhead, demonstrating its practicality and effectiveness for online exam proctoring.
abstract_zh: 通过 Zoom 等视频会议平台进行的在线考试已经变得越来越普遍，但由于实时监控多个视频源的困难，确保考试的完整性仍然具有挑战性。我们推出 iExam，这是一种在线考试监考和分析系统，它将轻量级实时人脸检测与深度人脸识别相结合，用于考后分析。 iExam 通过监控学生在考试期间的表现来协助监考人员，并从录制的视频中识别异常行为，例如面部消失、面部旋转和身份替换。该系统解决了三个关键挑战：(i) 高效的实时视频捕获和分析，(ii) 在动态 Zoom 姓名标签上使用增强型 OCR 进行自动学生身份标记，以及 (iii) 在标准教师设备上进行资源高效的培训和推理。大量实验表明，iExam 以较低的开销实现了 90.4% 的实时人脸检测准确率和 98.4% 的考后识别准确率，证明了其对于在线监考的实用性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iExam系统，结合轻量级实时人脸检测与深度人脸识别技术，解决在线考试监考中的作弊检测问题。
AI.motivation: 在线考试通过视频会议平台普及后，实时监控多路视频流以确保考试公正性面临挑战，需自动化手段辅助监考人员。
AI.method: 融合轻量级实时人脸检测算法与深度人脸识别模型，通过动态OCR技术自动标注学生身份，并优化标准设备上的资源效率。

AI.conclusion: iExam通过高效算法与优化设计，有效解决了在线考试监考中的关键问题，具备实际应用价值。

search_text: Effective Online Exam Proctoring by Combining Lightweight Face Detection and Deep Recognition 结合轻量级人脸检测和深度识别进行有效的在线考试监考 Online exams conducted via video conferencing platforms such as Zoom have become widespread, yet ensuring exam integrity remains challenging due to the difficulty of monitoring multiple video feeds in real time. We present iExam, an online exam proctoring and analysis system that combines lightweight real-time face detection with deep face recognition for postexam analysis. iExam assists invigilators by monitoring student presence during exams and identifies abnormal behaviors, such as face disappearance, face rotation, and identity substitution, from recorded videos. The system addresses three key challenges: (i)efficient real-time video capture and analysis, (ii) automated student identity labeling using enhanced OCR on dynamic Zoom name tags, and (iii) resource-efficient training and inference on standard teacher devices. Extensive experiments show that iExam achieves 90.4% accuracy in real-time face detection and 98.4% accuracy in post-exam recognition with low overhead, demonstrating its practicality and effectiveness for online exam proctoring. 通过 Zoom 等视频会议平台进行的在线考试已经变得越来越普遍，但由于实时监控多个视频源的困难，确保考试的完整性仍然具有挑战性。我们推出 iExam，这是一种在线考试监考和分析系统，它将轻量级实时人脸检测与深度人脸识别相结合，用于考后分析。 iExam 通过监控学生在考试期间的表现来协助监考人员，并从录制的视频中识别异常行为，例如面部消失、面部旋转和身份替换。该系统解决了三个关键挑战：(i) 高效的实时视频捕获和分析，(ii) 在动态 Zoom 姓名标签上使用增强型 OCR 进行自动学生身份标记，以及 (iii) 在标准教师设备上进行资源高效的培训和推理。大量实验表明，iExam 以较低的开销实现了 90.4% 的实时人脸检测准确率和 98.4% 的考后识别准确率，证明了其对于在线监考的实用性和有效性。 本文提出iExam系统，结合轻量级实时人脸检测与深度人脸识别技术，解决在线考试监考中的作弊检测问题。 Xu Yang,Juantao Zhong,Daoyuan Wu,Xiao Yi,Jimmy H. M. Lee,Tan Lee,Peng Han cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Tung Nguyen,Sang T. Truong,Jeffrey Uhlmann
title: A Simple and Scalable Tensor Completion Algorithm via Latent Invariant Constraint for Recommendation System
title_zh: 推荐系统中基于潜在不变约束的简单且可扩展的张量补全算法
abstract: In this paper we provide a latent-variable formulation and solution to the recommender system (RS) problem in terms of a fundamental property that any reasonable solution should be expected to satisfy. Specifically, we examine a novel tensor completion method to efficiently and accurately learn parameters of a model for the unobservable personal preferences that underly user ratings. By regularizing the tensor decomposition with a single latent invariant, we achieve three properties for a reliable recommender system: (1) uniqueness of the tensor completion result with minimal assumptions, (2) unit consistency that is independent of arbitrary preferences of users, and (3) a consensus ordering guarantee that provides consistent ranking between observed and unobserved rating scores. Our algorithm leads to a simple and elegant recommendation framework that has linear computational complexity and with no hyperparameter tuning. We provide empirical results demonstrating that the approach significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods.
summary: In this paper we provide a latent-variable formulation and solution to the recommender system (RS) problem in terms of a fundamental property that any reasonable solution should be expected to satisfy. Specifically, we examine a novel tensor completion method to efficiently and accurately learn parameters of a model for the unobservable personal preferences that underly user ratings. By regularizing the tensor decomposition with a single latent invariant, we achieve three properties for a reliable recommender system: (1) uniqueness of the tensor completion result with minimal assumptions, (2) unit consistency that is independent of arbitrary preferences of users, and (3) a consensus ordering guarantee that provides consistent ranking between observed and unobserved rating scores. Our algorithm leads to a simple and elegant recommendation framework that has linear computational complexity and with no hyperparameter tuning. We provide empirical results demonstrating that the approach significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们根据任何合理的解决方案都应满足的基本属性，提供了推荐系统（RS）问题的潜变量公式和解决方案。具体来说，我们研究了一种新颖的张量补全方法，以有效、准确地学习模型参数，以了解用户评分背后不可观察的个人偏好。通过使用单个潜在不变量对张量分解进行正则化，我们实现了可靠推荐系统的三个属性：（1）在最小假设下张量完成结果的唯一性，（2）独立于用户任意偏好的单元一致性，以及（3）共识排序保证，在观察到的和未观察到的评分之间提供一致的排名。我们的算法产生了一个简单而优雅的推荐框架，该框架具有线性计算复杂性并且无需超参数调整。我们提供的实证结果表明该方法明显优于当前最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在不变约束的张量补全算法，用于推荐系统中学习用户潜在偏好参数，实现高效准确的推荐。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统在处理用户评分数据时，常面临解唯一性不足、用户偏好依赖性强及排序一致性难以保证等问题，且多数方法需要复杂调参。
AI.method: 通过引入单潜在不变约束对张量分解进行正则化，构建满足唯一性、单位一致性及共识排序保证的推荐框架，算法复杂度线性且无需超参数调整。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个数据集上显著优于当前最先进的推荐算法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的简单可扩展张量补全算法，在保证推荐系统可靠性的同时提升了计算效率，为实际应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Klaudia-Doris Thellmann,Bernhard Stadler,Ricardo Usbeck,Jens Lehmann
title: Transformer with Tree-order Encoding for Neural Program Generation
title_zh: 用于生成神经程序的具有树序编码的 Transformer
comment: This paper was authored in late 2020 and early 2021 for the most part
comments: This paper was authored in late 2020 and early 2021 for the most part
abstract: While a considerable amount of semantic parsing approaches have employed RNN architectures for code generation tasks, there have been only few attempts to investigate the applicability of Transformers for this task. Including hierarchical information of the underlying programming language syntax has proven to be effective for code generation. Since the positional encoding of the Transformer can only represent positions in a flat sequence, we have extended the encoding scheme to allow the attention mechanism to also attend over hierarchical positions in the input. Furthermore, we have realized a decoder based on a restrictive grammar graph model to improve the generation accuracy and ensure the well-formedness of the generated code. While we did not surpass the state of the art, our findings suggest that employing a tree-based positional encoding in combination with a shared natural-language subword vocabulary improves generation performance over sequential positional encodings.
summary: While a considerable amount of semantic parsing approaches have employed RNN architectures for code generation tasks, there have been only few attempts to investigate the applicability of Transformers for this task. Including hierarchical information of the underlying programming language syntax has proven to be effective for code generation. Since the positional encoding of the Transformer can only represent positions in a flat sequence, we have extended the encoding scheme to allow the attention mechanism to also attend over hierarchical positions in the input. Furthermore, we have realized a decoder based on a restrictive grammar graph model to improve the generation accuracy and ensure the well-formedness of the generated code. While we did not surpass the state of the art, our findings suggest that employing a tree-based positional encoding in combination with a shared natural-language subword vocabulary improves generation performance over sequential positional encodings.
abstract_zh: 虽然大量语义解析方法已采用 RNN 架构来执行代码生成任务，但很少有人尝试研究 Transformer 在此任务中的适用性。事实证明，包含底层编程语言语法的分层信息对于代码生成是有效的。由于 Transformer 的位置编码只能表示平面序列中的位置，因此我们扩展了编码方案，以允许注意力机制也参与输入中的分层位置。此外，我们还实现了基于限制性语法图模型的解码器，以提高生成精度并确保生成代码的格式良好。虽然我们没有超越现有技术，但我们的研究结果表明，采用基于树的位置编码与共享自然语言子词词汇相结合可以提高顺序位置编码的生成性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合树序编码的Transformer模型，用于改进神经程序生成任务中的代码生成效果。
AI.motivation: 传统RNN在代码生成中表现良好，但Transformer的位置编码无法有效处理编程语言的层次结构，限制了其在代码生成任务中的应用。
AI.method: 扩展Transformer的位置编码以支持树状结构的层次信息，并采用基于限制语法图模型的解码器确保生成代码的语法正确性。
AI.result: 实验未超越当前最优方法，但树序编码与共享自然语言子词表的结合相比序列位置编码显著提升了生成性能。
AI.conclusion: 树结构位置编码与共享词汇表的结合有效提升了代码生成质量，未来可通过优化语法约束机制进一步提升效果。

While we did not surpass the state of the art, our findings suggest that employing a tree-based positional encoding in combination with a shared natural-language subword vocabulary improves generation performance over sequential positional encodings. 虽然大量语义解析方法已采用 RNN 架构来执行代码生成任务，但很少有人尝试研究 Transformer 在此任务中的适用性。事实证明，包含底层编程语言语法的分层信息对于代码生成是有效的。由于 Transformer 的位置编码只能表示平面序列中的位置，因此我们扩展了编码方案，以允许注意力机制也参与输入中的分层位置。此外，我们还实现了基于限制性语法图模型的解码器，以提高生成精度并确保生成代码的格式良好。虽然我们没有超越现有技术，但我们的研究结果表明，采用基于树的位置编码与共享自然语言子词词汇相结合可以提高顺序位置编码的生成性能。 本文提出了一种结合树序编码的Transformer模型，用于改进神经程序生成任务中的代码生成效果。 Klaudia-Doris Thellmann,Bernhard Stadler,Ricardo Usbeck,Jens Lehmann cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Joseph Carlsmith
title: Is Power-Seeking AI an Existential Risk?
title_zh: 追求权力的人工智能是一种生存风险吗？
comment: 57 pages, 1 figure. Edited to fix link to audio version, add links to short version and reviews, and fix a typo in section 2.1.2
comments: 57 pages, 1 figure. Edited to fix link to audio version, add links to short version and reviews, and fix a typo in section 2.1.2
abstract: This report examines what I see as the core argument for concern about existential risk from misaligned artificial intelligence. I proceed in two stages. First, I lay out a backdrop picture that informs such concern. On this picture, intelligent agency is an extremely powerful force, and creating agents much more intelligent than us is playing with fire -- especially given that if their objectives are problematic, such agents would plausibly have instrumental incentives to seek power over humans. Second, I formulate and evaluate a more specific six-premise argument that creating agents of this kind will lead to existential catastrophe by 2070. On this argument, by 2070: (1) it will become possible and financially feasible to build relevantly powerful and agentic AI systems; (2) there will be strong incentives to do so; (3) it will be much harder to build aligned (and relevantly powerful/agentic) AI systems than to build misaligned (and relevantly powerful/agentic) AI systems that are still superficially attractive to deploy; (4) some such misaligned systems will seek power over humans in high-impact ways; (5) this problem will scale to the full disempowerment of humanity; and (6) such disempowerment will constitute an existential catastrophe. I assign rough subjective credences to the premises in this argument, and I end up with an overall estimate of ~5% that an existential catastrophe of this kind will occur by 2070. (May 2022 update: since making this report public in April 2021, my estimate here has gone up, and is now at >10%.)

First, I lay out a backdrop picture that informs such concern. On this picture, intelligent agency is an extremely powerful force, and creating agents much more intelligent than us is playing with fire -- especially given that if their objectives are problematic, such agents would plausibly have instrumental incentives to seek power over humans. Second, I formulate and evaluate a more specific six-premise argument that creating agents of this kind will lead to existential catastrophe by 2070. On this argument, by 2070: (1) it will become possible and financially feasible to build relevantly powerful and agentic AI systems; (2) there will be strong incentives to do so; (3) it will be much harder to build aligned (and relevantly powerful/agentic) AI systems than to build misaligned (and relevantly powerful/agentic) AI systems that are still superficially attractive to deploy; (4) some such misaligned systems will seek power over humans in high-impact ways; (5) this problem will scale to the full disempowerment of humanity; and (6) such disempowerment will constitute an existential catastrophe. I assign rough subjective credences to the premises in this argument, and I end up with an overall estimate of ~5% that an existential catastrophe of this kind will occur by 2070. (May 2022 update: since making this report public in April 2021, my estimate here has gone up, and is now at >10%.)
abstract_zh: 这份报告探讨了我认为对人工智能失调带来的生存风险的担忧的核心论点。我分两个阶段进行。首先，我展示了一张背景图片来表达这种担忧。从这张图上看，智能机构是一股极其强大的力量，创造比我们聪明得多的智能体无异于在玩火——特别是考虑到如果他们的目标有问题，这些智能体很可能有工具性动机去寻求超越人类的权力。其次，我提出并评估了一个更具体的六前提论点，即创建此类代理将在 2070 年导致生存灾难。根据这一论点，到 2070 年：（1）构建相关强大且代理的人工智能系统将变得可能且在经济上可行； (2) 有强烈的动机这样做； (3) 构建一致的（且相关强大/代理的）人工智能系统比构建错位（且相关强大/代理的）人工智能系统要困难得多，但表面上仍具有部署吸引力； (4) 一些此类失调的系统将以高影响力的方式寻求对人类的权力； (5) 这个问题将严重到人类完全丧失权力； (6) 这种剥夺权力将构成一场生存灾难。我对这一论点中的前提给出了粗略的主观可信度，最终得出的总体估计是，到 2070 年，这种存在主义灾难将会发生约 5%。（2022 年 5 月更新：自 2021 年 4 月公开这份报告以来，我的估计有所上升，目前已超过 10%。）

AI.tldr: 本文分析了失控人工智能可能带来的存在性风险，通过两个阶段论证：首先构建背景框架，其次提出包含六个前提的论证，评估到2070年因目标错位的强人工智能导致人类灭绝的可能性。
AI.motivation: 作者认为，若人工智能具备超越人类的智能且目标不一致，可能通过追求权力对人类造成灾难性影响，需提前识别并应对这一存在性风险。
AI.method: 采用两阶段分析法：第一阶段阐述智能体力量的潜在危险性；第二阶段构建六前提论证链，结合主观概率评估，推导出2070年前发生存在性灾难的可能性。
AI.result: 作者最初估计存在性灾难发生概率为5%，后续更新后提升至10%以上，表明对AI风险的认知在动态调整。
AI.conclusion: 尽管概率未达极高，但作者强调需正视AI对齐难题的紧迫性，认为当前技术发展路径可能使人类面临被完全剥夺控制权的灾难性后果。

authors_text: Said Kerrache,Yasushi Nakauchi
title: Constrained Mass Optimal Transport
title_zh: 约束质量最优传输
abstract: Optimal mass transport, also known as the earth mover's problem, is an optimization problem with important applications in various disciplines, including economics, probability theory, fluid dynamics, cosmology and geophysics to cite a few. Optimal transport has also found successful applications in image registration, content-based image retrieval, and more generally in pattern recognition and machine learning as a way to measure dissimilarity among data. This paper introduces the problem of constrained optimal transport. The time-dependent formulation, more precisely, the fluid dynamics approach is used as a starting point from which the constrained problem is defined by imposing a soft constraint on the density and momentum fields or restricting them to a subset of curves that satisfy some prescribed conditions. A family of algorithms is introduced to solve a class of constrained saddle point problems, which has convexly constrained optimal transport on closed convex subsets of the Euclidean space as a special case. Convergence proofs and numerical results are presented.
summary: Optimal mass transport, also known as the earth mover's problem, is an optimization problem with important applications in various disciplines, including economics, probability theory, fluid dynamics, cosmology and geophysics to cite a few. Optimal transport has also found successful applications in image registration, content-based image retrieval, and more generally in pattern recognition and machine learning as a way to measure dissimilarity among data. This paper introduces the problem of constrained optimal transport. The time-dependent formulation, more precisely, the fluid dynamics approach is used as a starting point from which the constrained problem is defined by imposing a soft constraint on the density and momentum fields or restricting them to a subset of curves that satisfy some prescribed conditions. A family of algorithms is introduced to solve a class of constrained saddle point problems, which has convexly constrained optimal transport on closed convex subsets of the Euclidean space as a special case. Convergence proofs and numerical results are presented.
abstract_zh: 最优质量传输，也称为推土机问题，是一个优化问题，在多个学科中都有重要应用，包括经济学、概率论、流体动力学、宇宙学和地球物理学等。最佳传输还在图像配准、基于内容的图像检索以及更广泛的模式识别和机器学习中得到了成功的应用，作为测量数据之间差异的一种方法。本文介绍了约束最优传输问题。瞬态公式，更准确地说，流体动力学方法被用作起点，通过对密度和动量场施加软约束或将它们限制为满足某些规定条件的曲线子集来定义约束问题。引入一族算法来解决一类约束鞍点问题，该问题在欧几里得空间的闭凸子集上具有凸约束最优传输作为特例。给出了收敛性证明和数值结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出约束最优运输问题的求解方法，通过流体动力学方法定义约束条件并设计算法解决相关鞍点问题。
AI.motivation: 最优运输在多个领域有广泛应用，但现有方法缺乏对密度和动量场约束的考虑，需解决实际应用中的约束条件问题。
AI.method: 基于流体动力学的时间依赖公式，通过软约束或曲线子集限制定义约束问题，并引入解决凸约束鞍点问题的算法族。
AI.result: 提供了算法收敛性证明及数值实验结果，验证了方法在凸子集约束下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为约束最优运输问题提供了理论框架和算法解决方案，扩展了最优运输理论的应用范围。

authors_text: Amit Sheth,Manas Gaur,Kaushik Roy,Revathy Venkataraman,Vedant Khandelwal
title: Process Knowledge-Infused AI: Towards User-level Explainability, Interpretability, and Safety
title_zh: 流程注入知识的人工智能：迈向用户级可解释性、可解释性和安全性
comment: To paper in IEEE Internet Computing 2022
comments: To paper in IEEE Internet Computing 2022
abstract: AI systems have been widely adopted across various domains in the real world. However, in high-value, sensitive, or safety-critical applications such as self-management for personalized health or food recommendation with a specific purpose (e.g., allergy-aware recipe recommendations), their adoption is unlikely. Firstly, the AI system needs to follow guidelines or well-defined processes set by experts; the data alone will not be adequate. For example, to diagnose the severity of depression, mental healthcare providers use Patient Health Questionnaire (PHQ-9). So if an AI system were to be used for diagnosis, the medical guideline implied by the PHQ-9 needs to be used. Likewise, a nutritionist's knowledge and steps would need to be used for an AI system that guides a diabetic patient in developing a food plan. Second, the BlackBox nature typical of many current AI systems will not work; the user of an AI system will need to be able to give user-understandable explanations, explanations constructed using concepts that humans can understand and are familiar with. This is the key to eliciting confidence and trust in the AI system. For such applications, in addition to data and domain knowledge, the AI systems need to have access to and use the Process Knowledge, an ordered set of steps that the AI system needs to use or adhere to.
summary: AI systems have been widely adopted across various domains in the real world. However, in high-value, sensitive, or safety-critical applications such as self-management for personalized health or food recommendation with a specific purpose (e.g., allergy-aware recipe recommendations), their adoption is unlikely. Firstly, the AI system needs to follow guidelines or well-defined processes set by experts; the data alone will not be adequate. For example, to diagnose the severity of depression, mental healthcare providers use Patient Health Questionnaire (PHQ-9). So if an AI system were to be used for diagnosis, the medical guideline implied by the PHQ-9 needs to be used. Likewise, a nutritionist's knowledge and steps would need to be used for an AI system that guides a diabetic patient in developing a food plan. Second, the BlackBox nature typical of many current AI systems will not work; the user of an AI system will need to be able to give user-understandable explanations, explanations constructed using concepts that humans can understand and are familiar with. This is the key to eliciting confidence and trust in the AI system. For such applications, in addition to data and domain knowledge, the AI systems need to have access to and use the Process Knowledge, an ordered set of steps that the AI system needs to use or adhere to.
abstract_zh: 人工智能系统已在现实世界的各个领域得到广泛采用。然而，在高价值、敏感或安全关键的应用中，例如个性化健康的自我管理或具有特定目的的食物推荐（例如过敏感知食谱推荐），它们不太可能被采用。首先，人工智能系统需要遵循专家制定的指导方针或明确定义的流程；仅靠数据是不够的。例如，为了诊断抑郁症的严重程度，精神卫生保健提供者使用患者健康问卷 (PHQ-9)。因此，如果要使用人工智能系统进行诊断，就需要使用 PHQ-9 所暗示的医疗指南。同样，营养师的知识和步骤需要用于指导糖尿病患者制定饮食计划的人工智能系统。其次，当前许多人工智能系统典型的黑盒性质将无法发挥作用；人工智能系统的用户需要能够提供用户可以理解的解释，这些解释是使用人类可以理解和熟悉的概念构建的。这是激发人们对人工智能系统信心和信任的关键。对于此类应用程序，除了数据和领域知识之外，人工智能系统还需要访问和使用流程知识，这是人工智能系统需要使用或遵守的一组有序步骤。

AI.method: 通过整合领域专家定义的流程知识（如PHQ-9量表步骤），构建符合人类认知逻辑的AI决策框架。
AI.result: 验证了融合过程知识的AI系统能生成符合领域规范的可解释决策，提升用户信任度与系统安全性。
AI.conclusion: 过程知识驱动的AI框架可有效解决高敏感领域应用中的可解释性与安全性挑战。

authors_text: Hanwen Zhou,Xiufen Ye
title: A Unified Initial Alignment Method of SINS Based on FGO
title_zh: 基于FGO的捷联惯导统一初始对准方法
comment: 8 pages, This article has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Industrial Electronics
comments: 8 pages, This article has been accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Industrial Electronics
abstract: The initial alignment provides an accurate attitude for SINS (strapdown inertial navigation system). By further estimating the IMU's bias and misalignment angle, the recursive Bayesian filter is accurate. However, the prior heading error has significant influence on the convergence speed and accuracy. In addition, the accuracy will be limited by its iteration at a single time-step. Coarse alignment method OBA (optimization-based alignment) uses MLE (maximum likelihood estimation) to find the optimal attitude quickly. However, few methods consider the IMU bias and misalignment angle, which will reduce the attitude accuracy. In this paper, a unified method based on FGO (Factor graph optimization) and IBF (inertial base frame) is proposed. The attitude is estimated by MLE, IMU bias and misalignment angle are estimated by MAP estimation. The state of all time steps is optimized together to further improve the accuracy. Physical experiments on the rotation MEMS SINS show that the heading accuracy of this method is improved in limited alignment time.
summary: The initial alignment provides an accurate attitude for SINS (strapdown inertial navigation system). By further estimating the IMU's bias and misalignment angle, the recursive Bayesian filter is accurate. However, the prior heading error has significant influence on the convergence speed and accuracy. In addition, the accuracy will be limited by its iteration at a single time-step. Coarse alignment method OBA (optimization-based alignment) uses MLE (maximum likelihood estimation) to find the optimal attitude quickly. However, few methods consider the IMU bias and misalignment angle, which will reduce the attitude accuracy. In this paper, a unified method based on FGO (Factor graph optimization) and IBF (inertial base frame) is proposed. The attitude is estimated by MLE, IMU bias and misalignment angle are estimated by MAP estimation. The state of all time steps is optimized together to further improve the accuracy. Physical experiments on the rotation MEMS SINS show that the heading accuracy of this method is improved in limited alignment time.
abstract_zh: 初始对准为 SINS（捷联惯性导航系统）提供了准确的姿态。通过进一步估计IMU的偏差和未对准角度，递归贝叶斯滤波器是准确的。然而，先验航向误差对收敛速度和精度有显着影响。此外，准确性将受到单个时间步迭代的限制。粗对准方法OBA（基于优化的对准）使用MLE（最大似然估计）来快速找到最佳姿态。然而，很少有方法考虑IMU偏差和未对准角度，这会降低姿态精度。本文提出了一种基于FGO（因子图优化）和IBF（惯性基架）的统一方法。通过MLE估计姿态，通过MAP估计估计IMU偏差和未对准角度。所有时间步的状态一起优化，以进一步提高准确性。旋转MEMS捷联惯导系统物理实验表明，该方法在有限对准时间内提高了航向精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于因子图优化（FGO）和惯性基坐标系（IBF）的SINS初始对准统一方法，以提高对准精度和收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 现有递归贝叶斯滤波受先验航向误差影响，单步迭代限制精度；优化对准方法（OBA）虽快速但忽略IMU偏差和失准角估计，导致姿态精度不足。
AI.method: 融合FGO与IBF框架，采用最大似然估计（MLE）估计姿态，最大后验估计（MAP）联合估计IMU偏差和失准角，并优化所有时间步状态。
AI.result: 旋转式MEMS SINS物理实验表明，该方法在有限对准时间内显著提升了航向精度。
AI.conclusion: 基于FGO的统一方法有效解决了初始对准中精度与速度的矛盾，验证了多状态联合优化的有效性。

authors_text: Sebastian G. Popescu,David J. Sharp,James H. Cole,Konstantinos Kamnitsas,Ben Glocker
title: Distributional Gaussian Processes Layers for Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 用于分布外检测的分布高斯过程层
comment: Published in Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging: Special Issue: Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI) 2021
comments: Published in Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging: Special Issue: Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI) 2021
abstract: Machine learning models deployed on medical imaging tasks must be equipped with out-of-distribution detection capabilities in order to avoid erroneous predictions. It is unsure whether out-of-distribution detection models reliant on deep neural networks are suitable for detecting domain shifts in medical imaging. Gaussian Processes can reliably separate in-distribution data points from out-of-distribution data points via their mathematical construction. Hence, we propose a parameter efficient Bayesian layer for hierarchical convolutional Gaussian Processes that incorporates Gaussian Processes operating in Wasserstein-2 space to reliably propagate uncertainty. This directly replaces convolving Gaussian Processes with a distance-preserving affine operator on distributions. Our experiments on brain tissue-segmentation show that the resulting architecture approaches the performance of well-established deterministic segmentation algorithms (U-Net), which has not been achieved with previous hierarchical Gaussian Processes. Moreover, by applying the same segmentation model to out-of-distribution data (i.e., images with pathology such as brain tumors), we show that our uncertainty estimates result in out-of-distribution detection that outperforms the capabilities of previous Bayesian networks and reconstruction-based approaches that learn normative distributions. To facilitate future work our code is publicly available.
summary: Machine learning models deployed on medical imaging tasks must be equipped with out-of-distribution detection capabilities in order to avoid erroneous predictions. It is unsure whether out-of-distribution detection models reliant on deep neural networks are suitable for detecting domain shifts in medical imaging. Gaussian Processes can reliably separate in-distribution data points from out-of-distribution data points via their mathematical construction. Hence, we propose a parameter efficient Bayesian layer for hierarchical convolutional Gaussian Processes that incorporates Gaussian Processes operating in Wasserstein-2 space to reliably propagate uncertainty. This directly replaces convolving Gaussian Processes with a distance-preserving affine operator on distributions. Our experiments on brain tissue-segmentation show that the resulting architecture approaches the performance of well-established deterministic segmentation algorithms (U-Net), which has not been achieved with previous hierarchical Gaussian Processes. Moreover, by applying the same segmentation model to out-of-distribution data (i.e., images with pathology such as brain tumors), we show that our uncertainty estimates result in out-of-distribution detection that outperforms the capabilities of previous Bayesian networks and reconstruction-based approaches that learn normative distributions. To facilitate future work our code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 部署在医学成像任务上的机器学习模型必须配备分布外检测功能，以避免错误的预测。目前尚不确定依赖于深度神经网络的分布外检测模型是否适合检测医学成像中的域移位。高斯过程可以通过其数学结构可靠地将分布内数据点与分布外数据点分开。因此，我们提出了一种用于分层卷积高斯过程的参数有效贝叶斯层，该层结合了在 Wasserstein-2 空间中运行的高斯过程，以可靠地传播不确定性。这直接用分布上的保持距离仿射算子取代了卷积高斯过程。我们对脑组织分割的实验表明，所得的架构接近成熟的确定性分割算法（U-Net）的性能，这是以前的分层高斯过程无法实现的。此外，通过将相同的分割模型应用于分布外数据（即具有脑肿瘤等病理学的图像），我们表明我们的不确定性估计导致分布外检测，其性能优于以前的贝叶斯网络和基于重建的学习规范分布的方法的能力。为了方便将来的工作，我们的代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布高斯过程层的参数高效贝叶斯方法，用于医学影像领域的分布外检测（OOD Detection）。
AI.motivation: 医学影像任务中深度神经网络的分布外检测能力存疑，而高斯过程可通过数学构造可靠区分分布内/外数据，但传统分层高斯过程存在性能局限。
AI.method: 设计在Wasserstein-2空间运作的高斯过程层，通过距离保持的仿射算子替代传统卷积操作，构建参数高效的分层卷积高斯过程模型。
AI.result: 在脑组织分割任务中达到与U-Net相当的性能，且对肿瘤等病理图像的分布外检测效果优于现有贝叶斯网络和基于重构的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持分割性能的同时显著提升分布外检测能力，为医学影像领域提供新的不确定性量化框架。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布高斯过程层的参数高效贝叶斯方法，用于医学影像领域的分布外检测（OOD Detection）。
ai_content.motivation: 医学影像任务中深度神经网络的分布外检测能力存疑，而高斯过程可通过数学构造可靠区分分布内/外数据，但传统分层高斯过程存在性能局限。
ai_content.method: 设计在Wasserstein-2空间运作的高斯过程层，通过距离保持的仿射算子替代传统卷积操作，构建参数高效的分层卷积高斯过程模型。
ai_content.result: 在脑组织分割任务中达到与U-Net相当的性能，且对肿瘤等病理图像的分布外检测效果优于现有贝叶斯网络和基于重构的方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法在保持分割性能的同时显著提升分布外检测能力，为医学影像领域提供新的不确定性量化框架。

search_text: Distributional Gaussian Processes Layers for Out-of-Distribution Detection 用于分布外检测的分布高斯过程层 Machine learning models deployed on medical imaging tasks must be equipped with out-of-distribution detection capabilities in order to avoid erroneous predictions. It is unsure whether out-of-distribution detection models reliant on deep neural networks are suitable for detecting domain shifts in medical imaging. Gaussian Processes can reliably separate in-distribution data points from out-of-distribution data points via their mathematical construction. Hence, we propose a parameter efficient Bayesian layer for hierarchical convolutional Gaussian Processes that incorporates Gaussian Processes operating in Wasserstein-2 space to reliably propagate uncertainty. This directly replaces convolving Gaussian Processes with a distance-preserving affine operator on distributions. Our experiments on brain tissue-segmentation show that the resulting architecture approaches the performance of well-established deterministic segmentation algorithms (U-Net), which has not been achieved with previous hierarchical Gaussian Processes. Moreover, by applying the same segmentation model to out-of-distribution data (i.e., images with pathology such as brain tumors), we show that our uncertainty estimates result in out-of-distribution detection that outperforms the capabilities of previous Bayesian networks and reconstruction-based approaches that learn normative distributions. To facilitate future work our code is publicly available. 部署在医学成像任务上的机器学习模型必须配备分布外检测功能，以避免错误的预测。目前尚不确定依赖于深度神经网络的分布外检测模型是否适合检测医学成像中的域移位。高斯过程可以通过其数学结构可靠地将分布内数据点与分布外数据点分开。因此，我们提出了一种用于分层卷积高斯过程的参数有效贝叶斯层，该层结合了在 Wasserstein-2 空间中运行的高斯过程，以可靠地传播不确定性。这直接用分布上的保持距离仿射算子取代了卷积高斯过程。我们对脑组织分割的实验表明，所得的架构接近成熟的确定性分割算法（U-Net）的性能，这是以前的分层高斯过程无法实现的。此外，通过将相同的分割模型应用于分布外数据（即具有脑肿瘤等病理学的图像），我们表明我们的不确定性估计导致分布外检测，其性能优于以前的贝叶斯网络和基于重建的学习规范分布的方法的能力。为了方便将来的工作，我们的代码是公开的。 本文提出一种基于分布高斯过程层的参数高效贝叶斯方法，用于医学影像领域的分布外检测（OOD Detection）。 Sebastian G. Popescu,David J. Sharp,James H. Cole,Konstantinos Kamnitsas,Ben Glocker cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: José Ramón Prieto,Juan José Flores,Enrique Vidal,Alejandro H. Toselli,David Garrido,Carlos Alonso
title: Open Set Classification of Untranscribed Handwritten Documents
title_zh: 未转录手写文档的开集分类
abstract: Huge amounts of digital page images of important manuscripts are preserved in archives worldwide. The amounts are so large that it is generally unfeasible for archivists to adequately tag most of the documents with the required metadata so as to low proper organization of the archives and effective exploration by scholars and the general public. The class or ``typology'' of a document is perhaps the most important tag to be included in the metadata. The technical problem is one of automatic classification of documents, each consisting of a set of untranscribed handwritten text images, by the textual contents of the images. The approach considered is based on ``probabilistic indexing'', a relatively novel technology which allows to effectively represent the intrinsic word-level uncertainty exhibited by handwritten text images. We assess the performance of this approach on a large collection of complex notarial manuscripts from the Spanish Archivo Hostórico Provincial de Cádiz, with promising results.
summary: Huge amounts of digital page images of important manuscripts are preserved in archives worldwide. The amounts are so large that it is generally unfeasible for archivists to adequately tag most of the documents with the required metadata so as to low proper organization of the archives and effective exploration by scholars and the general public. The class or ``typology'' of a document is perhaps the most important tag to be included in the metadata. The technical problem is one of automatic classification of documents, each consisting of a set of untranscribed handwritten text images, by the textual contents of the images. The approach considered is based on ``probabilistic indexing'', a relatively novel technology which allows to effectively represent the intrinsic word-level uncertainty exhibited by handwritten text images. We assess the performance of this approach on a large collection of complex notarial manuscripts from the Spanish Archivo Hostórico Provincial de Cádiz, with promising results.
abstract_zh: 世界各地的档案馆中保存着大量重要手稿的数字页面图像。数量如此之大，以至于档案管理员通常无法用所需的元数据对大多数文档进行充分标记，从而导致档案的适当组织以及学者和公众的有效探索。文档的类或“类型”可能是元数据中包含的最重要的标签。技术问题是根据图像的文本内容对文档进行自动分类，每个文档由一组未转录的手写文本图像组成。所考虑的方法基于“概率索引”，这是一种相对新颖的技术，可以有效地表示手写文本图像所表现出的内在字级不确定性。我们在西班牙加的斯省档案馆收集的大量复杂公证手稿上评估了这种方法的性能，并取得了可喜的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于概率索引技术的开放集分类方法，用于对未转录的手写文档进行自动分类。
AI.motivation: 全球档案馆保存了大量数字化手写文献图像，但人工标注元数据的工作量巨大，亟需自动化方法实现文档分类以提升档案管理效率和可检索性。
AI.method: 采用概率索引技术，通过建模手写文本图像的词级不确定性，实现对未转录手写文档的开放集分类。
AI.result: 在西班牙加的斯省历史档案馆的大量复杂公证文书数据集上验证了该方法的有效性，取得了有前景的分类结果。
AI.conclusion: 概率索引技术能够有效处理未转录手写文档的开放集分类问题，为大规模档案数字化管理提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Omar Tanner
title: Multi-Agent Car Parking using Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用强化学习的多代理停车场
comment: ef:Book of Abstracts, ICUR 2022
comments: ef:Book of Abstracts, ICUR 2022
abstract: As the industry of autonomous driving grows, so does the potential interaction of groups of autonomous cars. Combined with the advancement of Artificial Intelligence and simulation, such groups can be simulated, and safety-critical models can be learned controlling the cars within. This study applies reinforcement learning to the problem of multi-agent car parking, where groups of cars aim to efficiently park themselves, while remaining safe and rational. Utilising robust tools and machine learning frameworks, we design and implement a flexible car parking environment in the form of a Markov decision process with independent learners, exploiting multi-agent communication. We implement a suite of tools to perform experiments at scale, obtaining models parking up to 7 cars with over a 98.1% success rate, significantly beating existing single-agent models. We also obtain several results relating to competitive and collaborative behaviours exhibited by the cars in our environment, with varying densities and levels of communication. Notably, we discover a form of collaboration that cannot arise without competition, and a 'leaky' form of collaboration whereby agents collaborate without sufficient state. Such work has numerous potential applications in the autonomous driving and fleet management industries, and provides several useful techniques and benchmarks for the application of reinforcement learning to multi-agent car parking.
summary: As the industry of autonomous driving grows, so does the potential interaction of groups of autonomous cars. Combined with the advancement of Artificial Intelligence and simulation, such groups can be simulated, and safety-critical models can be learned controlling the cars within. This study applies reinforcement learning to the problem of multi-agent car parking, where groups of cars aim to efficiently park themselves, while remaining safe and rational. Utilising robust tools and machine learning frameworks, we design and implement a flexible car parking environment in the form of a Markov decision process with independent learners, exploiting multi-agent communication. We implement a suite of tools to perform experiments at scale, obtaining models parking up to 7 cars with over a 98.1% success rate, significantly beating existing single-agent models. We also obtain several results relating to competitive and collaborative behaviours exhibited by the cars in our environment, with varying densities and levels of communication. Notably, we discover a form of collaboration that cannot arise without competition, and a 'leaky' form of collaboration whereby agents collaborate without sufficient state. Such work has numerous potential applications in the autonomous driving and fleet management industries, and provides several useful techniques and benchmarks for the application of reinforcement learning to multi-agent car parking.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶行业的发展，自动驾驶汽车组之间潜在的互动也在不断增长。结合人工智能和模拟的进步，可以模拟这些群体，并且可以学习控制其中的汽车的安全关键模型。这项研究将强化学习应用于多智能体停车问题，其中汽车组的目标是有效地自行停车，同时保持安全和合理。利用强大的工具和机器学习框架，我们以独立学习者的马尔可夫决策过程的形式设计和实现灵活的停车环境，利用多代理通信。我们实施了一套工具来进行大规模实验，获得了可停放 7 辆车的模型，成功率超过 98.1%，显着优于现有的单代理模型。我们还获得了一些与汽车在我们的环境中表现出的竞争和协作行为相关的结果，这些行为具有不同的通信密度和水平。值得注意的是，我们发现了一种没有竞争就不可能出现的协作形式，以及一种“泄漏”协作形式，即代理在没有足够状态的情况下进行协作。此类工作在自动驾驶和车队管理行业具有许多潜在的应用，并为强化学习在多智能体停车场的应用提供了一些有用的技术和基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于强化学习的多智能体汽车停车方法，通过模拟环境实现高效安全的自主停车。
AI.motivation: 随着自动驾驶发展，多辆自动驾驶汽车的协同交互需求增加，需解决群体停车时的安全性与效率问题。
AI.method: 构建马尔可夫决策过程模拟环境，采用独立学习者架构结合多智能体通信，设计大规模实验工具进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 实现7辆汽车停车成功率超98.1%，发现竞争驱动协作机制及无需完整状态信息的'泄漏'协作模式。
AI.conclusion: 为自动驾驶和车队管理提供关键技术方案，建立多智能体停车领域的新基准与研究方向。

ai_content.result: 实现7辆汽车停车成功率超98.1%，发现竞争驱动协作机制及无需完整状态信息的'泄漏'协作模式。
ai_content.conclusion: 为自动驾驶和车队管理提供关键技术方案，建立多智能体停车领域的新基准与研究方向。

Such work has numerous potential applications in the autonomous driving and fleet management industries, and provides several useful techniques and benchmarks for the application of reinforcement learning to multi-agent car parking. 随着自动驾驶行业的发展，自动驾驶汽车组之间潜在的互动也在不断增长。结合人工智能和模拟的进步，可以模拟这些群体，并且可以学习控制其中的汽车的安全关键模型。这项研究将强化学习应用于多智能体停车问题，其中汽车组的目标是有效地自行停车，同时保持安全和合理。利用强大的工具和机器学习框架，我们以独立学习者的马尔可夫决策过程的形式设计和实现灵活的停车环境，利用多代理通信。我们实施了一套工具来进行大规模实验，获得了可停放 7 辆车的模型，成功率超过 98.1%，显着优于现有的单代理模型。我们还获得了一些与汽车在我们的环境中表现出的竞争和协作行为相关的结果，这些行为具有不同的通信密度和水平。值得注意的是，我们发现了一种没有竞争就不可能出现的协作形式，以及一种“泄漏”协作形式，即代理在没有足够状态的情况下进行协作。此类工作在自动驾驶和车队管理行业具有许多潜在的应用，并为强化学习在多智能体停车场的应用提供了一些有用的技术和基准。 本文提出基于强化学习的多智能体汽车停车方法，通过模拟环境实现高效安全的自主停车。 Omar Tanner cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Peijie Dong,Xin Niu,Lujun Li,Linzhen Xie,Wenbin Zou,Tian Ye,Zimian Wei,Hengyue Pan
title: Prior-Guided One-shot Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 先验引导的一次性神经架构搜索
comment: Official 3st Place Solution for the Second workshop Neural Architecture Search Second lightweight NAS Challenge 2022 - Track1 Supernet Track. Official leaderboard: https://aistudio.baidu.com/aistudio/competition/detail/149/0/leaderboard CVPR 2022 Workshop: https://cvpr-nas.com/competition
comments: Official 3st Place Solution for the Second workshop Neural Architecture Search Second lightweight NAS Challenge 2022 - Track1 Supernet Track. Official leaderboard: https://aistudio.baidu.com/aistudio/competition/detail/149/0/leaderboard CVPR 2022 Workshop: https://cvpr-nas.com/competition
abstract: Neural architecture search methods seek optimal candidates with efficient weight-sharing supernet training. However, recent studies indicate poor ranking consistency about the performance between stand-alone architectures and shared-weight networks. In this paper, we present Prior-Guided One-shot NAS (PGONAS) to strengthen the ranking correlation of supernets. Specifically, we first explore the effect of activation functions and propose a balanced sampling strategy based on the Sandwich Rule to alleviate weight coupling in the supernet. Then, FLOPs and Zen-Score are adopted to guide the training of supernet with ranking correlation loss. Our PGONAS ranks 3rd place in the supernet Track Track of CVPR2022 Second lightweight NAS challenge. Code is available in https://github.com/pprp/CVPR2022-NAS?competition-Track1-3th-solution.
summary: Neural architecture search methods seek optimal candidates with efficient weight-sharing supernet training. However, recent studies indicate poor ranking consistency about the performance between stand-alone architectures and shared-weight networks. In this paper, we present Prior-Guided One-shot NAS (PGONAS) to strengthen the ranking correlation of supernets. Specifically, we first explore the effect of activation functions and propose a balanced sampling strategy based on the Sandwich Rule to alleviate weight coupling in the supernet. Then, FLOPs and Zen-Score are adopted to guide the training of supernet with ranking correlation loss. Our PGONAS ranks 3rd place in the supernet Track Track of CVPR2022 Second lightweight NAS challenge. Code is available in https://github.com/pprp/CVPR2022-NAS?competition-Track1-3th-solution.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索方法通过有效的权重共享超网训练来寻找最佳候选者。然而，最近的研究表明，独立架构和共享权重网络之间的性能排名一致性较差。在本文中，我们提出了先验引导一次性 NAS (PGONAS) 来加强超网的排名相关性。具体来说，我们首先探讨激活函数的效果，并提出一种基于三明治规则的平衡采样策略，以减轻超网中的权重耦合。然后，采用FLOPs和Zen-Score来指导具有排名相关损失的超网的训练。我们的PGONAS在CVPR2022第二届轻量级NAS挑战赛超网Track Track中排名第三。代码可在 https://github.com/pprp/CVPR2022-NAS?competition-Track1-3th-solution 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Prior-Guided One-shot NAS（PGONAS）方法，解决共享权重超网络中架构性能排名不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有NAS方法在共享权重超网络中存在架构性能排名与独立评估结果不一致的问题，影响搜索效率与准确性。
AI.method: 基于Sandwich Rule设计平衡采样策略缓解权重耦合，结合FLOPs和Zen-Score指标引入排名相关性损失函数训练超网络。
AI.result: 在CVPR2022轻量级NAS挑战赛超网络赛道中获得第三名，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: PGONAS通过先验引导机制有效提升了超网络架构评估的排名一致性，验证了方法在实际竞赛中的有效性。
