authors_text: Yuchen Wang,Zhongyu Li,Xiangxiang Cui,Liangliang Zhang,Xiang Luo,Meng Yang,Shi Chang
title: Key-frame Guided Network for Thyroid Nodule Recognition using Ultrasound Videos
title_zh: 使用超声视频进行甲状腺结节识别的关键帧引导网络
abstract: Ultrasound examination is widely used in the clinical diagnosis of thyroid nodules (benign/malignant). However, the accuracy relies heavily on radiologist experience. Although deep learning techniques have been investigated for thyroid nodules recognition. Current solutions are mainly based on static ultrasound images, with limited temporal information used and inconsistent with clinical diagnosis. This paper proposes a novel method for the automated recognition of thyroid nodules through an exhaustive exploration of ultrasound videos and key-frames. We first propose a detection-localization framework to automatically identify the clinical key-frame with a typical nodule in each ultrasound video. Based on the localized key-frame, we develop a key-frame guided video classification model for thyroid nodule recognition. Besides, we introduce a motion attention module to help the network focus on significant frames in an ultrasound video, which is consistent with clinical diagnosis. The proposed thyroid nodule recognition framework is validated on clinically collected ultrasound videos, demonstrating superior performance compared with other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Ultrasound examination is widely used in the clinical diagnosis of thyroid nodules (benign/malignant). However, the accuracy relies heavily on radiologist experience. Although deep learning techniques have been investigated for thyroid nodules recognition. Current solutions are mainly based on static ultrasound images, with limited temporal information used and inconsistent with clinical diagnosis. This paper proposes a novel method for the automated recognition of thyroid nodules through an exhaustive exploration of ultrasound videos and key-frames. We first propose a detection-localization framework to automatically identify the clinical key-frame with a typical nodule in each ultrasound video. Based on the localized key-frame, we develop a key-frame guided video classification model for thyroid nodule recognition. Besides, we introduce a motion attention module to help the network focus on significant frames in an ultrasound video, which is consistent with clinical diagnosis. The proposed thyroid nodule recognition framework is validated on clinically collected ultrasound videos, demonstrating superior performance compared with other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 超声检查广泛应用于甲状腺结节（良性/恶性）的临床诊断。然而，准确性在很大程度上依赖于放射科医生的经验。尽管深度学习技术已经被研究用于甲状腺结节识别。目前的解决方案主要基于静态超声图像，使用的时间信息有限，与临床诊断不一致。本文提出了一种通过对超声视频和关键帧进行详尽探索来自动识别甲状腺结节的新方法。我们首先提出了一个检测定位框架，用于自动识别每个超声视频中具有典型结节的临床关键帧。基于局部关键帧，我们开发了一种用于甲状腺结节识别的关键帧引导视频分类模型。此外，我们引入了运动注意力模块来帮助网络关注超声视频中的重要帧，这与临床诊断一致。所提出的甲状腺结节识别框架在临床收集的超声视频上得到了验证，与其他最先进的方法相比，表现出优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于关键帧引导的网络，利用超声视频进行甲状腺结节的自动识别方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖静态图像，未充分利用超声视频的时间信息，导致与临床诊断不一致，需提升自动识别的准确性。
AI.method: 提出检测-定位框架自动识别关键帧，构建关键帧引导的分类模型，并引入运动注意力模块以聚焦重要帧。
AI.result: 在临床超声视频数据集上验证，性能优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效利用超声视频信息，提升甲状腺结节识别准确性，符合临床诊断需求。

authors_text: Edward G. A. Henderson,Andrew F. Green,Marcel van Herk,Eliana M. Vasquez Osorio
title: Automatic identification of segmentation errors for radiotherapy using geometric learning
title_zh: 使用几何学习自动识别放射治疗的分割错误
comment: Accepted in 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2022). This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections
comments: Accepted in 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2022). This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections
abstract: Automatic segmentation of organs-at-risk (OARs) in CT scans using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) is being introduced into the radiotherapy workflow. However, these segmentations still require manual editing and approval by clinicians prior to clinical use, which can be time consuming. The aim of this work was to develop a tool to automatically identify errors in 3D OAR segmentations without a ground truth. Our tool uses a novel architecture combining a CNN and graph neural network (GNN) to leverage the segmentation's appearance and shape. The proposed model is trained using self-supervised learning using a synthetically-generated dataset of segmentations of the parotid and with realistic contouring errors. The effectiveness of our model is assessed with ablation tests, evaluating the efficacy of different portions of the architecture as well as the use of transfer learning from an unsupervised pretext task. Our best performing model predicted errors on the parotid gland with a precision of 85.0% & 89.7% for internal and external errors respectively, and recall of 66.5% & 68.6%. This offline QA tool could be used in the clinical pathway, potentially decreasing the time clinicians spend correcting contours by detecting regions which require their attention. All our code is publicly available at https://github.com/rrr-uom-projects/contour_auto_QATool.
summary: Automatic segmentation of organs-at-risk (OARs) in CT scans using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) is being introduced into the radiotherapy workflow. However, these segmentations still require manual editing and approval by clinicians prior to clinical use, which can be time consuming. The aim of this work was to develop a tool to automatically identify errors in 3D OAR segmentations without a ground truth. Our tool uses a novel architecture combining a CNN and graph neural network (GNN) to leverage the segmentation's appearance and shape. The proposed model is trained using self-supervised learning using a synthetically-generated dataset of segmentations of the parotid and with realistic contouring errors. The effectiveness of our model is assessed with ablation tests, evaluating the efficacy of different portions of the architecture as well as the use of transfer learning from an unsupervised pretext task. Our best performing model predicted errors on the parotid gland with a precision of 85.0% & 89.7% for internal and external errors respectively, and recall of 66.5% & 68.6%. This offline QA tool could be used in the clinical pathway, potentially decreasing the time clinicians spend correcting contours by detecting regions which require their attention. All our code is publicly available at https://github.com/rrr-uom-projects/contour_auto_QATool.
abstract_zh: 使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 对 CT 扫描中的危及器官 (OAR) 自动分割正在被引入放射治疗工作流程中。然而，这些分割仍然需要临床医生在临床使用之前进行手动编辑和批准，这可能非常耗时。这项工作的目的是开发一种工具，在没有基本事实的情况下自动识别 3D OAR 分割中的错误。我们的工具使用结合了 CNN 和图神经网络 (GNN) 的新颖架构来利用分割的外观和形状。所提出的模型是使用自我监督学习进行训练的，使用合成生成的腮腺分割数据集和真实的轮廓误差。我们模型的有效性是通过消融测试来评估的，评估架构不同部分的有效性以及从无监督借口任务中使用迁移学习。我们性能最佳的模型对腮腺的预测误差，内部和外部误差的精确度分别为 85.0% 和 89.7%，召回率为 66.5% 和 68.6%。这种离线 QA 工具可用于临床路径，可能会减少临床医生通过检测需要注意的区域来校正轮廓所花费的时间。我们所有的代码均可在 https://github.com/rrr-uom-projects/contour_auto_QATool 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何学习的自动识别放疗中器官分割错误的工具，无需真实标签即可检测分割缺陷。
AI.motivation: 当前基于CNN的器官分割需人工校正，耗时且效率低，需开发自动化工具减少临床工作量。
AI.method: 结合CNN与图神经网络（GNN），利用自监督学习在合成数据集（含腮腺分割及人为错误）上训练模型，并通过消融实验与迁移学习验证效果。
AI.result: 最佳模型对腮腺分割的内部/外部错误检测精确率达85.0%/89.7%，召回率为66.5%/68.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该离线质控工具可辅助临床医生快速定位需修正的区域，提升放疗分割效率，代码已开源。

search_text: Automatic identification of segmentation errors for radiotherapy using geometric learning 使用几何学习自动识别放射治疗的分割错误 Automatic segmentation of organs-at-risk (OARs) in CT scans using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) is being introduced into the radiotherapy workflow. However, these segmentations still require manual editing and approval by clinicians prior to clinical use, which can be time consuming. The aim of this work was to develop a tool to automatically identify errors in 3D OAR segmentations without a ground truth. Our tool uses a novel architecture combining a CNN and graph neural network (GNN) to leverage the segmentation's appearance and shape. The proposed model is trained using self-supervised learning using a synthetically-generated dataset of segmentations of the parotid and with realistic contouring errors. The effectiveness of our model is assessed with ablation tests, evaluating the efficacy of different portions of the architecture as well as the use of transfer learning from an unsupervised pretext task. Our best performing model predicted errors on the parotid gland with a precision of 85.0% & 89.7% for internal and external errors respectively, and recall of 66.5% & 68.6%. This offline QA tool could be used in the clinical pathway, potentially decreasing the time clinicians spend correcting contours by detecting regions which require their attention. All our code is publicly available at https://github.com/rrr-uom-projects/contour_auto_QATool. 使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 对 CT 扫描中的危及器官 (OAR) 自动分割正在被引入放射治疗工作流程中。然而，这些分割仍然需要临床医生在临床使用之前进行手动编辑和批准，这可能非常耗时。这项工作的目的是开发一种工具，在没有基本事实的情况下自动识别 3D OAR 分割中的错误。我们的工具使用结合了 CNN 和图神经网络 (GNN) 的新颖架构来利用分割的外观和形状。所提出的模型是使用自我监督学习进行训练的，使用合成生成的腮腺分割数据集和真实的轮廓误差。我们模型的有效性是通过消融测试来评估的，评估架构不同部分的有效性以及从无监督借口任务中使用迁移学习。我们性能最佳的模型对腮腺的预测误差，内部和外部误差的精确度分别为 85.0% 和 89.7%，召回率为 66.5% 和 68.6%。这种离线 QA 工具可用于临床路径，可能会减少临床医生通过检测需要注意的区域来校正轮廓所花费的时间。我们所有的代码均可在 https://github.com/rrr-uom-projects/contour_auto_QATool 上公开获取。 本文提出一种基于几何学习的自动识别放疗中器官分割错误的工具，无需真实标签即可检测分割缺陷。 Edward G. A. Henderson,Andrew F. Green,Marcel van Herk,Eliana M. Vasquez Osorio cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: David Lindner,Mennatallah El-Assady
title: Humans are not Boltzmann Distributions: Challenges and Opportunities for Modelling Human Feedback and Interaction in Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 人类不是玻尔兹曼分布：强化学习中人类反馈和交互建模的挑战和机遇
comment: Accepted to Communication in Human-AI Interaction Workshop (CHAI) at IJCAI-ECAI-22
comments: Accepted to Communication in Human-AI Interaction Workshop (CHAI) at IJCAI-ECAI-22
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) commonly assumes access to well-specified reward functions, which many practical applications do not provide. Instead, recently, more work has explored learning what to do from interacting with humans. So far, most of these approaches model humans as being (nosily) rational and, in particular, giving unbiased feedback. We argue that these models are too simplistic and that RL researchers need to develop more realistic human models to design and evaluate their algorithms. In particular, we argue that human models have to be personal, contextual, and dynamic. This paper calls for research from different disciplines to address key questions about how humans provide feedback to AIs and how we can build more robust human-in-the-loop RL systems.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) commonly assumes access to well-specified reward functions, which many practical applications do not provide. Instead, recently, more work has explored learning what to do from interacting with humans. So far, most of these approaches model humans as being (nosily) rational and, in particular, giving unbiased feedback. We argue that these models are too simplistic and that RL researchers need to develop more realistic human models to design and evaluate their algorithms. In particular, we argue that human models have to be personal, contextual, and dynamic. This paper calls for research from different disciplines to address key questions about how humans provide feedback to AIs and how we can build more robust human-in-the-loop RL systems.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）通常假设可以访问明确的奖励函数，但许多实际应用程序并不提供这种功能。相反，最近有更多的工作探索通过与人类互动来学习如何做。到目前为止，大多数方法都将人类建模为（爱管闲事的）理性的，特别是给出公正的反馈。我们认为这些模型过于简单化，强化学习研究人员需要开发更现实的人类模型来设计和评估他们的算法。特别是，我们认为人类模型必须是个性化的、情境化的和动态的。本文呼吁不同学科的研究来解决人类如何向人工智能提供反馈以及如何构建更强大的人机循环强化学习系统等关键问题。

AI.tldr: 论文指出当前强化学习中人类模型过于简化，需构建更现实的个性化、上下文和动态模型，并呼吁跨学科合作以改进人机交互的RL系统。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设人类反馈无偏且理性，但实际人类行为更复杂，需更真实模型以提升RL算法设计与评估。
AI.method: 论文通过分析现有模型局限，提出需考虑个性化、上下文和动态因素，并倡导跨学科方法解决人类反馈建模问题。
AI.result: 论文识别出人类反馈建模的关键挑战，并提出未来研究方向，如构建动态、个性化模型及跨学科合作。
AI.conclusion: 结论强调需开发更现实的人类模型，推动跨学科研究，以构建更稳健的人机交互强化学习系统。

authors_text: Kristina Tesch,Timo Gerkmann
title: Insights Into Deep Non-linear Filters for Improved Multi-channel Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 深入了解用于改进多通道语音增强的深度非线性滤波器
comment: Accepted version
comments: Accepted version
abstract: The key advantage of using multiple microphones for speech enhancement is that spatial filtering can be used to complement the tempo-spectral processing. In a traditional setting, linear spatial filtering (beamforming) and single-channel post-filtering are commonly performed separately. In contrast, there is a trend towards employing deep neural networks (DNNs) to learn a joint spatial and tempo-spectral non-linear filter, which means that the restriction of a linear processing model and that of a separate processing of spatial and tempo-spectral information can potentially be overcome. However, the internal mechanisms that lead to good performance of such data-driven filters for multi-channel speech enhancement are not well understood. Therefore, in this work, we analyse the properties of a non-linear spatial filter realized by a DNN as well as its interdependency with temporal and spectral processing by carefully controlling the information sources (spatial, spectral, and temporal) available to the network. We confirm the superiority of a non-linear spatial processing model, which outperforms an oracle linear spatial filter in a challenging speaker extraction scenario for a low number of microphones by 0.24 POLQA score. Our analyses reveal that in particular spectral information should be processed jointly with spatial information as this increases the spatial selectivity of the filter. Our systematic evaluation then leads to a simple network architecture, that outperforms state-of-the-art network architectures on a speaker extraction task by 0.22 POLQA score and by 0.32 POLQA score on the CHiME3 data.
summary: The key advantage of using multiple microphones for speech enhancement is that spatial filtering can be used to complement the tempo-spectral processing. In a traditional setting, linear spatial filtering (beamforming) and single-channel post-filtering are commonly performed separately. In contrast, there is a trend towards employing deep neural networks (DNNs) to learn a joint spatial and tempo-spectral non-linear filter, which means that the restriction of a linear processing model and that of a separate processing of spatial and tempo-spectral information can potentially be overcome. However, the internal mechanisms that lead to good performance of such data-driven filters for multi-channel speech enhancement are not well understood. Therefore, in this work, we analyse the properties of a non-linear spatial filter realized by a DNN as well as its interdependency with temporal and spectral processing by carefully controlling the information sources (spatial, spectral, and temporal) available to the network. We confirm the superiority of a non-linear spatial processing model, which outperforms an oracle linear spatial filter in a challenging speaker extraction scenario for a low number of microphones by 0.24 POLQA score. Our analyses reveal that in particular spectral information should be processed jointly with spatial information as this increases the spatial selectivity of the filter. Our systematic evaluation then leads to a simple network architecture, that outperforms state-of-the-art network architectures on a speaker extraction task by 0.22 POLQA score and by 0.32 POLQA score on the CHiME3 data.
abstract_zh: 使用多个麦克风进行语音增强的主要优点是可以使用空间滤波来补充时间频谱处理。在传统设置中，线性空间滤波（波束成形）和单通道后置滤波通常是分开执行的。相比之下，有一种趋势是采用深度神经网络（DNN）来学习联合空间和时间谱非线性滤波器，这意味着可以克服线性处理模型以及空间和时间谱信息单独处理的限制。然而，导致这种用于多通道语音增强的数据驱动滤波器具有良好性能的内部机制尚不清楚。因此，在这项工作中，我们通过仔细控制网络可用的信息源（空间、光谱和时间）来分析由 DNN 实现的非线性空间滤波器的属性及其与时间和光谱处理的相互依赖性。我们证实了非线性空间处理模型的优越性，在具有挑战性的少量麦克风的说话人提取场景中，该模型的 POLQA 分数优于 Oracle 线性空间滤波器 0.24。我们的分析表明，特别是光谱信息应与空间信息联合处理，因为这增加了滤波器的空间选择性。然后，我们的系统评估得出了一个简单的网络架构，该网络架构在说话人提取任务上优于最先进的网络架构，其 POLQA 得分高出 0.22，CHiME3 数据上的 POLQA 得分高出 0.32。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用深度非线性滤波器提升多通道语音增强效果的方法，分析其内部机制并提出改进架构。
AI.motivation: 传统线性空间滤波与单通道后处理分离的局限性，以及数据驱动滤波器内部机制不明确的问题。
AI.method: 通过控制输入网络的空间、谱及时域信息源，分析非线性滤波器特性及其与时频处理的关联性。
AI.result: 非线性模型在少量麦克风场景下优于线性滤波器0.24 POLQA分，联合谱空间处理提升选择性，新架构在任务中分别提升0.22和0.32 POLQA分。
AI.conclusion: 非线性空间处理优于线性模型，谱信息与空间信息联合处理关键，简单架构可有效提升性能。

In a traditional setting, linear spatial filtering (beamforming) and single-channel post-filtering are commonly performed separately. However, the internal mechanisms that lead to good performance of such data-driven filters for multi-channel speech enhancement are not well understood. Therefore, in this work, we analyse the properties of a non-linear spatial filter realized by a DNN as well as its interdependency with temporal and spectral processing by carefully controlling the information sources (spatial, spectral, and temporal) available to the network. We confirm the superiority of a non-linear spatial processing model, which outperforms an oracle linear spatial filter in a challenging speaker extraction scenario for a low number of microphones by 0.24 POLQA score. Our analyses reveal that in particular spectral information should be processed jointly with spatial information as this increases the spatial selectivity of the filter. Our systematic evaluation then leads to a simple network architecture, that outperforms state-of-the-art network architectures on a speaker extraction task by 0.22 POLQA score and by 0.32 POLQA score on the CHiME3 data. 使用多个麦克风进行语音增强的主要优点是可以使用空间滤波来补充时间频谱处理。在传统设置中，线性空间滤波（波束成形）和单通道后置滤波通常是分开执行的。相比之下，有一种趋势是采用深度神经网络（DNN）来学习联合空间和时间谱非线性滤波器，这意味着可以克服线性处理模型以及空间和时间谱信息单独处理的限制。然而，导致这种用于多通道语音增强的数据驱动滤波器具有良好性能的内部机制尚不清楚。因此，在这项工作中，我们通过仔细控制网络可用的信息源（空间、光谱和时间）来分析由 DNN 实现的非线性空间滤波器的属性及其与时间和光谱处理的相互依赖性。我们证实了非线性空间处理模型的优越性，在具有挑战性的少量麦克风的说话人提取场景中，该模型的 POLQA 分数优于 Oracle 线性空间滤波器 0.24。我们的分析表明，特别是光谱信息应与空间信息联合处理，因为这增加了滤波器的空间选择性。然后，我们的系统评估得出了一个简单的网络架构，该网络架构在说话人提取任务上优于最先进的网络架构，其 POLQA 得分高出 0.22，CHiME3 数据上的 POLQA 得分高出 0.32。 本文研究了利用深度非线性滤波器提升多通道语音增强效果的方法，分析其内部机制并提出改进架构。 Kristina Tesch,Timo Gerkmann eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Romain Xu-Darme,Georges Quénot,Zakaria Chihani,Marie-Christine Rousset
title: PARTICUL: Part Identification with Confidence measure using Unsupervised Learning
title_zh: PARTICUL：使用无监督学习通过置信度测量进行零件识别
comment: Accepted at XAIE: 2nd Workshop on Explainable and Ethical AI -- ICPR 2022
comments: Accepted at XAIE: 2nd Workshop on Explainable and Ethical AI -- ICPR 2022
abstract: In this paper, we present PARTICUL, a novel algorithm for unsupervised learning of part detectors from datasets used in fine-grained recognition. It exploits the macro-similarities of all images in the training set in order to mine for recurring patterns in the feature space of a pre-trained convolutional neural network. We propose new objective functions enforcing the locality and unicity of the detected parts. Additionally, we embed our detectors with a confidence measure based on correlation scores, allowing the system to estimate the visibility of each part. We apply our method on two public fine-grained datasets (Caltech-UCSD Bird 200 and Stanford Cars) and show that our detectors can consistently highlight parts of the object while providing a good measure of the confidence in their prediction. We also demonstrate that these detectors can be directly used to build part-based fine-grained classifiers that provide a good compromise between the transparency of prototype-based approaches and the performance of non-interpretable methods.
summary: In this paper, we present PARTICUL, a novel algorithm for unsupervised learning of part detectors from datasets used in fine-grained recognition. It exploits the macro-similarities of all images in the training set in order to mine for recurring patterns in the feature space of a pre-trained convolutional neural network. We propose new objective functions enforcing the locality and unicity of the detected parts. Additionally, we embed our detectors with a confidence measure based on correlation scores, allowing the system to estimate the visibility of each part. We apply our method on two public fine-grained datasets (Caltech-UCSD Bird 200 and Stanford Cars) and show that our detectors can consistently highlight parts of the object while providing a good measure of the confidence in their prediction. We also demonstrate that these detectors can be directly used to build part-based fine-grained classifiers that provide a good compromise between the transparency of prototype-based approaches and the performance of non-interpretable methods.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 PARTICUL，这是一种从细粒度识别中使用的数据集无监督学习部分检测器的新算法。它利用训练集中所有图像的宏观相似性来挖掘预训练卷积神经网络特征空间中的重复模式。我们提出了新的目标函数，以增强检测到的部分的局部性和唯一性。此外，我们在检测器中嵌入了基于相关分数的置信度度量，使系统能够估计每个部分的可见性。我们将我们的方法应用于两个公共细粒度数据集（加州理工学院-加州大学圣地亚哥分校 Bird 200 和斯坦福汽车），并表明我们的检测器可以一致地突出显示对象的某些部分，同时提供对其预测的置信度的良好衡量。我们还证明，这些检测器可以直接用于构建基于部件的细粒度分类器，这些分类器在基于原型的方法的透明度和不可解释方法的性能之间提供了良好的折衷。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PARTICUL算法，通过无监督学习从细粒度识别数据集中学习部分检测器，并结合置信度度量以提高检测结果的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 细粒度识别任务需要精确的部件检测，但现有方法依赖标注数据或缺乏可解释性。本文旨在开发一种无需标注的无监督算法，同时提供部件检测的置信度评估。
AI.method: 利用预训练卷积神经网络的特征空间，通过挖掘训练集中图像的宏观相似性，设计新的目标函数约束部件的局部性和唯一性，并嵌入基于相关性得分的置信度度量。
AI.result: 在Caltech-UCSD Bird 200和Stanford Cars数据集上验证，检测器能有效定位物体部件并提供可靠的置信度，所构建的基于部件的分类器在透明性与性能间取得平衡。
AI.conclusion: PARTICUL通过无监督学习和置信度机制，为细粒度识别提供了兼具可解释性与性能的部件检测解决方案。

authors_text: Harsh Vardhan,Janos Sztipanovits
title: Deep Active Learning for Regression Using $ε$-weighted Hybrid Query Strategy
title_zh: 使用 $ε$ 加权混合查询策略进行深度主动学习回归
abstract: Designing an inexpensive approximate surrogate model that captures the salient features of an expensive high-fidelity behavior is a prevalent approach in design optimization. In recent times, Deep Learning (DL) models are being used as a promising surrogate computational model for engineering problems. However, the main challenge in creating a DL-based surrogate is to simulate/label a large number of design points, which is time-consuming for computationally costly and/or high-dimensional engineering problems. In the present work, we propose a novel sampling technique by combining the active learning (AL) method with DL. We call this method $ε$-weighted hybrid query strategy ($ε$-HQS) , which focuses on the evaluation of the surrogate at each learning iteration and provides an estimate of the failure probability of the surrogate in the Design Space. By reusing already collected training and test data, the learned failure probability guides the next iteration's sampling process to the region of the high probability of failure. During the empirical evaluation, better accuracy of the surrogate was observed in comparison to other methods of sample selection. We empirically evaluated this method in two different engineering design domains, finite element based static stress analysis of submarine pressure vessel(computationally costly process) and second submarine propeller design( high dimensional problem). https://github.com/vardhah/epsilon_weighted_Hybrid_Query_Strategy
summary: Designing an inexpensive approximate surrogate model that captures the salient features of an expensive high-fidelity behavior is a prevalent approach in design optimization. In recent times, Deep Learning (DL) models are being used as a promising surrogate computational model for engineering problems. However, the main challenge in creating a DL-based surrogate is to simulate/label a large number of design points, which is time-consuming for computationally costly and/or high-dimensional engineering problems. In the present work, we propose a novel sampling technique by combining the active learning (AL) method with DL. We call this method $ε$-weighted hybrid query strategy ($ε$-HQS) , which focuses on the evaluation of the surrogate at each learning iteration and provides an estimate of the failure probability of the surrogate in the Design Space. By reusing already collected training and test data, the learned failure probability guides the next iteration's sampling process to the region of the high probability of failure. During the empirical evaluation, better accuracy of the surrogate was observed in comparison to other methods of sample selection. We empirically evaluated this method in two different engineering design domains, finite element based static stress analysis of submarine pressure vessel(computationally costly process) and second submarine propeller design( high dimensional problem). https://github.com/vardhah/epsilon_weighted_Hybrid_Query_Strategy
abstract_zh: 设计一种廉价的近似代理模型来捕获昂贵的高保真行为的显着特征是设计优化中的一种普遍方法。近年来，深度学习（DL）模型被用作解决工程问题的有前途的替代计算模型。然而，创建基于深度学习的代理的主要挑战是模拟/标记大量设计点，这对于计算成本高和/或高维工程问题来说非常耗时。在目前的工作中，我们将主动学习（AL）方法与深度学习相结合，提出了一种新颖的采样技术。我们将此方法称为 $ε$ 加权混合查询策略 ($ε$-HQS)，该策略侧重于每次学习迭代时对代理的评估，并提供设计空间中代理失败概率的估计。通过重用已经收集的训练和测试数据，学习到的故障概率将引导下一次迭代的采样过程到高故障概率区域。在实证评估过程中，与其他样本选择方法相比，观察到替代方法具有更好的准确性。我们在两个不同的工程设计领域对这种方法进行了实证评估，即基于有限元的潜艇压力容器静态应力分析（计算成本较高的过程）和第二艘潜艇螺旋桨设计（高维问题）。 https://github.com/vardhah/epsilon_weighted_Hybrid_Query_Strategy

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度学习与主动学习的ε-加权混合查询策略（ε-HQS），用于构建高精度的回归代理模型，以解决工程设计中计算成本高或高维问题下的样本标注难题。
AI.motivation: 传统代理模型需大量标注数据，而高维或计算密集型工程问题难以高效获取样本，需开发更智能的采样策略以提高模型精度并减少计算成本。
AI.method: 通过融合主动学习与深度学习，设计ε-HQS方法，利用代理模型的失败概率估计指导采样，优先在高失败概率区域获取新样本，迭代优化模型。
AI.result: 在潜艇压力容器有限元分析和螺旋桨设计两个工程场景中，ε-HQS方法相比其他采样策略显著提升了代理模型的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: ε-HQS方法通过智能采样有效平衡了计算成本与模型精度，为复杂工程问题的代理模型构建提供了可行方案。

By reusing already collected training and test data, the learned failure probability guides the next iteration's sampling process to the region of the high probability of failure. During the empirical evaluation, better accuracy of the surrogate was observed in comparison to other methods of sample selection. We empirically evaluated this method in two different engineering design domains, finite element based static stress analysis of submarine pressure vessel(computationally costly process) and second submarine propeller design( high dimensional problem). https://github.com/vardhah/epsilon_weighted_Hybrid_Query_Strategy 设计一种廉价的近似代理模型来捕获昂贵的高保真行为的显着特征是设计优化中的一种普遍方法。近年来，深度学习（DL）模型被用作解决工程问题的有前途的替代计算模型。然而，创建基于深度学习的代理的主要挑战是模拟/标记大量设计点，这对于计算成本高和/或高维工程问题来说非常耗时。在目前的工作中，我们将主动学习（AL）方法与深度学习相结合，提出了一种新颖的采样技术。我们将此方法称为 $ε$ 加权混合查询策略 ($ε$-HQS)，该策略侧重于每次学习迭代时对代理的评估，并提供设计空间中代理失败概率的估计。通过重用已经收集的训练和测试数据，学习到的故障概率将引导下一次迭代的采样过程到高故障概率区域。在实证评估过程中，与其他样本选择方法相比，观察到替代方法具有更好的准确性。我们在两个不同的工程设计领域对这种方法进行了实证评估，即基于有限元的潜艇压力容器静态应力分析（计算成本较高的过程）和第二艘潜艇螺旋桨设计（高维问题）。 https://github.com/vardhah/epsilon_weighted_Hybrid_Query_Strategy 本文提出一种结合深度学习与主动学习的ε-加权混合查询策略（ε-HQS），用于构建高精度的回归代理模型，以解决工程设计中计算成本高或高维问题下的样本标注难题。 Harsh Vardhan,Janos Sztipanovits cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sergio Tascon-Morales,Pablo Márquez-Neila,Raphael Sznitman
title: Consistency-preserving Visual Question Answering in Medical Imaging
title_zh: 医学成像中保持一致性的视觉问答
comment: Appears in Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Interventions (MICCAI), 2022
comments: Appears in Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Interventions (MICCAI), 2022
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) models take an image and a natural-language question as input and infer the answer to the question. Recently, VQA systems in medical imaging have gained popularity thanks to potential advantages such as patient engagement and second opinions for clinicians. While most research efforts have been focused on improving architectures and overcoming data-related limitations, answer consistency has been overlooked even though it plays a critical role in establishing trustworthy models. In this work, we propose a novel loss function and corresponding training procedure that allows the inclusion of relations between questions into the training process. Specifically, we consider the case where implications between perception and reasoning questions are known a-priori. To show the benefits of our approach, we evaluate it on the clinically relevant task of Diabetic Macular Edema (DME) staging from fundus imaging. Our experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, not only by improving model consistency, but also in terms of overall model accuracy. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/sergiotasconmorales/consistency_vqa.
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) models take an image and a natural-language question as input and infer the answer to the question. Recently, VQA systems in medical imaging have gained popularity thanks to potential advantages such as patient engagement and second opinions for clinicians. While most research efforts have been focused on improving architectures and overcoming data-related limitations, answer consistency has been overlooked even though it plays a critical role in establishing trustworthy models. In this work, we propose a novel loss function and corresponding training procedure that allows the inclusion of relations between questions into the training process. Specifically, we consider the case where implications between perception and reasoning questions are known a-priori. To show the benefits of our approach, we evaluate it on the clinically relevant task of Diabetic Macular Edema (DME) staging from fundus imaging. Our experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, not only by improving model consistency, but also in terms of overall model accuracy. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/sergiotasconmorales/consistency_vqa.
abstract_zh: 视觉问答（VQA）模型将图像和自然语言问题作为输入并推断问题的答案。最近，由于患者参与和临床医生的第二意见等潜在优势，医学成像中的 VQA 系统越来越受欢迎。虽然大多数研究工作都集中在改进架构和克服与数据相关的限制上，但答案一致性却被忽视了，尽管它在建立可信模型方面发挥着关键作用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的损失函数和相应的训练程序，允许将问题之间的关系纳入训练过程。具体来说，我们考虑感知和推理问题之间的影响是先验已知的情况。为了展示我们方法的优点，我们根据眼底成像对糖尿病黄斑水肿 (DME) 分期的临床相关任务进行了评估。我们的实验表明，我们的方法优于最先进的基线，不仅提高了模型的一致性，而且还提高了整体模型的准确性。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/sergiotasconmorales/consistency_vqa 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在医学影像中保持答案一致性的视觉问答（VQA）模型，通过引入新的损失函数和训练方法提升模型可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有医学影像VQA模型忽视了答案一致性这一关键因素，而一致性对建立可信模型至关重要。
AI.method: 设计新型损失函数并开发训练流程，将先验知识中的问题间关系（如感知与推理问题的隐含关联）纳入训练过程。
AI.result: 在糖尿病黄斑水肿分期任务中，该方法在保持答案一致性的同时，整体模型准确率优于现有最先进基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合问题间先验关系的训练方法，可有效提升医学影像VQA模型的一致性与准确性，为临床应用提供更可靠的辅助决策支持。

authors_text: Boah Kim,Jong Chul Ye
title: Diffusion Deformable Model for 4D Temporal Medical Image Generation
title_zh: 用于 4D 时态医学图像生成的扩散变形模型
comment: Accepted for MICCAI 2022
comments: Accepted for MICCAI 2022
abstract: Temporal volume images with 3D+t (4D) information are often used in medical imaging to statistically analyze temporal dynamics or capture disease progression. Although deep-learning-based generative models for natural images have been extensively studied, approaches for temporal medical image generation such as 4D cardiac volume data are limited. In this work, we present a novel deep learning model that generates intermediate temporal volumes between source and target volumes. Specifically, we propose a diffusion deformable model (DDM) by adapting the denoising diffusion probabilistic model that has recently been widely investigated for realistic image generation. Our proposed DDM is composed of the diffusion and the deformation modules so that DDM can learn spatial deformation information between the source and target volumes and provide a latent code for generating intermediate frames along a geodesic path. Once our model is trained, the latent code estimated from the diffusion module is simply interpolated and fed into the deformation module, which enables DDM to generate temporal frames along the continuous trajectory while preserving the topology of the source image. We demonstrate the proposed method with the 4D cardiac MR image generation between the diastolic and systolic phases for each subject. Compared to the existing deformation methods, our DDM achieves high performance on temporal volume generation.
summary: Temporal volume images with 3D+t (4D) information are often used in medical imaging to statistically analyze temporal dynamics or capture disease progression. Although deep-learning-based generative models for natural images have been extensively studied, approaches for temporal medical image generation such as 4D cardiac volume data are limited. In this work, we present a novel deep learning model that generates intermediate temporal volumes between source and target volumes. Specifically, we propose a diffusion deformable model (DDM) by adapting the denoising diffusion probabilistic model that has recently been widely investigated for realistic image generation. Our proposed DDM is composed of the diffusion and the deformation modules so that DDM can learn spatial deformation information between the source and target volumes and provide a latent code for generating intermediate frames along a geodesic path. Once our model is trained, the latent code estimated from the diffusion module is simply interpolated and fed into the deformation module, which enables DDM to generate temporal frames along the continuous trajectory while preserving the topology of the source image. We demonstrate the proposed method with the 4D cardiac MR image generation between the diastolic and systolic phases for each subject. Compared to the existing deformation methods, our DDM achieves high performance on temporal volume generation.
abstract_zh: 具有 3D+t (4D) 信息的时间体积图像通常用于医学成像，以统计分析时间动态或捕获疾病进展。尽管基于深度学习的自然图像生成模型已被广泛研究，但时态医学图像生成（例如 4D 心脏体积数据）的方法仍然有限。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习模型，可以生成源卷和目标卷之间的中间时间卷。具体来说，我们通过采用最近被广泛研究用于真实图像生成的去噪扩散概率模型，提出了一种扩散变形模型（DDM）。我们提出的 DDM 由扩散和变形模块组成，以便 DDM 可以学习源体积和目标体积之间的空间变形信息，并提供用于沿测地路径生成中间帧的潜在代码。一旦我们的模型经过训练，从扩散模块估计的潜在代码就会被简单地插值并输入到变形模块中，这使得 DDM 能够沿着连续轨迹生成时间帧，同时保留源图像的拓扑。我们通过在每个受试者的舒张期和收缩期之间生成 4D 心脏 MR 图像来演示所提出的方法。与现有的变形方法相比，我们的 DDM 在时间体生成方面实现了高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种扩散可变形模型（DDM），用于生成4D医学影像中的中间时间体积，解决现有方法在时间医学影像生成中的不足。
AI.motivation: 医学影像中4D时间体积生成（如心脏MRI）的研究较少，现有方法难以生成符合解剖结构连续性的中间帧，需开发新型深度学习模型以提升生成质量。
AI.method: 通过结合扩散概率模型与可变形模块，DDM利用扩散模块估计潜在编码并进行插值，再通过变形模块沿测地线路径生成保持源图像拓扑结构的连续时间帧。
AI.result: 在心脏MRI生成任务中，DDM相比现有方法在时间体积生成性能上表现更优，能够生成解剖结构连续且逼真的中间相位影像。
AI.conclusion: DDM为4D医学影像生成提供了新方法，通过联合扩散与变形机制有效保留拓扑结构，为疾病动态分析和影像合成提供技术支撑。

authors_text: Florent Bartoccioni,Éloi Zablocki,Andrei Bursuc,Patrick Pérez,Matthieu Cord,Karteek Alahari
title: LaRa: Latents and Rays for Multi-Camera Bird's-Eye-View Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: LaRa：多摄像机鸟瞰语义分割的潜伏和射线
abstract: Recent works in autonomous driving have widely adopted the bird's-eye-view (BEV) semantic map as an intermediate representation of the world. Online prediction of these BEV maps involves non-trivial operations such as multi-camera data extraction as well as fusion and projection into a common topview grid. This is usually done with error-prone geometric operations (e.g., homography or back-projection from monocular depth estimation) or expensive direct dense mapping between image pixels and pixels in BEV (e.g., with MLP or attention). In this work, we present 'LaRa', an efficient encoder-decoder, transformer-based model for vehicle semantic segmentation from multiple cameras. Our approach uses a system of cross-attention to aggregate information over multiple sensors into a compact, yet rich, collection of latent representations. These latent representations, after being processed by a series of self-attention blocks, are then reprojected with a second cross-attention in the BEV space. We demonstrate that our model outperforms the best previous works using transformers on nuScenes. The code and trained models are available at https://github.com/valeoai/LaRa
summary: Recent works in autonomous driving have widely adopted the bird's-eye-view (BEV) semantic map as an intermediate representation of the world. Online prediction of these BEV maps involves non-trivial operations such as multi-camera data extraction as well as fusion and projection into a common topview grid. This is usually done with error-prone geometric operations (e.g., homography or back-projection from monocular depth estimation) or expensive direct dense mapping between image pixels and pixels in BEV (e.g., with MLP or attention). In this work, we present 'LaRa', an efficient encoder-decoder, transformer-based model for vehicle semantic segmentation from multiple cameras. Our approach uses a system of cross-attention to aggregate information over multiple sensors into a compact, yet rich, collection of latent representations. These latent representations, after being processed by a series of self-attention blocks, are then reprojected with a second cross-attention in the BEV space. We demonstrate that our model outperforms the best previous works using transformers on nuScenes. The code and trained models are available at https://github.com/valeoai/LaRa
abstract_zh: 最近的自动驾驶工作广泛采用鸟瞰图（BEV）语义图作为世界的中间表示。这些 BEV 地图的在线预测涉及重要的操作，例如多摄像机数据提取以及融合和投影到公共顶视图网格中。这通常是通过容易出错的几何操作（例如，单应性或单目深度估计的反投影）或图像像素与 BEV 中的像素之间昂贵的直接密集映射（例如，使用 MLP 或注意力）来完成。在这项工作中，我们提出了“LaRa”，一种高效的编码器-解码器、基于变压器的模型，用于从多个摄像头进行车辆语义分割。我们的方法使用交叉注意系统将多个传感器上的信息聚合成紧凑但丰富的潜在表示集合。这些潜在表示在经过一系列自注意力模块处理后，然后在 BEV 空间中使用第二个交叉注意力进行重新投影。我们证明我们的模型优于之前在 nuScenes 上使用 Transformer 的最佳作品。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/valeoai/LaRa 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出LaRa模型，通过多摄像头数据的潜空间表示和光线投影，实现高效的鸟瞰图语义分割。
AI.motivation: 现有BEV地图预测方法依赖几何运算或密集映射，存在误差高、计算成本高的问题，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于编码器-解码器的Transformer架构，通过跨注意力机制聚合多传感器信息，结合自注意力处理潜空间表示，最终在BEV空间进行二次跨注意力投影。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上优于现有最佳Transformer方法，代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: LaRa通过创新的注意力机制设计，在多摄像头BEV语义分割任务中实现了高效且准确的性能提升。

authors_text: Hassan Sajjad,Nadir Durrani,Fahim Dalvi,Firoj Alam,Abdul Rafae Khan,Jia Xu
title: Analyzing Encoded Concepts in Transformer Language Models
title_zh: 分析 Transformer 语言模型中的编码概念
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures
comments: 20 pages, 10 figures
abstract: We propose a novel framework ConceptX, to analyze how latent concepts are encoded in representations learned within pre-trained language models. It uses clustering to discover the encoded concepts and explains them by aligning with a large set of human-defined concepts. Our analysis on seven transformer language models reveal interesting insights: i) the latent space within the learned representations overlap with different linguistic concepts to a varying degree, ii) the lower layers in the model are dominated by lexical concepts (e.g., affixation), whereas the core-linguistic concepts (e.g., morphological or syntactic relations) are better represented in the middle and higher layers, iii) some encoded concepts are multi-faceted and cannot be adequately explained using the existing human-defined concepts.
summary: We propose a novel framework ConceptX, to analyze how latent concepts are encoded in representations learned within pre-trained language models. It uses clustering to discover the encoded concepts and explains them by aligning with a large set of human-defined concepts. Our analysis on seven transformer language models reveal interesting insights: i) the latent space within the learned representations overlap with different linguistic concepts to a varying degree, ii) the lower layers in the model are dominated by lexical concepts (e.g., affixation), whereas the core-linguistic concepts (e.g., morphological or syntactic relations) are better represented in the middle and higher layers, iii) some encoded concepts are multi-faceted and cannot be adequately explained using the existing human-defined concepts.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个新颖的框架 ConceptX，来分析潜在概念如何编码在预训练语言模型中学习的表示中。它使用聚类来发现编码的概念，并通过与大量人类定义的概念对齐来解释它们。我们对七个 Transformer 语言模型的分析揭示了有趣的见解：i）学习表示中的潜在空间与不同的语言概念在不同程度上重叠，ii）模型中的较低层由词汇概念（例如词缀）主导，而核心语言概念（例如形态或句法关系）在中层和较高层中得到更好的表示，iii）一些编码概念是多方面的，无法使用现有的人类定义的概念充分解释。

AI.tldr: 提出ConceptX框架分析Transformer语言模型中潜在概念的编码方式
AI.motivation: 揭示预训练语言模型内部潜在概念的编码机制，探索不同模型层次如何表征语言学概念及其与人类定义概念的关联
AI.method: 通过聚类发现模型表示中的潜在概念，并与大量人类定义的概念进行对齐以解释这些概念
AI.result: 发现潜在空间与语言学概念重叠程度不同，低层处理词汇概念，中高层处理核心语言学概念，部分概念多面无法用现有概念解释
AI.conclusion: ConceptX框架有效揭示了模型编码机制的层次结构，指出现有概念体系对复杂概念的解释存在局限性

authors_text: Dominik Engel,Sebastian Hartwig,Timo Ropinski
title: Monocular Depth Decomposition of Semi-Transparent Volume Renderings
title_zh: 半透明体渲染的单目深度分解
comment: accepted at IEEE TVCG 2023
comments: accepted at IEEE TVCG 2023
abstract: Neural networks have shown great success in extracting geometric information from color images. Especially, monocular depth estimation networks are increasingly reliable in real-world scenes. In this work we investigate the applicability of such monocular depth estimation networks to semi-transparent volume rendered images. As depth is notoriously difficult to define in a volumetric scene without clearly defined surfaces, we consider different depth computations that have emerged in practice, and compare state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation approaches for these different interpretations during an evaluation considering different degrees of opacity in the renderings. Additionally, we investigate how these networks can be extended to further obtain color and opacity information, in order to create a layered representation of the scene based on a single color image. This layered representation consists of spatially separated semi-transparent intervals that composite to the original input rendering. In our experiments we show that existing approaches to monocular depth estimation can be adapted to perform well on semi-transparent volume renderings, which has several applications in the area of scientific visualization, like re-composition with additional objects and labels or additional shading.
summary: Neural networks have shown great success in extracting geometric information from color images. Especially, monocular depth estimation networks are increasingly reliable in real-world scenes. In this work we investigate the applicability of such monocular depth estimation networks to semi-transparent volume rendered images. As depth is notoriously difficult to define in a volumetric scene without clearly defined surfaces, we consider different depth computations that have emerged in practice, and compare state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation approaches for these different interpretations during an evaluation considering different degrees of opacity in the renderings. Additionally, we investigate how these networks can be extended to further obtain color and opacity information, in order to create a layered representation of the scene based on a single color image. This layered representation consists of spatially separated semi-transparent intervals that composite to the original input rendering. In our experiments we show that existing approaches to monocular depth estimation can be adapted to perform well on semi-transparent volume renderings, which has several applications in the area of scientific visualization, like re-composition with additional objects and labels or additional shading.
abstract_zh: 神经网络在从彩色图像中提取几何信息方面取得了巨大成功。特别是，单目深度估计网络在现实场景中越来越可靠。在这项工作中，我们研究了这种单目深度估计网络对半透明体积渲染图像的适用性。由于在没有明确定义的表面的体积场景中定义深度是出了名的困难，因此我们考虑了实践中出现的不同深度计算，并在考虑渲染中不同程度的不透明度的评估过程中比较这些不同解释的最先进的单目深度估计方法。此外，我们研究了如何扩展这些网络以进一步获取颜色和不透明度信息，以便基于单一彩色图像创建场景的分层表示。这种分层表示由空间分离的半透明间隔组成，这些间隔合成到原始输入渲染。在我们的实验中，我们表明，现有的单目深度估计方法可以适用于半透明体积渲染，这在科学可视化领域有多种应用，例如使用附加对象和标签或附加阴影进行重新组合。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何将单目深度估计网络应用于半透明体积渲染图像，以分解出层次化的场景表示。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法难以处理无明确表面的半透明体积场景，而科学可视化领域需要从单张图像中提取颜色、深度和透明度信息以实现再合成。
AI.method: 比较不同深度计算方式在不同透明度下的表现，并扩展网络以同时预测颜色、深度和透明度，构建空间分离的半透明分层表示。
AI.result: 证明现有单目深度估计方法可通过调整适应半透明体积渲染，实现分层分解并支持可视化再合成应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为科学可视化中的动态物体叠加、标签添加和阴影增强等任务提供了可行的解决方案。

search_text: Monocular Depth Decomposition of Semi-Transparent Volume Renderings 半透明体渲染的单目深度分解 Neural networks have shown great success in extracting geometric information from color images. Especially, monocular depth estimation networks are increasingly reliable in real-world scenes. In this work we investigate the applicability of such monocular depth estimation networks to semi-transparent volume rendered images. As depth is notoriously difficult to define in a volumetric scene without clearly defined surfaces, we consider different depth computations that have emerged in practice, and compare state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation approaches for these different interpretations during an evaluation considering different degrees of opacity in the renderings. Additionally, we investigate how these networks can be extended to further obtain color and opacity information, in order to create a layered representation of the scene based on a single color image. This layered representation consists of spatially separated semi-transparent intervals that composite to the original input rendering. In our experiments we show that existing approaches to monocular depth estimation can be adapted to perform well on semi-transparent volume renderings, which has several applications in the area of scientific visualization, like re-composition with additional objects and labels or additional shading. 神经网络在从彩色图像中提取几何信息方面取得了巨大成功。特别是，单目深度估计网络在现实场景中越来越可靠。在这项工作中，我们研究了这种单目深度估计网络对半透明体积渲染图像的适用性。由于在没有明确定义的表面的体积场景中定义深度是出了名的困难，因此我们考虑了实践中出现的不同深度计算，并在考虑渲染中不同程度的不透明度的评估过程中比较这些不同解释的最先进的单目深度估计方法。此外，我们研究了如何扩展这些网络以进一步获取颜色和不透明度信息，以便基于单一彩色图像创建场景的分层表示。这种分层表示由空间分离的半透明间隔组成，这些间隔合成到原始输入渲染。在我们的实验中，我们表明，现有的单目深度估计方法可以适用于半透明体积渲染，这在科学可视化领域有多种应用，例如使用附加对象和标签或附加阴影进行重新组合。 本文研究如何将单目深度估计网络应用于半透明体积渲染图像，以分解出层次化的场景表示。 Dominik Engel,Sebastian Hartwig,Timo Ropinski cs.CV

authors_text: Aleksandr Beknazaryan
title: Expressive power of binary and ternary neural networks
title_zh: 二元和三元神经网络的表达能力
abstract: We show that deep sparse ReLU networks with ternary weights and deep ReLU networks with binary weights can approximate $β$-Hölder functions on $[0,1]^d$. Also, for any interval $[a,b)\subset\mathbb{R}$, continuous functions on $[0,1]^d$ can be approximated by networks of depth $2$ with binary activation function $\mathds{1}_{[a,b)}$.
summary: We show that deep sparse ReLU networks with ternary weights and deep ReLU networks with binary weights can approximate $β$-Hölder functions on $[0,1]^d$. Also, for any interval $[a,b)\subset\mathbb{R}$, continuous functions on $[0,1]^d$ can be approximated by networks of depth $2$ with binary activation function $\mathds{1}_{[a,b)}$.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，具有三元权重的深度稀疏 ReLU 网络和具有二元权重的深度 ReLU 网络可以近似 $[0,1]^d$ 上的 $β$-Hölder 函数。此外，对于任何区间 $[a,b)\subset\mathbb{R}$，$[0,1]^d$ 上的连续函数可以通过深度为 $2$ 且具有二元激活函数 $\mathds{1}_{[a,b)}$ 的网络来近似。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二进制和三进制神经网络的表达能力，探讨其在近似特定函数方面的潜力。
AI.motivation: 研究二进制和三进制神经网络的表达能力，以了解它们在函数近似任务中的有效性，特别是在深度网络中的表现。
AI.method: 通过分析深度稀疏ReLU网络（三进制权重）和深度ReLU网络（二进制权重）的结构，证明它们能够近似β-Hölder函数以及连续函数。
AI.result: 证明了深度稀疏ReLU网络（三进制权重）和深度ReLU网络（二进制权重）可以近似β-Hölder函数，并且使用二元激活函数的深度为2的网络可以近似定义在区间上的连续函数。
AI.conclusion: 二进制和三进制神经网络具有强大的函数近似能力，适用于多种函数类，特别是在深度网络结构中表现优异。

authors_text: Andrew Catellier,Stephen Voran
title: Wideband Audio Waveform Evaluation Networks: Efficient, Accurate Estimation of Speech Qualities
title_zh: 宽带音频波形评估网络：高效、准确地估计语音质量
comment: This work has been accepted to the journal IEEE Access
comments: This work has been accepted to the journal IEEE Access
abstract: Wideband Audio Waveform Evaluation Networks (WAWEnets) are convolutional neural networks that operate directly on wideband audio waveforms in order to produce evaluations of those waveforms. In the present work these evaluations give qualities of telecommunications speech (e.g., noisiness, intelligibility, overall speech quality). WAWEnets are no-reference networks because they do not require ``reference'' (original or undistorted) versions of the waveforms they evaluate. Our initial WAWEnet publication introduced four WAWEnets and each emulated the output of an established full-reference speech quality or intelligibility estimation algorithm. We have updated the WAWEnet architecture to be more efficient and effective. Here we present a single WAWEnet that closely tracks seven different quality and intelligibility values. We create a second network that additionally tracks four subjective speech quality dimensions. We offer a third network that focuses on just subjective quality scores and achieves very high levels of agreement. This work has leveraged 334 hours of speech in 13 languages, over two million full-reference target values and over 93,000 subjective mean opinion scores. We also interpret the operation of WAWEnets and identify the key to their operation using the language of signal processing: ReLUs strategically move spectral information from non-DC components into the DC component. The DC values of 96 output signals define a vector in a 96-D latent space and this vector is then mapped to a quality or intelligibility value for the input waveform.
summary: Wideband Audio Waveform Evaluation Networks (WAWEnets) are convolutional neural networks that operate directly on wideband audio waveforms in order to produce evaluations of those waveforms. In the present work these evaluations give qualities of telecommunications speech (e.g., noisiness, intelligibility, overall speech quality). WAWEnets are no-reference networks because they do not require ``reference'' (original or undistorted) versions of the waveforms they evaluate. Our initial WAWEnet publication introduced four WAWEnets and each emulated the output of an established full-reference speech quality or intelligibility estimation algorithm. We have updated the WAWEnet architecture to be more efficient and effective. Here we present a single WAWEnet that closely tracks seven different quality and intelligibility values. We create a second network that additionally tracks four subjective speech quality dimensions. We offer a third network that focuses on just subjective quality scores and achieves very high levels of agreement. This work has leveraged 334 hours of speech in 13 languages, over two million full-reference target values and over 93,000 subjective mean opinion scores. We also interpret the operation of WAWEnets and identify the key to their operation using the language of signal processing: ReLUs strategically move spectral information from non-DC components into the DC component. The DC values of 96 output signals define a vector in a 96-D latent space and this vector is then mapped to a quality or intelligibility value for the input waveform.
abstract_zh: 宽带音频波形评估网络 (WAWEnets) 是卷积神经网络，直接对宽带音频波形进行操作，以便对这些波形进行评估。在目前的工作中，这些评估给出了电信语音的质量（例如，噪声、清晰度、整体语音质量）。 WAWEnet 是无参考网络，因为它们不需要它们评估的波形的“参考”（原始或未失真）版本。我们最初的 WAWEnet 出版物介绍了四个 WAWEnet，每个都模拟已建立的全参考语音质量或清晰度估计算法的输出。我们更新了 WAWEnet 架构，使其更加高效和有效。在这里，我们提出了一个 WAWEnet，它密切跟踪七个不同的质量和清晰度值。我们创建了第二个网络，另外跟踪四个主观语音质量维度。我们提供第三个网络，该网络仅关注主观质量分数并达到非常高的一致性。这项工作利用了 13 种语言的 334 小时演讲、超过 200 万个完整参考目标值和超过 93,000 个主观平均意见分数。我们还解释了 WAWEnet 的操作，并使用信号处理语言确定其操作的关键：ReLU 策略性地将频谱信息从非 DC 分量移动到 DC 分量。 96 个输出信号的 DC 值定义了 96 维潜在空间中的向量，然后该向量被映射到输入波形的质量或清晰度值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为WAWEnets的卷积神经网络，能够直接对宽带音频波形进行无参考评估，以估计电信语音的质量（如嘈杂程度、可懂度等）。
AI.motivation: 传统语音质量评估方法通常需要参考信号，而实际应用中参考信号可能不可用。本文旨在开发一种无需参考信号、高效且准确的语音质量评估模型。
AI.method: 通过改进WAWEnet架构，利用卷积神经网络直接处理原始音频波形，并结合信号处理理论（如ReLUs将非DC频谱信息转移到DC分量），将96个输出信号的DC值映射到质量或可懂度评分。
AI.result: 提出三种WAWEnet变体：一种可跟踪七种质量指标，第二种额外跟踪四种主观维度，第三种专注于主观评分并达到高一致性。模型基于334小时多语言数据训练，包含超200万参考值和9.3万主观评分。
AI.conclusion: WAWEnets通过DC分量的潜空间映射实现了高效的无参考语音质量评估，在电信领域具有广泛应用潜力。

authors_text: Lojze Žust,Matej Kristan
title: Learning with Weak Annotations for Robust Maritime Obstacle Detection
title_zh: 使用弱注释进行学习以实现强大的海上障碍物检测
comment: Published in MDPI Sensors, 23 pages, 8 figures
comments: Published in MDPI Sensors, 23 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Robust maritime obstacle detection is critical for safe navigation of autonomous boats and timely collision avoidance. The current state-of-the-art is based on deep segmentation networks trained on large datasets. However, per-pixel ground truth labeling of such datasets is labor-intensive and expensive. We propose a new scaffolding learning regime (SLR) that leverages weak annotations consisting of water edges, the horizon location, and obstacle bounding boxes to train segmentation-based obstacle detection networks, thereby reducing the required ground truth labeling effort by a factor of twenty. SLR trains an initial model from weak annotations and then alternates between re-estimating the segmentation pseudo-labels and improving the network parameters. Experiments show that maritime obstacle segmentation networks trained using SLR on weak annotations not only match but outperform the same networks trained with dense ground truth labels, which is a remarkable result. In addition to the increased accuracy, SLR also increases domain generalization and can be used for domain adaptation with a low manual annotation load. The SLR code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/lojzezust/SLR .
summary: Robust maritime obstacle detection is critical for safe navigation of autonomous boats and timely collision avoidance. The current state-of-the-art is based on deep segmentation networks trained on large datasets. However, per-pixel ground truth labeling of such datasets is labor-intensive and expensive. We propose a new scaffolding learning regime (SLR) that leverages weak annotations consisting of water edges, the horizon location, and obstacle bounding boxes to train segmentation-based obstacle detection networks, thereby reducing the required ground truth labeling effort by a factor of twenty. SLR trains an initial model from weak annotations and then alternates between re-estimating the segmentation pseudo-labels and improving the network parameters. Experiments show that maritime obstacle segmentation networks trained using SLR on weak annotations not only match but outperform the same networks trained with dense ground truth labels, which is a remarkable result. In addition to the increased accuracy, SLR also increases domain generalization and can be used for domain adaptation with a low manual annotation load. The SLR code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/lojzezust/SLR .
abstract_zh: 强大的海上障碍物检测对于自主船只的安全航行和及时避免碰撞至关重要。当前最先进的技术基于在大型数据集上训练的深度分割网络。然而，此类数据集的每像素地面实况标记是劳动密集型且昂贵的。我们提出了一种新的脚手架学习机制（SLR），它利用由水边、地平线位置和障碍物边界框组成的弱注释来训练基于分割的障碍物检测网络，从而将所需的地面实况标记工作减少二十倍。 SLR 从弱注释中训练初始模型，然后在重新估计分割伪标签和改进网络参数之间交替。实验表明，使用 SLR 在弱注释上训练的海上障碍物分割网络不仅匹配而且优于使用密集地面实况标签训练的相同网络，这是一个了不起的结果。除了提高准确性之外，SLR 还提高了领域泛化能力，并且可用于低手动注释负载的领域适应。 SLR 代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/lojzezust/SLR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的弱标注学习框架（SLR），用于提高海上障碍物检测的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的海上障碍物检测方法依赖于大量标注数据，而像素级标注工作量大且成本高。
AI.method: SLR框架利用弱标注信息（如水面边缘、地平线位置和障碍物边界框）来训练分割网络，并通过交替更新伪标签和网络参数进行优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用SLR训练的网络在准确性和领域泛化能力方面均优于使用密集标注数据训练的网络。
AI.conclusion: SLR框架有效降低了标注成本，同时提升了检测性能和领域适应能力，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Learning with Weak Annotations for Robust Maritime Obstacle Detection 使用弱注释进行学习以实现强大的海上障碍物检测 Robust maritime obstacle detection is critical for safe navigation of autonomous boats and timely collision avoidance. The current state-of-the-art is based on deep segmentation networks trained on large datasets. However, per-pixel ground truth labeling of such datasets is labor-intensive and expensive. We propose a new scaffolding learning regime (SLR) that leverages weak annotations consisting of water edges, the horizon location, and obstacle bounding boxes to train segmentation-based obstacle detection networks, thereby reducing the required ground truth labeling effort by a factor of twenty. SLR trains an initial model from weak annotations and then alternates between re-estimating the segmentation pseudo-labels and improving the network parameters. Experiments show that maritime obstacle segmentation networks trained using SLR on weak annotations not only match but outperform the same networks trained with dense ground truth labels, which is a remarkable result. In addition to the increased accuracy, SLR also increases domain generalization and can be used for domain adaptation with a low manual annotation load. The SLR code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/lojzezust/SLR . 强大的海上障碍物检测对于自主船只的安全航行和及时避免碰撞至关重要。当前最先进的技术基于在大型数据集上训练的深度分割网络。然而，此类数据集的每像素地面实况标记是劳动密集型且昂贵的。我们提出了一种新的脚手架学习机制（SLR），它利用由水边、地平线位置和障碍物边界框组成的弱注释来训练基于分割的障碍物检测网络，从而将所需的地面实况标记工作减少二十倍。 SLR 从弱注释中训练初始模型，然后在重新估计分割伪标签和改进网络参数之间交替。实验表明，使用 SLR 在弱注释上训练的海上障碍物分割网络不仅匹配而且优于使用密集地面实况标签训练的相同网络，这是一个了不起的结果。除了提高准确性之外，SLR 还提高了领域泛化能力，并且可用于低手动注释负载的领域适应。 SLR 代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/lojzezust/SLR 获取。 本文提出了一种新的弱标注学习框架（SLR），用于提高海上障碍物检测的鲁棒性。 Lojze Žust,Matej Kristan cs.CV

authors_text: Hansoo Lee,Bayu Adhi Tama,Meeyoung Cha
title: Prediction of Football Player Value using Bayesian Ensemble Approach
title_zh: 使用贝叶斯集成方法预测足球运动员价值
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables, will be published in Journal of Expert Systems with Applications
comments: 17 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables, will be published in Journal of Expert Systems with Applications
abstract: The transfer fees of sports players have become astronomical. This is because bringing players of great future value to the club is essential for their survival. We present a case study on the key factors affecting the world's top soccer players' transfer fees based on the FIFA data analysis. To predict each player's market value, we propose an improved LightGBM model by optimizing its hyperparameter using a Tree-structured Parzen Estimator (TPE) algorithm. We identify prominent features by the SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) algorithm. The proposed method has been compared against the baseline regression models (e.g., linear regression, lasso, elastic net, kernel ridge regression) and gradient boosting model without hyperparameter optimization. The optimized LightGBM model showed an excellent accuracy of approximately 3.8, 1.4, and 1.8 times on average compared to the regression baseline models, GBDT, and LightGBM model in terms of RMSE. Our model offers interpretability in deciding what attributes football clubs should consider in recruiting players in the future.
summary: The transfer fees of sports players have become astronomical. This is because bringing players of great future value to the club is essential for their survival. We present a case study on the key factors affecting the world's top soccer players' transfer fees based on the FIFA data analysis. To predict each player's market value, we propose an improved LightGBM model by optimizing its hyperparameter using a Tree-structured Parzen Estimator (TPE) algorithm. We identify prominent features by the SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) algorithm. The proposed method has been compared against the baseline regression models (e.g., linear regression, lasso, elastic net, kernel ridge regression) and gradient boosting model without hyperparameter optimization. The optimized LightGBM model showed an excellent accuracy of approximately 3.8, 1.4, and 1.8 times on average compared to the regression baseline models, GBDT, and LightGBM model in terms of RMSE. Our model offers interpretability in deciding what attributes football clubs should consider in recruiting players in the future.
abstract_zh: 体育运动员的转会费已经成为天文数字。这是因为为俱乐部带来具有巨大未来价值的球员对于他们的生存至关重要。我们基于国际足联的数据分析，对影响世界顶级足球运动员转会费的关键因素进行了案例研究。为了预测每个玩家的市场价值，我们提出了一种改进的 LightGBM 模型，通过使用树结构 Parzen 估计器 (TPE) 算法优化其超参数。我们通过 SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) 算法识别突出特征。所提出的方法已与基线回归模型（例如线性回归、套索、弹性网络、核岭回归）和没有超参数优化的梯度提升模型进行了比较。与回归基线模型、GBDT 和 LightGBM 模型相比，优化后的 LightGBM 模型在 RMSE 方面表现出平均约 3.8、1.4 和 1.8 倍的出色精度。我们的模型为决定足球俱乐部在未来招募球员时应考虑哪些属性提供了可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的LightGBM模型，结合树结构帕尔森估计器（TPE）优化超参数和SHAP算法识别关键特征，用于预测足球运动员的转会费。
AI.motivation: 由于顶级足球运动员的转会费用高昂，俱乐部需要准确预测球员价值以制定有效的招募策略，因此需要识别影响转会费的关键因素。
AI.method: 通过TPE算法优化LightGBM模型超参数，并利用SHAP算法分析特征重要性，与线性回归、GBDT等基线模型进行对比实验。
AI.result: 优化后的LightGBM模型在RMSE指标上分别比回归基线模型、GBDT和标准LightGBM模型高出3.8倍、1.4倍和1.8倍的预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 该模型不仅提升了预测准确性，还通过特征解释性帮助俱乐部明确未来招募球员时应关注的核心属性。

authors_text: Raviraj Joshi,Anupam Singh
title: A Simple Baseline for Domain Adaptation in End to End ASR Systems Using Synthetic Data
title_zh: 使用合成数据的端到端 ASR 系统中域适应的简单基线
comment: Accepted at ECNLP @ACL 2022
comments: Accepted at ECNLP @ACL 2022
abstract: Automatic Speech Recognition(ASR) has been dominated by deep learning-based end-to-end speech recognition models. These approaches require large amounts of labeled data in the form of audio-text pairs. Moreover, these models are more susceptible to domain shift as compared to traditional models. It is common practice to train generic ASR models and then adapt them to target domains using comparatively smaller data sets. We consider a more extreme case of domain adaptation where text-only corpus is available. In this work, we propose a simple baseline technique for domain adaptation in end-to-end speech recognition models. We convert the text-only corpus to audio data using single speaker Text to Speech (TTS) engine. The parallel data in the target domain is then used to fine-tune the final dense layer of generic ASR models. We show that single speaker synthetic TTS data coupled with final dense layer only fine-tuning provides reasonable improvements in word error rates. We use text data from address and e-commerce search domains to show the effectiveness of our low-cost baseline approach on CTC and attention-based models.
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition(ASR) has been dominated by deep learning-based end-to-end speech recognition models. These approaches require large amounts of labeled data in the form of audio-text pairs. Moreover, these models are more susceptible to domain shift as compared to traditional models. It is common practice to train generic ASR models and then adapt them to target domains using comparatively smaller data sets. We consider a more extreme case of domain adaptation where text-only corpus is available. In this work, we propose a simple baseline technique for domain adaptation in end-to-end speech recognition models. We convert the text-only corpus to audio data using single speaker Text to Speech (TTS) engine. The parallel data in the target domain is then used to fine-tune the final dense layer of generic ASR models. We show that single speaker synthetic TTS data coupled with final dense layer only fine-tuning provides reasonable improvements in word error rates. We use text data from address and e-commerce search domains to show the effectiveness of our low-cost baseline approach on CTC and attention-based models.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别（ASR）一直以基于深度学习的端到端语音识别模型为主。这些方法需要大量音频文本对形式的标记数据。此外，与传统模型相比，这些模型更容易受到领域转移的影响。常见的做法是训练通用 ASR 模型，然后使用相对较小的数据集使其适应目标领域。我们考虑域适应的更极端的情况，其中纯文本语料库可用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于端到端语音识别模型中的域适应的简单基线技术。我们使用单扬声器文本转语音 (TTS) 引擎将纯文本语料库转换为音频数据。然后，使用目标域中的并行数据来微调通用 ASR 模型的最终密集层。我们证明，单说话者合成 TTS 数据与最终密集层的微调相结合，可以合理改善单词错误率。我们使用来自地址和电子商务搜索域的文本数据来展示我们的低成本基线方法在 CTC 和基于注意力的模型上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于合成数据的端到端语音识别领域自适应简单基线方法，通过单人语音TTS生成音频并微调模型最后层以应对文本语料场景。
AI.motivation: 端到端ASR模型对领域偏移敏感且需要大量标注数据，而实际场景中目标领域常仅有文本语料，需探索低成本适应方案。
AI.method: 利用单人TTS引擎将文本语料转为合成音频，结合目标领域并行数据仅微调ASR模型的最终密集层。
AI.result: 在地址和电商搜索领域数据上，该方法使CTC和注意力模型的词错误率显著降低，验证了低成本基线的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据结合最后层微调可作为领域自适应的有效低成本方案，为端到端ASR模型适应新领域提供实用参考。

search_text: A Simple Baseline for Domain Adaptation in End to End ASR Systems Using Synthetic Data 使用合成数据的端到端 ASR 系统中域适应的简单基线 Automatic Speech Recognition(ASR) has been dominated by deep learning-based end-to-end speech recognition models. These approaches require large amounts of labeled data in the form of audio-text pairs. Moreover, these models are more susceptible to domain shift as compared to traditional models. It is common practice to train generic ASR models and then adapt them to target domains using comparatively smaller data sets. We consider a more extreme case of domain adaptation where text-only corpus is available. In this work, we propose a simple baseline technique for domain adaptation in end-to-end speech recognition models. We convert the text-only corpus to audio data using single speaker Text to Speech (TTS) engine. The parallel data in the target domain is then used to fine-tune the final dense layer of generic ASR models. We show that single speaker synthetic TTS data coupled with final dense layer only fine-tuning provides reasonable improvements in word error rates. We use text data from address and e-commerce search domains to show the effectiveness of our low-cost baseline approach on CTC and attention-based models. 自动语音识别（ASR）一直以基于深度学习的端到端语音识别模型为主。这些方法需要大量音频文本对形式的标记数据。此外，与传统模型相比，这些模型更容易受到领域转移的影响。常见的做法是训练通用 ASR 模型，然后使用相对较小的数据集使其适应目标领域。我们考虑域适应的更极端的情况，其中纯文本语料库可用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于端到端语音识别模型中的域适应的简单基线技术。我们使用单扬声器文本转语音 (TTS) 引擎将纯文本语料库转换为音频数据。然后，使用目标域中的并行数据来微调通用 ASR 模型的最终密集层。我们证明，单说话者合成 TTS 数据与最终密集层的微调相结合，可以合理改善单词错误率。我们使用来自地址和电子商务搜索域的文本数据来展示我们的低成本基线方法在 CTC 和基于注意力的模型上的有效性。 本文提出一种基于合成数据的端到端语音识别领域自适应简单基线方法，通过单人语音TTS生成音频并微调模型最后层以应对文本语料场景。 Raviraj Joshi,Anupam Singh eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Fangjun Kuang,Liyong Guo,Wei Kang,Long Lin,Mingshuang Luo,Zengwei Yao,Daniel Povey
title: Pruned RNN-T for fast, memory-efficient ASR training
title_zh: 修剪 RNN-T 以实现快速、内存高效的 ASR 训练
abstract: The RNN-Transducer (RNN-T) framework for speech recognition has been growing in popularity, particularly for deployed real-time ASR systems, because it combines high accuracy with naturally streaming recognition. One of the drawbacks of RNN-T is that its loss function is relatively slow to compute, and can use a lot of memory. Excessive GPU memory usage can make it impractical to use RNN-T loss in cases where the vocabulary size is large: for example, for Chinese character-based ASR. We introduce a method for faster and more memory-efficient RNN-T loss computation. We first obtain pruning bounds for the RNN-T recursion using a simple joiner network that is linear in the encoder and decoder embeddings; we can evaluate this without using much memory. We then use those pruning bounds to evaluate the full, non-linear joiner network.
summary: The RNN-Transducer (RNN-T) framework for speech recognition has been growing in popularity, particularly for deployed real-time ASR systems, because it combines high accuracy with naturally streaming recognition. One of the drawbacks of RNN-T is that its loss function is relatively slow to compute, and can use a lot of memory. Excessive GPU memory usage can make it impractical to use RNN-T loss in cases where the vocabulary size is large: for example, for Chinese character-based ASR. We introduce a method for faster and more memory-efficient RNN-T loss computation. We first obtain pruning bounds for the RNN-T recursion using a simple joiner network that is linear in the encoder and decoder embeddings; we can evaluate this without using much memory. We then use those pruning bounds to evaluate the full, non-linear joiner network.
abstract_zh: 用于语音识别的 RNN-Transducer (RNN-T) 框架越来越受欢迎，特别是对于已部署的实时 ASR 系统，因为它结合了高精度和自然流式识别。 RNN-T 的缺点之一是其损失函数计算相对较慢，并且会使用大量内存。过多的 GPU 内存使用可能会导致在词汇量很大的情况下使用 RNN-T 损失变得不切实际：例如，对于基于汉字的 ASR。我们引入了一种更快、更节省内存的 RNN-T 损失计算方法。我们首先使用在编码器和解码器嵌入中呈线性的简单连接网络获得 RNN-T 递归的剪枝边界；我们可以在不使用太多内存的情况下对其进行评估。然后，我们使用这些修剪边界来评估完整的非线性连接器网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种剪枝方法优化RNN-T训练，实现快速且内存高效的语音识别模型训练，特别针对大词汇量场景。
AI.motivation: RNN-T虽适合实时ASR但存在损失函数计算慢、内存消耗大的问题，尤其在中文等大词汇量场景下实用性受限。
AI.method: 通过线性连接网络计算剪枝边界以减少冗余计算，再利用该边界优化完整非线性连接网络的评估过程。
AI.result: 显著降低RNN-T损失计算时间与内存占用，使大词汇量ASR训练成为可能。
AI.conclusion: 剪枝技术有效提升了RNN-T的训练效率与可扩展性，为复杂语言场景的ASR系统提供可行方案。

authors_text: Tianzi Wang,Jiajun Deng,Mengzhe Geng,Zi Ye,Shoukang Hu,Yi Wang,Mingyu Cui,Zengrui Jin,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng
title: Conformer Based Elderly Speech Recognition System for Alzheimer's Disease Detection
title_zh: 基于一致性的老年人语音识别系统用于阿尔茨海默病检测
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, accepted by INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, accepted by INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: Early diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease (AD) is crucial in facilitating preventive care to delay further progression. This paper presents the development of a state-of-the-art Conformer based speech recognition system built on the DementiaBank Pitt corpus for automatic AD detection. The baseline Conformer system trained with speed perturbation and SpecAugment based data augmentation is significantly improved by incorporating a set of purposefully designed modeling features, including neural architecture search based auto-configuration of domain-specific Conformer hyper-parameters in addition to parameter fine-tuning; fine-grained elderly speaker adaptation using learning hidden unit contributions (LHUC); and two-pass cross-system rescoring based combination with hybrid TDNN systems. An overall word error rate (WER) reduction of 13.6% absolute (34.8% relative) was obtained on the evaluation data of 48 elderly speakers. Using the final systems' recognition outputs to extract textual features, the best-published speech recognition based AD detection accuracy of 91.7% was obtained.
summary: Early diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease (AD) is crucial in facilitating preventive care to delay further progression. This paper presents the development of a state-of-the-art Conformer based speech recognition system built on the DementiaBank Pitt corpus for automatic AD detection. The baseline Conformer system trained with speed perturbation and SpecAugment based data augmentation is significantly improved by incorporating a set of purposefully designed modeling features, including neural architecture search based auto-configuration of domain-specific Conformer hyper-parameters in addition to parameter fine-tuning; fine-grained elderly speaker adaptation using learning hidden unit contributions (LHUC); and two-pass cross-system rescoring based combination with hybrid TDNN systems. An overall word error rate (WER) reduction of 13.6% absolute (34.8% relative) was obtained on the evaluation data of 48 elderly speakers. Using the final systems' recognition outputs to extract textual features, the best-published speech recognition based AD detection accuracy of 91.7% was obtained.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 的早期诊断对于促进预防性护理、延缓进一步进展至关重要。本文介绍了基于 DementiaBank Pitt 语料库的最先进的基于 Conformer 的语音识别系统的开发，用于自动 AD 检测。通过合并一组专门设计的建模功能（包括基于神经架构搜索的特定领域 Conformer 超参数的自动配置以及参数微调），经过速度扰动和基于 SpecAugment 的数据增强训练的基线 Conformer 系统得到了显着改进；使用学习隐藏单元贡献（LHUC）进行细粒度的老年说话者适应；以及基于与混合 TDNN 系统的组合的两遍跨系统重新评分。根据 48 名老年说话者的评估数据，整体单词错误率 (WER) 绝对降低了 13.6%（相对降低了 34.8%）。使用最终系统的识别输出来提取文本特征，获得了最好的基于语音识别的 AD 检测准确率，达到 91.7%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Conformer的语音识别系统，用于阿尔茨海默病的自动检测。
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病的早期诊断对延缓病情进展至关重要，传统方法依赖临床评估，存在滞后性。
AI.method: 构建基于DementiaBank Pitt语料库的Conformer系统，结合速度扰动、SpecAugment数据增强，通过神经架构搜索优化超参数、LHUC细粒度说话人适配及双系统交叉重打分策略。
AI.result: 在48名老年受试者评估数据上实现词错误率绝对降低13.6%（相对34.8%），基于识别文本的AD检测准确率达91.7%。
AI.conclusion: 所提出系统显著提升语音识别性能与AD检测准确率，为无创早期筛查提供新方法。

authors_text: Jinmiao Huang,Waseem Gharbieh,Qianhui Wan,Han Suk Shim,Chul Lee
title: QbyE-MLPMixer: Query-by-Example Open-Vocabulary Keyword Spotting using MLPMixer
title_zh: QbyE-MLPMixer：使用 MLPMixer 进行示例查询开放词汇关键字识别
comment: Accepted to INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: Accepted to INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: Current keyword spotting systems are typically trained with a large amount of pre-defined keywords. Recognizing keywords in an open-vocabulary setting is essential for personalizing smart device interaction. Towards this goal, we propose a pure MLP-based neural network that is based on MLPMixer - an MLP model architecture that effectively replaces the attention mechanism in Vision Transformers. We investigate different ways of adapting the MLPMixer architecture to the QbyE open-vocabulary keyword spotting task. Comparisons with the state-of-the-art RNN and CNN models show that our method achieves better performance in challenging situations (10dB and 6dB environments) on both the publicly available Hey-Snips dataset and a larger scale internal dataset with 400 speakers. Our proposed model also has a smaller number of parameters and MACs compared to the baseline models.
summary: Current keyword spotting systems are typically trained with a large amount of pre-defined keywords. Recognizing keywords in an open-vocabulary setting is essential for personalizing smart device interaction. Towards this goal, we propose a pure MLP-based neural network that is based on MLPMixer - an MLP model architecture that effectively replaces the attention mechanism in Vision Transformers. We investigate different ways of adapting the MLPMixer architecture to the QbyE open-vocabulary keyword spotting task. Comparisons with the state-of-the-art RNN and CNN models show that our method achieves better performance in challenging situations (10dB and 6dB environments) on both the publicly available Hey-Snips dataset and a larger scale internal dataset with 400 speakers. Our proposed model also has a smaller number of parameters and MACs compared to the baseline models.
abstract_zh: 当前的关键词识别系统通常使用大量预定义关键词进行训练。在开放词汇环境中识别关键词对于个性化智能设备交互至关重要。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种基于 MLPixer 的纯 MLP 神经网络，MLPMixer 是一种 MLP 模型架构，可有效取代 Vision Transformers 中的注意力机制。我们研究了使 MLPMixer 架构适应 QbyE 开放词汇关键词识别任务的不同方法。与最先进的 RNN 和 CNN 模型的比较表明，我们的方法在公开可用的 Hey-Snips 数据集和具有 400 个说话者的更大规模内部数据集上，在具有挑战性的情况（10dB 和 6dB 环境）中实现了更好的性能。与基线模型相比，我们提出的模型的参数和 MAC 数量也更少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于MLPMixer的纯MLP神经网络，用于开放词汇的Query-by-Example关键词识别任务。
AI.motivation: 传统关键词识别系统依赖预定义关键词，难以满足开放词汇场景下智能设备个性化交互的需求。
AI.method: 采用MLPMixer架构替代视觉Transformer的注意力机制，设计适配QbyE任务的纯MLP模型。
AI.result: 在Hey-Snips数据集和400人内部数据集中，模型在10dB/6dB噪声环境下优于RNN/CNN，参数量和MACs更少。
AI.conclusion: MLPMixer在开放词汇关键词识别任务中兼具性能优势与计算效率，为智能设备交互提供新方案。

authors_text: Arian Skoki,Jonatan Lerga,Ivan Štajduhar
title: ML-Based Approach for NFL Defensive Pass Interference Prediction Using GPS Tracking Data
title_zh: 使用 GPS 跟踪数据进行基于 ML 的 NFL 防守传球干扰预测方法
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2021 44th International Convention on Information, Communication and Electronic Technology (MIPRO)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2021 44th International Convention on Information, Communication and Electronic Technology (MIPRO)
abstract: Defensive Pass Interference (DPI) is one of the most impactful penalties in the NFL. DPI is a spot foul, yielding an automatic first down to the team in possession. With such an influence on the game, referees have no room for a mistake. It is also a very rare event, which happens 1-2 times per 100 pass attempts. With technology improving and many IoT wearables being put on the athletes to collect valuable data, there is a solid ground for applying machine learning (ML) techniques to improve every aspect of the game. The work presented here is the first attempt in predicting DPI using player tracking GPS data. The data we used was collected by NFL's Next Gen Stats throughout the 2018 regular season. We present ML models for highly imbalanced time-series binary classification: LSTM, GRU, ANN, and Multivariate LSTM-FCN. Results showed that using GPS tracking data to predict DPI has limited success. The best performing models had high recall with low precision which resulted in the classification of many false positive examples. Looking closely at the data confirmed that there is just not enough information to determine whether a foul was committed. This study might serve as a filter for multi-step pipeline for video sequence classification which could be able to solve this problem.
summary: Defensive Pass Interference (DPI) is one of the most impactful penalties in the NFL. DPI is a spot foul, yielding an automatic first down to the team in possession. With such an influence on the game, referees have no room for a mistake. It is also a very rare event, which happens 1-2 times per 100 pass attempts. With technology improving and many IoT wearables being put on the athletes to collect valuable data, there is a solid ground for applying machine learning (ML) techniques to improve every aspect of the game. The work presented here is the first attempt in predicting DPI using player tracking GPS data. The data we used was collected by NFL's Next Gen Stats throughout the 2018 regular season. We present ML models for highly imbalanced time-series binary classification: LSTM, GRU, ANN, and Multivariate LSTM-FCN. Results showed that using GPS tracking data to predict DPI has limited success. The best performing models had high recall with low precision which resulted in the classification of many false positive examples. Looking closely at the data confirmed that there is just not enough information to determine whether a foul was committed. This study might serve as a filter for multi-step pipeline for video sequence classification which could be able to solve this problem.
abstract_zh: 防守传球干扰 (DPI) 是 NFL 中最具影响力的处罚之一。 DPI 是一次当场犯规，自动让控球球队先下场。在对比赛影响如此之大的情况下，裁判没有犯错的余地。这也是一种非常罕见的事件，每 100 次传球尝试中会发生 1-2 次。随着技术的进步以及运动员佩戴许多物联网可穿戴设备来收集有价值的数据，应用机器学习 (ML) 技术来改进比赛的各个方面都有了坚实的基础。这里介绍的工作是使用玩家跟踪 GPS 数据来预测 DPI 的首次尝试。我们使用的数据是 NFL 下一代统计数据在 2018 年常规赛期间收集的。我们提出了用于高度不平衡时间序列二元分类的 ML 模型：LSTM、GRU、ANN 和多元 LSTM-FCN。结果表明，使用 GPS 跟踪数据来预测 DPI 的成功有限。表现最好的模型具有高召回率和低精度，这导致了许多误报示例的分类。仔细观察数据发现，没有足够的信息来确定是否犯规。这项研究可以作为视频序列分类多步管道的过滤器，能够解决这个问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于机器学习的方法，利用NFL球员的GPS追踪数据预测防守传球干扰（DPI）事件。
AI.motivation: DPI是NFL中影响极大的罕见犯规，传统判罚易出错。随着可穿戴设备普及，利用GPS数据通过机器学习辅助判罚具有现实意义。
AI.method: 采用LSTM、GRU、ANN和多变量LSTM-FCN模型，处理高度不平衡的时间序列二分类问题，使用NFL 2018赛季Next Gen Stats采集的GPS数据进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 最佳模型虽具有高召回率但精确率较低，导致大量误判。数据分析表明现有GPS数据信息不足以准确判定犯规。
AI.conclusion: 该研究可作为视频序列分类多步骤流水线的预筛选模块，结合视频数据可能更有效解决DPI判定问题。

authors_text: Vaclav Skala
title: Clipping and Intersection Algorithms: Short Survey and References
title_zh: 裁剪和交叉算法：简短的调查和参考
comment: 22 pages
comments: 22 pages
abstract: This contribution presents a brief survey of clipping and intersection algorithms in E2 and E3 with a nearly complete list of relevant references. Some algorithms use the projective extension of the Euclidean space and vector-vector operations, which supports GPU and SSE use.
summary: This contribution presents a brief survey of clipping and intersection algorithms in E2 and E3 with a nearly complete list of relevant references. Some algorithms use the projective extension of the Euclidean space and vector-vector operations, which supports GPU and SSE use.
abstract_zh: 本贡献对 E2 和 E3 中的裁剪和交叉算法进行了简要概述，并提供了几乎完整的相关参考文献列表。一些算法使用欧几里得空间的射影扩展和向量-向量运算，支持 GPU 和 SSE 使用。

AI.tldr: 本文对二维和三维空间中的裁剪与相交算法进行了简要综述，并提供了详尽的参考文献列表。
AI.motivation: 为开发者提供相关算法的系统性参考，促进在GPU和SSE等硬件加速环境下的高效几何计算。
AI.method: 通过回顾现有算法，分类总结其原理，并整理相关文献，部分算法涉及投影扩展欧几里得空间及向量运算。
AI.result: 总结了多种裁剪与相交算法的适用场景及实现方式，为后续研究与应用提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 裁剪与相交算法在计算机图形学等领域至关重要，选择合适算法需结合具体应用场景与硬件特性。

authors_text: Gwendal Fouché,Ferran Argelaguet,Emmanuel Faure,Charles Kervrann
title: Immersive and Interactive Visualization of 3D Spatio-Temporal Data using a Space Time Hypercube
title_zh: 使用时空超立方体对 3D 时空数据进行沉浸式交互式可视化
comment: 21 1-column pages, 7 figures
comments: 21 1-column pages, 7 figures
abstract: We propose an extension of the well-known Space-Time Cube (STC) visualization technique in order to visualize time-varying 3D spatial data, taking advantage of the interaction capabilities of Virtual Reality (VR). The analysis of multidimensional time-varying datasets, which size grows as recording and simulating techniques advance, faces challenges on the representation and visualization of dense data, as well as on the study of temporal variations. First, we propose the Space-Time Hypercube (STH) as an abstraction for 3D temporal data, extended from the STC concept. Second, through the example of embryo development imaging dataset, we detail the construction and visualization of a STC based on a user-driven projection of the spatial and temporal information. This projection yields a 3D STC visualization, which can also encode additional numerical and categorical data. Additionally, we propose a set of tools allowing the user to filter and manipulate the 3D STC which benefits from the visualization, exploration and interaction possibilities offered by VR. Finally, we evaluated the proposed visualization method in the context of the visualization of spatio-temporal biological data. Several biology experts accompanied the application design to provide insight on how the STC visualization could be used to explore such data. We report a user study (n=12) using non-expert users performing a set of exploration and query tasks to evaluate the system.
