The analysis of multidimensional time-varying datasets, which size grows as recording and simulating techniques advance, faces challenges on the representation and visualization of dense data, as well as on the study of temporal variations. First, we propose the Space-Time Hypercube (STH) as an abstraction for 3D temporal data, extended from the STC concept. Second, through the example of embryo development imaging dataset, we detail the construction and visualization of a STC based on a user-driven projection of the spatial and temporal information. This projection yields a 3D STC visualization, which can also encode additional numerical and categorical data. Additionally, we propose a set of tools allowing the user to filter and manipulate the 3D STC which benefits from the visualization, exploration and interaction possibilities offered by VR. Finally, we evaluated the proposed visualization method in the context of the visualization of spatio-temporal biological data. Several biology experts accompanied the application design to provide insight on how the STC visualization could be used to explore such data. We report a user study (n=12) using non-expert users performing a set of exploration and query tasks to evaluate the system.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了著名的时空立方体 (STC) 可视化技术的扩展，以便利用虚拟现实 (VR) 的交互功能来可视化随时间变化的 3D 空间数据。随着记录和模拟技术的进步，多维时变数据集的规模不断增大，其分析面临着密集数据的表示和可视化以及时间变化研究的挑战。首先，我们提出时空超立方体（STH）作为 3D 时态数据的抽象，从 STC 概念扩展而来。其次，通过胚胎发育成像数据集的示例，我们详细介绍了基于用户驱动的时空信息投影的 STC 的构建和可视化。该投影产生 3D STC 可视化，它还可以对其他数字和分类数据进行编码。此外，我们还提出了一套工具，允许用户过滤和操作 3D STC，这受益于 VR 提供的可视化、探索和交互可能性。最后，我们在时空生物数据可视化的背景下评估了所提出的可视化方法。几位生物学专家伴随着应用程序设计，提供了有关如何使用 STC 可视化来探索此类数据的见解。我们报告了一项用户研究 (n=12)，使用非专家用户执行一组探索和查询任务来评估系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于虚拟现实（VR）的时空超立方体（STH）可视化方法，用于交互式探索三维时空数据。
AI.motivation: 随着数据采集和模拟技术的发展，多维时变数据集的规模不断增长，传统可视化方法难以有效处理密集数据及时间变化分析，尤其在生物医学领域存在显著挑战。
AI.method: 扩展时空立方体（STC）概念为三维时空超立方体（STH），结合VR交互技术，通过用户驱动的空间时间投影构建可视化模型，并开发过滤与操作工具支持数据探索。
AI.result: 通过胚胎发育影像数据集验证方法有效性，生物学专家参与设计，用户研究（n=12）表明非专业用户能高效完成探索与查询任务。
AI.conclusion: VR增强的STH方法有效支持复杂时空数据的可视化分析，为生物医学等领域的时空数据研究提供了交互式工具。

authors_text: Maria Chiara Angelini,Federico Ricci-Tersenghi
title: Modern graph neural networks do worse than classical greedy algorithms in solving combinatorial optimization problems like maximum independent set
title_zh: 现代图神经网络在解决最大独立集等组合优化问题方面比经典贪婪算法表现更差
comment: Comment to "Combinatorial Optimization with Physics-Inspired Graph Neural Networks'' [Nat Mach Intell 4 (2022) 367] https://www.nature.com/articles/s42256-022-00468-6
comments: Comment to "Combinatorial Optimization with Physics-Inspired Graph Neural Networks'' [Nat Mach Intell 4 (2022) 367] https://www.nature.com/articles/s42256-022-00468-6
abstract: The recent work ``Combinatorial Optimization with Physics-Inspired Graph Neural Networks'' [Nat Mach Intell 4 (2022) 367] introduces a physics-inspired unsupervised Graph Neural Network (GNN) to solve combinatorial optimization problems on sparse graphs. To test the performances of these GNNs, the authors of the work show numerical results for two fundamental problems: maximum cut and maximum independent set (MIS). They conclude that "the graph neural network optimizer performs on par or outperforms existing solvers, with the ability to scale beyond the state of the art to problems with millions of variables." In this comment, we show that a simple greedy algorithm, running in almost linear time, can find solutions for the MIS problem of much better quality than the GNN. The greedy algorithm is faster by a factor of $10^4$ with respect to the GNN for problems with a million variables. We do not see any good reason for solving the MIS with these GNN, as well as for using a sledgehammer to crack nuts. In general, many claims of superiority of neural networks in solving combinatorial problems are at risk of being not solid enough, since we lack standard benchmarks based on really hard problems. We propose one of such hard benchmarks, and we hope to see future neural network optimizers tested on these problems before any claim of superiority is made.
summary: The recent work ``Combinatorial Optimization with Physics-Inspired Graph Neural Networks'' [Nat Mach Intell 4 (2022) 367] introduces a physics-inspired unsupervised Graph Neural Network (GNN) to solve combinatorial optimization problems on sparse graphs. To test the performances of these GNNs, the authors of the work show numerical results for two fundamental problems: maximum cut and maximum independent set (MIS). They conclude that "the graph neural network optimizer performs on par or outperforms existing solvers, with the ability to scale beyond the state of the art to problems with millions of variables." In this comment, we show that a simple greedy algorithm, running in almost linear time, can find solutions for the MIS problem of much better quality than the GNN. The greedy algorithm is faster by a factor of $10^4$ with respect to the GNN for problems with a million variables. We do not see any good reason for solving the MIS with these GNN, as well as for using a sledgehammer to crack nuts. In general, many claims of superiority of neural networks in solving combinatorial problems are at risk of being not solid enough, since we lack standard benchmarks based on really hard problems. We propose one of such hard benchmarks, and we hope to see future neural network optimizers tested on these problems before any claim of superiority is made.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作“受物理启发的图神经网络的组合优化”[Nat Mach Intell 4 (2022) 367]引入了受物理启发的无监督图神经网络（GNN）来解决稀疏图上的组合优化问题。为了测试这些 GNN 的性能，该工作的作者展示了两个基本问题的数值结果：最大割和最大独立集（MIS）。他们的结论是：“图神经网络优化器的性能与现有求解器相当或优于现有求解器，能够超越现有技术水平，解决具有数百万个变量的问题。”在这篇评论中，我们展示了一个简单的贪婪算法，在几乎线性的时间内运行，可以找到比 GNN 质量好得多的 MIS 问题的解决方案。对于具有一百万个变量的问题，贪心算法比 GNN 快 10^4 倍。我们看不出用这些 GNN 来解决 MIS 以及用大锤来破解坚果有什么好的理由。一般来说，许多关于神经网络在解决组合问题方面的优越性的说法都存在不够可靠的风险，因为我们缺乏基于真正困难问题的标准基准。我们提出了这样一个硬基准，我们希望看到未来的神经网络优化器在提出任何优越性之前对这些问题进行测试。

AI.tldr: 本文评论了近期一篇关于使用物理启发图神经网络解决组合优化问题的研究，指出传统贪心算法在解决最大独立集问题上表现更优。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在评估图神经网络在解决组合优化问题上的实际效果，并指出其可能存在的不足。
AI.method: 通过对比实验，使用简单的贪心算法与图神经网络在最大独立集问题上的表现进行比较。
AI.result: 贪心算法在速度和解的质量上均优于图神经网络，且速度快了10^4倍。
AI.conclusion: 图神经网络在解决某些组合优化问题上可能并不优于传统算法，缺乏基于真正难题的标准基准测试可能使神经网络的优越性主张不够稳固。

authors_text: Diogo Leitão,Pedro Saleiro,Mário A. T. Figueiredo,Pedro Bizarro
title: Human-AI Collaboration in Decision-Making: Beyond Learning to Defer
title_zh: 决策中的人机协作：超越学习推迟
comment: ICML 2022 Workshop on Human-Machine Collaboration and Teaming
comments: ICML 2022 Workshop on Human-Machine Collaboration and Teaming
abstract: Human-AI collaboration (HAIC) in decision-making aims to create synergistic teaming between human decision-makers and AI systems. Learning to defer (L2D) has been presented as a promising framework to determine who among humans and AI should make which decisions in order to optimize the performance and fairness of the combined system. Nevertheless, L2D entails several often unfeasible requirements, such as the availability of predictions from humans for every instance or ground-truth labels that are independent from said humans. Furthermore, neither L2D nor alternative approaches tackle fundamental issues of deploying HAIC systems in real-world settings, such as capacity management or dealing with dynamic environments. In this paper, we aim to identify and review these and other limitations, pointing to where opportunities for future research in HAIC may lie.
summary: Human-AI collaboration (HAIC) in decision-making aims to create synergistic teaming between human decision-makers and AI systems. Learning to defer (L2D) has been presented as a promising framework to determine who among humans and AI should make which decisions in order to optimize the performance and fairness of the combined system. Nevertheless, L2D entails several often unfeasible requirements, such as the availability of predictions from humans for every instance or ground-truth labels that are independent from said humans. Furthermore, neither L2D nor alternative approaches tackle fundamental issues of deploying HAIC systems in real-world settings, such as capacity management or dealing with dynamic environments. In this paper, we aim to identify and review these and other limitations, pointing to where opportunities for future research in HAIC may lie.
abstract_zh: 决策中的人机协作（HAIC）旨在在人类决策者和人工智能系统之间建立协同团队。学习延迟（L2D）被认为是一个有前景的框架，可以确定人类和人工智能中的谁应该做出哪些决策，以优化组合系统的性能和公平性。然而，L2D 带来了一些通常不可行的要求，例如人类对每个实例的预测的可用性或独立于所述人类的真实标签。此外，L2D 和替代方法都没有解决在现实环境中部署 HAIC 系统的基本问题，例如容量管理或处理动态环境。在本文中，我们的目标是识别和回顾这些和其他局限性，指出 HAIC 未来研究的机会所在。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在审查人机协作决策系统中的局限性，并指出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有学习让步框架存在不切实际的要求，且未解决实际部署中的关键问题。
AI.method: 通过回顾现有方法的局限性，分析数据需求和实际部署挑战。
AI.result: 识别出L2D框架的数据依赖性及动态环境适应性不足等核心问题。
AI.conclusion: 需突破现有框架限制，开发更适应实际场景的人机协作决策机制。

search_text: Human-AI Collaboration in Decision-Making: Beyond Learning to Defer 决策中的人机协作：超越学习推迟 Human-AI collaboration (HAIC) in decision-making aims to create synergistic teaming between human decision-makers and AI systems. Learning to defer (L2D) has been presented as a promising framework to determine who among humans and AI should make which decisions in order to optimize the performance and fairness of the combined system. Nevertheless, L2D entails several often unfeasible requirements, such as the availability of predictions from humans for every instance or ground-truth labels that are independent from said humans. Furthermore, neither L2D nor alternative approaches tackle fundamental issues of deploying HAIC systems in real-world settings, such as capacity management or dealing with dynamic environments. In this paper, we aim to identify and review these and other limitations, pointing to where opportunities for future research in HAIC may lie. 决策中的人机协作（HAIC）旨在在人类决策者和人工智能系统之间建立协同团队。学习延迟（L2D）被认为是一个有前景的框架，可以确定人类和人工智能中的谁应该做出哪些决策，以优化组合系统的性能和公平性。然而，L2D 带来了一些通常不可行的要求，例如人类对每个实例的预测的可用性或独立于所述人类的真实标签。此外，L2D 和替代方法都没有解决在现实环境中部署 HAIC 系统的基本问题，例如容量管理或处理动态环境。在本文中，我们的目标是识别和回顾这些和其他局限性，指出 HAIC 未来研究的机会所在。 本文旨在审查人机协作决策系统中的局限性，并指出未来研究方向。 Diogo Leitão,Pedro Saleiro,Mário A. T. Figueiredo,Pedro Bizarro cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Markus Schön,Michael Buchholz,Klaus Dietmayer
title: MGNet: Monocular Geometric Scene Understanding for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: MGNet：自动驾驶的单目几何场景理解
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV), 2021, pp. 15784-15795
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV), 2021, pp. 15784-15795
abstract: We introduce MGNet, a multi-task framework for monocular geometric scene understanding. We define monocular geometric scene understanding as the combination of two known tasks: Panoptic segmentation and self-supervised monocular depth estimation. Panoptic segmentation captures the full scene not only semantically, but also on an instance basis. Self-supervised monocular depth estimation uses geometric constraints derived from the camera measurement model in order to measure depth from monocular video sequences only. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to propose the combination of these two tasks in one single model. Our model is designed with focus on low latency to provide fast inference in real-time on a single consumer-grade GPU. During deployment, our model produces dense 3D point clouds with instance aware semantic labels from single high-resolution camera images. We evaluate our model on two popular autonomous driving benchmarks, i.e., Cityscapes and KITTI, and show competitive performance among other real-time capable methods. Source code is available at https://github.com/markusschoen/MGNet.
summary: We introduce MGNet, a multi-task framework for monocular geometric scene understanding. We define monocular geometric scene understanding as the combination of two known tasks: Panoptic segmentation and self-supervised monocular depth estimation. Panoptic segmentation captures the full scene not only semantically, but also on an instance basis. Self-supervised monocular depth estimation uses geometric constraints derived from the camera measurement model in order to measure depth from monocular video sequences only. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to propose the combination of these two tasks in one single model. Our model is designed with focus on low latency to provide fast inference in real-time on a single consumer-grade GPU. During deployment, our model produces dense 3D point clouds with instance aware semantic labels from single high-resolution camera images. We evaluate our model on two popular autonomous driving benchmarks, i.e., Cityscapes and KITTI, and show competitive performance among other real-time capable methods. Source code is available at https://github.com/markusschoen/MGNet.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 MGNet，一个用于单目几何场景理解的多任务框架。我们将单目几何场景理解定义为两个已知任务的组合：全景分割和自监督单目深度估计。全景分割不仅在语义上而且在实例的基础上捕获整个场景。自监督单目深度估计使用从相机测量模型导出的几何约束，以便仅测量单目视频序列的深度。据我们所知，我们是第一个提出将这两项任务组合在一个模型中的人。我们的模型的设计重点是低延迟，以便在单个消费级 GPU 上提供实时快速推理。在部署过程中，我们的模型会生成密集的 3D 点云，其中包含来自单个高分辨率相机图像的实例感知语义标签。我们在两个流行的自动驾驶基准（即 Cityscapes 和 KITTI）上评估我们的模型，并显示出与其他实时方法相比具有竞争力的性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/markusschoen/MGNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MGNet，一种结合全景分割与自监督单目深度估计的多任务框架，用于自动驾驶中的单目几何场景理解。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效融合几何感知与语义理解，且实时性不足。本文旨在通过联合优化两项任务，提升自动驾驶场景理解的准确性与效率。
AI.method: 设计轻量级多任务网络，集成全景分割（语义+实例级）与自监督深度估计模块，利用相机几何约束进行单目深度预测，并优化模型以在消费级GPU实现实时推理。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和KITTI数据集上，MGNet在实时方法中表现优异，可生成带语义标签的稠密3D点云，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MGNet通过联合优化几何与语义任务，为自动驾驶提供了高效、精准的单目场景理解方案，具有实际部署价值。

authors_text: Yi Wang,Conrad M Albrecht,Nassim Ait Ali Braham,Lichao Mou,Xiao Xiang Zhu
title: Self-supervised Learning in Remote Sensing: A Review
title_zh: 遥感自监督学习：回顾
comment: Accepted by IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Magazine. 32 pages, 22 content pages
comments: Accepted by IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Magazine. 32 pages, 22 content pages
abstract: In deep learning research, self-supervised learning (SSL) has received great attention triggering interest within both the computer vision and remote sensing communities. While there has been a big success in computer vision, most of the potential of SSL in the domain of earth observation remains locked. In this paper, we provide an introduction to, and a review of the concepts and latest developments in SSL for computer vision in the context of remote sensing. Further, we provide a preliminary benchmark of modern SSL algorithms on popular remote sensing datasets, verifying the potential of SSL in remote sensing and providing an extended study on data augmentations. Finally, we identify a list of promising directions of future research in SSL for earth observation (SSL4EO) to pave the way for fruitful interaction of both domains.
summary: In deep learning research, self-supervised learning (SSL) has received great attention triggering interest within both the computer vision and remote sensing communities. While there has been a big success in computer vision, most of the potential of SSL in the domain of earth observation remains locked. In this paper, we provide an introduction to, and a review of the concepts and latest developments in SSL for computer vision in the context of remote sensing. Further, we provide a preliminary benchmark of modern SSL algorithms on popular remote sensing datasets, verifying the potential of SSL in remote sensing and providing an extended study on data augmentations. Finally, we identify a list of promising directions of future research in SSL for earth observation (SSL4EO) to pave the way for fruitful interaction of both domains.
abstract_zh: 在深度学习研究中，自监督学习（SSL）受到了极大的关注，引发了计算机视觉和遥感界的兴趣。尽管计算机视觉领域取得了巨大成功，但 SSL 在地球观测领域的大部分潜力仍然被锁定。在本文中，我们介绍并回顾了遥感背景下计算机视觉 SSL 的概念和最新发展。此外，我们在流行的遥感数据集上提供了现代 SSL 算法的初步基准，验证了 SSL 在遥感中的潜力，并提供了关于数据增强的扩展研究。最后，我们确定了 SSL 地球观测 (SSL4EO) 未来研究的一系列有前景的方向，为两个领域富有成效的互动铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 综述自监督学习在遥感领域的应用，并评估其效果
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习在计算机视觉中取得成功，但其在遥感领域的潜力尚未充分开发，需通过综述和基准测试推动其应用
AI.method: 通过综述SSL概念与最新进展，对遥感数据集进行基准测试，分析数据增强方法，并提出未来研究方向
AI.result: 验证了SSL在遥感中的潜力，并扩展了数据增强方法的研究
AI.conclusion: 指出了SSL在地球观测中的未来研究方向，促进计算机视觉与遥感领域的交叉融合

authors_text: Yifan Hou,Hongzhi Chen,Changji Li,James Cheng,Ming-Chang Yang
title: A Representation Learning Framework for Property Graphs
title_zh: 属性图的表示学习框架
comment: This paper is published in KDD 2019. Code can be found here: https://github.com/yifan-h/PGE
comments: This paper is published in KDD 2019. Code can be found here: https://github.com/yifan-h/PGE
abstract: Representation learning on graphs, also called graph embedding, has demonstrated its significant impact on a series of machine learning applications such as classification, prediction and recommendation. However, existing work has largely ignored the rich information contained in the properties (or attributes) of both nodes and edges of graphs in modern applications, e.g., those represented by property graphs. To date, most existing graph embedding methods either focus on plain graphs with only the graph topology, or consider properties on nodes only. We propose PGE, a graph representation learning framework that incorporates both node and edge properties into the graph embedding procedure. PGE uses node clustering to assign biases to differentiate neighbors of a node and leverages multiple data-driven matrices to aggregate the property information of neighbors sampled based on a biased strategy. PGE adopts the popular inductive model for neighborhood aggregation. We provide detailed analyses on the efficacy of our method and validate the performance of PGE by showing how PGE achieves better embedding results than the state-of-the-art graph embedding methods on benchmark applications such as node classification and link prediction over real-world datasets.
summary: Representation learning on graphs, also called graph embedding, has demonstrated its significant impact on a series of machine learning applications such as classification, prediction and recommendation. However, existing work has largely ignored the rich information contained in the properties (or attributes) of both nodes and edges of graphs in modern applications, e.g., those represented by property graphs. To date, most existing graph embedding methods either focus on plain graphs with only the graph topology, or consider properties on nodes only. We propose PGE, a graph representation learning framework that incorporates both node and edge properties into the graph embedding procedure. PGE uses node clustering to assign biases to differentiate neighbors of a node and leverages multiple data-driven matrices to aggregate the property information of neighbors sampled based on a biased strategy. PGE adopts the popular inductive model for neighborhood aggregation. We provide detailed analyses on the efficacy of our method and validate the performance of PGE by showing how PGE achieves better embedding results than the state-of-the-art graph embedding methods on benchmark applications such as node classification and link prediction over real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 图的表示学习，也称为图嵌入，已经证明了其对分类、预测和推荐等一系列机器学习应用的重大影响。然而，现有的工作在很大程度上忽略了现代应用程序中图的节点和边的属性（或属性）中包含的丰富信息，例如由属性图表示的信息。迄今为止，大多数现有的图嵌入方法要么专注于仅具有图拓扑的普通图，要么仅考虑节点上的属性。我们提出了 PGE，一种图表示学习框架，它将节点和边属性合并到图嵌入过程中。 PGE 使用节点聚类分配偏差来区分节点的邻居，并利用多个数据驱动矩阵来聚合基于偏差策略采样的邻居的属性信息。 PGE采用流行的归纳模型进行邻域聚合。我们对我们的方法的有效性进行了详细分析，并通过展示 PGE 如何在基准应用程序（例如现实世界数据集上的节点分类和链接预测）上实现比最先进的图嵌入方法更好的嵌入结果来验证 PGE 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PGE的图表示学习框架，旨在通过整合节点和边的属性信息来改进图嵌入效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图嵌入方法大多忽略属性图中节点和边的丰富属性信息，而现代应用（如推荐系统）亟需利用这些属性提升模型性能。
AI.method: PGE通过节点聚类分配偏差区分邻居，利用多矩阵聚合基于偏差策略采样的邻居属性信息，并采用归纳模型进行邻居特征聚合。
AI.result: 在真实数据集的节点分类和链接预测任务中，PGE的嵌入效果优于当前最先进的图嵌入方法。
AI.conclusion: PGE框架有效利用属性图的属性信息，为图表示学习提供了新的思路并验证了其实际应用价值。

authors_text: Zeqing Zhang,Yinqiang Zhang,Ruihua Han,Liangjun Zhang,Jia Pan
title: A Generalized Continuous Collision Detection Framework of Polynomial Trajectory for Mobile Robots in Cluttered Environments
title_zh: 杂乱环境中移动机器人多项式轨迹的广义连续碰撞检测框架
comment: 8 pages. Accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters. See video (CN) at https://bilibili.com/video/BV19t4y1b7av?share_source=copy_web
comments: 8 pages. Accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters. See video (CN) at https://bilibili.com/video/BV19t4y1b7av?share_source=copy_web
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a generalized continuous collision detection (CCD) framework for the mobile robot along the polynomial trajectory in cluttered environments including various static obstacle models. Specifically, we find that the collision conditions between robots and obstacles could be transformed into a set of polynomial inequalities, whose roots can be efficiently solved by the proposed solver. In addition, we test different types of mobile robots with various kinematic and dynamic constraints in our generalized CCD framework and validate that it allows the provable collision checking and can compute the exact time of impact. Furthermore, we combine our architecture with the path planner in the navigation system. Benefiting from our CCD method, the mobile robot is able to work safely in some challenging scenarios.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a generalized continuous collision detection (CCD) framework for the mobile robot along the polynomial trajectory in cluttered environments including various static obstacle models. Specifically, we find that the collision conditions between robots and obstacles could be transformed into a set of polynomial inequalities, whose roots can be efficiently solved by the proposed solver. In addition, we test different types of mobile robots with various kinematic and dynamic constraints in our generalized CCD framework and validate that it allows the provable collision checking and can compute the exact time of impact. Furthermore, we combine our architecture with the path planner in the navigation system. Benefiting from our CCD method, the mobile robot is able to work safely in some challenging scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种通用的连续碰撞检测（CCD）框架，用于移动机器人在杂乱环境（包括各种静态障碍物模型）中沿多项式轨迹移动。具体来说，我们发现机器人和障碍物之间的碰撞条件可以转化为一组多项式不等式，其根可以通过所提出的求解器有效求解。此外，我们在通用 CCD 框架中测试了具有各种运动学和动态约束的不同类型的移动机器人，并验证它是否允许进行可证明的碰撞检查并可以计算准确的碰撞时间。此外，我们将我们的架构与导航系统中的路径规划器相结合。受益于我们的 CCD 方法，移动机器人能够在一些具有挑战性的场景中安全工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于复杂环境中移动机器人的多项式轨迹连续碰撞检测（CCD）通用框架。
AI.motivation: 在复杂环境中，移动机器人需要精确检测多项式轨迹与静态障碍物的碰撞以确保安全导航。
AI.method: 将机器人与障碍物的碰撞条件转化为多项式不等式，并通过设计的求解器高效计算根以确定碰撞时间。
AI.result: 验证了框架在不同动力学约束机器人上的有效性，实现了可证明的碰撞检测与精确碰撞时间计算。
AI.conclusion: 该CCD方法可与路径规划器集成，使移动机器人在复杂场景中实现安全导航。

authors_text: Hiroyuki Kido
title: Towards Unifying Perceptual Reasoning and Logical Reasoning
title_zh: 统一感知推理和逻辑推理
abstract: An increasing number of scientific experiments support the view of perception as Bayesian inference, which is rooted in Helmholtz's view of perception as unconscious inference. Recent study of logic presents a view of logical reasoning as Bayesian inference. In this paper, we give a simple probabilistic model that is applicable to both perceptual reasoning and logical reasoning. We show that the model unifies the two essential processes common in perceptual and logical systems: on the one hand, the process by which perceptual and logical knowledge is derived from another knowledge, and on the other hand, the process by which such knowledge is derived from data. We fully characterise the model in terms of logical consequence relations.
summary: An increasing number of scientific experiments support the view of perception as Bayesian inference, which is rooted in Helmholtz's view of perception as unconscious inference. Recent study of logic presents a view of logical reasoning as Bayesian inference. In this paper, we give a simple probabilistic model that is applicable to both perceptual reasoning and logical reasoning. We show that the model unifies the two essential processes common in perceptual and logical systems: on the one hand, the process by which perceptual and logical knowledge is derived from another knowledge, and on the other hand, the process by which such knowledge is derived from data. We fully characterise the model in terms of logical consequence relations.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的科学实验支持将感知视为贝叶斯推理的观点，这一观点植根于亥姆霍兹将感知视为无意识推理的观点。最近的逻辑研究提出了一种将逻辑推理视为贝叶斯推理的观点。在本文中，我们给出了一个适用于感知推理和逻辑推理的简单概率模型。我们表明，该模型统一了感知和逻辑系统中常见的两个基本过程：一方面，感知和逻辑知识从另一种知识派生的过程，另一方面，这种知识从数据派生的过程。我们根据逻辑结果关系充分描述了该模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一的概率模型，将感知推理与逻辑推理结合，基于贝叶斯推理框架进行表征。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分别将感知与逻辑推理视为贝叶斯推理的不同表现，但缺乏统一模型整合两者，导致应用受限。
AI.method: 构建简单概率模型，通过逻辑推导关系描述感知知识与逻辑知识的生成过程，涵盖从先验知识与数据中推导知识的双重机制。
AI.result: 模型成功统一了感知与逻辑系统的两种核心过程，并通过逻辑后承关系完整表征了模型特性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为人工智能中的推理系统设计提供了理论基础，揭示了感知与逻辑推理的共性，推动跨学科研究。

In this paper, we give a simple probabilistic model that is applicable to both perceptual reasoning and logical reasoning. We show that the model unifies the two essential processes common in perceptual and logical systems: on the one hand, the process by which perceptual and logical knowledge is derived from another knowledge, and on the other hand, the process by which such knowledge is derived from data. We fully characterise the model in terms of logical consequence relations. 越来越多的科学实验支持将感知视为贝叶斯推理的观点，这一观点植根于亥姆霍兹将感知视为无意识推理的观点。最近的逻辑研究提出了一种将逻辑推理视为贝叶斯推理的观点。在本文中，我们给出了一个适用于感知推理和逻辑推理的简单概率模型。我们表明，该模型统一了感知和逻辑系统中常见的两个基本过程：一方面，感知和逻辑知识从另一种知识派生的过程，另一方面，这种知识从数据派生的过程。我们根据逻辑结果关系充分描述了该模型。 本文提出一个统一的概率模型，将感知推理与逻辑推理结合，基于贝叶斯推理框架进行表征。 Hiroyuki Kido cs.AI

authors_text: Rhydian Windsor,Amir Jamaludin,Timor Kadir,Andrew Zisserman
title: Context-Aware Transformers For Spinal Cancer Detection and Radiological Grading
title_zh: 用于脊柱癌检测和放射分级的上下文感知 Transformer
comment: Pre-print of paper accepted to MICCAI 2022. 15 pages, 7 figures
comments: Pre-print of paper accepted to MICCAI 2022. 15 pages, 7 figures
abstract: This paper proposes a novel transformer-based model architecture for medical imaging problems involving analysis of vertebrae. It considers two applications of such models in MR images: (a) detection of spinal metastases and the related conditions of vertebral fractures and metastatic cord compression, (b) radiological grading of common degenerative changes in intervertebral discs. Our contributions are as follows: (i) We propose a Spinal Context Transformer (SCT), a deep-learning architecture suited for the analysis of repeated anatomical structures in medical imaging such as vertebral bodies (VBs). Unlike previous related methods, SCT considers all VBs as viewed in all available image modalities together, making predictions for each based on context from the rest of the spinal column and all available imaging modalities. (ii) We apply the architecture to a novel and important task: detecting spinal metastases and the related conditions of cord compression and vertebral fractures/collapse from multi-series spinal MR scans. This is done using annotations extracted from free-text radiological reports as opposed to bespoke annotation. However, the resulting model shows strong agreement with vertebral-level bespoke radiologist annotations on the test set. (iii) We also apply SCT to an existing problem: radiological grading of inter-vertebral discs (IVDs) in lumbar MR scans for common degenerative changes.We show that by considering the context of vertebral bodies in the image, SCT improves the accuracy for several gradings compared to previously published model.
summary: This paper proposes a novel transformer-based model architecture for medical imaging problems involving analysis of vertebrae. It considers two applications of such models in MR images: (a) detection of spinal metastases and the related conditions of vertebral fractures and metastatic cord compression, (b) radiological grading of common degenerative changes in intervertebral discs. Our contributions are as follows: (i) We propose a Spinal Context Transformer (SCT), a deep-learning architecture suited for the analysis of repeated anatomical structures in medical imaging such as vertebral bodies (VBs). Unlike previous related methods, SCT considers all VBs as viewed in all available image modalities together, making predictions for each based on context from the rest of the spinal column and all available imaging modalities. (ii) We apply the architecture to a novel and important task: detecting spinal metastases and the related conditions of cord compression and vertebral fractures/collapse from multi-series spinal MR scans. This is done using annotations extracted from free-text radiological reports as opposed to bespoke annotation. However, the resulting model shows strong agreement with vertebral-level bespoke radiologist annotations on the test set. (iii) We also apply SCT to an existing problem: radiological grading of inter-vertebral discs (IVDs) in lumbar MR scans for common degenerative changes.We show that by considering the context of vertebral bodies in the image, SCT improves the accuracy for several gradings compared to previously published model.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的基于变压器的模型架构，用于解决涉及椎骨分析的医学成像问题。它考虑了此类模型在 MR 图像中的两种应用：（a）检测脊柱转移以及椎骨骨折和转移性脊髓受压的相关情况，（b）椎间盘常见退行性变化的放射学分级。我们的贡献如下：（i）我们提出了一种脊髓上下文转换器（SCT），这是一种深度学习架构，适用于分析医学成像中的重复解剖结构，例如椎体（VB）。与以前的相关方法不同，SCT 将所有可用图像模式中查看的所有 VB 一起考虑，并根据脊柱其余部分和所有可用成像模式的上下文对每个 VB 进行预测。 (ii) 我们将该架构应用于一项新颖且重要的任务：通过多系列脊柱 MR 扫描检测脊柱转移瘤以及脊髓受压和椎骨骨折/塌陷的相关情况。这是使用从自由文本放射学报告中提取的注释而不是定制注释来完成的。然而，生成的模型与测试集上的椎骨级定制放射科医生注释非常一致。 (iii) 我们还将 SCT 应用于现有的问题：腰椎 MR 扫描中椎间盘 (IVD) 的放射学分级，以发现常见的退行性变化。我们表明，通过考虑图像中椎体的背景，与之前发布的模型相比，SCT 提高了多个分级的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的新型深度学习架构SCT，用于脊柱MRI图像中脊柱转移瘤检测及椎间盘退行性病变分级。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理脊柱重复解剖结构时缺乏全局上下文建模能力，且现有标注方式成本高昂。
AI.method: 设计Spinal Context Transformer架构，整合多模态MRI数据与全脊柱椎体上下文信息，利用放射报告文本标注替代传统定制标注。
AI.result: 模型在椎体转移瘤检测任务中与放射科医生标注达成强一致性，在椎间盘分级任务中较现有方法提升准确率。
AI.conclusion: SCT通过上下文感知机制有效提升了脊柱影像分析性能，为医学影像AI提供了新范式。

authors_text: Yifan Hou,Jian Zhang,James Cheng,Kaili Ma,Richard T. B. Ma,Hongzhi Chen,Ming-Chang Yang
title: Measuring and Improving the Use of Graph Information in Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 测量和改进图神经网络中图信息的使用
comment: This paper has been published in ICLR 2020. Code and Dataset can be found here: https://github.com/yifan-h/CS-GNN
comments: This paper has been published in ICLR 2020. Code and Dataset can be found here: https://github.com/yifan-h/CS-GNN
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have been widely used for representation learning on graph data. However, there is limited understanding on how much performance GNNs actually gain from graph data. This paper introduces a context-surrounding GNN framework and proposes two smoothness metrics to measure the quantity and quality of information obtained from graph data. A new GNN model, called CS-GNN, is then designed to improve the use of graph information based on the smoothness values of a graph. CS-GNN is shown to achieve better performance than existing methods in different types of real graphs.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have been widely used for representation learning on graph data. However, there is limited understanding on how much performance GNNs actually gain from graph data. This paper introduces a context-surrounding GNN framework and proposes two smoothness metrics to measure the quantity and quality of information obtained from graph data. A new GNN model, called CS-GNN, is then designed to improve the use of graph information based on the smoothness values of a graph. CS-GNN is shown to achieve better performance than existing methods in different types of real graphs.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）已广泛用于图数据的表示学习。然而，对于 GNN 从图数据中实际获得多少性能的了解还很有限。本文介绍了一种围绕上下文的 GNN 框架，并提出了两个平滑度指标来衡量从图数据中获得的信息的数量和质量。然后设计了一种称为 CS-GNN 的新 GNN 模型，以根据图的平滑度值改进图信息的使用。 CS-GNN 在不同类型的真实图中表现出比现有方法更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 测量并提升图神经网络（GNN）对图信息的利用
AI.motivation: 现有GNNs对图数据利用程度缺乏量化评估，需明确其性能提升来源并优化
AI.method: 提出上下文环绕框架及两个平滑度指标，设计基于平滑度的CS-GNN模型以优化图信息利用
AI.result: CS-GNN在多种真实图数据集上优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 通过量化图信息利用并优化模型，有效提升了GNN性能，验证了方法的有效性

authors_text: Ningyuan Huang,Yash R. Deshpande,Yibo Liu,Houda Alberts,Kyunghyun Cho,Clara Vania,Iacer Calixto
title: Endowing Language Models with Multimodal Knowledge Graph Representations
title_zh: 赋予语言模型多模态知识图表示
comment: 14 pages with appendix, 2 figures, 15 tables
comments: 14 pages with appendix, 2 figures, 15 tables
abstract: We propose a method to make natural language understanding models more parameter efficient by storing knowledge in an external knowledge graph (KG) and retrieving from this KG using a dense index. Given (possibly multilingual) downstream task data, e.g., sentences in German, we retrieve entities from the KG and use their multimodal representations to improve downstream task performance. We use the recently released VisualSem KG as our external knowledge repository, which covers a subset of Wikipedia and WordNet entities, and compare a mix of tuple-based and graph-based algorithms to learn entity and relation representations that are grounded on the KG multimodal information. We demonstrate the usefulness of the learned entity representations on two downstream tasks, and show improved performance on the multilingual named entity recognition task by $0.3\%$--$0.7\%$ F1, while we achieve up to $2.5\%$ improvement in accuracy on the visual sense disambiguation task. All our code and data are available in: \url{https://github.com/iacercalixto/visualsem-kg}.
summary: We propose a method to make natural language understanding models more parameter efficient by storing knowledge in an external knowledge graph (KG) and retrieving from this KG using a dense index. Given (possibly multilingual) downstream task data, e.g., sentences in German, we retrieve entities from the KG and use their multimodal representations to improve downstream task performance. We use the recently released VisualSem KG as our external knowledge repository, which covers a subset of Wikipedia and WordNet entities, and compare a mix of tuple-based and graph-based algorithms to learn entity and relation representations that are grounded on the KG multimodal information. We demonstrate the usefulness of the learned entity representations on two downstream tasks, and show improved performance on the multilingual named entity recognition task by $0.3\%$--$0.7\%$ F1, while we achieve up to $2.5\%$ improvement in accuracy on the visual sense disambiguation task. All our code and data are available in: \url{https://github.com/iacercalixto/visualsem-kg}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种方法，通过将知识存储在外部知识图（KG）中并使用密集索引从该 KG 中检索，使自然语言理解模型的参数效率更高。给定（可能是多语言的）下游任务数据，例如德语句子，我们从知识图谱中检索实体并使用它们的多模态表示来提高下游任务性能。我们使用最近发布的 VisualSem KG 作为我们的外部知识库，它涵盖了 Wikipedia 和 WordNet 实体的子集，并比较基于元组和基于图的算法的组合来学习基于 KG 多模态信息的实体和关系表示。我们展示了学习到的实体表示在两个下游任务中的有用性，并在多语言命名实体识别任务上显示了 $0.3\%$--$0.7\%$ F1 的性能改进，同时我们在视觉消歧任务上实现了高达 $2.5\%$ 的准确性改进。我们所有的代码和数据都可以在：\url{https://github.com/iacercalixto/visualsem-kg} 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过外部多模态知识图谱表示增强语言模型性能的方法，用于提升下游自然语言处理任务的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统语言模型参数冗余且难以高效利用外部知识，而多模态知识图谱能提供结构化语义信息，从而提升模型效率与任务表现。
AI.method: 使用VisualSem知识图谱作为外部知识库，结合密集索引检索实体，并通过混合图基与元组算法学习多模态实体及关系表示，应用于多语言命名实体识别与视觉歧义消解任务。
AI.result: 在多语言命名实体识别任务中F1值提升0.3%-0.7%，视觉歧义消解任务准确率最高提升2.5%。
AI.conclusion: 多模态知识图谱表示能有效增强语言模型的语义理解能力，尤其在跨语言与视觉相关任务中表现显著。

search_text: Endowing Language Models with Multimodal Knowledge Graph Representations 赋予语言模型多模态知识图表示 We propose a method to make natural language understanding models more parameter efficient by storing knowledge in an external knowledge graph (KG) and retrieving from this KG using a dense index. Given (possibly multilingual) downstream task data, e.g., sentences in German, we retrieve entities from the KG and use their multimodal representations to improve downstream task performance. We use the recently released VisualSem KG as our external knowledge repository, which covers a subset of Wikipedia and WordNet entities, and compare a mix of tuple-based and graph-based algorithms to learn entity and relation representations that are grounded on the KG multimodal information. We demonstrate the usefulness of the learned entity representations on two downstream tasks, and show improved performance on the multilingual named entity recognition task by $0.3\%$--$0.7\%$ F1, while we achieve up to $2.5\%$ improvement in accuracy on the visual sense disambiguation task. All our code and data are available in: \url{https://github.com/iacercalixto/visualsem-kg}. 我们提出了一种方法，通过将知识存储在外部知识图（KG）中并使用密集索引从该 KG 中检索，使自然语言理解模型的参数效率更高。给定（可能是多语言的）下游任务数据，例如德语句子，我们从知识图谱中检索实体并使用它们的多模态表示来提高下游任务性能。我们使用最近发布的 VisualSem KG 作为我们的外部知识库，它涵盖了 Wikipedia 和 WordNet 实体的子集，并比较基于元组和基于图的算法的组合来学习基于 KG 多模态信息的实体和关系表示。我们展示了学习到的实体表示在两个下游任务中的有用性，并在多语言命名实体识别任务上显示了 $0.3\%$--$0.7\%$ F1 的性能改进，同时我们在视觉消歧任务上实现了高达 $2.5\%$ 的准确性改进。我们所有的代码和数据都可以在：\url{https://github.com/iacercalixto/visualsem-kg} 中找到。 本文提出一种通过外部多模态知识图谱表示增强语言模型性能的方法，用于提升下游自然语言处理任务的效果。 Ningyuan Huang,Yash R. Deshpande,Yibo Liu,Houda Alberts,Kyunghyun Cho,Clara Vania,Iacer Calixto cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yushan Zheng,Jun Li,Jun Shi,Fengying Xie,Zhiguo Jiang
title: Kernel Attention Transformer (KAT) for Histopathology Whole Slide Image Classification
title_zh: 用于组织病理学全玻片图像分类的内核注意力变换器 (KAT)
comment: accepted for MICCAI 2022
comments: accepted for MICCAI 2022
abstract: Transformer has been widely used in histopathology whole slide image (WSI) classification for the purpose of tumor grading, prognosis analysis, etc. However, the design of token-wise self-attention and positional embedding strategy in the common Transformer limits the effectiveness and efficiency in the application to gigapixel histopathology images. In this paper, we propose a kernel attention Transformer (KAT) for histopathology WSI classification. The information transmission of the tokens is achieved by cross-attention between the tokens and a set of kernels related to a set of positional anchors on the WSI. Compared to the common Transformer structure, the proposed KAT can better describe the hierarchical context information of the local regions of the WSI and meanwhile maintains a lower computational complexity. The proposed method was evaluated on a gastric dataset with 2040 WSIs and an endometrial dataset with 2560 WSIs, and was compared with 6 state-of-the-art methods. The experimental results have demonstrated the proposed KAT is effective and efficient in the task of histopathology WSI classification and is superior to the state-of-the-art methods. The code is available at https://github.com/zhengyushan/kat.
summary: Transformer has been widely used in histopathology whole slide image (WSI) classification for the purpose of tumor grading, prognosis analysis, etc. However, the design of token-wise self-attention and positional embedding strategy in the common Transformer limits the effectiveness and efficiency in the application to gigapixel histopathology images. In this paper, we propose a kernel attention Transformer (KAT) for histopathology WSI classification. The information transmission of the tokens is achieved by cross-attention between the tokens and a set of kernels related to a set of positional anchors on the WSI. Compared to the common Transformer structure, the proposed KAT can better describe the hierarchical context information of the local regions of the WSI and meanwhile maintains a lower computational complexity. The proposed method was evaluated on a gastric dataset with 2040 WSIs and an endometrial dataset with 2560 WSIs, and was compared with 6 state-of-the-art methods. The experimental results have demonstrated the proposed KAT is effective and efficient in the task of histopathology WSI classification and is superior to the state-of-the-art methods. The code is available at https://github.com/zhengyushan/kat.
abstract_zh: Transformer 已广泛应用于组织病理学全切片图像（WSI）分类，用于肿瘤分级、预后分析等。然而，常见 Transformer 中 token-wise self-attention 和位置嵌入策略的设计限制了其在十亿像素组织病理学图像中应用的有效性和效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于组织病理学 WSI 分类的内核注意力变换器 (KAT)。令牌的信息传输是通过令牌和与 WSI 上的一组位置锚相关的一组内核之间的交叉注意力来实现的。与常见的 Transformer 结构相比，所提出的 KAT 可以更好地描述 WSI 局部区域的分层上下文信息，同时保持较低的计算复杂度。该方法在具有 2040 个 WSI 的胃数据集和具有 2560 个 WSI 的子宫内膜数据集上进行了评估，并与 6 种最先进的方法进行了比较。实验结果表明，所提出的 KAT 在组织病理学 WSI 分类任务中是有效且高效的，并且优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/zhengyushan/kat 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为KAT的核注意力Transformer模型，用于病理全切片图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在处理高分辨率病理图像时存在计算复杂度高、难以有效捕捉局部区域层次化上下文信息的局限性。
AI.method: 通过跨注意力机制在token与位置锚点相关核之间传递信息，降低计算复杂度并增强局部区域上下文建模能力。
AI.result: 在胃癌（2040例）和子宫内膜（2560例）数据集上优于6种最先进方法，验证了KAT的有效性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: KAT在病理全切片图像分类任务中表现出优越性能，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Chuwei Luo,Guozhi Tang,Qi Zheng,Cong Yao,Lianwen Jin,Chenliang Li,Yang Xue,Luo Si
title: Bi-VLDoc: Bidirectional Vision-Language Modeling for Visually-Rich Document Understanding
title_zh: Bi-VLDoc：用于理解丰富视觉文档的双向视觉语言建模
comment: IJDAR 2025
comments: IJDAR 2025
abstract: Multi-modal document pre-trained models have proven to be very effective in a variety of visually-rich document understanding (VrDU) tasks. Though existing document pre-trained models have achieved excellent performance on standard benchmarks for VrDU, the way they model and exploit the interactions between vision and language on documents has hindered them from better generalization ability and higher accuracy. In this work, we investigate the problem of vision-language joint representation learning for VrDU mainly from the perspective of supervisory signals. Specifically, a pre-training paradigm called Bi-VLDoc is proposed, in which a bidirectional vision-language supervision strategy and a vision-language hybrid-attention mechanism are devised to fully explore and utilize the interactions between these two modalities, to learn stronger cross-modal document representations with richer semantics. Benefiting from the learned informative cross-modal document representations, Bi-VLDoc significantly advances the state-of-the-art performance on three widely-used document understanding benchmarks, including Form Understanding (from 85.14% to 93.44%), Receipt Information Extraction (from 96.01% to 97.84%), and Document Classification (from 96.08% to 97.12%). On Document Visual QA, Bi-VLDoc achieves the state-of-the-art performance compared to previous single model methods.
summary: Multi-modal document pre-trained models have proven to be very effective in a variety of visually-rich document understanding (VrDU) tasks. Though existing document pre-trained models have achieved excellent performance on standard benchmarks for VrDU, the way they model and exploit the interactions between vision and language on documents has hindered them from better generalization ability and higher accuracy. In this work, we investigate the problem of vision-language joint representation learning for VrDU mainly from the perspective of supervisory signals. Specifically, a pre-training paradigm called Bi-VLDoc is proposed, in which a bidirectional vision-language supervision strategy and a vision-language hybrid-attention mechanism are devised to fully explore and utilize the interactions between these two modalities, to learn stronger cross-modal document representations with richer semantics. Benefiting from the learned informative cross-modal document representations, Bi-VLDoc significantly advances the state-of-the-art performance on three widely-used document understanding benchmarks, including Form Understanding (from 85.14% to 93.44%), Receipt Information Extraction (from 96.01% to 97.84%), and Document Classification (from 96.08% to 97.12%). On Document Visual QA, Bi-VLDoc achieves the state-of-the-art performance compared to previous single model methods.
abstract_zh: 多模态文档预训练模型已被证明在各种视觉丰富的文档理解 (VrDU) 任务中非常有效。尽管现有的文档预训练模型在 VrDU 标准基准上取得了优异的性能，但它们建模和利用文档上视觉和语言之间交互的方式阻碍了它们更好的泛化能力和更高的准确性。在这项工作中，我们主要从监督信号的角度研究VrDU的视觉-语言联合表示学习问题。具体来说，提出了一种称为 Bi-VLDoc 的预训练范式，其中设计了双向视觉-语言监督策略和视觉-语言混合注意机制，以充分探索和利用这两种模态之间的相互作用，以学习更强的具有更丰富语义的跨模态文档表示。受益于学习到的信息丰富的跨模态文档表示，Bi-VLDoc 显着提高了三个广泛使用的文档理解基准的最新性能，包括表单理解（从 85.14% 到 93.44%）、收据信息提取（从 96.01% 到 97.84%）和文档分类（从 96.08% 到 97.12%）。在文档视觉 QA 上，与之前的单模型方法相比，Bi-VLDoc 实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Bi-VLDoc模型，通过双向视觉-语言联合表示学习提升视觉丰富文档理解任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文档预训练模型在视觉-语言交互建模方面存在局限，导致泛化能力和准确率不足，需探索更有效的监督信号利用方式。
AI.method: 设计双向视觉-语言监督策略与混合注意力机制，通过预训练范式Bi-VLDoc充分挖掘跨模态语义关联。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中显著提升性能：表单理解（85.14%→93.44%）、收据信息提取（96.01%→97.84%）、文档分类（96.08%→97.12%），并在文档视觉问答任务中达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: Bi-VLDoc通过创新的跨模态表示学习方法，有效提升了视觉丰富文档理解任务的准确率和泛化能力。

Specifically, a pre-training paradigm called Bi-VLDoc is proposed, in which a bidirectional vision-language supervision strategy and a vision-language hybrid-attention mechanism are devised to fully explore and utilize the interactions between these two modalities, to learn stronger cross-modal document representations with richer semantics. Benefiting from the learned informative cross-modal document representations, Bi-VLDoc significantly advances the state-of-the-art performance on three widely-used document understanding benchmarks, including Form Understanding (from 85.14% to 93.44%), Receipt Information Extraction (from 96.01% to 97.84%), and Document Classification (from 96.08% to 97.12%). On Document Visual QA, Bi-VLDoc achieves the state-of-the-art performance compared to previous single model methods. 多模态文档预训练模型已被证明在各种视觉丰富的文档理解 (VrDU) 任务中非常有效。尽管现有的文档预训练模型在 VrDU 标准基准上取得了优异的性能，但它们建模和利用文档上视觉和语言之间交互的方式阻碍了它们更好的泛化能力和更高的准确性。在这项工作中，我们主要从监督信号的角度研究VrDU的视觉-语言联合表示学习问题。具体来说，提出了一种称为 Bi-VLDoc 的预训练范式，其中设计了双向视觉-语言监督策略和视觉-语言混合注意机制，以充分探索和利用这两种模态之间的相互作用，以学习更强的具有更丰富语义的跨模态文档表示。受益于学习到的信息丰富的跨模态文档表示，Bi-VLDoc 显着提高了三个广泛使用的文档理解基准的最新性能，包括表单理解（从 85.14% 到 93.44%）、收据信息提取（从 96.01% 到 97.84%）和文档分类（从 96.08% 到 97.12%）。在文档视觉 QA 上，与之前的单模型方法相比，Bi-VLDoc 实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出Bi-VLDoc模型，通过双向视觉-语言联合表示学习提升视觉丰富文档理解任务的性能。 Chuwei Luo,Guozhi Tang,Qi Zheng,Cong Yao,Lianwen Jin,Chenliang Li,Yang Xue,Luo Si cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.MM

authors_text: Shantanav Chakraborty,Aditya Morolia,Anurudh Peduri
title: Quantum Regularized Least Squares
title_zh: 量子正则化最小二乘法
comment: 51 pages. Accepted in Quantum Journal
comments: 51 pages. Accepted in Quantum Journal
abstract: Linear regression is a widely used technique to fit linear models and finds widespread applications across different areas such as machine learning and statistics. In most real-world scenarios, however, linear regression problems are often ill-posed or the underlying model suffers from overfitting, leading to erroneous or trivial solutions. This is often dealt with by adding extra constraints, known as regularization. In this paper, we use the frameworks of block-encoding and quantum singular value transformation (QSVT) to design the first quantum algorithms for quantum least squares with general $\ell_2$-regularization. These include regularized versions of quantum ordinary least squares, quantum weighted least squares, and quantum generalized least squares. Our quantum algorithms substantially improve upon prior results on quantum ridge regression (polynomial improvement in the condition number and an exponential improvement in accuracy), which is a particular case of our result. To this end, we assume approximate block-encodings of the underlying matrices as input and use robust QSVT algorithms for various linear algebra operations. In particular, we develop a variable-time quantum algorithm for matrix inversion using QSVT, where we use quantum eigenvalue discrimination as a subroutine instead of gapped phase estimation. This ensures that substantially fewer ancilla qubits are required for this procedure than prior results. Owing to the generality of the block-encoding framework, our algorithms are applicable to a variety of input models and can also be seen as improved and generalized versions of prior results on standard (non-regularized) quantum least squares algorithms.

In most real-world scenarios, however, linear regression problems are often ill-posed or the underlying model suffers from overfitting, leading to erroneous or trivial solutions. This is often dealt with by adding extra constraints, known as regularization. In this paper, we use the frameworks of block-encoding and quantum singular value transformation (QSVT) to design the first quantum algorithms for quantum least squares with general $\ell_2$-regularization. These include regularized versions of quantum ordinary least squares, quantum weighted least squares, and quantum generalized least squares. Our quantum algorithms substantially improve upon prior results on quantum ridge regression (polynomial improvement in the condition number and an exponential improvement in accuracy), which is a particular case of our result. To this end, we assume approximate block-encodings of the underlying matrices as input and use robust QSVT algorithms for various linear algebra operations. In particular, we develop a variable-time quantum algorithm for matrix inversion using QSVT, where we use quantum eigenvalue discrimination as a subroutine instead of gapped phase estimation. This ensures that substantially fewer ancilla qubits are required for this procedure than prior results. Owing to the generality of the block-encoding framework, our algorithms are applicable to a variety of input models and can also be seen as improved and generalized versions of prior results on standard (non-regularized) quantum least squares algorithms.
abstract_zh: 线性回归是一种广泛使用的拟合线性模型的技术，并在机器学习和统计等不同领域得到广泛应用。然而，在大多数现实场景中，线性回归问题通常是不适定的，或者底层模型出现过度拟合，从而导致错误或微不足道的解决方案。这通常通过添加额外的约束来解决，称为正则化。在本文中，我们使用块编码和量子奇异值变换（QSVT）的框架来设计第一个具有通用$\ell_2$正则化的量子最小二乘算法。其中包括量子普通最小二乘、量子加权最小二乘和量子广义最小二乘的正则化版本。我们的量子算法大大改进了量子岭回归的先前结果（条件数的多项式改进和准确性的指数改进），这是我们结果的一个特殊情况。为此，我们假设底层矩阵的近似块编码作为输入，并使用鲁棒的 QSVT 算法进行各种线性代数运算。特别是，我们开发了一种使用 QSVT 进行矩阵求逆的变时间量子算法，其中我们使用量子特征值判别作为子程序，而不是间隙相位估计。这确保了该过程所需的辅助量子位比之前的结果少得多。由于块编码框架的通用性，我们的算法适用于各种输入模型，也可以被视为标准（非正则化）量子最小二乘算法先前结果的改进和推广版本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于块编码和量子奇异值变换（QSVT）的量子正则化最小二乘算法，解决传统线性回归中的病态问题和过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 传统线性回归在实际应用中常面临病态问题或过拟合，需通过正则化约束改善。现有量子算法在条件数和精度上存在局限，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用块编码框架和QSVT设计量子正则化最小二乘算法，结合量子特征值判别替代相位估计，开发可变时间矩阵求逆算法，减少辅助量子比特需求。
AI.result: 相较先前量子岭回归算法，在条件数上实现多项式级提升，在精度上实现指数级提升，且适用于多种输入模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为量子正则化最小二乘问题提供了更高效、通用的解决方案，可推广至非正则化量子最小二乘算法的改进版本。

authors_text: Mathieu Marsot,Stefanie Wuhrer,Jean-Sebastien Franco,Anne Hélène Olivier
title: Representing motion as a sequence of latent primitives, a flexible approach for human motion modelling
title_zh: 将运动表示为一系列潜在基元，这是人体运动建模的一种灵活方法
abstract: We propose a new representation of human body motion which encodes a full motion in a sequence of latent motion primitives. Recently, task generic motion priors have been introduced and propose a coherent representation of human motion based on a single latent code, with encouraging results for many tasks. Extending these methods to longer motion with various duration and framerate is all but straightforward as one latent code proves inefficient to encode longer term variability. Our hypothesis is that long motions are better represented as a succession of actions than in a single block. By leveraging a sequence-to-sequence architecture, we propose a model that simultaneously learns a temporal segmentation of motion and a prior on the motion segments. To provide flexibility with temporal resolution and motion duration, our representation is continuous in time and can be queried for any timestamp. We show experimentally that our method leads to a significant improvement over state-of-the-art motion priors on a spatio-temporal completion task on sparse pointclouds. Code will be made available upon publication.
summary: We propose a new representation of human body motion which encodes a full motion in a sequence of latent motion primitives. Recently, task generic motion priors have been introduced and propose a coherent representation of human motion based on a single latent code, with encouraging results for many tasks. Extending these methods to longer motion with various duration and framerate is all but straightforward as one latent code proves inefficient to encode longer term variability. Our hypothesis is that long motions are better represented as a succession of actions than in a single block. By leveraging a sequence-to-sequence architecture, we propose a model that simultaneously learns a temporal segmentation of motion and a prior on the motion segments. To provide flexibility with temporal resolution and motion duration, our representation is continuous in time and can be queried for any timestamp. We show experimentally that our method leads to a significant improvement over state-of-the-art motion priors on a spatio-temporal completion task on sparse pointclouds. Code will be made available upon publication.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的人体运动表示，它将完整的运动编码为一系列潜在运动原语。最近，任务通用运动先验被引入，并提出了基于单个潜在代码的人体运动的连贯表示，为许多任务带来了令人鼓舞的结果。将这些方法扩展到具有不同持续时间和帧速率的较长运动几乎是简单的，因为事实证明一种潜在代码对长期可变性进行编码效率低下。我们的假设是，长动作最好用一系列动作来表示，而不是用单个块来表示。通过利用序列到序列的架构，我们提出了一种模型，该模型可以同时学习运动的时间分割和运动片段的先验。为了提供时间分辨率和运动持续时间的灵活性，我们的表示在时间上是连续的，并且可以查询任何时间戳。我们通过实验证明，我们的方法在稀疏点云上的时空完成任务上比最先进的运动先验有了显着的改进。代码将在发布后提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将人体运动表示为潜在运动原语序列的新方法，以解决现有单一潜在代码在处理长时运动时的效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于单一潜在代码的运动先验方法难以有效编码长时间、多帧率的运动，无法适应不同持续时间和分辨率的需求。
AI.method: 采用序列到序列架构，同时学习运动的时间分割和片段先验，通过连续时间表示支持任意时间戳查询。
AI.result: 在稀疏点云的时空补全任务中，该方法显著优于现有最先进的运动先验模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分段表示提升了长时运动建模的灵活性和准确性，适用于多时间分辨率和持续时长的场景。

authors_text: Zhongshu Hou,Qinwen Hu,Kai Chen,Jing Lu
title: A two-stage full-band speech enhancement model with effective spectral compression mapping
title_zh: 具有有效频谱压缩映射的两级全频带语音增强模型
abstract: The direct expansion of deep neural network (DNN) based wide-band speech enhancement (SE) to full-band processing faces the challenge of low frequency resolution in low frequency range, which would highly likely lead to deteriorated performance of the model. In this paper, we propose a learnable spectral compression mapping (SCM) to effectively compress the high frequency components so that they can be processed in a more efficient manner. By doing so, the model can pay more attention to low and middle frequency range, where most of the speech power is concentrated. Instead of suppressing noise in a single network structure, we first estimate a spectral magnitude mask, converting the speech to a high signal-to-ratio (SNR) state, and then utilize a subsequent model to further optimize the real and imaginary mask of the pre-enhanced signal. We conduct comprehensive experiments to validate the efficacy of the proposed method.
summary: The direct expansion of deep neural network (DNN) based wide-band speech enhancement (SE) to full-band processing faces the challenge of low frequency resolution in low frequency range, which would highly likely lead to deteriorated performance of the model. In this paper, we propose a learnable spectral compression mapping (SCM) to effectively compress the high frequency components so that they can be processed in a more efficient manner. By doing so, the model can pay more attention to low and middle frequency range, where most of the speech power is concentrated. Instead of suppressing noise in a single network structure, we first estimate a spectral magnitude mask, converting the speech to a high signal-to-ratio (SNR) state, and then utilize a subsequent model to further optimize the real and imaginary mask of the pre-enhanced signal. We conduct comprehensive experiments to validate the efficacy of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 基于深度神经网络（DNN）的宽带语音增强（SE）直接扩展到全频带处理面临着低频范围内低频分辨率的挑战，这很可能导致模型性能恶化。在本文中，我们提出了一种可学习的频谱压缩映射（SCM）来有效地压缩高频分量，以便能够以更有效的方式处理它们。通过这样做，模型可以更加关注大部分语音功率集中的低频和中频范围。我们不是在单个网络结构中抑制噪声，而是首先估计频谱幅度掩模，将语音转换为高信噪比（SNR）状态，然后利用后续模型进一步优化预增强信号的实部和虚部掩模。我们进行了全面的实验来验证所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种两阶段全频带语音增强模型，通过可学习的谱压缩映射（SCM）解决低频分辨率不足的问题，并优化预增强信号的实部和虚部掩码。
AI.motivation: 基于深度神经网络的宽带语音增强模型扩展到全频带处理时，低频段频率分辨率不足会导致性能下降，需更关注集中语音能量的低中频段。
AI.method: 设计可学习的谱压缩映射压缩高频成分，分两阶段处理：首先估计谱幅度掩码将语音转换为高信噪比状态，再通过后续模型优化预增强信号的实部和虚部掩码。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提方法在全频带语音增强任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过谱压缩映射和两阶段处理框架，本文方法有效提升了全频带语音增强性能，尤其在低中频段表现突出。

authors_text: Chengfei Li,Shuhao Deng,Yaoping Wang,Guangjing Wang,Yaguang Gong,Changbin Chen,Jinfeng Bai
title: TALCS: An Open-Source Mandarin-English Code-Switching Corpus and a Speech Recognition Baseline
title_zh: TALCS：开源的普通话-英语语码转换语料库和语音识别基线
comment: accepted by INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: accepted by INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: This paper introduces a new corpus of Mandarin-English code-switching speech recognition--TALCS corpus, suitable for training and evaluating code-switching speech recognition systems. TALCS corpus is derived from real online one-to-one English teaching scenes in TAL education group, which contains roughly 587 hours of speech sampled at 16 kHz. To our best knowledge, TALCS corpus is the largest well labeled Mandarin-English code-switching open source automatic speech recognition (ASR) dataset in the world. In this paper, we will introduce the recording procedure in detail, including audio capturing devices and corpus environments. And the TALCS corpus is freely available for download under the permissive license1. Using TALCS corpus, we conduct ASR experiments in two popular speech recognition toolkits to make a baseline system, including ESPnet and Wenet. The Mixture Error Rate (MER) performance in the two speech recognition toolkits is compared in TALCS corpus. The experimental results implies that the quality of audio recordings and transcriptions are promising and the baseline system is workable.
summary: This paper introduces a new corpus of Mandarin-English code-switching speech recognition--TALCS corpus, suitable for training and evaluating code-switching speech recognition systems. TALCS corpus is derived from real online one-to-one English teaching scenes in TAL education group, which contains roughly 587 hours of speech sampled at 16 kHz. To our best knowledge, TALCS corpus is the largest well labeled Mandarin-English code-switching open source automatic speech recognition (ASR) dataset in the world. In this paper, we will introduce the recording procedure in detail, including audio capturing devices and corpus environments. And the TALCS corpus is freely available for download under the permissive license1. Using TALCS corpus, we conduct ASR experiments in two popular speech recognition toolkits to make a baseline system, including ESPnet and Wenet. The Mixture Error Rate (MER) performance in the two speech recognition toolkits is compared in TALCS corpus. The experimental results implies that the quality of audio recordings and transcriptions are promising and the baseline system is workable.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的汉英语码转换语音识别语料库——TALCS语料库，适合训练和评估语码转换语音识别系统。 TALCS语料来源于好未来教育集团真实的在线一对一英语教学场景，包含约587小时的16kHz采样语音。据我们所知，TALCS 语料库是世界上最大的、标记良好的普通话-英语语码转换开源自动语音识别 (ASR) 数据集。在本文中，我们将详细介绍录音过程，包括音频捕获设备和语料库环境。 TALCS 语料库可在许可协议下免费下载1。使用TALCS语料库，我们在两个流行的语音识别工具包中进行ASR实验，以制作基线系统，包括ESPnet和Wenet。在 TALCS 语料库中比较了两个语音识别工具包的混合错误率 (MER) 性能。实验结果表明录音和转录的质量是有希望的并且基线系统是可行的。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了TALCS语料库及语音识别基线系统，用于训练和评估中英代码切换的语音识别模型。
AI.motivation: 现有公开的中英代码切换语音识别数据集不足，且缺乏高质量标注，需构建大规模语料库推动相关研究。
AI.method: 通过采集TAL教育集团在线英语教学场景的语音数据，构建587小时的TALCS语料库，并基于ESPnet和Wenet工具包进行ASR实验，对比混合错误率（MER）性能。
AI.result: 实验表明音频质量与转录标注可靠，基线系统在TALCS语料库上表现稳定，验证了数据集的可用性。
AI.conclusion: TALCS语料库为中英代码切换语音识别研究提供了重要资源，基线系统为后续模型优化奠定了基础。

authors_text: Liang Zhang,Zexu Zhang,Roland Siegwart,Jen Jen Chung
title: Probabilistic network topology prediction for active planning:An adaptive algorithm and application
title_zh: 主动规划的概率网络拓扑预测：一种自适应算法及应用
comment: An evolved papaer based on 2020 ICRA results. It has been accepted by TRO recently
comments: An evolved papaer based on 2020 ICRA results. It has been accepted by TRO recently
abstract: This paper tackles the problem of active planning to achieve cooperative localization for multi-robot systems (MRS) under measurement uncertainty in GNSS-limited scenarios. Specifically, we address the issue of accurately predicting the probability of a future connection between two robots equipped with range-based measurement devices. Due to the limited range of the equipped sensors, edges in the network connection topology will be created or destroyed as the robots move with respect to one another. Accurately predicting the future existence of an edge, given imperfect state estimation and noisy actuation, is therefore a challenging task. An adaptive power series expansion (or APSE) algorithm is developed based on current estimates and control candidates. Such an algorithm applies the power series expansion formula of the quadratic positive form in a normal distribution. Finite-term approximation is made to realize the computational tractability. Further analyses are presented to show that the truncation error in the finite-term approximation can be theoretically reduced to a desired threshold by adaptively choosing the summation degree of the power series. Several sufficient conditions are rigorously derived as the selection principles. Finally, extensive simulation results and comparisons, with respect to both single and multi-robot cases, validate that a formally computed and therefore more accurate probability of future topology can help improve the performance of active planning under uncertainty.
summary: This paper tackles the problem of active planning to achieve cooperative localization for multi-robot systems (MRS) under measurement uncertainty in GNSS-limited scenarios. Specifically, we address the issue of accurately predicting the probability of a future connection between two robots equipped with range-based measurement devices. Due to the limited range of the equipped sensors, edges in the network connection topology will be created or destroyed as the robots move with respect to one another. Accurately predicting the future existence of an edge, given imperfect state estimation and noisy actuation, is therefore a challenging task. An adaptive power series expansion (or APSE) algorithm is developed based on current estimates and control candidates. Such an algorithm applies the power series expansion formula of the quadratic positive form in a normal distribution. Finite-term approximation is made to realize the computational tractability. Further analyses are presented to show that the truncation error in the finite-term approximation can be theoretically reduced to a desired threshold by adaptively choosing the summation degree of the power series. Several sufficient conditions are rigorously derived as the selection principles. Finally, extensive simulation results and comparisons, with respect to both single and multi-robot cases, validate that a formally computed and therefore more accurate probability of future topology can help improve the performance of active planning under uncertainty.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了 GNSS 限制场景中测量不确定性下的主动规划问题，以实现多机器人系统 (MRS) 的协作定位。具体来说，我们解决了准确预测两个配备有基于范围的测量设备的机器人之间未来连接的概率的问题。由于所配备的传感器的范围有限，当机器人相对于彼此移动时，网络连接拓扑中的边缘将被创建或破坏。因此，在不完美的状态估计和噪声驱动的情况下，准确预测边缘的未来存在是一项具有挑战性的任务。自适应幂级数展开（或 APSE）算法是根据当前估计和控制候选者开发的。这种算法应用正态分布中的二次正形式的幂级数展开公式。进行有限项近似以实现计算的易处理性。进一步的分析表明，通过自适应地选择幂级数的求和次数，理论上可以将有限项近似的截断误差减小到期望的阈值。严格推导了几个充分条件作为选择原则。最后，针对单机器人和多机器人情况的广泛模拟结果和比较，验证了正式计算的、因此更准确的未来拓扑概率可以帮助提高不确定性下主动规划的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应算法以预测多机器人系统在GNSS受限场景下的网络拓扑结构，解决因传感器范围限制导致的动态连接不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 在GNSS信号受限的环境下，多机器人系统需依赖协作定位，但传感器测量误差和机器人相对运动导致网络连接拓扑动态变化，准确预测未来连接概率对主动规划至关重要。
AI.method: 开发自适应幂级数展开（APSE）算法，基于当前状态估计和控制候选方案，通过二次正定形式的正态分布幂级数展开进行有限项近似，并通过自适应调整幂级数阶数控制截断误差。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了该方法在单机器人和多机器人场景下均能有效提升主动规划性能，相比传统方法具有更高的拓扑预测精度。
AI.conclusion: APSE算法通过理论可控的误差截断机制，实现了动态网络拓扑的概率预测，为多机器人系统的不确定性主动规划提供了可靠支撑。

search_text: Probabilistic network topology prediction for active planning:An adaptive algorithm and application 主动规划的概率网络拓扑预测：一种自适应算法及应用 This paper tackles the problem of active planning to achieve cooperative localization for multi-robot systems (MRS) under measurement uncertainty in GNSS-limited scenarios. Specifically, we address the issue of accurately predicting the probability of a future connection between two robots equipped with range-based measurement devices. Due to the limited range of the equipped sensors, edges in the network connection topology will be created or destroyed as the robots move with respect to one another. Accurately predicting the future existence of an edge, given imperfect state estimation and noisy actuation, is therefore a challenging task. An adaptive power series expansion (or APSE) algorithm is developed based on current estimates and control candidates. Such an algorithm applies the power series expansion formula of the quadratic positive form in a normal distribution. Finite-term approximation is made to realize the computational tractability. Further analyses are presented to show that the truncation error in the finite-term approximation can be theoretically reduced to a desired threshold by adaptively choosing the summation degree of the power series. Several sufficient conditions are rigorously derived as the selection principles. Finally, extensive simulation results and comparisons, with respect to both single and multi-robot cases, validate that a formally computed and therefore more accurate probability of future topology can help improve the performance of active planning under uncertainty. 本文解决了 GNSS 限制场景中测量不确定性下的主动规划问题，以实现多机器人系统 (MRS) 的协作定位。具体来说，我们解决了准确预测两个配备有基于范围的测量设备的机器人之间未来连接的概率的问题。由于所配备的传感器的范围有限，当机器人相对于彼此移动时，网络连接拓扑中的边缘将被创建或破坏。因此，在不完美的状态估计和噪声驱动的情况下，准确预测边缘的未来存在是一项具有挑战性的任务。自适应幂级数展开（或 APSE）算法是根据当前估计和控制候选者开发的。这种算法应用正态分布中的二次正形式的幂级数展开公式。进行有限项近似以实现计算的易处理性。进一步的分析表明，通过自适应地选择幂级数的求和次数，理论上可以将有限项近似的截断误差减小到期望的阈值。严格推导了几个充分条件作为选择原则。最后，针对单机器人和多机器人情况的广泛模拟结果和比较，验证了正式计算的、因此更准确的未来拓扑概率可以帮助提高不确定性下主动规划的性能。 本文提出一种自适应算法以预测多机器人系统在GNSS受限场景下的网络拓扑结构，解决因传感器范围限制导致的动态连接不确定性问题。 Liang Zhang,Zexu Zhang,Roland Siegwart,Jen Jen Chung cs.RO

authors_text: Dwarikanath Mahapatra
title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Using Feature Disentanglement And GCNs For Medical Image Classification
title_zh: 使用特征解缠和 GCN 进行医学图像分类的无监督域适应
abstract: The success of deep learning has set new benchmarks for many medical image analysis tasks. However, deep models often fail to generalize in the presence of distribution shifts between training (source) data and test (target) data. One method commonly employed to counter distribution shifts is domain adaptation: using samples from the target domain to learn to account for shifted distributions. In this work we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation approach that uses graph neural networks and, disentangled semantic and domain invariant structural features, allowing for better performance across distribution shifts. We propose an extension to swapped autoencoders to obtain more discriminative features. We test the proposed method for classification on two challenging medical image datasets with distribution shifts - multi center chest Xray images and histopathology images. Experiments show our method achieves state-of-the-art results compared to other domain adaptation methods.
summary: The success of deep learning has set new benchmarks for many medical image analysis tasks. However, deep models often fail to generalize in the presence of distribution shifts between training (source) data and test (target) data. One method commonly employed to counter distribution shifts is domain adaptation: using samples from the target domain to learn to account for shifted distributions. In this work we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation approach that uses graph neural networks and, disentangled semantic and domain invariant structural features, allowing for better performance across distribution shifts. We propose an extension to swapped autoencoders to obtain more discriminative features. We test the proposed method for classification on two challenging medical image datasets with distribution shifts - multi center chest Xray images and histopathology images. Experiments show our method achieves state-of-the-art results compared to other domain adaptation methods.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的成功为许多医学图像分析任务树立了新的基准。然而，在训练（源）数据和测试（目标）数据之间存在分布变化的情况下，深度模型通常无法泛化。域适应通常用于应对分布偏移的一种方法：使用目标域中的样本来学习解释偏移分布。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种无监督的域适应方法，该方法使用图神经网络以及解开语义和域不变结构特征，从而在分布变化时获得更好的性能。我们提出了对交换自动编码器的扩展，以获得更具辨别力的特征。我们在两个具有分布变化的具有挑战性的医学图像数据集（多中心胸部 X 射线图像和组织病理学图像）上测试了所提出的分类方法。实验表明，与其他领域适应方法相比，我们的方法取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合特征解耦与图卷积网络的无监督领域自适应方法，用于解决医学图像分类中的分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在医学图像分析中面临训练数据与测试数据分布不匹配导致的泛化能力不足问题，需要更有效的领域自适应方法。
AI.method: 通过改进交换自编码器实现特征解耦，分离语义特征与领域不变结构特征，并结合图卷积网络（GCNs）提升特征判别性。
AI.result: 在多中心胸部X光和组织病理学图像数据集上，该方法在分布偏移场景下达到优于现有领域自适应方法的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过特征解耦与图结构建模有效缓解了医学图像分类中的领域偏移问题，验证了其在实际应用中的优越性。

authors_text: Yurong Chen,Xiaotie Deng,Yuhao Li
title: Optimal Private Payoff Manipulation against Commitment in Extensive-form Games
title_zh: 广泛型博弈中针对承诺的最优私人收益操纵
abstract: To take advantage of strategy commitment, a useful tactic of playing games, a leader must learn enough information about the follower's payoff function. However, this leaves the follower a chance to provide fake information and influence the final game outcome. Through a carefully contrived payoff function misreported to the learning leader, the follower may induce an outcome that benefits him more, compared to the ones when he truthfully behaves. We study the follower's optimal manipulation via such strategic behaviors in extensive-form games. Followers' different attitudes are taken into account. An optimistic follower maximizes his true utility among all game outcomes that can be induced by some payoff function. A pessimistic follower only considers misreporting payoff functions that induce a unique game outcome. For all the settings considered in this paper, we characterize all the possible game outcomes that can be induced successfully. We show that it is polynomial-time tractable for the follower to find the optimal way of misreporting his private payoff information. Our work completely resolves this follower's optimal manipulation problem on an extensive-form game tree.
summary: To take advantage of strategy commitment, a useful tactic of playing games, a leader must learn enough information about the follower's payoff function. However, this leaves the follower a chance to provide fake information and influence the final game outcome. Through a carefully contrived payoff function misreported to the learning leader, the follower may induce an outcome that benefits him more, compared to the ones when he truthfully behaves. We study the follower's optimal manipulation via such strategic behaviors in extensive-form games. Followers' different attitudes are taken into account. An optimistic follower maximizes his true utility among all game outcomes that can be induced by some payoff function. A pessimistic follower only considers misreporting payoff functions that induce a unique game outcome. For all the settings considered in this paper, we characterize all the possible game outcomes that can be induced successfully. We show that it is polynomial-time tractable for the follower to find the optimal way of misreporting his private payoff information. Our work completely resolves this follower's optimal manipulation problem on an extensive-form game tree.
abstract_zh: 为了利用策略承诺（一种有用的博弈策略），领导者必须了解有关追随者收益函数的足够信息。然而，这使得追随者有机会提供虚假信息并影响最终的游戏结果。通过向学习领导者错误报告精心设计的回报函数，追随者可能会产生比他真实行为时更有利的结果。我们通过广泛形式博弈中的此类策略行为来研究追随者的最佳操纵。考虑到追随者的不同态度。乐观的追随者会在所有可能由某些收益函数引起的游戏结果中最大化他的真实效用。悲观的追随者只考虑错误报告的收益函数，从而导致独特的游戏结果。对于本文考虑的所有设置，我们描述了可以成功诱导的所有可能的游戏结果。我们证明，追随者可以在多项式时间内找到错误报告其私人收益信息的最佳方式。我们的工作完全解决了该追随者在扩展博弈树上的最优操纵问题。

AI.tldr: 研究扩展型博弈中跟随者如何通过操纵私有收益信息来最大化自身利益。
AI.motivation: 当领导者利用策略承诺时，跟随者可能通过虚假信息影响结果，因此需要研究其最优操纵策略。
AI.method: 通过分析不同态度下的博弈结果，设计多项式时间算法来找到最优操纵策略。
AI.result: 证明跟随者可多项式时间找到最优操纵方法，并完全解决该问题。
AI.conclusion: 解决了扩展型博弈中跟随者对抗承诺的最优操纵问题，为博弈论中的策略操纵提供了理论支持。

We show that it is polynomial-time tractable for the follower to find the optimal way of misreporting his private payoff information. Our work completely resolves this follower's optimal manipulation problem on an extensive-form game tree. 为了利用策略承诺（一种有用的博弈策略），领导者必须了解有关追随者收益函数的足够信息。然而，这使得追随者有机会提供虚假信息并影响最终的游戏结果。通过向学习领导者错误报告精心设计的回报函数，追随者可能会产生比他真实行为时更有利的结果。我们通过广泛形式博弈中的此类策略行为来研究追随者的最佳操纵。考虑到追随者的不同态度。乐观的追随者会在所有可能由某些收益函数引起的游戏结果中最大化他的真实效用。悲观的追随者只考虑错误报告的收益函数，从而导致独特的游戏结果。对于本文考虑的所有设置，我们描述了可以成功诱导的所有可能的游戏结果。我们证明，追随者可以在多项式时间内找到错误报告其私人收益信息的最佳方式。我们的工作完全解决了该追随者在扩展博弈树上的最优操纵问题。 研究扩展型博弈中跟随者如何通过操纵私有收益信息来最大化自身利益。 Yurong Chen,Xiaotie Deng,Yuhao Li cs.GT,cs.AI,cs.DS,econ.TH

authors_text: Chao Liu,Jianwei Guo,Dong-Ming Yan,Zhirong Liang,Xiaopeng Zhang,Zhanglin Cheng
title: SARNet: Semantic Augmented Registration of Large-Scale Urban Point Clouds
title_zh: SARNet：大规模城市点云的语义增强配准
comment: Author information changes
comments: Author information changes
abstract: Registering urban point clouds is a quite challenging task due to the large-scale, noise and data incompleteness of LiDAR scanning data. In this paper, we propose SARNet, a novel semantic augmented registration network aimed at achieving efficient registration of urban point clouds at city scale. Different from previous methods that construct correspondences only in the point-level space, our approach fully exploits semantic features as assistance to improve registration accuracy. Specifically, we extract per-point semantic labels with advanced semantic segmentation networks and build a prior semantic part-to-part correspondence. Then we incorporate the semantic information into a learning-based registration pipeline, consisting of three core modules: a semantic-based farthest point sampling module to efficiently filter out outliers and dynamic objects; a semantic-augmented feature extraction module for learning more discriminative point descriptors; a semantic-refined transformation estimation module that utilizes prior semantic matching as a mask to refine point correspondences by reducing false matching for better convergence. We evaluate the proposed SARNet extensively by using real-world data from large regions of urban scenes and comparing it with alternative methods. The code is available at https://github.com/WinterCodeForEverything/SARNet.

In this paper, we propose SARNet, a novel semantic augmented registration network aimed at achieving efficient registration of urban point clouds at city scale. Different from previous methods that construct correspondences only in the point-level space, our approach fully exploits semantic features as assistance to improve registration accuracy. Then we incorporate the semantic information into a learning-based registration pipeline, consisting of three core modules: a semantic-based farthest point sampling module to efficiently filter out outliers and dynamic objects; a semantic-augmented feature extraction module for learning more discriminative point descriptors; a semantic-refined transformation estimation module that utilizes prior semantic matching as a mask to refine point correspondences by reducing false matching for better convergence. We evaluate the proposed SARNet extensively by using real-world data from large regions of urban scenes and comparing it with alternative methods. The code is available at https://github.com/WinterCodeForEverything/SARNet.
abstract_zh: 由于激光雷达扫描数据规模大、噪声大且数据不完整，配准城市点云是一项相当具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们提出了 SARNet，一种新颖的语义增强配准网络，旨在实现城市规模的城市点云的高效配准。与以前仅在点级空间中构建对应关系的方法不同，我们的方法充分利用语义特征来帮助提高配准准确性。具体来说，我们使用高级语义分割网络提取每点语义标签，并构建先验语义部分到部分对应关系。然后，我们将语义信息合并到基于学习的配准管道中，该管道由三个核心模块组成：基于语义的最远点采样模块，用于有效过滤异常值和动态对象；用于学习更具辨别力的点描述符的语义增强特征提取模块；语义细化变换估计模块，利用先前的语义匹配作为掩码，通过减少错误匹配来细化点对应关系，以实现更好的收敛。我们通过使用来自大片城市场景区域的真实数据并将其与其他方法进行比较，对所提出的 SARNet 进行了广泛的评估。该代码可从 https://github.com/WinterCodeForEverything/SARNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SARNet，一种利用语义信息增强的点云配准网络，旨在解决大规模城市点云配准中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统点云配准方法在处理大规模城市场景时面临噪声、数据不完整性和计算效率低的问题，而语义信息可提供先验知识以提升配准精度。
AI.method: SARNet通过三个核心模块整合语义信息：基于语义的最远点采样模块过滤噪声，语义增强的特征提取模块学习判别性描述子，以及语义优化的变换估计模块减少误匹配。
AI.result: 在真实城市场景数据集上实验表明，SARNet相比现有方法在配准精度和鲁棒性方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合语义先验与点云特征，SARNet有效提升了大规模城市点云配准的准确性与效率，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Jun Li,Yushan Zheng,Kun Wu,Jun Shi,Fengying Xie,Zhiguo Jiang
title: Lesion-Aware Contrastive Representation Learning for Histopathology Whole Slide Images Analysis
title_zh: 用于组织病理学全幻灯片图像分析的病变感知对比表示学习
comment: accepted for MICCAI 2022
comments: accepted for MICCAI 2022
abstract: Local representation learning has been a key challenge to promote the performance of the histopathological whole slide images analysis. The previous representation learning methods followed the supervised learning paradigm. However, manual annotation for large-scale WSIs is time-consuming and labor-intensive. Hence, the self-supervised contrastive learning has recently attracted intensive attention. The present contrastive learning methods treat each sample as a single class, which suffers from class collision problems, especially in the domain of histopathology image analysis. In this paper, we proposed a novel contrastive representation learning framework named Lesion-Aware Contrastive Learning (LACL) for histopathology whole slide image analysis. We built a lesion queue based on the memory bank structure to store the representations of different classes of WSIs, which allowed the contrastive model to selectively define the negative pairs during the training. Moreover, We designed a queue refinement strategy to purify the representations stored in the lesion queue. The experimental results demonstrate that LACL achieves the best performance in histopathology image representation learning on different datasets, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods under different WSI classification benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/junl21/lacl.
summary: Local representation learning has been a key challenge to promote the performance of the histopathological whole slide images analysis. The previous representation learning methods followed the supervised learning paradigm. However, manual annotation for large-scale WSIs is time-consuming and labor-intensive. Hence, the self-supervised contrastive learning has recently attracted intensive attention. The present contrastive learning methods treat each sample as a single class, which suffers from class collision problems, especially in the domain of histopathology image analysis. In this paper, we proposed a novel contrastive representation learning framework named Lesion-Aware Contrastive Learning (LACL) for histopathology whole slide image analysis. We built a lesion queue based on the memory bank structure to store the representations of different classes of WSIs, which allowed the contrastive model to selectively define the negative pairs during the training. Moreover, We designed a queue refinement strategy to purify the representations stored in the lesion queue. The experimental results demonstrate that LACL achieves the best performance in histopathology image representation learning on different datasets, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods under different WSI classification benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/junl21/lacl.
abstract_zh: 局部表示学习一直是提高组织病理学全幻灯片图像分析性能的关键挑战。以前的表示学习方法遵循监督学习范式。然而，大规模 WSI 的手动注释既耗时又费力。因此，自监督对比学习最近引起了人们的广泛关注。目前的对比学习方法将每个样本视为一个类，这会遇到类冲突问题，特别是在组织病理学图像分析领域。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的对比表示学习框架，称为病变感知对比学习（LACL），用于组织病理学全幻灯片图像分析。我们基于记忆库结构构建了一个病变队列来存储不同类别 WSI 的表示，这使得对比模型可以在训练期间选择性地定义负对。此外，我们设计了一种队列细化策略来净化存储在病变队列中的表示。实验结果表明，LACL 在不同数据集上的组织病理学图像表示学习中取得了最佳性能，并且在不同的 WSI 分类基准下优于最先进的方法。该代码可在 https://github.com/junl21/lacl 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对组织病理学全切片图像分析的病变感知对比表示学习框架LACL，以解决现有对比学习方法中的类别碰撞问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖耗时的手动标注，而现有自监督对比学习方法将每个样本视为单一类别，导致组织病理学图像分析中类别碰撞问题严重。
AI.method: 构建基于记忆库结构的病变队列存储不同类别WSI表示，并设计队列优化策略净化存储表示，使对比模型在训练中可选择性定义负样本对。
AI.result: LACL在多个数据集和WSI分类基准测试中均优于现有最先进方法，实现了最佳表示学习性能。
AI.conclusion: LACL通过病变感知机制有效缓解类别碰撞问题，为组织病理学图像分析提供了更优的对比表示学习方案。
