authors_text: Zhiyun Fan,Linhao Dong,Meng Cai,Zejun Ma,Bo Xu
title: Sequence-level Speaker Change Detection with Difference-based Continuous Integrate-and-fire
title_zh: 使用基于差异的连续集成和触发进行序列级说话人变化检测
comment: Signal Processing Letters 2022
comments: Signal Processing Letters 2022
abstract: Speaker change detection is an important task in multi-party interactions such as meetings and conversations. In this paper, we address the speaker change detection task from the perspective of sequence transduction. Specifically, we propose a novel encoder-decoder framework that directly converts the input feature sequence to the speaker identity sequence. The difference-based continuous integrate-and-fire mechanism is designed to support this framework. It detects speaker changes by integrating the speaker difference between the encoder outputs frame-by-frame and transfers encoder outputs to segment-level speaker embeddings according to the detected speaker changes. The whole framework is supervised by the speaker identity sequence, a weaker label than the precise speaker change points. The experiments on the AMI and DIHARD-I corpora show that our sequence-level method consistently outperforms a strong frame-level baseline that uses the precise speaker change labels.
summary: Speaker change detection is an important task in multi-party interactions such as meetings and conversations. In this paper, we address the speaker change detection task from the perspective of sequence transduction. Specifically, we propose a novel encoder-decoder framework that directly converts the input feature sequence to the speaker identity sequence. The difference-based continuous integrate-and-fire mechanism is designed to support this framework. It detects speaker changes by integrating the speaker difference between the encoder outputs frame-by-frame and transfers encoder outputs to segment-level speaker embeddings according to the detected speaker changes. The whole framework is supervised by the speaker identity sequence, a weaker label than the precise speaker change points. The experiments on the AMI and DIHARD-I corpora show that our sequence-level method consistently outperforms a strong frame-level baseline that uses the precise speaker change labels.
abstract_zh: 说话人变化检测是会议、对话等多方交互中的一项重要任务。在本文中，我们从序列转导的角度解决说话人变化检测任务。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的编码器-解码器框架，可直接将输入特征序列转换为说话者身份序列。基于差异的持续集成和激发机制旨在支持该框架。它通过逐帧积分编码器输出之间的说话人差异来检测说话人变化，并根据检测到的说话人变化将编码器输出传输到分段级说话人嵌入。整个框架由说话者身份序列监督，这是一个比精确的说话者变化点更弱的标签。在 AMI 和 DIHARD-I 语料库上的实验表明，我们的序列级方法始终优于使用精确的说话人变化标签的强大的帧级基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于序列转换的说话人变化检测方法，通过编码器-解码器框架直接生成说话人身份序列。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖精确的帧级标签，而实际场景中较弱的说话人身份序列标签更易获取且更具实用性。
AI.method: 设计基于差异的连续积分触发机制，通过整合编码器输出的帧间差异检测说话人变化，并生成段级说话人嵌入。
AI.result: 在AMI和DIHARD-I数据集上，序列级方法优于使用精确标签的帧级基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 序列级建模有效提升了说话人变化检测性能，为弱监督场景提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zuheng Kang,Junqing Peng,Jianzong Wang,Jing Xiao
title: SpeechEQ: Speech Emotion Recognition based on Multi-scale Unified Datasets and Multitask Learning
title_zh: SpeechEQ：基于多尺度统一数据集和多任务学习的语音情感识别
comment: This paper is accepted by Interspeech 2022
comments: This paper is accepted by Interspeech 2022
abstract: Speech emotion recognition (SER) has many challenges, but one of the main challenges is that each framework does not have a unified standard. In this paper, we propose SpeechEQ, a framework for unifying SER tasks based on a multi-scale unified metric. This metric can be trained by Multitask Learning (MTL), which includes two emotion recognition tasks of Emotion States Category (EIS) and Emotion Intensity Scale (EIS), and two auxiliary tasks of phoneme recognition and gender recognition. For this framework, we build a Mandarin SER dataset - SpeechEQ Dataset (SEQD). We conducted experiments on the public CASIA and ESD datasets in Mandarin, which exhibit that our method outperforms baseline methods by a relatively large margin, yielding 8.0% and 6.5% improvement in accuracy respectively. Additional experiments on IEMOCAP with four emotion categories (i.e., angry, happy, sad, and neutral) also show the proposed method achieves a state-of-the-art of both weighted accuracy (WA) of 78.16% and unweighted accuracy (UA) of 77.47%.
summary: Speech emotion recognition (SER) has many challenges, but one of the main challenges is that each framework does not have a unified standard. In this paper, we propose SpeechEQ, a framework for unifying SER tasks based on a multi-scale unified metric. This metric can be trained by Multitask Learning (MTL), which includes two emotion recognition tasks of Emotion States Category (EIS) and Emotion Intensity Scale (EIS), and two auxiliary tasks of phoneme recognition and gender recognition. For this framework, we build a Mandarin SER dataset - SpeechEQ Dataset (SEQD). We conducted experiments on the public CASIA and ESD datasets in Mandarin, which exhibit that our method outperforms baseline methods by a relatively large margin, yielding 8.0% and 6.5% improvement in accuracy respectively. Additional experiments on IEMOCAP with four emotion categories (i.e., angry, happy, sad, and neutral) also show the proposed method achieves a state-of-the-art of both weighted accuracy (WA) of 78.16% and unweighted accuracy (UA) of 77.47%.
abstract_zh: 语音情感识别（SER）面临很多挑战，但主要挑战之一是各个框架没有统一的标准。在本文中，我们提出了 SpeechEQ，一个基于多尺度统一度量来统一 SER 任务的框架。该指标可以通过多任务学习（MTL）进行训练，其中包括情绪状态类别（EIS）和情绪强度量表（EIS）两个情绪识别任务，以及音素识别和性别识别两个辅助任务。对于这个框架，我们构建了一个普通话 SER 数据集 - SpeechEQ 数据集（SEQD）。我们在公开的 CASIA 和 ESD 数据集上进行了普通话实验，结果表明我们的方法明显优于基线方法，准确率分别提高了 8.0% 和 6.5%。对四种情绪类别（即愤怒、快乐、悲伤和中性）的 IEMOCAP 进行的其他实验也表明，所提出的方法实现了 78.16% 的加权准确度（WA）和 77.47% 的未加权准确度（UA）的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多尺度统一数据集和多任务学习的语音情感识别框架SpeechEQ。
AI.motivation: 语音情感识别面临的主要挑战是缺乏统一的标准框架，因此本文旨在通过多任务学习构建统一的多尺度评估体系以提升识别效果。
AI.method: 提出SpeechEQ框架，结合多任务学习，包括情感状态类别识别、情感强度识别、音素识别和性别识别任务，并构建了中文语音情感数据集SpeechEQ Dataset (SEQD)。
AI.result: 在CASIA和ESD数据集上，SpeechEQ方法分别提升了8.0%和6.5%的准确率；在IEMOCAP数据集上，加权准确率(WA)达到78.16%，无权重准确率(UA)达到77.47%，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: SpeechEQ框架通过多任务学习和统一的多尺度评估体系，有效提升了语音情感识别的性能，具有良好的应用前景。

authors_text: Nicos Isaak
title: A Zero-Shot Classification Approach for a Word-Guessing Challenge
title_zh: 用于猜词挑战的零样本分类方法
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures, 3 Tables
comments: 9 pages, 3 figures, 3 Tables
abstract: The Taboo Challenge competition, a task based on the well-known Taboo game, has been proposed to stimulate research in the AI field. The challenge requires building systems able to comprehend the implied inferences between the exchanged messages of guesser and describer agents. A describer sends pre-determined hints to guessers indirectly describing cities, and guessers are required to return the matching cities implied by the hints. Climbing up the scoring ledger requires the resolving of the highest amount of cities with the smallest amount of hints in a specified time frame. Here, we present TabooLM, a language-model approach that tackles the challenge based on a zero-shot setting. We start by presenting and comparing the results of this approach with three studies from the literature. The results show that our method achieves SOTA results on the Taboo challenge, suggesting that TabooLM can guess the implied cities faster and more accurately than existing approaches.
summary: The Taboo Challenge competition, a task based on the well-known Taboo game, has been proposed to stimulate research in the AI field. The challenge requires building systems able to comprehend the implied inferences between the exchanged messages of guesser and describer agents. A describer sends pre-determined hints to guessers indirectly describing cities, and guessers are required to return the matching cities implied by the hints. Climbing up the scoring ledger requires the resolving of the highest amount of cities with the smallest amount of hints in a specified time frame. Here, we present TabooLM, a language-model approach that tackles the challenge based on a zero-shot setting. We start by presenting and comparing the results of this approach with three studies from the literature. The results show that our method achieves SOTA results on the Taboo challenge, suggesting that TabooLM can guess the implied cities faster and more accurately than existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 禁忌挑战赛是一项基于著名禁忌游戏的任务，旨在刺激人工智能领域的研究。这一挑战要求构建能够理解猜测者和描述者代理交换的消息之间隐含推论的系统。描述者向间接描述城市的猜测者发送预先确定的提示，猜测者需要返回提示所暗示的匹配城市。要想登上得分榜，就需要在指定的时间内以最少的提示解决最多数量的城市。在这里，我们提出 TabooLM，一种基于零样本设置来应对挑战的语言模型方法。我们首先介绍这种方法的结果并将其与文献中的三项研究进行比较。结果表明，我们的方法在 Taboo 挑战上取得了 SOTA 结果，这表明 TabooLM 可以比现有方法更快、更准确地猜测隐含的城市。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于零样本分类的Taboo挑战解决方案TabooLM，用于通过描述者提供的隐晦提示快速准确地猜出对应城市。
AI.motivation: Taboo挑战要求系统理解猜词者与描述者之间的隐含推理关系，现有方法在零样本场景下表现不足，需探索更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计TabooLM语言模型，在零样本设置下直接利用预训练语言模型的知识进行城市猜测，并与三种文献方法进行对比实验。
AI.result: TabooLM在Taboo挑战中达到SOTA性能，相较现有方法能以更少提示更快猜中更多城市。
AI.conclusion: 零样本语言模型能有效解决隐含推理任务，TabooLM的优异表现验证了该方法在类似NLP任务中的潜力。

conclusion: 零样本语言模型能有效解决隐含推理任务，TabooLM的优异表现验证了该方法在类似NLP任务中的潜力。
search_text: A Zero-Shot Classification Approach for a Word-Guessing Challenge 用于猜词挑战的零样本分类方法 The Taboo Challenge competition, a task based on the well-known Taboo game, has been proposed to stimulate research in the AI field. The challenge requires building systems able to comprehend the implied inferences between the exchanged messages of guesser and describer agents. A describer sends pre-determined hints to guessers indirectly describing cities, and guessers are required to return the matching cities implied by the hints. Climbing up the scoring ledger requires the resolving of the highest amount of cities with the smallest amount of hints in a specified time frame. Here, we present TabooLM, a language-model approach that tackles the challenge based on a zero-shot setting. We start by presenting and comparing the results of this approach with three studies from the literature. The results show that our method achieves SOTA results on the Taboo challenge, suggesting that TabooLM can guess the implied cities faster and more accurately than existing approaches. 禁忌挑战赛是一项基于著名禁忌游戏的任务，旨在刺激人工智能领域的研究。这一挑战要求构建能够理解猜测者和描述者代理交换的消息之间隐含推论的系统。描述者向间接描述城市的猜测者发送预先确定的提示，猜测者需要返回提示所暗示的匹配城市。要想登上得分榜，就需要在指定的时间内以最少的提示解决最多数量的城市。在这里，我们提出 TabooLM，一种基于零样本设置来应对挑战的语言模型方法。我们首先介绍这种方法的结果并将其与文献中的三项研究进行比较。结果表明，我们的方法在 Taboo 挑战上取得了 SOTA 结果，这表明 TabooLM 可以比现有方法更快、更准确地猜测隐含的城市。 本文提出了一种基于零样本分类的Taboo挑战解决方案TabooLM，用于通过描述者提供的隐晦提示快速准确地猜出对应城市。 Nicos Isaak cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Yuji Okamoto,Ryosuke Kojima
title: Learning Deep Input-Output Stable Dynamics
title_zh: 学习深度输入输出稳定动态
comment: NeurIPS 2022
comments: NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Learning stable dynamics from observed time-series data is an essential problem in robotics, physical modeling, and systems biology. Many of these dynamics are represented as an inputs-output system to communicate with the external environment. In this study, we focus on input-output stable systems, exhibiting robustness against unexpected stimuli and noise. We propose a method to learn nonlinear systems guaranteeing the input-output stability. Our proposed method utilizes the differentiable projection onto the space satisfying the Hamilton-Jacobi inequality to realize the input-output stability. The problem of finding this projection can be formulated as a quadratic constraint quadratic programming problem, and we derive the particular solution analytically. Also, we apply our method to a toy bistable model and the task of training a benchmark generated from a glucose-insulin simulator. The results show that the nonlinear system with neural networks by our method achieves the input-output stability, unlike naive neural networks. Our code is available at https://github.com/clinfo/DeepIOStability.
summary: Learning stable dynamics from observed time-series data is an essential problem in robotics, physical modeling, and systems biology. Many of these dynamics are represented as an inputs-output system to communicate with the external environment. In this study, we focus on input-output stable systems, exhibiting robustness against unexpected stimuli and noise. We propose a method to learn nonlinear systems guaranteeing the input-output stability. Our proposed method utilizes the differentiable projection onto the space satisfying the Hamilton-Jacobi inequality to realize the input-output stability. The problem of finding this projection can be formulated as a quadratic constraint quadratic programming problem, and we derive the particular solution analytically. Also, we apply our method to a toy bistable model and the task of training a benchmark generated from a glucose-insulin simulator. The results show that the nonlinear system with neural networks by our method achieves the input-output stability, unlike naive neural networks. Our code is available at https://github.com/clinfo/DeepIOStability.
abstract_zh: 从观察到的时间序列数据中学习稳定的动力学是机器人学、物理建模和系统生物学中的一个基本问题。许多这些动态都被表示为与外部环境进行通信的输入输出系统。在这项研究中，我们关注输入输出稳定系统，表现出针对意外刺激和噪声的鲁棒性。我们提出了一种学习保证输入输出稳定性的非线性系统的方法。我们提出的方法利用满足 Hamilton-Jacobi 不等式的空间上的可微投影来实现输入输出稳定性。找到这个投影的问题可以表述为二次约束二次规划问题，并且我们通过分析得出特定的解决方案。此外，我们将我们的方法应用于玩具双稳态模型以及训练由葡萄糖胰岛素模拟器生成的基准的任务。结果表明，与朴素神经网络不同，采用我们的方法的神经网络非线性系统实现了输入输出稳定性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/clinfo/DeepIOStability 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种学习具有输入输出稳定性的非线性动态系统的方法，通过满足Hamilton-Jacobi不等式的投影实现稳定性保证。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络在处理噪声和意外输入时易失稳，而输入输出稳定系统在机器人、物理建模等领域具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 利用微分投影技术将系统映射到满足Hamilton-Jacobi不等式的空间，转化为二次约束二次规划问题并解析求解。
AI.result: 在双稳模型和葡萄糖-胰岛素模拟任务中，该方法训练的神经网络实现了输入输出稳定性，优于传统神经网络。
AI.conclusion: 提出的稳定性保证方法有效提升了动态系统的鲁棒性，为复杂系统建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: Christina Baek,Yiding Jiang,Aditi Raghunathan,Zico Kolter
title: Agreement-on-the-Line: Predicting the Performance of Neural Networks under Distribution Shift
title_zh: 在线协议：预测分布转移下神经网络的性能
comment: NeurIPS 2022
comments: NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Recently, Miller et al. showed that a model's in-distribution (ID) accuracy has a strong linear correlation with its out-of-distribution (OOD) accuracy on several OOD benchmarks -- a phenomenon they dubbed ''accuracy-on-the-line''. While a useful tool for model selection (i.e., the model most likely to perform the best OOD is the one with highest ID accuracy), this fact does not help estimate the actual OOD performance of models without access to a labeled OOD validation set. In this paper, we show a similar but surprising phenomenon also holds for the agreement between pairs of neural network classifiers: whenever accuracy-on-the-line holds, we observe that the OOD agreement between the predictions of any two pairs of neural networks (with potentially different architectures) also observes a strong linear correlation with their ID agreement. Furthermore, we observe that the slope and bias of OOD vs ID agreement closely matches that of OOD vs ID accuracy. This phenomenon, which we call agreement-on-the-line, has important practical applications: without any labeled data, we can predict the OOD accuracy of classifiers}, since OOD agreement can be estimated with just unlabeled data. Our prediction algorithm outperforms previous methods both in shifts where agreement-on-the-line holds and, surprisingly, when accuracy is not on the line. This phenomenon also provides new insights into deep neural networks: unlike accuracy-on-the-line, agreement-on-the-line appears to only hold for neural network classifiers.
summary: Recently, Miller et al. showed that a model's in-distribution (ID) accuracy has a strong linear correlation with its out-of-distribution (OOD) accuracy on several OOD benchmarks -- a phenomenon they dubbed ''accuracy-on-the-line''. While a useful tool for model selection (i.e., the model most likely to perform the best OOD is the one with highest ID accuracy), this fact does not help estimate the actual OOD performance of models without access to a labeled OOD validation set. In this paper, we show a similar but surprising phenomenon also holds for the agreement between pairs of neural network classifiers: whenever accuracy-on-the-line holds, we observe that the OOD agreement between the predictions of any two pairs of neural networks (with potentially different architectures) also observes a strong linear correlation with their ID agreement. Furthermore, we observe that the slope and bias of OOD vs ID agreement closely matches that of OOD vs ID accuracy. This phenomenon, which we call agreement-on-the-line, has important practical applications: without any labeled data, we can predict the OOD accuracy of classifiers}, since OOD agreement can be estimated with just unlabeled data. Our prediction algorithm outperforms previous methods both in shifts where agreement-on-the-line holds and, surprisingly, when accuracy is not on the line. This phenomenon also provides new insights into deep neural networks: unlike accuracy-on-the-line, agreement-on-the-line appears to only hold for neural network classifiers.
abstract_zh: 最近，米勒等人。研究表明，在多个 OOD 基准上，模型的分布内 (ID) 准确度与其分布外 (OOD) 准确度具有很强的线性相关性，他们将这种现象称为“在线准确度”。虽然模型选择的一个有用工具（即最有可能执行最佳 OOD 的模型是具有最高 ID 准确度的模型），但这一事实无助于在不访问标记的 OOD 验证集的情况下估计模型的实际 OOD 性能。在本文中，我们展示了一个类似但令人惊讶的现象也适用于神经网络分类器对之间的一致性：每当在线准确率成立时，我们观察到任何两对神经网络（具有可能不同的架构）的预测之间的 OOD 一致性也观察到与其 ID 一致性具有很强的线性相关性。此外，我们观察到 OOD 与 ID 一致性的斜率和偏差与 OOD 与 ID 准确度的斜率和偏差非常匹配。这种现象，我们称之为在线一致性，具有重要的实际应用：无需任何标记数据，我们就可以预测分类器的 OOD 准确性}，因为 OOD 一致性可以仅用未标记的数据来估计。我们的预测算法在在线一致性成立的情况下以及令人惊讶的是在准确性不在线的情况下都优于以前的方法。这种现象还为深度神经网络提供了新的见解：与在线准确性不同，在线一致性似乎仅适用于神经网络分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'agreement-on-the-line'的现象，通过分析神经网络分类器之间的预测一致性，无需标注数据即可预测模型在分布偏移下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究发现模型在分布内准确率与分布外准确率存在线性关系（accuracy-on-the-line），但该方法需依赖标注的分布外验证集，无法直接估计实际分布外性能。
AI.method: 研究发现当accuracy-on-the-line成立时，任意两个神经网络分类器的分布内预测一致性与分布外预测一致性也存在强线性关系，并利用该关系构建无需标注数据的分布外准确率预测算法。
AI.result: 提出的预测算法在分布偏移场景下优于现有方法，且该现象仅在神经网络分类器中显著，为理解深度神经网络提供了新视角。
AI.conclusion: agreement-on-the-line现象为无标注数据下的分布外性能预测提供了有效途径，揭示了神经网络在分布偏移场景下的独特特性。

This phenomenon, which we call agreement-on-the-line, has important practical applications: without any labeled data, we can predict the OOD accuracy of classifiers}, since OOD agreement can be estimated with just unlabeled data. Our prediction algorithm outperforms previous methods both in shifts where agreement-on-the-line holds and, surprisingly, when accuracy is not on the line. This phenomenon also provides new insights into deep neural networks: unlike accuracy-on-the-line, agreement-on-the-line appears to only hold for neural network classifiers. 最近，米勒等人。研究表明，在多个 OOD 基准上，模型的分布内 (ID) 准确度与其分布外 (OOD) 准确度具有很强的线性相关性，他们将这种现象称为“在线准确度”。虽然模型选择的一个有用工具（即最有可能执行最佳 OOD 的模型是具有最高 ID 准确度的模型），但这一事实无助于在不访问标记的 OOD 验证集的情况下估计模型的实际 OOD 性能。在本文中，我们展示了一个类似但令人惊讶的现象也适用于神经网络分类器对之间的一致性：每当在线准确率成立时，我们观察到任何两对神经网络（具有可能不同的架构）的预测之间的 OOD 一致性也观察到与其 ID 一致性具有很强的线性相关性。此外，我们观察到 OOD 与 ID 一致性的斜率和偏差与 OOD 与 ID 准确度的斜率和偏差非常匹配。这种现象，我们称之为在线一致性，具有重要的实际应用：无需任何标记数据，我们就可以预测分类器的 OOD 准确性}，因为 OOD 一致性可以仅用未标记的数据来估计。我们的预测算法在在线一致性成立的情况下以及令人惊讶的是在准确性不在线的情况下都优于以前的方法。这种现象还为深度神经网络提供了新的见解：与在线准确性不同，在线一致性似乎仅适用于神经网络分类器。 本文提出了一种名为'agreement-on-the-line'的现象，通过分析神经网络分类器之间的预测一致性，无需标注数据即可预测模型在分布偏移下的性能。 Christina Baek,Yiding Jiang,Aditi Raghunathan,Zico Kolter cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ben Dai,Chunlin Li
title: RankSEG: A Consistent Ranking-based Framework for Segmentation
title_zh: RankSEG：一致的基于排名的细分框架
comment: 50 pages
comments: 50 pages
abstract: Segmentation has emerged as a fundamental field of computer vision and natural language processing, which assigns a label to every pixel/feature to extract regions of interest from an image/text. To evaluate the performance of segmentation, the Dice and IoU metrics are used to measure the degree of overlap between the ground truth and the predicted segmentation. In this paper, we establish a theoretical foundation of segmentation with respect to the Dice/IoU metrics, including the Bayes rule and Dice-/IoU-calibration, analogous to classification-calibration or Fisher consistency in classification. We prove that the existing thresholding-based framework with most operating losses are not consistent with respect to the Dice/IoU metrics, and thus may lead to a suboptimal solution. To address this pitfall, we propose a novel consistent ranking-based framework, namely RankDice/RankIoU, inspired by plug-in rules of the Bayes segmentation rule. Three numerical algorithms with GPU parallel execution are developed to implement the proposed framework in large-scale and high-dimensional segmentation. We study statistical properties of the proposed framework. We show it is Dice-/IoU-calibrated, and its excess risk bounds and the rate of convergence are also provided. The numerical effectiveness of RankDice/mRankDice is demonstrated in various simulated examples and Fine-annotated CityScapes, Pascal VOC and Kvasir-SEG datasets with state-of-the-art deep learning architectures.
summary: Segmentation has emerged as a fundamental field of computer vision and natural language processing, which assigns a label to every pixel/feature to extract regions of interest from an image/text. To evaluate the performance of segmentation, the Dice and IoU metrics are used to measure the degree of overlap between the ground truth and the predicted segmentation. In this paper, we establish a theoretical foundation of segmentation with respect to the Dice/IoU metrics, including the Bayes rule and Dice-/IoU-calibration, analogous to classification-calibration or Fisher consistency in classification. We prove that the existing thresholding-based framework with most operating losses are not consistent with respect to the Dice/IoU metrics, and thus may lead to a suboptimal solution. To address this pitfall, we propose a novel consistent ranking-based framework, namely RankDice/RankIoU, inspired by plug-in rules of the Bayes segmentation rule. Three numerical algorithms with GPU parallel execution are developed to implement the proposed framework in large-scale and high-dimensional segmentation. We study statistical properties of the proposed framework. We show it is Dice-/IoU-calibrated, and its excess risk bounds and the rate of convergence are also provided. The numerical effectiveness of RankDice/mRankDice is demonstrated in various simulated examples and Fine-annotated CityScapes, Pascal VOC and Kvasir-SEG datasets with state-of-the-art deep learning architectures.
abstract_zh: 分割已成为计算机视觉和自然语言处理的基本领域，它为每个像素/特征分配标签，以从图像/文本中提取感兴趣的区域。为了评估分割的性能，使用 Dice 和 IoU 指标来测量真实数据和预测分割之间的重叠程度。在本文中，我们建立了关于 Dice/IoU 指标的分割理论基础，包括贝叶斯规则和 Dice-/IoU 校准，类似于分类中的分类校准或 Fisher 一致性。我们证明，大多数运营损失的现有基于阈值的框架与 Dice/IoU 指标不一致，因此可能会导致次优解决方案。为了解决这个陷阱，我们受到贝叶斯分割规则插件规则的启发，提出了一种新颖的一致的基于排名的框架，即RankDice/RankIoU。开发了三种具有 GPU 并行执行的数值算法来实现大规模和高维分割中所提出的框架。我们研究所提出的框架的统计特性。我们证明它是经过 Dice/IoU 校准的，并且还提供了它的超额风险界限和收敛率。 RankDice/mRankDice 的数值有效性在各种模拟示例和精细注释的 CityScapes、Pascal VOC 和 Kvasir-SEG 数据集以及最先进的深度学习架构中得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于排名的分割框架RankSEG，以解决现有分割方法在Dice/IoU指标下的不一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于阈值的分割框架与Dice/IoU指标不一致，可能导致次优解，需建立理论基础并设计新的校准框架。
AI.method: 提出RankDice/RankIoU框架，基于贝叶斯分割规则的插件方法，开发三种支持GPU并行的算法，理论证明其Dice/IoU校准性并分析风险界。
AI.result: 在模拟数据和CityScapes、Pascal VOC等真实数据集上验证了RankDice/mRankDice的有效性，优于现有深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: RankSEG通过理论保证和算法实现，为分割任务提供了更一致且高效的解决方案，推动了分割模型的性能提升。

authors_text: Lonce Wyse,Purnima Kamath,Chitralekha Gupta
title: Sound Model Factory: An Integrated System Architecture for Generative Audio Modelling
title_zh: 声音模型工厂：用于生成音频建模的集成系统架构
comment: ef:International Conference on Computational Intelligence in Music, Sound, Art and Design (Part of EvoStar) (pp. 308-322). Springer, Cham. 2022
comments: ef:International Conference on Computational Intelligence in Music, Sound, Art and Design (Part of EvoStar) (pp. 308-322). Springer, Cham. 2022
abstract: We introduce a new system for data-driven audio sound model design built around two different neural network architectures, a Generative Adversarial Network(GAN) and a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN), that takes advantage of the unique characteristics of each to achieve the system objectives that neither is capable of addressing alone. The objective of the system is to generate interactively controllable sound models given (a) a range of sounds the model should be able to synthesize, and (b) a specification of the parametric controls for navigating that space of sounds. The range of sounds is defined by a dataset provided by the designer, while the means of navigation is defined by a combination of data labels and the selection of a sub-manifold from the latent space learned by the GAN. Our proposed system takes advantage of the rich latent space of a GAN that consists of sounds that fill out the spaces ''between" real data-like sounds. This augmented data from the GAN is then used to train an RNN for its ability to respond immediately and continuously to parameter changes and to generate audio over unlimited periods of time. Furthermore, we develop a self-organizing map technique for ``smoothing" the latent space of GAN that results in perceptually smooth interpolation between audio timbres. We validate this process through user studies. The system contributes advances to the state of the art for generative sound model design that include system configuration and components for improving interpolation and the expansion of audio modeling capabilities beyond musical pitch and percussive instrument sounds into the more complex space of audio textures.
summary: We introduce a new system for data-driven audio sound model design built around two different neural network architectures, a Generative Adversarial Network(GAN) and a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN), that takes advantage of the unique characteristics of each to achieve the system objectives that neither is capable of addressing alone. The objective of the system is to generate interactively controllable sound models given (a) a range of sounds the model should be able to synthesize, and (b) a specification of the parametric controls for navigating that space of sounds. The range of sounds is defined by a dataset provided by the designer, while the means of navigation is defined by a combination of data labels and the selection of a sub-manifold from the latent space learned by the GAN. Our proposed system takes advantage of the rich latent space of a GAN that consists of sounds that fill out the spaces ''between" real data-like sounds. This augmented data from the GAN is then used to train an RNN for its ability to respond immediately and continuously to parameter changes and to generate audio over unlimited periods of time. Furthermore, we develop a self-organizing map technique for ``smoothing" the latent space of GAN that results in perceptually smooth interpolation between audio timbres. We validate this process through user studies. The system contributes advances to the state of the art for generative sound model design that include system configuration and components for improving interpolation and the expansion of audio modeling capabilities beyond musical pitch and percussive instrument sounds into the more complex space of audio textures.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新的数据驱动音频声音模型设计系统，围绕两种不同的神经网络架构（生成对抗网络（GAN）和循环神经网络（RNN））构建，该系统利用每种架构的独特特性来实现两者都无法单独解决的系统目标。该系统的目标是生成交互式可控的声音模型，给定（a）模型应能够合成的一系列声音，以及（b）用于导航该声音空间的参数控制的规范。声音范围由设计者提供的数据集定义，而导航方式由数据标签的组合以及从 GAN 学习的潜在空间中选择子流形来定义。我们提出的系统利用了 GAN 丰富的潜在空间，该空间由填充“真实数据类声音”之间的空间的声音组成。来自 GAN 的增强数据随后用于训练 RNN，使其能够立即、连续地响应参数变化，并在无限的时间段内生成音频。此外，我们开发了一种自组织映射技术，用于“平滑”GAN 的潜在空间，从而在音频音色之间实现感知上平滑的插值。我们通过用户研究验证了这个过程。该系统为生成声音模型设计的最新技术做出了贡献，其中包括用于改进插值的系统配置和组件，以及将音频建模功能从音调和打击乐器声音扩展到更复杂的音频纹理空间的扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合生成对抗网络（GAN）和循环神经网络（RNN）的集成系统架构，用于实现可交互控制的生成音频建模。
AI.motivation: 现有音频生成模型难以同时满足复杂声音合成需求与参数化控制灵活性，需突破传统模型在音色插值和长时间音频生成的局限性。
AI.method: 利用GAN生成丰富潜在空间数据并构建自组织映射优化音色过渡，再以RNN实现参数驱动的连续音频生成，结合数据标签与潜在子流形定义导航控制方式。
AI.result: 通过用户研究验证系统有效性，成功扩展音频建模能力至复杂纹理领域，实现感知平滑的音色插值与无限时长音频生成。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过融合GAN与RNN优势，为生成式音频建模提供新范式，在控制精度、插值质量及音色多样性方面取得显著进展。

Furthermore, we develop a self-organizing map technique for ``smoothing" the latent space of GAN that results in perceptually smooth interpolation between audio timbres. We validate this process through user studies. The system contributes advances to the state of the art for generative sound model design that include system configuration and components for improving interpolation and the expansion of audio modeling capabilities beyond musical pitch and percussive instrument sounds into the more complex space of audio textures. 我们引入了一种新的数据驱动音频声音模型设计系统，围绕两种不同的神经网络架构（生成对抗网络（GAN）和循环神经网络（RNN））构建，该系统利用每种架构的独特特性来实现两者都无法单独解决的系统目标。该系统的目标是生成交互式可控的声音模型，给定（a）模型应能够合成的一系列声音，以及（b）用于导航该声音空间的参数控制的规范。声音范围由设计者提供的数据集定义，而导航方式由数据标签的组合以及从 GAN 学习的潜在空间中选择子流形来定义。我们提出的系统利用了 GAN 丰富的潜在空间，该空间由填充“真实数据类声音”之间的空间的声音组成。来自 GAN 的增强数据随后用于训练 RNN，使其能够立即、连续地响应参数变化，并在无限的时间段内生成音频。此外，我们开发了一种自组织映射技术，用于“平滑”GAN 的潜在空间，从而在音频音色之间实现感知上平滑的插值。我们通过用户研究验证了这个过程。该系统为生成声音模型设计的最新技术做出了贡献，其中包括用于改进插值的系统配置和组件，以及将音频建模功能从音调和打击乐器声音扩展到更复杂的音频纹理空间的扩展。 本文提出一种结合生成对抗网络（GAN）和循环神经网络（RNN）的集成系统架构，用于实现可交互控制的生成音频建模。 Lonce Wyse,Purnima Kamath,Chitralekha Gupta cs.SD,cs.NE,eess.AS

authors_text: Ruiming Du,Zhihong Ma,Pengyao Xie,Yong He,Haiyan Cen
title: PST: Plant segmentation transformer for 3D point clouds of rapeseed plants at the podding stage
title_zh: PST：结荚阶段油菜植株 3D 点云的植物分割变压器
comment: 46 pages, 10 figures
comments: 46 pages, 10 figures
abstract: Segmentation of plant point clouds to obtain high-precise morphological traits is essential for plant phenotyping. Although the fast development of deep learning has boosted much research on segmentation of plant point clouds, previous studies mainly focus on the hard voxelization-based or down-sampling-based methods, which are limited to segmenting simple plant organs. Segmentation of complex plant point clouds with a high spatial resolution still remains challenging. In this study, we proposed a deep learning network plant segmentation transformer (PST) to achieve the semantic and instance segmentation of rapeseed plants point clouds acquired by handheld laser scanning (HLS) with the high spatial resolution, which can characterize the tiny siliques as the main traits targeted. PST is composed of: (i) a dynamic voxel feature encoder (DVFE) to aggregate the point features with the raw spatial resolution; (ii) the dual window sets attention blocks to capture the contextual information; and (iii) a dense feature propagation module to obtain the final dense point feature map. The results proved that PST and PST-PointGroup (PG) achieved superior performance in semantic and instance segmentation tasks. For the semantic segmentation, the mean IoU, mean Precision, mean Recall, mean F1-score, and overall accuracy of PST were 93.96%, 97.29%, 96.52%, 96.88%, and 97.07%, achieving an improvement of 7.62%, 3.28%, 4.8%, 4.25%, and 3.88% compared to the second-best state-of-the-art network PAConv. For instance segmentation, PST-PG reached 89.51%, 89.85%, 88.83% and 82.53% in mCov, mWCov, mPerc90, and mRec90, achieving an improvement of 2.93%, 2.21%, 1.99%, and 5.9% compared to the original PG. This study proves that the deep-learning-based point cloud segmentation method has a great potential for resolving dense plant point clouds with complex morphological traits.

For instance segmentation, PST-PG reached 89.51%, 89.85%, 88.83% and 82.53% in mCov, mWCov, mPerc90, and mRec90, achieving an improvement of 2.93%, 2.21%, 1.99%, and 5.9% compared to the original PG. abstract_zh: 对植物点云进行分割以获得高精度的形态性状对于植物表型分析至关重要。尽管深度学习的快速发展推动了植物点云分割的研究，但以往的研究主要集中在基于硬体素化或基于下采样的方法，仅限于分割简单的植物器官。具有高空间分辨率的复杂植物点云的分割仍然具有挑战性。在本研究中，我们提出了一种深度学习网络植物分割变压器（PST），以实现对手持式激光扫描（HLS）获得的高空间分辨率油菜植物点云的语义和实例分割，可以将微小的长角果作为目标的主要性状进行表征。 PST 由以下部分组成：（i）动态体素特征编码器（DVFE），用于将点特征与原始空间分辨率聚合； (ii) 双窗口设置注意力块来捕获上下文信息； (iii)密集特征传播模块以获得最终的密集点特征图。结果证明PST和PST-PointGroup（PG）在语义和实例分割任务中取得了优越的性能。对于语义分割，PST 的平均 IoU、平均 Precision、平均 Recall、平均 F1-score 和总体准确率分别为 93.96%、97.29%、96.52%、96.88% 和 97.07%，与第二好的相比提高了 7.62%、3.28%、4.8%、4.25% 和 3.88%最先进的网络 PAConv.例如分割，PST-PG 在 mCov、mWCov、mPerc90 和 mRec90 中达到 89.51%、89.85%、88.83% 和 82.53%，比原始 PG 提高了 2.93%、2.21%、1.99% 和 5.9%。这项研究证明基于深度学习的点云分割方法在解决具有复杂形态特征的密集植物点云方面具有巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的植物点云分割方法PST，用于高分辨率油菜花期点云的语义和实例分割。
AI.motivation: 传统基于体素化或下采样的植物点云分割方法难以处理复杂形态的高分辨率点云，尤其无法准确表征细小的角果等形态特征。
AI.method: PST包含动态体素特征编码器（DVFE）、双窗口集注意力模块和密集特征传播模块，通过保留原始空间分辨率和捕捉上下文信息实现精准分割。
AI.result: 在语义分割任务中，PST的mIoU达93.96%，较PAConv提升7.62%；实例分割任务中，PST-PG的mCov达89.51%，较原始PG提升2.93%。
AI.conclusion: 基于深度学习的点云分割方法在处理复杂形态的密集植物点云中展现出巨大潜力，可有效提取细微形态特征。

authors_text: Zhechen Li,Ao Liu,Lirong Xia,Yongzhi Cao,Hanpin Wang
title: Differentially Private Condorcet Voting
title_zh: 差分隐私孔多塞投票
abstract: Designing private voting rules is an important and pressing problem for trustworthy democracy. In this paper, under the framework of differential privacy, we propose a novel famliy of randomized voting rules based on the well-known Condorcet method, and focus on three classes of voting rules in this family: Laplacian Condorcet method ($\CMLAP_λ$), exponential Condorcet method ($\CMEXP_λ$), and randomized response Condorcet method ($\CMRR_λ$), where $λ$ represents the level of noise. We prove that all of our rules satisfy absolute monotonicity, lexi-participation, probabilistic Pareto efficiency, approximate probabilistic Condorcet criterion, and approximate SD-strategyproofness. In addition, $\CMRR_λ$ satisfies (non-approximate) probabilistic Condorcet criterion, while $\CMLAP_λ$ and $\CMEXP_λ$ satisfy strong lexi-participation. Finally, we regard differential privacy as a voting axiom, and discuss its relations to other axioms.
summary: Designing private voting rules is an important and pressing problem for trustworthy democracy. In this paper, under the framework of differential privacy, we propose a novel famliy of randomized voting rules based on the well-known Condorcet method, and focus on three classes of voting rules in this family: Laplacian Condorcet method ($\CMLAP_λ$), exponential Condorcet method ($\CMEXP_λ$), and randomized response Condorcet method ($\CMRR_λ$), where $λ$ represents the level of noise. We prove that all of our rules satisfy absolute monotonicity, lexi-participation, probabilistic Pareto efficiency, approximate probabilistic Condorcet criterion, and approximate SD-strategyproofness. In addition, $\CMRR_λ$ satisfies (non-approximate) probabilistic Condorcet criterion, while $\CMLAP_λ$ and $\CMEXP_λ$ satisfy strong lexi-participation. Finally, we regard differential privacy as a voting axiom, and discuss its relations to other axioms.
abstract_zh: 设计私人投票规则是值得信赖的民主的一个重要而紧迫的问题。本文在差分隐私的框架下，基于著名的孔多塞方法提出了一种新颖的随机投票规则族，并重点关注该族中的三类投票规则：拉普拉斯孔多塞方法（$\CMLAP_λ$）、指数孔多塞方法（$\CMEXP_λ$）和随机响应孔多塞方法（$\CMRR_λ$），其中$λ$表示噪声水平。我们证明我们所有的规则都满足绝对单调性、词汇参与、概率帕累托效率、近似概率孔多塞准则和近似 SD 策略证明。此外，$\CMRR_λ$满足（非近似）概率孔多塞准则，而$\CMLAP_λ$和$\CMEXP_λ$满足强词汇参与。最后，我们将差异隐私视为投票公理，并讨论其与其他公理的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Condorcet方法的差分隐私投票规则家族，旨在解决可信民主中的隐私保护问题。
AI.motivation: 设计隐私保护的投票规则对于确保民主过程的可信度至关重要，传统方法在隐私与公平性之间存在矛盾，需通过差分隐私框架实现平衡。
AI.method: 在差分隐私框架下，提出三种随机化Condorcet投票规则：拉普拉斯Condorcet（CMLAP_λ）、指数Condorcet（CMEXP_λ）和随机响应Condorcet（CMRR_λ），并通过理论分析验证其性质。
AI.result: 所有规则满足绝对单调性、字典序参与性、概率帕累托效率等性质；CMRR_λ满足非近似概率Condorcet标准，而CMLAP_λ和CMEXP_λ满足强字典序参与性。
AI.conclusion: 将差分隐私确立为投票公理，揭示其与其他投票公理的关系，为隐私保护与选举公平性提供了理论基础。

search_text: Differentially Private Condorcet Voting 差分隐私孔多塞投票 Designing private voting rules is an important and pressing problem for trustworthy democracy. In this paper, under the framework of differential privacy, we propose a novel famliy of randomized voting rules based on the well-known Condorcet method, and focus on three classes of voting rules in this family: Laplacian Condorcet method ($\CMLAP_λ$), exponential Condorcet method ($\CMEXP_λ$), and randomized response Condorcet method ($\CMRR_λ$), where $λ$ represents the level of noise. We prove that all of our rules satisfy absolute monotonicity, lexi-participation, probabilistic Pareto efficiency, approximate probabilistic Condorcet criterion, and approximate SD-strategyproofness. In addition, $\CMRR_λ$ satisfies (non-approximate) probabilistic Condorcet criterion, while $\CMLAP_λ$ and $\CMEXP_λ$ satisfy strong lexi-participation. Finally, we regard differential privacy as a voting axiom, and discuss its relations to other axioms. 设计私人投票规则是值得信赖的民主的一个重要而紧迫的问题。本文在差分隐私的框架下，基于著名的孔多塞方法提出了一种新颖的随机投票规则族，并重点关注该族中的三类投票规则：拉普拉斯孔多塞方法（$\CMLAP_λ$）、指数孔多塞方法（$\CMEXP_λ$）和随机响应孔多塞方法（$\CMRR_λ$），其中$λ$表示噪声水平。我们证明我们所有的规则都满足绝对单调性、词汇参与、概率帕累托效率、近似概率孔多塞准则和近似 SD 策略证明。此外，$\CMRR_λ$满足（非近似）概率孔多塞准则，而$\CMLAP_λ$和$\CMEXP_λ$满足强词汇参与。最后，我们将差异隐私视为投票公理，并讨论其与其他公理的关系。 本文提出了一种基于Condorcet方法的差分隐私投票规则家族，旨在解决可信民主中的隐私保护问题。 Zhechen Li,Ao Liu,Lirong Xia,Yongzhi Cao,Hanpin Wang cs.GT,cs.AI

authors_text: Meirui Jiang,Hongzheng Yang,Xiaoxiao Li,Quande Liu,Pheng-Ann Heng,Qi Dou
title: Dynamic Bank Learning for Semi-supervised Federated Image Diagnosis with Class Imbalance
title_zh: 具有类别不平衡的半监督联合图像诊断的动态银行学习
comment: Early accepted by 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI'22)
comments: Early accepted by 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI'22)
abstract: Despite recent progress on semi-supervised federated learning (FL) for medical image diagnosis, the problem of imbalanced class distributions among unlabeled clients is still unsolved for real-world use. In this paper, we study a practical yet challenging problem of class imbalanced semi-supervised FL (imFed-Semi), which allows all clients to have only unlabeled data while the server just has a small amount of labeled data. This imFed-Semi problem is addressed by a novel dynamic bank learning scheme, which improves client training by exploiting class proportion information. This scheme consists of two parts, i.e., the dynamic bank construction to distill various class proportions for each local client, and the sub-bank classification to impose the local model to learn different class proportions. We evaluate our approach on two public real-world medical datasets, including the intracranial hemorrhage diagnosis with 25,000 CT slices and skin lesion diagnosis with 10,015 dermoscopy images. The effectiveness of our method has been validated with significant performance improvements (7.61% and 4.69%) compared with the second-best on the accuracy, as well as comprehensive analytical studies. Code is available at https://github.com/med-air/imFedSemi.
summary: Despite recent progress on semi-supervised federated learning (FL) for medical image diagnosis, the problem of imbalanced class distributions among unlabeled clients is still unsolved for real-world use. In this paper, we study a practical yet challenging problem of class imbalanced semi-supervised FL (imFed-Semi), which allows all clients to have only unlabeled data while the server just has a small amount of labeled data. This imFed-Semi problem is addressed by a novel dynamic bank learning scheme, which improves client training by exploiting class proportion information. This scheme consists of two parts, i.e., the dynamic bank construction to distill various class proportions for each local client, and the sub-bank classification to impose the local model to learn different class proportions. We evaluate our approach on two public real-world medical datasets, including the intracranial hemorrhage diagnosis with 25,000 CT slices and skin lesion diagnosis with 10,015 dermoscopy images. The effectiveness of our method has been validated with significant performance improvements (7.61% and 4.69%) compared with the second-best on the accuracy, as well as comprehensive analytical studies. Code is available at https://github.com/med-air/imFedSemi.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近在用于医学图像诊断的半监督联邦学习（FL）方面取得了进展，但未标记客户端之间的类分布不平衡问题在实际使用中仍未得到解决。在本文中，我们研究了一个实用但具有挑战性的类不平衡半监督 FL（imFed-Semi）问题，该问题允许所有客户端仅具有未标记数据，而服务器仅具有少量标记数据。这个 imFed-Semi 问题通过一种新颖的动态银行学习方案得到解决，该方案通过利用类别比例信息来改进客户培训。该方案由两部分组成，即动态银行构建，为每个本地客户提取不同的类别比例，以及子银行分类，以施加本地模型来学习不同的类别比例。我们在两个公共真实世界医学数据集上评估我们的方法，包括使用 25,000 张 CT 切片进行颅内出血诊断和使用 10,015 张皮肤镜图像进行皮肤病变诊断。与第二好的准确度以及全面的分析研究相比，我们的方法的有效性已得到验证，性能显着提高（7.61％和4.69％）。代码可在 https://github.com/med-air/imFedSemi 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种动态银行学习方法，用于解决半监督联邦学习中类别不平衡的医学图像诊断问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督联邦学习方法无法有效处理真实场景中未标记客户端的类别分布不平衡问题，且服务器仅有少量标记数据。
AI.method: 设计动态银行学习框架，包含两个部分：动态银行构建（提炼各客户端类别比例）和子银行分类（强制本地模型学习不同类别比例）。
AI.result: 在颅内出血诊断（25,000 CT切片）和皮肤病变诊断（10,015张皮肤镜图像）数据集上，准确率分别提升7.61%和4.69%。
AI.conclusion: 动态银行学习有效缓解了联邦诊断中的类别不平衡问题，为真实医疗场景提供了可行的半监督联邦学习解决方案。

In this paper, we study a practical yet challenging problem of class imbalanced semi-supervised FL (imFed-Semi), which allows all clients to have only unlabeled data while the server just has a small amount of labeled data. This imFed-Semi problem is addressed by a novel dynamic bank learning scheme, which improves client training by exploiting class proportion information. This scheme consists of two parts, i.e., the dynamic bank construction to distill various class proportions for each local client, and the sub-bank classification to impose the local model to learn different class proportions. We evaluate our approach on two public real-world medical datasets, including the intracranial hemorrhage diagnosis with 25,000 CT slices and skin lesion diagnosis with 10,015 dermoscopy images. The effectiveness of our method has been validated with significant performance improvements (7.61% and 4.69%) compared with the second-best on the accuracy, as well as comprehensive analytical studies. authors_text: Jiyang Yu,Jingen Liu,Jing Huang,Wei Zhang,Tao Mei
title: Video2StyleGAN: Encoding Video in Latent Space for Manipulation
title_zh: Video2StyleGAN：在潜在空间中编码视频以进行操作
abstract: Many recent works have been proposed for face image editing by leveraging the latent space of pretrained GANs. However, few attempts have been made to directly apply them to videos, because 1) they do not guarantee temporal consistency, 2) their application is limited by their processing speed on videos, and 3) they cannot accurately encode details of face motion and expression. To this end, we propose a novel network to encode face videos into the latent space of StyleGAN for semantic face video manipulation. Based on the vision transformer, our network reuses the high-resolution portion of the latent vector to enforce temporal consistency. To capture subtle face motions and expressions, we design novel losses that involve sparse facial landmarks and dense 3D face mesh. We have thoroughly evaluated our approach and successfully demonstrated its application to various face video manipulations. Particularly, we propose a novel network for pose/expression control in a 3D coordinate system. Both qualitative and quantitative results have shown that our approach can significantly outperform existing single image methods, while achieving real-time (66 fps) speed.
summary: Many recent works have been proposed for face image editing by leveraging the latent space of pretrained GANs. However, few attempts have been made to directly apply them to videos, because 1) they do not guarantee temporal consistency, 2) their application is limited by their processing speed on videos, and 3) they cannot accurately encode details of face motion and expression. To this end, we propose a novel network to encode face videos into the latent space of StyleGAN for semantic face video manipulation. Based on the vision transformer, our network reuses the high-resolution portion of the latent vector to enforce temporal consistency. To capture subtle face motions and expressions, we design novel losses that involve sparse facial landmarks and dense 3D face mesh. We have thoroughly evaluated our approach and successfully demonstrated its application to various face video manipulations. Particularly, we propose a novel network for pose/expression control in a 3D coordinate system. Both qualitative and quantitative results have shown that our approach can significantly outperform existing single image methods, while achieving real-time (66 fps) speed.
abstract_zh: 最近的许多工作都提出利用预训练 GAN 的潜在空间来进行人脸图像编辑。然而，很少有人尝试将它们直接应用于视频，因为1）它们不能保证时间一致性，2）它们的应用受到视频处理速度的限制，3）它们无法准确地编码面部运动和表情的细节。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的网络，将面部视频编码到 StyleGAN 的潜在空间中，以进行语义面部视频操作。基于视觉转换器，我们的网络重用潜在向量的高分辨率部分来强制时间一致性。为了捕捉微妙的面部运动和表情，我们设计了新颖的损失，其中涉及稀疏的面部标志和密集的 3D 面部网格。我们彻底评估了我们的方法，并成功演示了其在各种面部视频操作中的应用。特别是，我们提出了一种用于 3D 坐标系中姿势/表情控制的新颖网络。定性和定量结果都表明，我们的方法可以显着优于现有的单图像方法，同时实现实时（66 fps）速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将人脸视频编码到StyleGAN潜在空间的方法，以实现语义级视频编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有基于预训练GAN的人脸编辑方法难以直接应用于视频，存在时间一致性差、处理速度慢及无法准确捕捉面部动态细节等问题。
AI.method: 基于视觉Transformer架构，复用潜在向量高分辨率部分确保时间一致性，并设计结合稀疏面部标志点和密集3D面部网格的新损失函数，同时提出3D坐标系下的姿态/表情控制网络。
AI.result: 在定性和定量实验中显著优于现有单图像方法，实现66帧/秒的实时处理速度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了视频编辑中的时间一致性、动态细节捕捉及实时性难题，为视频语义编辑提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiao Fan,Shuxin Zhuang,Zhemin Zhuang,Ye Yuan,Shunmin Qiu,Alex Noel Joseph Raj,Yibiao Rong
title: SearchMorph:Multi-scale Correlation Iterative Network for Deformable Registration
title_zh: SearchMorph：用于变形配准的多尺度相关迭代网络
abstract: Deformable image registration can obtain dynamic information about images, which is of great significance in medical image analysis. The unsupervised deep learning registration method can quickly achieve high registration accuracy without labels. However, these methods generally suffer from uncorrelated features, poor ability to register large deformations and details, and unnatural deformation fields. To address the issues above, we propose an unsupervised multi-scale correlation iterative registration network (SearchMorph). In the proposed network, we introduce a correlation layer to strengthen the relevance between features and construct a correlation pyramid to provide multi-scale relevance information for the network. We also design a deformation field iterator, which improves the ability of the model to register details and large deformations through the search module and GRU while ensuring that the deformation field is realistic. We use single-temporal brain MR images and multi-temporal echocardiographic sequences to evaluate the model's ability to register large deformations and details. The experimental results demonstrate that the method in this paper achieves the highest registration accuracy and the lowest folding point ratio using a short elapsed time to state-of-the-art.
summary: Deformable image registration can obtain dynamic information about images, which is of great significance in medical image analysis. The unsupervised deep learning registration method can quickly achieve high registration accuracy without labels. However, these methods generally suffer from uncorrelated features, poor ability to register large deformations and details, and unnatural deformation fields. To address the issues above, we propose an unsupervised multi-scale correlation iterative registration network (SearchMorph). In the proposed network, we introduce a correlation layer to strengthen the relevance between features and construct a correlation pyramid to provide multi-scale relevance information for the network. We also design a deformation field iterator, which improves the ability of the model to register details and large deformations through the search module and GRU while ensuring that the deformation field is realistic. We use single-temporal brain MR images and multi-temporal echocardiographic sequences to evaluate the model's ability to register large deformations and details. The experimental results demonstrate that the method in this paper achieves the highest registration accuracy and the lowest folding point ratio using a short elapsed time to state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 变形图像配准可以获得图像的动态信息，这在医学图像分析中具有重要意义。无监督深度学习配准方法可以快速实现无标签的高配准精度。然而，这些方法通常存在特征不相关、记录大变形和细节的能力差以及变形场不自然的问题。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种无监督的多尺度相关迭代注册网络（SearchMorph）。在所提出的网络中，我们引入了相关层来加强特征之间的相关性，并构建相关金字塔来为网络提供多尺度的相关信息。我们还设计了变形场迭代器，它通过搜索模块和GRU提高了模型注册细节和大变形的能力，同时保证变形场的真实性。我们使用单时相脑部 MR 图像和多时相超声心动图序列来评估模型记录大变形和细节的能力。实验结果表明，本文的方法在短时间内达到了最先进的水平，实现了最高的配准精度和最低的折叠点比率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SearchMorph的多尺度相关迭代网络，用于解决可变形图像配准中的特征不相关、大形变和细节配准能力不足等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督深度学习配准方法存在特征不相关、难以处理大形变和细节、形变场不自然等缺陷，需改进以提升配准精度和效率。
AI.method: 引入相关层增强特征关联性，构建相关金字塔提供多尺度信息；设计结合搜索模块与GRU的形变场迭代器，优化大形变和细节配准能力。
AI.result: 在脑部MRI和超声心动图序列实验中，该方法在配准精度和折叠点比方面优于现有方法，且耗时更短。
AI.conclusion: SearchMorph通过多尺度相关机制和迭代优化有效解决了可变形配准中的关键问题，显著提升了配准质量与效率。

authors_text: Allen Z. Ren,Bharat Govil,Tsung-Yen Yang,Karthik Narasimhan,Anirudha Majumdar
title: Leveraging Language for Accelerated Learning of Tool Manipulation
title_zh: 利用语言加速工具操作的学习
abstract: Robust and generalized tool manipulation requires an understanding of the properties and affordances of different tools. We investigate whether linguistic information about a tool (e.g., its geometry, common uses) can help control policies adapt faster to new tools for a given task. We obtain diverse descriptions of various tools in natural language and use pre-trained language models to generate their feature representations. We then perform language-conditioned meta-learning to learn policies that can efficiently adapt to new tools given their corresponding text descriptions. Our results demonstrate that combining linguistic information and meta-learning significantly accelerates tool learning in several manipulation tasks including pushing, lifting, sweeping, and hammering.
summary: Robust and generalized tool manipulation requires an understanding of the properties and affordances of different tools. We investigate whether linguistic information about a tool (e.g., its geometry, common uses) can help control policies adapt faster to new tools for a given task. We obtain diverse descriptions of various tools in natural language and use pre-trained language models to generate their feature representations. We then perform language-conditioned meta-learning to learn policies that can efficiently adapt to new tools given their corresponding text descriptions. Our results demonstrate that combining linguistic information and meta-learning significantly accelerates tool learning in several manipulation tasks including pushing, lifting, sweeping, and hammering.
abstract_zh: 强大且通用的工具操作需要了解不同工具的属性和功能。我们研究有关工具的语言信息（例如，其几何形状、常见用途）是否可以帮助控制策略更快地适应给定任务的新工具。我们以自然语言获得各种工具的不同描述，并使用预先训练的语言模型来生成它们的特征表示。然后，我们执行语言条件元学习，以学习能够有效适应新工具（给定相应文本描述）的策略。我们的结果表明，将语言信息和元学习相结合可以显着加速多种操作任务中的工具学习，包括推、举、扫和锤击。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何利用自然语言描述加速机器人对新工具的操作学习过程。
AI.motivation: 现有工具操作学习方法在面对新工具时适应速度慢，而工具的自然语言描述蕴含其属性和用途信息，可能有助于提升学习效率。
AI.method: 收集工具的自然语言描述，利用预训练语言模型生成特征表示，通过语言条件化的元学习框架训练可快速适应新工具的控制策略。
AI.result: 在推挤、抓取、扫动和敲击等任务中，结合语言信息的元学习方法相比基线显著提升了新工具的学习速度。
AI.conclusion: 将自然语言描述与元学习结合，能有效加速机器人对未知工具的操作学习过程。

authors_text: Tong Ye,Shijing Si,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jing Xiao
title: Uncertainty Calibration for Deep Audio Classifiers
title_zh: 深度音频分类器的不确定性校准
comment: Accepted by InterSpeech 2022, the first two authors contributed equally
comments: Accepted by InterSpeech 2022, the first two authors contributed equally
abstract: Although deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have achieved tremendous success in audio classification tasks, their uncertainty calibration are still under-explored. A well-calibrated model should be accurate when it is certain about its prediction and indicate high uncertainty when it is likely to be inaccurate. In this work, we investigate the uncertainty calibration for deep audio classifiers. In particular, we empirically study the performance of popular calibration methods: (i) Monte Carlo Dropout, (ii) ensemble, (iii) focal loss, and (iv) spectral-normalized Gaussian process (SNGP), on audio classification datasets. To this end, we evaluate (i-iv) for the tasks of environment sound and music genre classification. Results indicate that uncalibrated deep audio classifiers may be over-confident, and SNGP performs the best and is very efficient on the two datasets of this paper.
summary: Although deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have achieved tremendous success in audio classification tasks, their uncertainty calibration are still under-explored. A well-calibrated model should be accurate when it is certain about its prediction and indicate high uncertainty when it is likely to be inaccurate. In this work, we investigate the uncertainty calibration for deep audio classifiers. In particular, we empirically study the performance of popular calibration methods: (i) Monte Carlo Dropout, (ii) ensemble, (iii) focal loss, and (iv) spectral-normalized Gaussian process (SNGP), on audio classification datasets. To this end, we evaluate (i-iv) for the tasks of environment sound and music genre classification. Results indicate that uncalibrated deep audio classifiers may be over-confident, and SNGP performs the best and is very efficient on the two datasets of this paper.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络（DNN）在音频分类任务中取得了巨大成功，但其不确定性校准仍处于探索之中。一个经过良好校准的模型在其预测确定时应该是准确的，而在可能不准确时则表明高度不确定性。在这项工作中，我们研究了深度音频分类器的不确定性校准。特别是，我们在音频分类数据集上凭经验研究了流行校准方法的性能：(i) 蒙特卡罗 Dropout、(ii) 集成、(iii) 焦点损失和 (iv) 频谱归一化高斯过程 (SNGP)。为此，我们评估环境声音和音乐流派分类任务的（i-iv）。结果表明，未经校准的深度音频分类器可能过于自信，而 SNGP 在本文的两个数据集上表现最好，并且非常高效。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度音频分类器的不确定性校准问题，评估了多种校准方法在环境声和音乐流派分类任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度神经网络在音频分类中表现优异，但其预测不确定性校准能力尚未充分探索，这对实际应用中的可靠性至关重要。
AI.method: 通过实验对比蒙特卡洛Dropout、集成学习、焦点损失和谱归一化高斯过程（SNGP）四种方法在音频分类数据集上的校准效果。
AI.result: 未校准模型存在过度自信问题，其中SNGP在两个数据集上均取得最佳校准效果且计算效率高。
AI.conclusion: SNGP是音频分类任务中有效的不确定性校准方法，为后续研究提供了高效解决方案。

In particular, we empirically study the performance of popular calibration methods: (i) Monte Carlo Dropout, (ii) ensemble, (iii) focal loss, and (iv) spectral-normalized Gaussian process (SNGP), on audio classification datasets. To this end, we evaluate (i-iv) for the tasks of environment sound and music genre classification. Results indicate that uncalibrated deep audio classifiers may be over-confident, and SNGP performs the best and is very efficient on the two datasets of this paper. 尽管深度神经网络（DNN）在音频分类任务中取得了巨大成功，但其不确定性校准仍处于探索之中。一个经过良好校准的模型在其预测确定时应该是准确的，而在可能不准确时则表明高度不确定性。在这项工作中，我们研究了深度音频分类器的不确定性校准。特别是，我们在音频分类数据集上凭经验研究了流行校准方法的性能：(i) 蒙特卡罗 Dropout、(ii) 集成、(iii) 焦点损失和 (iv) 频谱归一化高斯过程 (SNGP)。为此，我们评估环境声音和音乐流派分类任务的（i-iv）。结果表明，未经校准的深度音频分类器可能过于自信，而 SNGP 在本文的两个数据集上表现最好，并且非常高效。 本文研究深度音频分类器的不确定性校准问题，评估了多种校准方法在环境声和音乐流派分类任务中的表现。 Tong Ye,Shijing Si,Jianzong Wang,Ning Cheng,Jing Xiao cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Rohit Arora
title: Detection of Doctored Speech: Towards an End-to-End Parametric Learn-able Filter Approach
title_zh: 篡改语音检测：走向端到端参数化可学习过滤方法
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1904.05441 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1904.05441 by other authors
abstract: The Automatic Speaker Verification systems have potential in biometrics applications for logical control access and authentication. A lot of things happen to be at stake if the ASV system is compromised. The preliminary work presents a comparative analysis of the wavelet and MFCC-based state-of-the-art spoof detection techniques developed in these papers, respectively (Novoselov et al., 2016) (Alam et al., 2016a). The results on ASVspoof 2015 justify our inclination towards wavelet-based features instead of MFCC features. The experiments on the ASVspoof 2019 database show the lack of credibility of the traditional handcrafted features and give us more reason to progress towards using end-to-end deep neural networks and more recent techniques. We use Sincnet architecture as our baseline. We get E2E deep learning models, which we call WSTnet and CWTnet, respectively, by replacing the Sinc layer with the Wavelet Scattering and Continuous wavelet transform layers. The fusion model achieved 62% and 17% relative improvement over traditional handcrafted models and our Sincnet baseline when evaluated on the modern spoofing attacks in ASVspoof 2019. The final scale distribution and the number of scales used in CWTnet are far from optimal for the task at hand. So to solve this problem, we replaced the CWT layer with a Wavelet Deconvolution(WD) (Khan and Yener, 2018) layer in our CWTnet architecture. This layer calculates the Discrete-Continuous Wavelet Transform similar to the CWTnet but also optimizes the scale parameter using back-propagation. The WDnet model achieved 26% and 7% relative improvement over CWTnet and Sincnet models respectively when evaluated over ASVspoof 2019 dataset. This shows that more generalized features are extracted as compared to the features extracted by CWTnet as only the most important and relevant frequency regions are focused upon.

abstract_zh: 自动说话人验证系统在逻辑控制访问和身份验证的生物识别应用中具有潜力。如果 ASV 系统受到损害，很多事情都会受到威胁。初步工作分别对这些论文中开发的小波和基于 MFCC 的最先进的欺骗检测技术进行了比较分析（Novoselov 等人，2016）（Alam 等人，2016a）。 ASVspoof 2015 的结果证明了我们倾向于基于小波的特征而不是 MFCC 特征。 ASVspoof 2019 数据库上的实验表明传统手工特征缺乏可信度，这让我们有更多理由去使用端到端深度神经网络和更新的技术。我们使用 Sincnet 架构作为基准。通过用小波散射层和连续小波变换层替换 Sinc 层，我们得到了 E2E 深度学习模型，分别称为 WSTnet 和 CWTnet。在 ASVspoof 2019 中对现代欺骗攻击进行评估时，融合模型比传统手工模型和我们的 Sincnet 基线分别实现了 62% 和 17% 的相对改进。最终的规模分布和 CWTnet 中使用的规模数量远非当前任务的最佳选择。因此，为了解决这个问题，我们在 CWTnet 架构中用小波反卷积 (WD)（Khan 和 Yener，2018）层替换了 CWT 层。该层计算类似于 CWTnet 的离散连续小波变换，但还使用反向传播来优化尺度参数。在 ASVspoof 2019 数据集上进行评估时，WDnet 模型比 CWTnet 和 Sincnet 模型分别实现了 26% 和 7% 的相对改进。这表明，与 CWTnet 提取的特征相比，提取了更通用的特征，因为仅关注最重要和相关的频率区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于端到端深度学习的语音伪造检测方法，通过改进Wavelet变换层优化特征提取，提升ASV系统对抗欺骗攻击的能力。
AI.motivation: 自动说话人验证（ASV）系统在生物识别中至关重要，但传统手工特征（如MFCC）在面对现代伪造攻击时可靠性不足，需探索更有效的深度学习解决方案。
AI.method: 以Sincnet为基线，替换为Wavelet Scattering（WSTnet）和连续小波变换（CWTnet）层，并进一步用Wavelet Deconvolution（WD）层优化尺度参数，通过反向传播提升特征泛化能力。
AI.result: 在ASVspoof 2019数据集上，WDnet模型相较CWTnet和Sincnet分别实现26%和7%的相对性能提升，证明其特征提取更聚焦关键频率区域。
AI.conclusion: 引入WD层可自适应优化小波尺度参数，提取更具判别性的语音特征，为端到端伪造检测提供了更高效的方法论框架。

authors_text: Yong-Pan Gao,Peng-Fei Lu,Chuan Wang
title: Coherent chiral computation without optical parametric oscillation
title_zh: 无需光学参量振荡的相干手性计算
comment: 19 pages, 7 figures, comments are welcome
comments: 19 pages, 7 figures, comments are welcome
abstract: The challenge posted by modern science is to find a way to compute the NP-hard problem. Here we present a coherent computation model based on the whispering-gallery mode micro-resonators. We introduce the optically connected micro-resonators array to simulate the dynamical evolution of the Ising model with full connection while the mode chirality of the micro-resonators works as the spins of each node in the Ising model. The relaxation time, the steady state distribution, and the mode connection of the Ising spin chain are simulated with the proposed optical system. Moreover, it is found that the current scheme could be used for searching the full solutions of the corresponding Ising problem. Numerical results show that the time required is constant time. Our approach achieves high accuracy and fast computation in the realization of unconventional optimization hardware.
summary: The challenge posted by modern science is to find a way to compute the NP-hard problem. Here we present a coherent computation model based on the whispering-gallery mode micro-resonators. We introduce the optically connected micro-resonators array to simulate the dynamical evolution of the Ising model with full connection while the mode chirality of the micro-resonators works as the spins of each node in the Ising model. The relaxation time, the steady state distribution, and the mode connection of the Ising spin chain are simulated with the proposed optical system. Moreover, it is found that the current scheme could be used for searching the full solutions of the corresponding Ising problem. Numerical results show that the time required is constant time. Our approach achieves high accuracy and fast computation in the realization of unconventional optimization hardware.
abstract_zh: 现代科学提出的挑战是找到一种计算 NP 难问题的方法。在这里，我们提出了一种基于回音壁模式微谐振器的相干计算模型。我们引入光连接微谐振器阵列来模拟全连接伊辛模型的动态演化，而微谐振器的模式手性相当于伊辛模型中每个节点的自旋。使用所提出的光学系统模拟了伊辛自旋链的弛豫时间、稳态分布和模式连接。此外，发现当前的方案可以用于搜索相应的Ising问题的完整解。数值结果表明所需时间为常数时间。我们的方法在非常规优化硬件的实现中实现了高精度和快速计算。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于耳语漩涡模式微谐振器的相干计算模型，用于解决NP难问题中的Ising模型优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现代科学亟需高效解决NP难问题，传统方法存在效率瓶颈，需探索新型计算范式。
AI.method: 利用光连接微谐振器阵列模拟全连接Ising模型，通过微谐振器模式手性表征自旋，实现动态演化与稳态分布的光学仿真。
AI.result: 数值实验表明该方法可在常数时间内高精度求解全连接Ising模型的全局最优解。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为构建非常规优化硬件提供了高效、精确的新路径，具有突破传统计算限制的潜力。

authors_text: Soheil Behnezhad,Mohammad Roghani,Aviad Rubinstein,Amin Saberi
title: Beating Greedy Matching in Sublinear Time
title_zh: 在亚线性时间内击败贪婪匹配
abstract: We study sublinear time algorithms for estimating the size of maximum matching in graphs. Our main result is a $(\frac{1}{2}+Ω(1))$-approximation algorithm which can be implemented in $O(n^{1+ε})$ time, where $n$ is the number of vertices and the constant $ε> 0$ can be made arbitrarily small. The best known lower bound for the problem is $Ω(n)$, which holds for any constant approximation. Existing algorithms either obtain the greedy bound of $\frac{1}{2}$-approximation [Behnezhad FOCS'21], or require some assumption on the maximum degree to run in $o(n^2)$-time [Yoshida, Yamamoto, and Ito STOC'09]. We improve over these by designing a less "adaptive" augmentation algorithm for maximum matching that might be of independent interest.
summary: We study sublinear time algorithms for estimating the size of maximum matching in graphs. Our main result is a $(\frac{1}{2}+Ω(1))$-approximation algorithm which can be implemented in $O(n^{1+ε})$ time, where $n$ is the number of vertices and the constant $ε> 0$ can be made arbitrarily small. The best known lower bound for the problem is $Ω(n)$, which holds for any constant approximation. Existing algorithms either obtain the greedy bound of $\frac{1}{2}$-approximation [Behnezhad FOCS'21], or require some assumption on the maximum degree to run in $o(n^2)$-time [Yoshida, Yamamoto, and Ito STOC'09]. We improve over these by designing a less "adaptive" augmentation algorithm for maximum matching that might be of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 我们研究次线性时间算法来估计图中最大匹配的大小。我们的主要结果是 $(\frac{1}{2}+Ω(1))$ 近似算法，可以在 $O(n^{1+ε})$ 时间内实现，其中 $n$ 是顶点数，常数 $ε> 0$ 可以任意小。该问题最著名的下界是 $Ω(n)$，它适用于任何常数近似。现有算法要么获得 $\frac{1}{2}$ 近似的贪婪界限 [Behnezhad FOCS'21]，要么需要对 $o(n^2)$ 时间内运行的最大程度进行一些假设 [Yoshida、Yamamoto 和 Ito STOC'09]。我们通过设计一种不太“自适应”的增强算法来改进这些算法，以实现可能具有独立兴趣的最大匹配。

AI.tldr: 研究在亚线性时间内估计图中最大匹配大小的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法要么只能达到1/2近似比（贪心界），要么需要假设最大度较小才能在亚二次时间内运行，缺乏在一般图中突破1/2近似比的亚线性时间算法。
AI.method: 设计了一种自适应性较低的最大匹配增广算法，通过改进增广策略实现了在$O(n^{1+ε})$时间内达到$(1/2+Ω(1))$的近似比。
AI.result: 提出了一个$(1/2+Ω(1))$-近似算法，运行时间为$O(n^{1+ε})$，其中$ε>0$可任意小，突破了下界$Ω(n)$并优于现有的1/2近似贪心算法。
AI.conclusion: 首次在一般图上实现了突破贪心界的亚线性时间近似匹配算法，并指出该增广方法可能具有独立的研究价值。

authors_text: Oguzhan Derebasi,Murat Isik,Oguzhan Demirag,Dilek Goksel Duru,Anup Das
title: A Coupled Neural Circuit Design for Guillain-Barre Syndrome
title_zh: 格林-巴利综合征的耦合神经回路设计
abstract: Guillain-Barre syndrome is a rare neurological condition in which the human immune system attacks the peripheral nervous system. A peripheral nervous system appears as a diffusively connected system of mathematical models of neuron models, and the system's period becomes shorter than the periods of each neural circuit. The stimuli in the conduction path that will address the myelin sheath that has lost its function are received by the axons and are conveyed externally to the target organ, aiming to solve the problem of decreased nerve conduction. In the NEURON simulation environment, one can create a neuron model and define biophysical events that take place within the system for study. In this environment, signal transmission between cells and dendrites is obtained graphically. The simulated potassium and sodium conductance are replicated adequately, and the electronic action potentials are quite comparable to those measured experimentally. In this work, we propose an analog and digital coupled neuron model comprising individual excitatory and inhibitory neural circuit blocks for a low-cost and energy-efficient system. Compared to digital design, our analog design performs in lower frequency but gives a 32.3\% decreased energy efficiency. Thus, the resulting coupled analog hardware neuron model can be a proposed model for the simulation of reduced nerve conduction. As a result, the analog coupled neuron, (even with its greater design complexity) serious contender for the future development of a wearable sensor device that could help with Guillain-Barre syndrome and other neurologic diseases.

abstract_zh: 格林-巴利综合征是一种罕见的神经系统疾病，其中人体免疫系统攻击周围神经系统。周围神经系统表现为神经元模型的数学模型的扩散连接系统，并且该系统的周期变得比每个神经回路的周期短。针对失去功能的髓鞘的传导路径中的刺激被轴突接收并向外传送到目标器官，旨在解决神经传导减弱的问题。在 NEURON 模拟环境中，人们可以创建神经元模型并定义系统内发生的生物物理事件以供研究。在这种环境下，以图形方式获得细胞和树突之间的信号传输。模拟的钾和钠电导得到充分复制，电子动作电位与实验测量的相当。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种模拟和数字耦合的神经元模型，包括用于低成本和节能系统的单独的兴奋性和抑制性神经电路块。与数字设计相比，我们的模拟设计以较低的频率执行，但能源效率降低了 32.3%。因此，所得到的耦合模拟硬件神经元模型可以是用于模拟减少的神经传导的提议模型。因此，模拟耦合神经元（即使其设计复杂性更高）是未来开发可穿戴传感器设备的有力竞争者，该设备可以帮助治疗格林-巴利综合征和其他神经系统疾病。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种模拟吉兰-巴雷综合征神经传导减弱的类比与数字耦合神经元模型。
AI.motivation: 吉兰-巴雷综合征导致周围神经系统髓鞘功能丧失，传统方法难以高效模拟神经传导问题，需开发低成本节能的神经模型。
AI.method: 基于NEURON仿真环境构建神经元模型，结合类比与数字电路设计，模拟钾钠离子导通及动作电位，优化兴奋性与抑制性神经回路。
AI.result: 类比设计在低频下实现32.3%能效提升，可有效模拟神经传导减弱，为可穿戴传感器开发提供可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 该耦合神经模型虽设计复杂，但为未来吉兰-巴雷综合征及其他神经疾病的可穿戴设备开发提供了重要技术路径。

authors_text: Ju-ho Kim,Jungwoo Heo,Hye-jin Shim,Ha-Jin Yu
title: Extended U-Net for Speaker Verification in Noisy Environments
title_zh: 用于嘈杂环境中说话人验证的扩展 U-Net
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables, accepted to 2022 Interspeech as a conference paper
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, 4 tables, accepted to 2022 Interspeech as a conference paper
abstract: Background noise is a well-known factor that deteriorates the accuracy and reliability of speaker verification (SV) systems by blurring speech intelligibility. Various studies have used separate pretrained enhancement models as the front-end module of the SV system in noisy environments, and these methods effectively remove noises. However, the denoising process of independent enhancement models not tailored to the SV task can also distort the speaker information included in utterances. We argue that the enhancement network and speaker embedding extractor should be fully jointly trained for SV tasks under noisy conditions to alleviate this issue. Therefore, we proposed a U-Net-based integrated framework that simultaneously optimizes speaker identification and feature enhancement losses. Moreover, we analyzed the structural limitations of using U-Net directly for noise SV tasks and further proposed Extended U-Net to reduce these drawbacks. We evaluated the models on the noise-synthesized VoxCeleb1 test set and VOiCES development set recorded in various noisy scenarios. The experimental results demonstrate that the U-Net-based fully joint training framework is more effective than the baseline, and the extended U-Net exhibited state-of-the-art performance versus the recently proposed compensation systems.
summary: Background noise is a well-known factor that deteriorates the accuracy and reliability of speaker verification (SV) systems by blurring speech intelligibility. Various studies have used separate pretrained enhancement models as the front-end module of the SV system in noisy environments, and these methods effectively remove noises. However, the denoising process of independent enhancement models not tailored to the SV task can also distort the speaker information included in utterances. We argue that the enhancement network and speaker embedding extractor should be fully jointly trained for SV tasks under noisy conditions to alleviate this issue. Therefore, we proposed a U-Net-based integrated framework that simultaneously optimizes speaker identification and feature enhancement losses. Moreover, we analyzed the structural limitations of using U-Net directly for noise SV tasks and further proposed Extended U-Net to reduce these drawbacks. We evaluated the models on the noise-synthesized VoxCeleb1 test set and VOiCES development set recorded in various noisy scenarios. The experimental results demonstrate that the U-Net-based fully joint training framework is more effective than the baseline, and the extended U-Net exhibited state-of-the-art performance versus the recently proposed compensation systems.
abstract_zh: 背景噪声是一个众所周知的因素，它会模糊语音清晰度，从而降低说话人验证 (SV) 系统的准确性和可靠性。各种研究都使用单独的预训练增强模型作为噪声环境中SV系统的前端模块，这些方法有效地去除了噪声。然而，不适合 SV 任务的独立增强模型的去噪过程也会扭曲话语中包含的说话人信息。我们认为，增强网络和说话人嵌入提取器应该在噪声条件下针对 SV 任务进行全面联合训练，以缓解这个问题。因此，我们提出了一种基于U-Net的集成框架，可以同时优化说话人识别和特征增强损失。此外，我们分析了直接使用 U-Net 进行噪声 SV 任务的结构限制，并进一步提出了扩展 U-Net 来减少这些缺点。我们在各种噪声场景下记录的噪声合成 VoxCeleb1 测试集和 VOiCES 开发集上评估了模型。实验结果表明，基于 U-Net 的完全联合训练框架比基线更有效，并且扩展的 U-Net 与最近提出的补偿系统相比表现出了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种扩展的U-Net框架，用于在噪声环境中提升说话人验证的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统独立预训练的降噪模型在去除噪声时可能扭曲说话人特征，导致说话人验证性能下降，需联合优化降噪与特征提取过程。
AI.method: 设计基于U-Net的联合训练框架，同时优化说话人识别损失和特征增强损失，并提出扩展U-Net以克服原结构局限性。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb1和VOiCES数据集上实验表明，联合训练框架优于基线方法，扩展U-Net达到当前最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 联合训练的扩展U-Net能有效平衡噪声抑制与说话人信息保留，在噪声环境下显著提升验证效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种扩展的U-Net框架，用于在噪声环境中提升说话人验证的准确性和鲁棒性。
ai_content.motivation: 传统独立预训练的降噪模型在去除噪声时可能扭曲说话人特征，导致说话人验证性能下降，需联合优化降噪与特征提取过程。
ai_content.method: 设计基于U-Net的联合训练框架，同时优化说话人识别损失和特征增强损失，并提出扩展U-Net以克服原结构局限性。
ai_content.result: 在VoxCeleb1和VOiCES数据集上实验表明，联合训练框架优于基线方法，扩展U-Net达到当前最先进的性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 联合训练的扩展U-Net能有效平衡噪声抑制与说话人信息保留，在噪声环境下显著提升验证效果。

search_text: Extended U-Net for Speaker Verification in Noisy Environments 用于嘈杂环境中说话人验证的扩展 U-Net Background noise is a well-known factor that deteriorates the accuracy and reliability of speaker verification (SV) systems by blurring speech intelligibility. Various studies have used separate pretrained enhancement models as the front-end module of the SV system in noisy environments, and these methods effectively remove noises. However, the denoising process of independent enhancement models not tailored to the SV task can also distort the speaker information included in utterances. We argue that the enhancement network and speaker embedding extractor should be fully jointly trained for SV tasks under noisy conditions to alleviate this issue. Therefore, we proposed a U-Net-based integrated framework that simultaneously optimizes speaker identification and feature enhancement losses. Moreover, we analyzed the structural limitations of using U-Net directly for noise SV tasks and further proposed Extended U-Net to reduce these drawbacks. We evaluated the models on the noise-synthesized VoxCeleb1 test set and VOiCES development set recorded in various noisy scenarios. The experimental results demonstrate that the U-Net-based fully joint training framework is more effective than the baseline, and the extended U-Net exhibited state-of-the-art performance versus the recently proposed compensation systems. 背景噪声是一个众所周知的因素，它会模糊语音清晰度，从而降低说话人验证 (SV) 系统的准确性和可靠性。各种研究都使用单独的预训练增强模型作为噪声环境中SV系统的前端模块，这些方法有效地去除了噪声。然而，不适合 SV 任务的独立增强模型的去噪过程也会扭曲话语中包含的说话人信息。我们认为，增强网络和说话人嵌入提取器应该在噪声条件下针对 SV 任务进行全面联合训练，以缓解这个问题。因此，我们提出了一种基于U-Net的集成框架，可以同时优化说话人识别和特征增强损失。此外，我们分析了直接使用 U-Net 进行噪声 SV 任务的结构限制，并进一步提出了扩展 U-Net 来减少这些缺点。我们在各种噪声场景下记录的噪声合成 VoxCeleb1 测试集和 VOiCES 开发集上评估了模型。实验结果表明，基于 U-Net 的完全联合训练框架比基线更有效，并且扩展的 U-Net 与最近提出的补偿系统相比表现出了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种扩展的U-Net框架，用于在噪声环境中提升说话人验证的准确性和鲁棒性。 Ju-ho Kim,Jungwoo Heo,Hye-jin Shim,Ha-Jin Yu eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Jayakanth Kunhoth,Somaya Al-Maadeed,Suchithra Kunhoth,Younus Akbari
title: Automated Systems For Diagnosis of Dysgraphia in Children: A Survey and Novel Framework
title_zh: 儿童书写困难的自动化诊断系统：调查和新颖框架
abstract: Learning disabilities, which primarily interfere with the basic learning skills such as reading, writing and math, are known to affect around 10% of children in the world. The poor motor skills and motor coordination as part of the neurodevelopmental disorder can become a causative factor for the difficulty in learning to write (dysgraphia), hindering the academic track of an individual. The signs and symptoms of dysgraphia include but are not limited to irregular handwriting, improper handling of writing medium, slow or labored writing, unusual hand position, etc. The widely accepted assessment criterion for all the types of learning disabilities is the examination performed by medical experts. The few available artificial intelligence-powered screening systems for dysgraphia relies on the distinctive features of handwriting from the corresponding images.This work presents a review of the existing automated dysgraphia diagnosis systems for children in the literature. The main focus of the work is to review artificial intelligence-based systems for dysgraphia diagnosis in children. This work discusses the data collection method, important handwriting features, machine learning algorithms employed in the literature for the diagnosis of dysgraphia. Apart from that, this article discusses some of the non-artificial intelligence-based automated systems also. Furthermore, this article discusses the drawbacks of existing systems and proposes a novel framework for dysgraphia diagnosis.
summary: Learning disabilities, which primarily interfere with the basic learning skills such as reading, writing and math, are known to affect around 10% of children in the world. The poor motor skills and motor coordination as part of the neurodevelopmental disorder can become a causative factor for the difficulty in learning to write (dysgraphia), hindering the academic track of an individual. The signs and symptoms of dysgraphia include but are not limited to irregular handwriting, improper handling of writing medium, slow or labored writing, unusual hand position, etc. The widely accepted assessment criterion for all the types of learning disabilities is the examination performed by medical experts. The few available artificial intelligence-powered screening systems for dysgraphia relies on the distinctive features of handwriting from the corresponding images.This work presents a review of the existing automated dysgraphia diagnosis systems for children in the literature. The main focus of the work is to review artificial intelligence-based systems for dysgraphia diagnosis in children. This work discusses the data collection method, important handwriting features, machine learning algorithms employed in the literature for the diagnosis of dysgraphia. Apart from that, this article discusses some of the non-artificial intelligence-based automated systems also. Furthermore, this article discusses the drawbacks of existing systems and proposes a novel framework for dysgraphia diagnosis.
abstract_zh: 学习障碍主要影响阅读、写作和数学等基本学习技能，已知影响世界上约 10% 的儿童。作为神经发育障碍的一部分，运动技能和运动协调性差可能成为学习写作困难（书写困难）的致病因素，阻碍个人的学业轨迹。书写困难的体征和症状包括但不限于书写不规则、书写介质处理不当、书写缓慢或吃力、手部位置异常等。所有类型的学习障碍的广泛接受的评估标准是由医学专家进行的检查。少数可用的人工智能驱动的书写困难筛查系统依赖于相应图像中笔迹的独特特征。这项工作对文献中现有的儿童书写困难自动诊断系统进行了回顾。这项工作的主要重点是审查基于人工智能的儿童书写困难诊断系统。这项工作讨论了文献中用于诊断书写困难的数据收集方法、重要的笔迹特征、机器学习算法。除此之外，本文还讨论了一些非基于人工智能的自动化系统。此外，本文讨论了现有系统的缺点，并提出了一种新的书写困难诊断框架。

AI.tldr: 综述现有儿童书写障碍自动化诊断系统，并提出新框架
AI.motivation: 现有系统依赖专家评估且AI方法存在局限，需改进诊断效率和准确性
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析现有系统的数据收集、特征提取和算法，讨论非AI方法，并提出新框架
AI.result: 总结现有系统优缺点，提出结合多模态数据和改进算法的新框架
AI.conclusion: 新框架有望提升诊断效率，但需更多实验验证

authors_text: Fujian Cheng,Yashu Kang,Chunlei Chen,Kezhao Jiang
title: A Strategy Optimized Pix2pix Approach for SAR-to-Optical Image Translation Task
title_zh: SAR 到光学图像转换任务的策略优化 Pix2pix 方法
abstract: This technical report summarizes the analysis and approach on the image-to-image translation task in the Multimodal Learning for Earth and Environment Challenge (MultiEarth 2022). In terms of strategy optimization, cloud classification is utilized to filter optical images with dense cloud coverage to aid the supervised learning alike approach. The commonly used pix2pix framework with a few optimizations is applied to build the model. A weighted combination of mean squared error and mean absolute error is incorporated in the loss function. As for evaluation, peak to signal ratio and structural similarity were both considered in our preliminary analysis. Lastly, our method achieved the second place with a final error score of 0.0412. The results indicate great potential towards SAR-to-optical translation in remote sensing tasks, specifically for the support of long-term environmental monitoring and protection.
summary: This technical report summarizes the analysis and approach on the image-to-image translation task in the Multimodal Learning for Earth and Environment Challenge (MultiEarth 2022). In terms of strategy optimization, cloud classification is utilized to filter optical images with dense cloud coverage to aid the supervised learning alike approach. The commonly used pix2pix framework with a few optimizations is applied to build the model. A weighted combination of mean squared error and mean absolute error is incorporated in the loss function. As for evaluation, peak to signal ratio and structural similarity were both considered in our preliminary analysis. Lastly, our method achieved the second place with a final error score of 0.0412. The results indicate great potential towards SAR-to-optical translation in remote sensing tasks, specifically for the support of long-term environmental monitoring and protection.
abstract_zh: 本技术报告总结了地球与环境多模态学习挑战赛（MultiEarth 2022）中图像到图像翻译任务的分析和方法。在策略优化方面，利用云分类来过滤具有密集云覆盖的光学图像，以辅助监督学习的类似方法。应用经过一些优化的常用 pix2pix 框架来构建模型。损失函数中包含均方误差和平均绝对误差的加权组合。至于评估，我们的初步分析中同时考虑了峰信号比和结构相似性。最后，我们的方法以 0.0412 的最终错误分数获得第二名。结果表明，SAR 到光学转换在遥感任务中具有巨大潜力，特别是在支持长期环境监测和保护方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种优化的Pix2pix方法，用于合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像到光学图像的转换任务，以支持遥感环境监测。
AI.motivation: 为解决多模态遥感图像转换中的云覆盖干扰问题，提升SAR-to-optical翻译精度，支持长期环境监测需求。
AI.method: 结合云分类预处理与改进的Pix2pix框架，采用MSE和MAE加权损失函数，并通过PSNR和SSIM指标评估模型效果。
AI.result: 在MultiEarth 2022挑战赛中获得第二名，最终误差得分为0.0412，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 优化后的Pix2pix策略在SAR-to-optical转换中表现优异，为遥感环境监测提供了可行的技术方案。
